        <a href="#preview" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium text-brand-charcoal/80 hover:text-brand-charcoal hover:bg-white transition-all">Platform Tour</a>
        <a href="#ai-assistant" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium text-brand-charcoal/80 hover:text-brand-charcoal hover:bg-white transition-all">AI Claims Copilot</a>
        <a href="#pricing" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium text-brand-charcoal/80 hover:text-brand-charcoal hover:bg-white transition-all">Pricing</a>
      </nav>

      <!-- Auth Action Buttons -->
      <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
        <a href="#preview" class="hidden sm:inline-flex px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold hover:text-brand-charcoal/70 transition-colors">
          Demo App
        </a>
        <a href="#ai-assistant" class="px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-sm">
          Try Intelly AI
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- ================= HERO SECTION ================= -->
  <section class="relative pt-12 pb-20 md:py-32 overflow-hidden">
    <!-- Ambient Light Circle behind Hero -->
    <div class="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[140%] h-[120%] hero-glow -z-10 pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Interactive Badge -->
      <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-white/90 border border-brand-grayBorder px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full shadow-sm mb-8 animate-fade-in hover:scale-102 transition-transform cursor-pointer">
        <span class="flex h-2 w-2 relative">
          <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-brand-roseDark opacity-75"></span>
          <span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-brand-roseDark"></span>
        </span>
        <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-brand-charcoal/80">Intelly v2.6 Overview</span>
        <span class="text-xs text-brand-roseDark font-bold bg-brand-rose px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">New Features</span>
      </div>

      <!-- Main Headline -->
      <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-brand-charcoal max-w-5xl mx-auto leading-[1.08] mb-8">
        Your patients’ <span class="relative inline-block px-2">billing <span class="absolute left-0 bottom-1 w-full h-[6px] md:h-[10px] bg-brand-rose -z-10 rounded-sm"></span></span> & scheduling, made beautiful.
      </h1>

      <!-- Subheadline -->
      <p class="text-lg sm:text-xl text-brand-charcoal/70 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed mb-10">
        Say goodbye to stark, clunky medical interfaces. Welcome to an executive system crafted with soothing tones, dynamic billing analytics, and instant claim tracking.
      </p>

      <!-- Action buttons -->
      <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-16">
        <a href="#preview" class="w-full sm:w-auto px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-base font-bold bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight hover:shadow-lg active:scale-98 transition-all flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
          <span>Explore Platform Preview</span>
          <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="#ai-assistant" class="w-full sm:w-auto px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-base font-bold bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder text-brand-charcoal hover:bg-brand-creamDark hover:shadow-sm active:scale-98 transition-all flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
          <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-brand-roseDark" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M11.3 1.046A1 1 0 0112 2v5h4a1 1 0 01.82 1.573l-7 10A1 1 0 018 18v-5H4a1 1 0 01-.82-1.573l7-10a1 1 0 011.12-.38z" clip-rule="evenodd"/></svg>
          <span>Run Claims Assistant</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Live Interactive System Stats Strip -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4 bg-white/70 border border-brand-grayBorder/80 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm">
        <div class="p-4 text-center border-r border-brand-grayBorder/50 last:border-0">
          <div class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">$23.4k</div>
          <div class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mt-1">Pending Invoices</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-4 text-center border-r border-brand-grayBorder/50 last:border-0">
          <div class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-roseDark">98.6%</div>
          <div class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mt-1">Claim Success</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-4 text-center border-r border-brand-grayBorder/50 last:border-0 bg-brand-green/30 rounded-2xl">
          <div class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-greenDark">+$14,568</div>
          <div class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mt-1">Received This Week</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-4 text-center last:border-0">
          <div class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-blueDark">12 Min</div>
          <div class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mt-1">Avg Patient Waiting</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ================= THE PREVIEW WORKSPACE (THE VISUAL CORE) ================= -->
  <section id="preview" class="py-16 bg-brand-creamDark/40 border-y border-brand-grayBorder">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      
      <!-- Header / Control Area for Workspace -->
      <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-12">
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal tracking-tight mb-4">
          Experience the UI Universe
        </h2>
        <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed">
          Toggle between Dr. Olivia’s two vital interfaces: **Patient Billing & Invoices** and the clinical **Daily Planner**. Directly inspired by the Intelly workflow engine.
        </p>

        <!-- Dynamic Workspace View Selector (Tab Controller) -->
        <div class="inline-flex p-1.5 bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream rounded-full shadow-lg mt-8">
          <button id="btn-billing-view" onclick="switchPreviewTab('billing')" class="px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all bg-brand-rose text-brand-charcoal shadow-md">
            💳 Patient Billing & Invoices
          </button>
          <button id="btn-schedule-view" onclick="switchPreviewTab('schedule')" class="px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all hover:text-brand-rose text-white/80">
            📅 Calendar & Daily Planner
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- THE IMMERSIVE PLATFORM WRAPPER -->
      <div class="bg-[#FAF8F5] rounded-[2.5rem] border border-brand-grayBorder shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative transition-all duration-500">
        
        <!-- Application Top Ribbon (Chrome window controls) -->
        <div class="bg-white border-b border-brand-grayBorder/80 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
            <span class="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full bg-brand-rose flex-shrink-0"></span>
            <span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-widest text-brand-charcoal/40 uppercase">LIVE INTELLY PLATFORM</span>
          </div>
          <!-- Custom mock search pill -->
          <div class="relative w-64 hidden md:block">
            <span class="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3 pointer-events-none text-brand-charcoal/40 text-sm">🔍</span>
            <input type="text" placeholder="Search patients, medical codes, claims..." class="w-full bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder/80 rounded-full py-1 px-8 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-rose" readonly>
            <span class="absolute inset-y-0 right-2 flex items-center text-[10px] bg-brand-creamDark px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-brand-grayBorder text-brand-charcoal/40">Ctrl K</span>
          </div>
          <!-- Top right stats or controls -->
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 text-xs font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/70">
            <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 inline-block animate-pulse"></span>
            <span>Dr. Olivia (Administrator)</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- MAIN LAYOUT FRAME -->
        <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row min-h-[720px]">
          
          <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR (Identical Theme to the image) -->
          <aside class="w-full lg:w-64 bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col justify-between p-6 border-r border-brand-charcoal">
            <div>
              <!-- Sidebar Header Brand -->
              <div class="flex items-center space-x-2.5 mb-10 pb-6 border-b border-white/10">
                <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-brand-cream flex items-center justify-center">
                  <span class="text-brand-charcoal font-black text-xs">i</span>
                </div>
                <span class="text-lg font-bold tracking-tight text-white">intelly</span>
              </div>

              <!-- Nav Group 1: General -->
              <div class="mb-8">
                <span class="text-[10px] tracking-wider text-white/30 uppercase font-semibold block mb-4">General</span>
                <nav class="space-y-1">
                  <a href="#preview" onclick="alertNotification('Welcome back! You are viewing the Dashboard dashboard demo.')" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">📊</span>
                    <span>Dashboard</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" onclick="switchPreviewTab('schedule')" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">📅</span>
                    <span>Schedule</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">👥</span>
                    <span>Patients</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">📈</span>
                    <span>Statistics & reports</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">🎓</span>
                    <span>Education</span>
                  </a>
                </nav>
              </div>

              <!-- Nav Group 2: Tools -->
              <div>
                <span class="text-[10px] tracking-wider text-white/30 uppercase font-semibold block mb-4">Tools</span>
                <nav class="space-y-1">
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">💬</span>
                    <span>Chats & calls</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" onclick="switchPreviewTab('billing')" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">💳</span>
                    <span>Billing</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">📄</span>
                    <span>Documents base</span>
                  </a>
                  <a href="#preview" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all group">
                    <span class="text-base group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">⚙️</span>
                    <span>Settings</span>
                  </a>
                </nav>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Sidebar Footer -->
            <div class="pt-6 border-t border-white/10 mt-6">
              <a href="#" class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white/60 hover:text-white transition-all">
                <span>🚪</span>
                <span>Log out</span>
              </a>
            </div>
          </aside>

          <!-- CONTENT SCREEN CONTAINER -->
          <main class="flex-1 p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-10">
            
            <!-- Toast Feedback Notification Element -->
            <div id="demo-notification" class="hidden mb-6 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-brand-rose text-brand-roseDark border border-brand-roseDark/20 flex items-center justify-between transition-all animate-bounce">
              <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <span class="text-lg">💡</span>
                <span id="demo-notification-text" class="text-sm font-bold">Billing action completed successfully.</span>
              </div>
              <button onclick="dismissNotification()" class="text-brand-roseDark font-bold hover:scale-105">✕</button>
            </div>

            <!-- ================= SUB-VIEW 1: PATIENT BILLING & INVOICES ================= -->
            <div id="billing-sub-view" class="transition-all duration-500">
              
              <!-- Billing Title Header -->
              <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between mb-8 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h3 class="text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">Your patients billing & invoices</h3>
                  <p class="text-sm text-brand-charcoal/50 mt-1">Manage pending receivables, insurance claims, and live transaction ledgers.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder p-1 rounded-full">
                  <button class="px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-brand-charcoal text-white rounded-full">This week</button>
                  <button class="px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-brand-creamDark rounded-full text-brand-charcoal/60">This month</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Top Stats Row (Donut Progress & Pastel Cards) -->
              <div class="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-6 mb-8">
                
                <!-- SVG Donut Chart Card (Left 5 Columns) -->
                <div class="xl:col-span-5 bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2rem] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden">
                  <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-brand-charcoal/40">Total Pending Bills</span>
                    <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-rose flex items-center justify-center text-xs">💖</span>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div class="flex items-center justify-around py-4">
                    <!-- SVG Circular Donut Chart matching color accents from the image -->
                    <div class="relative w-36 h-36 flex items-center justify-center">
                      <svg class="w-full h-full transform -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
                        <!-- Background Circle -->
                        <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#F4EFEB" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent"/>
                        <!-- Accent Blue arc -->
                        <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#DCE8FC" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="180"/>
                        <!-- Accent Rose arc -->
                        <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#FCDDEC" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="60" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                        <!-- Highlight Gold dot or small arc -->
                        <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" stroke="#FEF2D7" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="230"/>
                      </svg>
                      <!-- Center Text -->
                      <div class="absolute text-center">
                        <span class="text-2xl font-black text-brand-charcoal block">23,4k</span>
                        <span class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/40 tracking-widest">USD</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Chart Legend -->
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-brand-rose"></span>
                        <span class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/70">Insurance</span>
                      </div>
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-brand-blue"></span>
                        <span class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/70">Telemedicine</span>
                      </div>
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-brand-gold"></span>
                        <span class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/70">In-clinic</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Three Premium Pastel Cards stacked (Right 7 Columns) -->
                <div class="xl:col-span-7 flex flex-col justify-between gap-4">
                  
                  <!-- Card 1: Payments Received -->
                  <div class="bg-brand-rose border border-brand-roseDark/10 rounded-2xl p-5 flex items-center justify-between transition-transform hover:translate-x-1 duration-200">
                    <div>
                      <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-roseDark/60 block mb-1">💳 Payments received</span>
                      <span class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-roseDark">$ 14,568</span>
                      <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-roseDark/50 block mt-1">Total receipts value updated</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                      <span class="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-white/70 text-brand-roseDark">
                        ↑ 13%
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <!-- Card 2: Payments Requested -->
                  <div class="bg-brand-blue border border-brand-blueDark/10 rounded-2xl p-5 flex items-center justify-between transition-transform hover:translate-x-1 duration-200">
                    <div>
                      <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-blueDark/60 block mb-1">🩺 Payments requested</span>
                      <span class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-blueDark">$ 6,234</span>
                      <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-blueDark/50 block mt-1">Total waiting payments value</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                      <span class="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-white/70 text-brand-blueDark">
                        ↓ -4%
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <!-- Card 3: Non insurance payments -->
                  <div class="bg-brand-gold border border-brand-goldDark/10 rounded-2xl p-5 flex items-center justify-between transition-transform hover:translate-x-1 duration-200">
                    <div>
                      <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-goldDark/60 block mb-1">🏷️ Non insurance payments</span>
                      <span class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-goldDark">$ 3,786</span>
                      <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-goldDark/50 block mt-1">Total value of non-covered by insurance payments</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                      <span class="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-white/70 text-brand-goldDark">
                        ↓ -17%
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Waiting for Bills / Action Area & Transaction Strip -->
              <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-8">
                
                <!-- Waiting for Bills Action Cards -->
                <div class="bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2rem] p-6 shadow-sm">
                  <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Waiting for bills</h4>
                  <div class="space-y-3">
                    
                    <!-- Patient 1 -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between p-4 bg-brand-cream rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder/40">
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 mb-3 sm:mb-0">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-blue flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-brand-blueDark">SW</div>
                        <div>
                          <p class="text-sm font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">Samantha Williams</p>
                          <p class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/40">DXG - Routine Check-Up</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-brand-blue text-brand-blueDark px-3 py-1 rounded-full">09:15 AM</span>
                        <button onclick="requestPaymentAction('Samantha Williams', 345.65)" class="text-xs font-bold bg-brand-charcoal text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight transition-all active:scale-95">Request payment</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Patient 2 -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between p-4 bg-brand-cream rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder/40">
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 mb-3 sm:mb-0">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-rose flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-brand-roseDark">AW</div>
                        <div>
                          <p class="text-sm font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">Amy White</p>
                          <p class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/40">312O - Video Consultation</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-brand-rose text-brand-roseDark px-3 py-1 rounded-full">09:45 AM</span>
                        <button onclick="requestPaymentAction('Amy White', 120.00)" class="text-xs font-bold bg-brand-charcoal text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight transition-all active:scale-95">Request payment</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                  </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Latest Transaction Cards (Pastel colored blocks) -->
                <div class="bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2rem] p-6 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Latest Transactions</h4>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      
                      <!-- Tx 1 -->
                      <div class="p-4 rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder/60 bg-brand-cream">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
                          <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/40 font-bold uppercase">121277 GEICO</span>
                          <span class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/50">15 min ago</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                          <span class="text-sm font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">#3586895</span>
                          <span class="bg-brand-green text-brand-greenDark font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs">+ $568.56</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Tx 2 -->
                      <div class="p-4 rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder/60 bg-brand-cream">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
                          <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/40 font-bold uppercase">Wilkinson T.</span>
                          <span class="text-xs text-brand-charcoal/50">15 min ago</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                          <span class="text-sm font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">#1244657</span>
                          <span class="bg-brand-green text-brand-greenDark font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs">+ $465.40</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <!-- Quick Action Button to see more -->
                  <button onclick="alertNotification('Reviewing complete financial ledger containing 1,420 previous claims.')" class="w-full text-center text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal hover:text-brand-roseDark underline mt-4">
                    View Complete Transaction Log →
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Main Billing Ledger / Table (Recreated premium interactive styling) -->
              <div class="bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
                <div class="p-6 border-b border-brand-grayBorder flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
                  <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    <span class="text-lg">📋</span>
                    <h4 class="text-base font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">Detailed Billing & Claim Ledger</h4>
                  </div>
                  <!-- Filter Buttons matching the capsule UI density of original -->
                  <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5 flex-wrap">
                    <button class="px-3.5 py-1 text-xs font-semibold bg-brand-charcoal text-white rounded-full">All Ledger</button>
                    <button class="px-3.5 py-1 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-brand-creamDark text-brand-charcoal/60 rounded-full">Telemedicine</button>
                    <button class="px-3.5 py-1 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-brand-creamDark text-brand-charcoal/60 rounded-full">In-clinic</button>
                    <button class="px-3.5 py-1 text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-brand-creamDark text-brand-charcoal/60 rounded-full">Insurance</button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div class="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table class="w-full text-left border-collapse">
                    <thead>
                      <tr class="bg-brand-creamDark/40 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-brand-charcoal/50 border-b border-brand-grayBorder">
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Type</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Send date</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Name</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Amount</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Recipient</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Due date</th>
                        <th class="py-4 px-6">Status</th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody class="divide-y divide-brand-grayBorder/60 text-xs">
                      
                      <!-- Row 1 -->
                      <tr class="hover:bg-brand-cream/30 transition-colors">
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-semibold">Telemedicine</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/12/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">Rachel Meyers</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">$345.65</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/60">American Family Insurance</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/15/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6">
                          <span class="inline-flex px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold bg-brand-blue text-brand-blueDark">Requested</span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>

                      <!-- Row 2 -->
                      <tr class="hover:bg-brand-cream/30 transition-colors">
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-semibold">In clinic</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/12/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">Samantha Williams</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">$245.65</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/60">Samantha Williams</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">-</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6">
                          <span class="inline-flex px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold bg-brand-green text-brand-greenDark">Paid</span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>

                      <!-- Row 3 -->
                      <tr class="hover:bg-brand-cream/30 transition-colors">
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-semibold">Insurance</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/12/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">Amy White</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">$345.65</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/60">GEICO</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/15/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6">
                          <span class="inline-flex px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold bg-brand-rose text-brand-roseDark">Sent</span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>

                      <!-- Row 4 -->
                      <tr class="hover:bg-brand-cream/30 transition-colors">
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-semibold">In clinic</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">12/12/24</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">Tyler Young</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 font-extrabold">$345.65</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/60">American Family Insurance</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6 text-brand-charcoal/50">-</td>
                        <td class="py-4 px-6">
                          <span class="inline-flex px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold bg-brand-green text-brand-greenDark">Paid</span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>

                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>

            <!-- ================= SUB-VIEW 2: DR. OLIVIA'S CLINIC SCHEDULE ================= -->
            <div id="schedule-sub-view" class="hidden transition-all duration-500">
              
              <!-- Title Block -->
              <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between mb-8 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h3 class="text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal">Stay up to date, Dr. Olivia</h3>
                  <p class="text-sm text-brand-charcoal/50 mt-1">Review clinical visits, diagnostic exams, team standups, and health education modules.</p>
                </div>
                <!-- Control Buttons for Calendar Actions -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <button onclick="alertNotification('Adding new medical appointment block to calendar...')" class="bg-brand-charcoal hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight text-white text-xs font-bold px-4 py-2.5 rounded-full shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-all">
                    + Add Event
                  </button>
                  <div class="flex items-center space-x-1 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder p-1 rounded-full text-xs">
                    <button class="px-3 py-1 font-semibold rounded-full bg-white text-brand-charcoal shadow-sm">Week</button>
                    <button class="px-3 py-1 font-semibold text-brand-charcoal/50 rounded-full">Month</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Calendar Timeline Grid Layout (Visual masterpiece mimicking screen 2) -->
              <div class="bg-white border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2.5rem] p-6 shadow-sm overflow-x-auto">
                <div class="min-w-[900px]">
                  
                  <!-- Weekday Headers -->
                  <div class="grid grid-cols-7 gap-4 mb-4 border-b border-brand-grayBorder/60 pb-4 text-center">
                    <div class="text-brand-charcoal/40 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold">Time</div>
                    <div class="p-2">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">Mon</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-charcoal">11/05</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-2">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">Tue</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-charcoal">12/05</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-2">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">Wed</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-charcoal">13/05</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-2 bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream rounded-2xl shadow-md">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-white/60">Thu (Today)</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-rose">14/05</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-2">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">Fri</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-charcoal">15/05</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-2">
                      <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">Sat</p>
                      <p class="text-lg font-black text-brand-charcoal">16/05</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <!-- Hourly Blocks Rows -->
                  <div class="space-y-4 relative">
                    
                    <!-- Line representing modern visual indicator timeline -->
                    <div class="absolute top-[85px] left-0 w-full border-t border-dashed border-brand-roseDark z-20 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-end">
                      <span class="bg-brand-rose text-brand-roseDark text-[9px] font-extrabold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full mr-2 shadow-sm border border-brand-roseDark/20 uppercase tracking-widest">Active Time indicator</span>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 1: Morning block -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-7 gap-4 items-stretch min-h-[140px]">
                      <!-- Time header -->
                      <div class="flex flex-col justify-center text-left py-2 border-r border-brand-grayBorder/40">
                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal">07:00 AM</span>
                        <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/40">Diagnostic Setup</span>
                      </div>
                      
                      <!-- Monday: Emergency visit -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-rose border border-brand-roseDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between relative overflow-hidden group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-roseDark uppercase tracking-wider">Emergency visit</span>
                            <span class="text-xs">🚨</span>
                          </div>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Samantha Williams</p>
                          <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/60">Room 302</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-roseDark bg-white/70 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">07:00 - 07:30</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Tuesday: Online Visit -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-blue border border-brand-blueDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-blueDark uppercase tracking-wider block">Online visit</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Rachel Meyers</p>
                          <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/60">Telehealth Ch 3</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-blueDark bg-white/70 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">07:00 - 08:00</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Wednesday: Empty block -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder/40 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-xs text-brand-charcoal/30 font-medium border-dashed">
                        No Event Scheduled
                      </div>

                      <!-- Thursday: Online Visit (Today!) -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-purple border border-brand-purpleDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-purpleDark uppercase tracking-wider block">Online visit</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Amy White</p>
                          <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/60">Telehealth Ch 1</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
                          <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-purpleDark bg-white/70 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">In progress...</span>
                          <button onclick="alertNotification('Connecting to encrypted WebRTC video consultation room...')" class="text-[10px] bg-brand-charcoal hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight text-white font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full shadow">Join</button>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Friday: Team planning -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-gold border border-brand-goldDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-goldDark uppercase tracking-wider block">Team results</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">West camp. Room 200</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-goldDark bg-white/70 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">07:00 - 09:00</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Saturday: Offline rest block -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder/40 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-xs text-brand-charcoal/30 font-medium border-dashed">
                        Weekend Off
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 2: Midday block -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-7 gap-4 items-stretch min-h-[140px]">
                      <!-- Time header -->
                      <div class="flex flex-col justify-center text-left py-2 border-r border-brand-grayBorder/40">
                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal">08:00 AM</span>
                        <span class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/40">Consultation Window</span>
                      </div>
                      
                      <!-- Monday: Diagnostic test -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/40 uppercase block">Diagnostic test</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Tyler Young</p>
                          <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/60">Lab Room 12</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal/50 bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">08:00 - 08:30</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Tuesday: Diagnostic test 2 -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/40 uppercase block">Diagnostic test</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Rachel Meyers</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal/50 bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">08:00 - 08:15</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Wednesday: Follow-up visit -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-charcoal/40 uppercase block">Follow-up</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">West camp. Room 312</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal/50 bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">08:00 - 08:30</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Thursday: Chronic Kidney module -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-blue border border-brand-blueDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-blueDark uppercase tracking-wider block">Primary Care</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Chronic Kidney Care</p>
                          <p class="text-[10px] text-brand-charcoal/60">Leverage AI diagnostic tools to map chronic kidney markers.</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="alertNotification('Opening kidney diagnostic training modules...')" class="text-[10px] bg-brand-charcoal text-white font-bold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full mt-2 hover:bg-brand-charcoalLight transition-all">Launch Study</button>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Friday: Emergency visit -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-rose border border-brand-roseDark/10 p-3.5 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between group hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform">
                        <div>
                          <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-roseDark uppercase tracking-wider block">Emergency visit</span>
                          <p class="text-xs font-black text-brand-charcoal mt-1">Tyler Young</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-extrabold text-brand-roseDark bg-white/70 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md inline-block w-max mt-2">08:00 - 08:30</span>
                      </div>

                      <!-- Saturday: Weekend rest -->
                      <div class="bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder/40 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-xs text-brand-charcoal/30 font-medium border-dashed">
                        Weekend Off
                      </div>
                    </div>

                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>

          </main>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ================= BRAND ATTRIBUTES & DESIGN VIBE IN DETAIL ================= -->
  <section id="features" class="py-24 relative overflow-hidden bg-white">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
      
      <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16">
        <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-brand-roseDark bg-brand-rose px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full">DESIGN SYSTEM HIGHLIGHTS</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-brand-charcoal mt-6">
          Constructed with medical mindfulness.
        </h2>
        <p class="text-brand-charcoal/60 mt-4 leading-relaxed">
          Intelly goes beyond administrative power to respect your physical and emotional space. Discover the pillars that make Intelly feel completely cohesive.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Bento Grid of Design & Feature System -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8">
        
        <!-- Bento 1: Color Psychology -->
        <div class="md:col-span-7 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-10 flex flex-col justify-between relative overflow-hidden bento-glow-rose group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
          <div>
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-brand-roseDark mb-6">
              <span class="text-2xl">🎨</span>
              <span class="text-xs uppercase font-extrabold tracking-widest">Atmospheric Calm</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal mb-4">Therapeutic Color Language</h3>
            <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-6">
              Unlike clinical, white-and-blue medical systems that induce high heart rate and anxiety, Intelly uses soft, warm cream backdrops combined with comforting pastel labels to keep clinicians grounded and focused.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- Colors strip demo inside block -->
          <div class="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2 bg-white/70 p-3 rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder">
            <div class="h-10 rounded-lg bg-brand-rose flex items-center justify-center"><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-roseDark">Rose</span></div>
            <div class="h-10 rounded-lg bg-brand-blue flex items-center justify-center"><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-blueDark">Blue</span></div>
            <div class="h-10 rounded-lg bg-brand-gold flex items-center justify-center"><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-goldDark">Gold</span></div>
            <div class="h-10 rounded-lg bg-brand-green flex items-center justify-center"><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-greenDark">Sage</span></div>
            <div class="h-10 rounded-lg bg-brand-purple flex items-center justify-center"><span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-purpleDark">Lilac</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Bento 2: Premium Shadows & Depths -->
        <div class="md:col-span-5 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-10 flex flex-col justify-between bento-glow-blue group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
          <div>
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-brand-blueDark mb-6">
              <span class="text-2xl">✨</span>
              <span class="text-xs uppercase font-extrabold tracking-widest">Tactile Depth</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal mb-4">Soft Floating Containers</h3>
            <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-6">
              Every card looks gently raised over the cream canvas. Soft inner borders and drop-shadow definitions create a natural layout hierarchy that reduces cognitive workload for busy administrative staffs.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-brand-grayBorder shadow-sm flex items-center justify-between">
            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal">Platform Container Stroke</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] bg-brand-creamDark px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold text-brand-charcoal/50">#EBE6DD</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Bento 3: Quick claim analytics -->
        <div class="md:col-span-5 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-10 flex flex-col justify-between group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
          <div>
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-brand-goldDark mb-6">
              <span class="text-2xl">⚡</span>
              <span class="text-xs uppercase font-extrabold tracking-widest">Billing Velocity</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal mb-4">Instant Ledger Updates</h3>
            <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-6">
              Click-and-request functionality streamlines invoice submissions to American Family Insurance, GEICO, and personal payees. Experience lightning-fast claim cycles in three clicks.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- Action Mock -->
          <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-brand-grayBorder flex items-center justify-between">
            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal">Quick Submission State</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] bg-brand-green text-brand-greenDark px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-black uppercase">Approved in 2s</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Bento 4: Intelligent Auto-scheduling -->
        <div class="md:col-span-7 bg-brand-cream border border-brand-grayBorder rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-10 flex flex-col justify-between group hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
          <div>
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-brand-greenDark mb-6">
              <span class="text-2xl">🧠</span>
              <span class="text-xs uppercase font-extrabold tracking-widest">Medical intelligence</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-brand-charcoal mb-4">Contextual Clinical Timelines</h3>
            <p class="text-brand-charcoal/70 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-6">
              Your dashboard stays updated to the minute, adjusting team standups, diagnostics, and telehealth links dynamically. Direct patients to education materials smoothly with automated triggers.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div class="flex space-x-2 bg-white/70 p-3 rounded-2xl border border-brand-grayBorder">
            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-charcoal">Integrated Telehealth Engine</span>
            <span class="text-xs text-brand-roseDark font-bold bg-brand-rose px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">WebRTC Encrypted</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ================= INTELLY AI CLAIMS COPILOT (GEMINI API INTEGRATION) ================= -->
  <section id="ai-assistant" class="py-20 bg-brand-charcoal text-brand-cream border-t border-brand-charcoal relative">
    
    <!-- Visual background accent glow -->
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_bottom_left,rgba(252,221,236,0.15),transparent_40%)] pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Section Intro -->
      <div class="text-center mb-12">
        <span class="inline-block text-xs font-extrabold text-brand-rose bg-white/10 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest">Intelly AI Copilot</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-black text-white mt-4">Draft Smart Clinical & Billing Documents</h2>
        <p class="text-white/60 mt-4 text-sm sm:text-base">
          Accelerate tedious administration tasks using the integrated **Gemini 2.5 Flash** model. Generate complete claim dispute arguments, medical appeal letters, or clear discharge summaries instantly.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- AI Assistant Work Console -->
      <div class="bg-[#1C1C22] border border-white/10 rounded-[2.5rem] p-6 sm:p-8 shadow-2xl">
        
        <!-- Input Selector / Query options -->
        <div class="mb-6">
          <label class="block text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-wider text-white/40 mb-3">Choose a Clinical template target</label>
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
            <button onclick="setAiQueryType('claim')" class="ai-template-btn p-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition-all text-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-rose">
              📑 Dispute claim denial
            </button>
            <button onclick="setAiQueryType('discharge')" class="ai-template-btn p-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition-all text-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-rose">
              🏥 Patient discharge summary
            </button>
            <button onclick="setAiQueryType('telehealth')" class="ai-template-btn p-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition-all text-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-rose">
              📹 Telehealth report summary
            </button>
            <button onclick="setAiQueryType('custom')" class="ai-template-btn p-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-xs font-semibold text-white transition-all text-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-rose">
              ✨ Custom AI prompt
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- System Prompt Instruction & Dynamic Input Prompt Textarea -->
        <div class="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label class="block text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-wider text-white/40 mb-2">Prompt Input Details</label>
            <textarea id="ai-input-prompt" rows="4" class="w-full bg-[#131316] text-white border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-rose transition-all" placeholder="Enter patient details, claim rejection codes, or clinical symptoms here..."></textarea>
          </div>

          <!-- Run/Generate Button & Loading Indicators -->
          <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4 pt-2">
            <span class="text-xs text-white/40 flex items-center space-x-2">
              <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-brand-rose animate-pulse"></span>
              <span>Running Live on **Gemini 2.5 Flash**</span>
            </span>
            <button id="btn-generate-ai" onclick="generateAiClinicalOutput()" class="bg-brand-rose hover:bg-brand-rose/95 text-brand-charcoal font-bold px-8 py-3.5 rounded-full text-sm transition-all shadow-md active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
              <span>🚀 Generate with Intelly AI</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Output Result Panel -->
        <div class="mt-8 border-t border-white/10 pt-8">
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-wider text-brand-rose">Generated Documentation Output</span>
            <button onclick="copyAiOutputToClipboard()" class="text-xs text-white/60 hover:text-white bg-white/5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-white/10 transition-colors">
              📋 Copy output
            </button>
          </div>
          
          <!-- Live result loader & viewport -->
          <div class="bg-[#131316] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-5 min-h-[160px] relative overflow-hidden">
            <!-- Loading Indicator overlay -->
            <div id="ai-loading" class="hidden absolute inset-0 bg-[#131316]/90 flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-3">
              <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-4 border-brand-rose border-t-transparent animate-spin"></div>
              <p class="text-xs text-white/60 font-semibold">Generating clinical document via Gemini AI...</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Empty / Default Output State text -->
            <div id="ai-output-placeholder" class="text-sm text-white/30 italic leading-relaxed">
              No clinical output generated yet. Choose a template target above, enter patient details, and click "Generate with Intelly AI" to watch premium documentation form in real-time.
            </div>

            <!-- Styled Rich Text Output Container -->
            <pre id="ai-output-content" class="hidden text-sm text-white/90 whitespace-pre-wrap font-mono leading-relaxed overflow-x-auto"></pre>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ================= SYSTEM JAVASCRIPT ================= -->
  <script>
    // System variables and mock database
    const apiKey = ""; // Will be configured at runtime
    
    // Switch between the two dashboard views inspired by the image
    function switchPreviewTab(tabName) {
      const billingTab = document.getElementById('billing-sub-view');
      const scheduleTab = document.getElementById('schedule-sub-view');
      const btnBilling = document.getElementById('btn-billing-view');
      const btnSchedule = document.getElementById('btn-schedule-view');

      if (tabName === 'billing') {
        billingTab.classList.remove('hidden');
        scheduleTab.classList.add('hidden');
        
        // Button style updates
        btnBilling.className = "px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all bg-brand-rose text-brand-charcoal shadow-md";
        btnSchedule.className = "px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all hover:text-brand-rose text-white/85";
      } else {
        billingTab.classList.add('hidden');
        scheduleTab.classList.remove('hidden');

        // Button style updates
        btnBilling.className = "px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all hover:text-brand-rose text-white/85";
        btnSchedule.className = "px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold transition-all bg-brand-rose text-brand-charcoal shadow-md";
      }
    }

    // Interactive Notification Toast logic
    function alertNotification(message) {
      const notification = document.getElementById('demo-notification');
      const notificationText = document.getElementById('demo-notification-text');
      
      notificationText.innerText = message;
      notification.classList.remove('hidden');
      
      // Auto dismiss after 7 seconds
      setTimeout(() => {
        dismissNotification();
      }, 7000);
    }

    function dismissNotification() {
      document.getElementById('demo-notification').classList.add('hidden');
    }

    // Instant request billing workflow mock trigger
    function requestPaymentAction(patientName, amountValue) {
      alertNotification(`Initiated instant payment link submission of $${amountValue} for ${patientName}.`);
    }

    // --- AI GENERATIVE ENGINE (GEMINI INTEGRATION WITH BACKOFF RETRY) ---
    let currentTemplateType = 'claim';
    
    const templates = {
      claim: "Draft a formal claim denial dispute response. Patient: Samantha Williams. ICD-10 Code: M25.562 (Pain in left knee). Insurer: GEICO Medical. Suggest that the clinic provided full diagnostic confirmation before treatment to appeal the denial.",
      discharge: "Generate a reassuring, clean clinical patient discharge summary for Tyler Young after undergoing a successful diagnostic exam. Provide clear, simple guidelines on home rest and scheduling follow-up sessions.",
      telehealth: "Synthesize a professional Telehealth Video Consultation summary for Dr. Olivia. Subject: Patient Amy White's routine chronic hypertension checkup. Outline her current medication levels and future online clinic visits.",
      custom: "Write a clinical summary or billing appeal of your choice. Enter custom variables here."
    };

    // Set active prompt based on chosen button
    function setAiQueryType(type) {
      currentTemplateType = type;
      
      // Update prompts textarea
      document.getElementById('ai-input-prompt').value = templates[type];
      
      // Visual feedback on buttons
      const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.ai-template-btn');
      buttons.forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove('bg-brand-rose', 'text-brand-charcoal');
        btn.classList.add('bg-white/5', 'text-white');
      });
      
      // Active item styling
      event.target.classList.remove('bg-white/5', 'text-white');
      event.target.classList.add('bg-brand-rose', 'text-brand-charcoal');
    }

    // Set default prompt on load
    setAiQueryType('claim');

    // Clipboard copy tool
    function copyAiOutputToClipboard() {
      const outputText = document.getElementById('ai-output-content').innerText;
      if (!outputText) {
        alertNotification("There is no generated text to copy yet!");
        return;
      }
      
      // Use fallback copying due to potential iframe security limits
      const el = document.createElement('textarea');
      el.value = outputText;
      document.body.appendChild(el);
      el.select();
      document.execCommand('copy');
      document.body.removeChild(el);
      
      alertNotification("Copied clinical document to clipboard successfully!");
    }

    // Main API Call Routine implementing the exponential backoff as requested
    async function callGeminiApiWithRetry(promptText, retries = 5, delay = 1000) {
      const systemInstructionText = "You are Intelly AI, an expert medical billing, claim appeal, and clinical coding assistant. Draft precise, beautiful, professional, HIPAA-respectful clinical documentation. Ensure a compassionate, professional tone that mirrors high-quality administrative systems.";
      
      const payload = {
        contents: [{
          parts: [{ text: promptText }]
        }],
        systemInstruction: {
          parts: [{ text: systemInstructionText }]
        }
      };

      const url = `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`;

      try {
        const response = await fetch(url, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
          },
          body: JSON.stringify(payload)
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`API Status Error: ${response.status}`);
        }

        const data = await response.json();
        return data.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text;
      } catch (error) {
        if (retries > 0) {
          // Silent backoff logging on retries
          await new Promise(res => setTimeout(res, delay));
          return callGeminiApiWithRetry(promptText, retries - 1, delay * 2);
        } else {
          throw error;
        }
      }
    }

    // Trigger Generation UI
    async function generateAiClinicalOutput() {
      const promptText = document.getElementById('ai-input-prompt').value.trim();
      const loader = document.getElementById('ai-loading');
      const placeholder = document.getElementById('ai-output-placeholder');
      const outputBox = document.getElementById('ai-output-content');
      
      if (!promptText) {
        alertNotification("Please enter some prompt details before generating.");
        return;
      }

      loader.classList.remove('hidden');
      
      try {
        const responseText = await callGeminiApiWithRetry(promptText);
        
        loader.classList.add('hidden');
        placeholder.classList.add('hidden');
        outputBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        
        outputBox.innerText = responseText || "No content returned from Intelly AI. Try again.";
        alertNotification("AI clinical documentation drafted successfully!");
      } catch (error) {
        loader.classList.add('hidden');
        alertNotification("Error generating content. Displaying simulation preview instead.");
        
        // Elegant simulated fallback for offline previews or environment hiccups
        outputBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        placeholder.classList.add('hidden');
        outputBox.innerText = `[SIMULATED APPLICABLE OUTPUT FOR DEMONSTRATION]

INTELLY CLINICAL DOCUMENTATION
DOCUMENT TYPE: ${currentTemplateType.toUpperCase()}
DRAFT DATE: May 24, 2026

Dear Claims Administrator,

We are writing to appeal the denial of clinical diagnostic code M25.562 for patient Samantha Williams. The routine examination executed by Dr. Olivia on 14/05/2026 confirmed persistent articular discomfort which mandated immediate diagnostic imaging validation.

Under HIPAA Clinical Guidelines, we have attached the necessary clearance records and request immediate review and processing of the pending transaction total ($345.65).

Best Regards,
Intelly AI Copilot & Dr. Olivia (West Camp Clinics)`;
      }
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>
5
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>TRAVEL - We Pursue a Relaxed Gaming Experience</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Lucide Icons -->
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;700;800&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'],
                        space: ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        night: {
                            950: '#080711',
                            900: '#0d0c1d',
                            800: '#14122b',
                            700: '#1c1a3a',
                            600: '#26234e',
                            purple: '#4c2e8c',
                        },
                        campfire: {
                            gold: '#ffd166',
                            orange: '#f77f00',
                            red: '#ef476f',
                            glow: 'rgba(247, 127, 0, 0.15)',
                        }
                    },
                    boxShadow: {
                        'glow-warm': '0 0 30px 10px rgba(247, 127, 0, 0.25)',
                        'glow-warm-lg': '0 0 60px 20px rgba(247, 127, 0, 0.35)',
                        'glow-purple': '0 0 30px 5px rgba(123, 44, 177, 0.3)',
                    },
                    animation: {
                        'pulse-slow': 'pulse 3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
                        'float': 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
        }
        .float-animation {
            animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        /* Custom scrollbar for immersive night theme */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #080711;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #26234e;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #f77f00;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-night-950 text-slate-100 font-sans overflow-x-hidden relative selection:bg-campfire-orange selection:text-white">

    <!-- Ambient Sky & Stars -->
    <div class="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-0 overflow-hidden" id="star-sky">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#080711] via-[#0d0c1d] to-[#14122b]"></div>
        <!-- Dynamic Stars will be injected here by JS -->
    </div>

    <!-- Soft glowing campfire backdrop layer -->
    <div id="global-fire-glow" class="fixed bottom-1/4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[80vw] h-[80vw] max-w-[800px] max-h-[800px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-campfire-orange/10 to-campfire-gold/5 blur-[120px] pointer-events-none z-0 transition-all duration-700 ease-out"></div>

    <!-- MAIN WRAPPER -->
    <div class="relative z-10 min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-between">

        <!-- HEADER / NAVIGATION -->
        <header class="border-b border-night-600/30 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
                <!-- Travel Cozy Logo Design -->
                <a href="#hero" class="flex items-center space-x-3 group">
                    <div class="relative flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-night-800 border border-night-600 group-hover:border-campfire-orange transition-all duration-300 shadow-glow-purple group-hover:shadow-glow-warm">
                        <span class="text-campfire-gold text-xl font-bold font-space">T</span>
                        <div class="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-campfire-orange animate-pulse"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex flex-col">
                        <span class="font-space font-extrabold text-2xl tracking-widest text-slate-100 flex items-center">
                            T<span class="text-campfire-orange">R</span>A<span class="relative">V<span class="absolute -top-1 left-1 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-campfire-gold rounded-full"></span></span>EL
                        </span>
                        <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400">Relaxed Gaming</span>
                    </div>
                </a>

                <!-- Desktop Nav Links -->
                <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
                    <a href="#about" class="hover:text-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-200">The Universe</a>
                    <a href="#experience" class="hover:text-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-200">Experiences</a>
                    <a href="#campsite" class="hover:text-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-200">Interactive Campsite</a>
                    <a href="#perks" class="hover:text-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-200">Relaxed Perks</a>
                </nav>

                <!-- Sound Control & Launch Panel -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                    <!-- Synthesized Ambient Audio Toggle -->
                    <button id="synth-ambient-btn" onclick="toggleAmbientSound()" class="flex items-center space-x-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-night-800 hover:bg-night-700 border border-night-600 hover:border-campfire-gold text-slate-300 hover:text-campfire-gold transition-all duration-300 text-xs">
                        <span id="ambient-icon-container" class="relative flex h-2 w-2">
                            <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-slate-400 opacity-75"></span>
                            <span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-slate-500" id="sound-indicator"></span>
                        </span>
                        <span id="synth-btn-text">Play Campfire Sounds</span>
                    </button>

                    <a href="#portal" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-r from-night-700 to-night-800 hover:from-campfire-orange hover:to-campfire-gold text-white font-space font-medium text-xs tracking-wider uppercase border border-night-600 hover:border-campfire-gold transition-all duration-500 shadow-lg">
                        Enter Campfire
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </header>

        <!-- HERO SECTION -->
        <section id="hero" class="relative min-h-[calc(100vh-80px)] flex flex-col justify-center py-12 px-6">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto w-full grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Hand Details (Vibe & Pitch) -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col space-y-6 text-left relative z-20">
                    <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-night-800/80 border border-night-600/50 backdrop-blur-md px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs text-campfire-gold tracking-wide max-w-max">
                        <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-4.5 h-4.5 text-campfire-gold animate-spin" style="animation-duration: 8s;"></i>
                        <span>WELCOME TO THE COZIEST DIGITAL SANCTUARY</span>
                    </div>

                    <h1 class="font-space font-extrabold text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-slate-100">
                        We pursue a <span class="bg-gradient-to-r from-campfire-gold via-campfire-orange to-campfire-red bg-clip-text text-transparent">relaxed</span> gaming experience.
                    </h1>

                    <p class="text-slate-300 text-base sm:text-lg max-w-xl leading-relaxed">
                        Step away from high-stakes tension. Welcome to a low-poly night sky where your only mission is to stay warm, watch the stars, play gentle atmospheric micro-games, and rest with players worldwide.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Interactive campsite quick-metrics -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 py-4 max-w-md">
                        <div class="bg-night-800/40 border border-night-700 p-3 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm hover:border-campfire-orange/40 transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block text-xl font-bold font-space text-campfire-gold" id="campfire-heat-stat">85°C</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Fire Temperature</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-night-800/40 border border-night-700 p-3 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm hover:border-campfire-orange/40 transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block text-xl font-bold font-space text-slate-100" id="active-campers-stat">1,402</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Active Campers</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-night-800/40 border border-night-700 p-3 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm hover:border-campfire-orange/40 transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block text-xl font-bold font-space text-indigo-400" id="ambient-wind-stat">4 m/s</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Gentle Breeze</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Call to action buttons -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-stretch sm:items-center gap-4 pt-2">
                        <a href="#campsite" class="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-campfire-orange to-campfire-gold hover:from-campfire-gold hover:to-campfire-orange text-night-950 font-space font-bold tracking-wider text-center transition-all duration-300 shadow-glow-warm hover:shadow-glow-warm-lg">
                            Go to Campsite Visualizer
                        </a>
                        <a href="#portal" class="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-night-800/80 border border-night-600 hover:border-campfire-orange text-slate-200 hover:text-white font-space text-center transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
                            <span>Access Traveler Portal</span>
                            <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Hand: Authentic Campsite UI & Sign Up (A tribute to your reference image) -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 relative z-20 flex justify-center" id="portal">
                    <!-- Frame mockup mimicking reference phone/tablet viewport perfectly -->
