                    <div class="relative w-full max-w-[420px] rounded-3xl border border-night-600 bg-night-900/90 shadow-2xl p-8 overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-md">
                        
                        <!-- Top status bar mock -->
                        <div class="absolute top-0 inset-x-0 h-8 px-6 flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5">
                                <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
                                <span>TRAVEL_NET</span>
                            </div>
                            <span>9:41 AM</span>
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1">
                                <i data-lucide="wifi" class="w-3 h-3"></i>
                                <span class="text-[8px]">100%</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Inside content: The stylized Campsite Scene & Travel Identity -->
                        <div class="mt-4 flex flex-col items-center text-center">
                            
                            <!-- Immersive Low Poly Campsite Illustration -->
                            <div class="w-full h-48 bg-gradient-to-b from-night-950 to-night-800 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden border border-night-700/60 flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
                                <!-- Mountains Silhouette -->
                                <div class="absolute bottom-0 inset-x-0 h-16 flex items-end opacity-20 pointer-events-none">
                                    <svg class="w-full h-full fill-slate-400" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none">
                                        <polygon points="0,100 20,30 40,80 65,20 85,90 100,100"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                                
                                <!-- Low-poly pine trees SVG layout -->
                                <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-6 w-10 h-16 opacity-40">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-full h-full text-emerald-800 fill-current">
                                        <polygon points="20,0 35,40 28,40 38,70 5,70 15,40 8,40"/>
                                        <rect x="17" y="70" width="6" height="10" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                                <div class="absolute bottom-2 right-8 w-12 h-20 opacity-30">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-full h-full text-emerald-700 fill-current">
                                        <polygon points="20,0 35,45 27,45 38,75 5,75 16,45 8,45"/>
                                        <rect x="17" y="75" width="6" height="5" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Low-poly Yellow Tent -->
                                <div class="absolute bottom-2 right-16 w-16 h-12">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 80 60" class="w-full h-full">
                                        <!-- Main tent body (mustard yellow) -->
                                        <polygon points="40,5 75,55 5,55" fill="#d97706" opacity="0.9"/>
                                        <!-- Tent opening flap (lit yellow) -->
                                        <polygon points="40,5 55,55 25,55" fill="#f59e0b"/>
                                        <!-- Inside pitch black -->
                                        <polygon points="40,15 48,55 32,55" fill="#080711"/>
                                    </svg>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Cozy campfire SVG animation -->
                                <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-16 h-16 flex flex-col items-center justify-end">
                                    <!-- Logs -->
                                    <div class="absolute bottom-1 w-8 h-2 bg-amber-900 rounded-full transform rotate-12"></div>
                                    <div class="absolute bottom-1 w-8 h-2 bg-amber-950 rounded-full transform -rotate-12"></div>
                                    
                                    <!-- Dynamic animated flame -->
                                    <div class="w-8 h-10 bg-gradient-to-t from-campfire-red via-campfire-orange to-campfire-gold rounded-t-full animate-pulse blur-[1px] transform origin-bottom" style="animation-duration: 0.8s;"></div>
                                    
                                    <!-- Campfire warm circle glow -->
                                    <div class="absolute bottom-1 w-12 h-12 bg-campfire-orange/20 rounded-full filter blur-md animate-ping" style="animation-duration: 3s;"></div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Moon in sky -->
                                <div class="absolute top-4 right-8 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-200/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center">
                                    <!-- Moon crater simulation -->
                                    <div class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-slate-300 absolute top-2 left-2 opacity-55"></div>
                                    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-slate-300 absolute bottom-2 right-2 opacity-40"></div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Star trails -->
                                <div class="absolute top-6 left-12 w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-slate-300/80 animate-ping" style="animation-duration: 4s;"></div>
                                <div class="absolute top-12 left-24 w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-slate-100/60 animate-ping" style="animation-duration: 2.5s;"></div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Styled Title (Matches Image) -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col items-center mb-1">
                                <span class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl tracking-[0.3em] text-slate-100 flex items-center relative">
                                    T<span class="text-campfire-orange">R</span>A<span class="relative">V<span class="absolute -top-1.5 left-1 w-2 h-2 bg-campfire-gold rounded-full"></span></span>EL
                                </span>
                                <div class="w-24 h-[2px] bg-campfire-orange rounded-full mt-1"></div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <p class="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400 mt-2 font-space">
                                We pursue a relaxed gaming experience
                            </p>

                            <!-- Authentically Styled Login Fields (Pure reference match) -->
                            <form onsubmit="handleFormSubmit(event)" class="w-full mt-6 space-y-4">
                                <div class="relative border-b border-night-600/60 py-2 group focus-within:border-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-300">
                                    <input type="text" id="username" placeholder="Username" required class="w-full bg-transparent border-none text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none text-sm pr-10 pl-2">
                                    <div class="absolute right-2 top-2 text-night-purple/80 group-focus-within:text-campfire-gold transition-colors">
                                        <i data-lucide="user" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div class="relative border-b border-night-600/60 py-2 group focus-within:border-campfire-gold transition-colors duration-300">
                                    <input type="password" id="password" placeholder="Password" required class="w-full bg-transparent border-none text-slate-200 placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none text-sm pr-10 pl-2">
                                    <div class="absolute right-2 top-2 text-night-purple/80 group-focus-within:text-campfire-gold transition-colors">
                                        <i data-lucide="lock" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Dual Buttons: Sign Up / Sign In (Reference Exact Match styling with custom enhancement) -->
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 pt-4">
                                    <button type="submit" class="py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg bg-transparent border border-campfire-gold/80 text-campfire-gold hover:bg-campfire-gold hover:text-night-950 font-space font-semibold text-xs tracking-wider uppercase transition-all duration-300">
                                        Sign Up
                                    </button>
                                    <button type="button" onclick="toastAlert('Sign in activated. Welcome back traveler!')" class="py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg bg-night-800 hover:bg-night-700 border border-night-600 hover:border-slate-400 text-slate-300 hover:text-white font-space font-semibold text-xs tracking-wider uppercase transition-all duration-300">
                                        Sign In
                                    </button>
                                </div>

                                <div class="text-center mt-4">
                                    <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('We\'ll send password reset instructions to your registered email.')" class="text-xs text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">
                                        Forgot Password?
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- THE UNIVERSE / ABOUT SECTION -->
        <section id="about" class="py-24 px-6 relative border-t border-night-800/40 bg-night-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16">
                    <span class="text-campfire-orange text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.25em] uppercase block mb-3">Core Philosophy</span>
                    <h2 class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-4xl text-slate-100">Designed to Heal & Decelerate</h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-400 mt-4">Unlike modern games that demand relentless progression, TRAVEL invites you to wind down. Let's trade anxiety for cozy exploration.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                    <!-- Concept Card 1 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/30 border border-night-700/60 p-8 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-campfire-gold/30 transition-all duration-500">
                        <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-bl from-campfire-gold/5 to-transparent pointer-events-none rounded-bl-full"></div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-campfire-gold border border-night-600 mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                            <i data-lucide="moon" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-xl text-slate-100 mb-2">Realtime Dynamic Nights</h3>
                        <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Our worlds sync with your local clock. Experience mesmerizing starry skies, low-poly mountain vistas, and cozy forest crackles right from your desk as dusk sets.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Concept Card 2 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/30 border border-night-700/60 p-8 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-campfire-orange/30 transition-all duration-500">
                        <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-bl from-campfire-orange/5 to-transparent pointer-events-none rounded-bl-full"></div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-campfire-orange border border-night-600 mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                            <i data-lucide="flame" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-xl text-slate-100 mb-2">The Shared Hearth</h3>
                        <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Sit with travelers in asynchronous, peaceful multiplayer lobbies. Share handwritten journal entries, trade resources, or play gentle collaborative card games.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Concept Card 3 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/30 border border-night-700/60 p-8 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-purple-500/30 transition-all duration-500">
                        <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-bl from-night-purple/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none rounded-bl-full"></div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-purple-400 border border-night-600 mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                            <i data-lucide="music" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-xl text-slate-100 mb-2">Generative Night Soundscapes</h3>
                        <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Our sound engine procedurally combines nature sounds, retro-cozy synth pads, and analog warmth that adapts beautifully to your gameplay activities and state.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- INTERACTIVE CAMPSITE VISUALIZER / PLAYGROUND -->
        <section id="campsite" class="py-24 px-6 relative bg-gradient-to-b from-night-950 to-night-900 border-t border-night-800/50">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                    
                    <!-- Left: Interactive Control Deck -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col space-y-6">
                        <span class="text-campfire-gold text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.25em] uppercase block">Interactive Simulator</span>
                        <h2 class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-4xl text-slate-100">Tend Your Fire, Shape Your Atmosphere</h2>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Interact with this live simulation panel to alter the visual universe's climate. Toss timber to fuel the flames, shift wind speeds, or adjust star density. Watch the whole page glowingly react.
                        </p>

                        <!-- Controls -->
                        <div class="space-y-4 pt-2">
                            <!-- Timber Log count button action -->
                            <div class="bg-night-800/60 border border-night-700 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col space-y-3">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono tracking-wider">Fuel Level</span>
                                    <span id="timber-count-label" class="text-xs text-campfire-gold font-bold">5 Logs in Hearth</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="w-full bg-night-950 rounded-full h-2">
                                    <div id="timber-bar" class="bg-gradient-to-r from-campfire-orange to-campfire-gold h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-500" style="width: 50%;"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex space-x-2">
                                    <button onclick="addTimber()" class="flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg bg-campfire-orange/10 hover:bg-campfire-orange/20 border border-campfire-orange/40 hover:border-campfire-orange text-campfire-gold text-xs font-space font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-colors">
                                        + Toss Firewood Log
                                    </button>
                                    <button onclick="douseFire()" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-night-700 hover:bg-night-600 border border-night-600 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 text-xs transition-colors">
                                        Douse
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Star Density Range slider -->
                            <div class="bg-night-800/60 border border-night-700 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col space-y-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono tracking-wider">Star Density</span>
                                    <span id="star-count-label" class="text-xs text-slate-200">120 Stars</span>
                                </div>
                                <input type="range" id="star-slider" min="30" max="250" value="120" oninput="updateStarDensity(this.value)" class="w-full accent-campfire-gold bg-night-950 h-1 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer">
                            </div>

                            <!-- Wind Breeze Control -->
                            <div class="bg-night-800/60 border border-night-700 rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col space-y-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase font-mono tracking-wider">Breeze Intensity</span>
                                    <span id="wind-strength-label" class="text-xs text-slate-200">Gentle</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex space-x-2">
                                    <button onclick="setBreeze('calm')" class="flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded bg-night-950 hover:bg-night-900 border border-night-700 text-xs hover:border-campfire-gold transition-all text-slate-400">Calm</button>
                                    <button onclick="setBreeze('gentle')" class="flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded bg-campfire-orange/20 border border-campfire-orange/40 text-xs text-campfire-gold">Gentle</button>
                                    <button onclick="setBreeze('gusty')" class="flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded bg-night-950 hover:bg-night-900 border border-night-700 text-xs hover:border-campfire-gold transition-all text-slate-400">Gusty</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Right: Immersive Low Poly Animated Vector Campfire Landscape Panel -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex justify-center">
                        <div class="w-full max-w-[550px] aspect-[4/3] rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-b from-[#090818] via-[#0e0c24] to-[#141235] border border-night-700/60 overflow-hidden relative shadow-glow-purple flex items-end">
                            
                            <!-- Deep Mountain Backdrops -->
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-40 pointer-events-none">
                                <svg class="w-full h-full text-[#1d1a49] fill-current" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none">
                                    <!-- High Peaks -->
                                    <polygon points="0,100 15,40 35,90 60,35 80,85 100,100"/>
                                    <!-- Mid-ground Peaks -->
                                    <polygon points="0,100 25,60 50,85 75,55 100,100" class="text-[#2c286e]" opacity="0.6"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Cozy Interactive Glowing Moon -->
                            <div class="absolute top-12 right-16 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-slate-200 to-white shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.25)] flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse-slow">
                                <!-- Subtle low-poly detailing on moon -->
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full opacity-10">
                                    <polygon points="20,20 40,15 35,35 15,30" fill="black"/>
                                    <polygon points="70,50 85,60 75,75 60,65" fill="black"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Pine Trees Left & Right -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-8 left-8 flex space-x-1 items-end pointer-events-none opacity-80">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-8 h-16 text-[#173e2a] fill-current">
                                    <polygon points="20,0 35,40 28,40 38,70 5,70 15,40 8,40"/>
                                </svg>
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-12 h-24 text-[#0f2d1d] fill-current">
                                    <polygon points="20,0 35,40 28,40 38,70 5,70 15,40 8,40"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <div class="absolute bottom-8 right-8 flex space-x-1 items-end pointer-events-none opacity-80">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-10 h-20 text-[#0f2d1d] fill-current">
                                    <polygon points="20,0 35,40 28,40 38,70 5,70 15,40 8,40"/>
                                </svg>
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 40 80" class="w-6 h-12 text-[#1c4b33] fill-current">
                                    <polygon points="20,0 35,40 28,40 38,70 5,70 15,40 8,40"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Centered Low Poly Cozy Yellow/Orange Tent -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-8 left-16 w-24 h-20 pointer-events-none">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 100 80" class="w-full h-full drop-shadow-lg">
                                    <!-- Back Flap -->
                                    <polygon points="50,10 90,75 10,75" fill="#ca8a04"/>
                                    <!-- Inside pitch shadows -->
                                    <polygon points="50,10 70,75 30,75" fill="#f59e0b"/>
                                    <!-- Opening glowing door -->
                                    <polygon points="50,25 60,75 40,75" fill="#3f3f46"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Centered Interactive Fire pit & Ambient Glow -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-48 h-32 flex flex-col items-center justify-end z-20">
                                <!-- Dynamic Radial Fire Light (Increases with timber logs) -->
                                <div id="live-fire-radial-glow" class="absolute bottom-2 w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-t from-campfire-orange/40 to-campfire-gold/10 filter blur-xl animate-pulse duration-1000"></div>

                                <!-- Campfire Wood Log Base Structure -->
                                <div class="relative w-24 h-6 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                                    <div class="absolute w-16 h-3 bg-amber-950 rounded-full transform rotate-12 origin-center"></div>
                                    <div class="absolute w-16 h-3 bg-amber-900 rounded-full transform -rotate-12 origin-center"></div>
                                    <div class="absolute w-12 h-2.5 bg-[#451a03] rounded-full bottom-0"></div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Layered SVG Fire Particle Flames -->
                                <div class="relative h-20 w-16 flex items-end justify-center">
                                    <svg viewBox="0 0 60 100" class="w-full h-full pointer-events-none">
                                        <!-- Fire outer layer -->
                                        <path id="fire-outer" d="M 30,0 C 15,35 5,50 5,75 C 5,95 55,95 55,75 C 55,50 45,35 30,0 Z" fill="#dc2626" class="animate-pulse transform origin-bottom" style="animation-duration: 0.9s;" />
                                        <!-- Fire middle layer -->
                                        <path id="fire-mid" d="M 30,15 C 20,45 10,55 10,75 C 10,90 50,90 50,75 C 50,55 40,45 30,15 Z" fill="#ea580c" class="animate-pulse transform origin-bottom" style="animation-duration: 0.6s;" />
                                        <!-- Fire inner core -->
                                        <path id="fire-inner" d="M 30,30 C 23,52 18,60 18,75 C 18,85 42,85 42,75 C 42,60 37,52 30,30 Z" fill="#eab308" class="animate-pulse transform origin-bottom" style="animation-duration: 0.4s;" />
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Decorative Low Poly SUV / Cruiser (References the SUV/car in image) -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-8 right-24 w-28 h-16 pointer-events-none opacity-90">
                                <svg viewBox="0 0 120 70" class="w-full h-full">
                                    <!-- SUV Body with low-poly shades -->
                                    <rect x="10" y="30" width="100" height="25" fill="#4b5563" rx="4"/>
                                    <polygon points="35,10 80,10 95,30 20,30" fill="#6b7280"/>
                                    <!-- Windows -->
                                    <polygon points="38,13 56,13 56,27 30,27" fill="#1f2937"/>
                                    <polygon points="60,13 78,13 88,27 60,27" fill="#1f2937"/>
                                    <!-- Headlight glow -->
                                    <polygon points="110,35 120,30 120,50 110,45" fill="#fef08a" opacity="0.3"/>
                                    <!-- Tires -->
                                    <circle cx="35" cy="55" r="12" fill="#111827"/>
                                    <circle cx="35" cy="55" r="6" fill="#374151"/>
                                    <circle cx="85" cy="55" r="12" fill="#111827"/>
                                    <circle cx="85" cy="55" r="6" fill="#374151"/>
                                    <!-- Wheel arches -->
                                    <path d="M20,55 A15,15 0 0,1 50,55" stroke="#1f2937" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
                                    <path d="M70,55 A15,15 0 0,1 100,55" stroke="#1f2937" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- GAME EXPERIENCES / MAP MODES -->
        <section id="experience" class="py-24 px-6 relative bg-night-900 border-t border-night-800/40">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16">
                    <span class="text-campfire-gold text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.25em] uppercase block mb-3">Our Relaxed Playlists</span>
                    <h2 class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-4xl text-slate-100">Journey Across Slow-Paced Worlds</h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-400 mt-4">Discover minimalist mini-games crafted purely to relieve tension and trigger relaxation.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                    
                    <!-- Mode Card 1 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group hover:border-campfire-gold/30 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="h-48 bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-950 to-night-900 relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                            <!-- Vector constellation art inside map -->
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="w-full h-full opacity-30 stroke-indigo-400 fill-none stroke-[0.5]">
                                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="3" fill="white"/>
                                <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="2" fill="white"/>
                                <circle cx="70" cy="40" r="2" fill="white"/>
                                <circle cx="40" cy="70" r="2.5" fill="white"/>
                                <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="30" y2="30"/>
                                <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="70" y2="40"/>
                                <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="40" y2="70"/>
                            </svg>
                            <span class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 bg-campfire-orange/10 border border-campfire-orange/30 px-3 py-1 rounded text-[10px] text-campfire-gold uppercase font-mono">Map Active</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-6">
                            <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-lg text-slate-100 mb-2">Celestia Connection</h3>
                            <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">
                                Connect bright geometric constellations under beautiful low-poly night skies to reveal cozy myths while listing to ambient acoustic guitar melodies.
                            </p>
                            <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Launching Celestia Connection...')" class="text-xs text-campfire-gold font-bold tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-campfire-orange transition-colors">Start Stargazing &rarr;</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Mode Card 2 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group hover:border-campfire-orange/30 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="h-48 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#121633] to-night-900 relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                            <!-- Vector mountain and lake layout -->
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="w-full h-full opacity-30 fill-none stroke-[0.5] stroke-teal-400">
                                <polygon points="10,80 50,30 90,80" />
                                <line x1="0" y1="80" x2="100" y2="80"/>
                                <path d="M 20,85 Q 40,81 60,85 T 100,85"/>
                            </svg>
                            <span class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 bg-teal-500/10 border border-teal-500/30 px-3 py-1 rounded text-[10px] text-teal-300 uppercase font-mono">Solo Relax</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-6">
                            <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-lg text-slate-100 mb-2">Silent Shorelines</h3>
                            <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">
                                Pilot a simple digital wooden canoe through mist-shrouded canals, gathering glowing lily pads that build ambient synthesizer sound loops around you.
                            </p>
                            <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Launching Silent Shorelines...')" class="text-xs text-campfire-gold font-bold tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-campfire-orange transition-colors">Sail Peacefully &rarr;</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Mode Card 3 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group hover:border-purple-500/30 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="h-48 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-950 to-night-900 relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                            <!-- Wind spirals vector -->
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="w-full h-full opacity-30 stroke-purple-400 fill-none stroke-1">
                                <path d="M 10,50 Q 30,30 50,50 T 90,50" />
                                <path d="M 20,60 Q 40,40 60,60 T 100,60" />
                            </svg>
                            <span class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30 px-3 py-1 rounded text-[10px] text-purple-300 uppercase font-mono">Co-Op Lobby</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-6">
                            <h3 class="font-space font-bold text-lg text-slate-100 mb-2">Campfire Chronology</h3>
                            <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4">
                                Sit around a shared fire, answering cozy writing prompts. Read inspiring stories written by travelers before you and leave your own notes in return.
                            </p>
                            <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Accessing Campfire Chronology...')" class="text-xs text-campfire-gold font-bold tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-campfire-orange transition-colors">Join Hearth Stories &rarr;</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- STATS / AMBIENT METRICS -->
        <section class="py-20 px-6 relative border-t border-night-800/40 bg-night-950">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                    
                    <div class="text-center p-6 border-r border-night-800 last:border-0">
                        <span class="block text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold font-space text-campfire-gold" id="campfire-stat-1">120K</span>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400 block mt-2">Active Travelers</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="text-center p-6 border-r border-night-800 last:border-0">
                        <span class="block text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold font-space text-campfire-orange" id="campfire-stat-2">4.9/5</span>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400 block mt-2">Relaxation Score</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="text-center p-6 border-r border-night-800 last:border-0">
                        <span class="block text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold font-space text-slate-100" id="campfire-stat-3">8,542</span>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400 block mt-2">Campsites Planted</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="text-center p-6 last:border-0">
                        <span class="block text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-extrabold font-space text-indigo-400 animate-pulse" id="campfire-stat-4">12M+</span>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400 block mt-2">Stars Discovered</span>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- TESTIMONIALS / GUESTBOOK -->
        <section class="py-24 px-6 relative border-t border-night-800/50 bg-night-900/40">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16">
                    <span class="text-campfire-orange text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.25em] uppercase block mb-3">Traveler Logbook</span>
                    <h2 class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-4xl text-slate-100">Letters from the Campsite</h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-400 mt-4">Read what travelers around the globe say about taking a pause in our low-poly sanctuary.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                    
                    <!-- Log 1 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/60 p-6 rounded-2xl relative">
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-1 text-campfire-gold mb-3">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed italic mb-4">
                            "This has completely replaced my evening doom-scrolling. I put on the synthesizer campfire noise, connect some stars, and feel completely present. A masterpiece of cozy design."
                        </p>
                        <div class="border-t border-night-700/50 pt-3 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-slate-400">
                            <span>Traveler @HearthWanderer</span>
                            <span>Tokyo, JP</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Log 2 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/60 p-6 rounded-2xl relative">
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-1 text-campfire-gold mb-3">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed italic mb-4">
                            "The low-poly aesthetic is beautiful. It makes my modern high-refresh monitor look like a cozy animated campfire painting. Highly recommended for busy software engineers."
                        </p>
                        <div class="border-t border-night-700/50 pt-3 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-slate-400">
                            <span>Traveler @PinePixel</span>
                            <span>San Francisco, US</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Log 3 -->
                    <div class="bg-night-800/20 border border-night-700/60 p-6 rounded-2xl relative">
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-1 text-campfire-gold mb-3">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed italic mb-4">
                            "Playing this asynchronous multiplayer with my kids has been marvelous. We trade small flowers and check our digital campsites before bed. Beautiful atmosphere!"
                        </p>
                        <div class="border-t border-night-700/50 pt-3 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-slate-400">
                            <span>Traveler @NordicCozy</span>
                            <span>Oslo, NO</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- CTA SECTION -->
        <section class="py-24 px-6 relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-night-900 to-night-950 border-t border-night-800/60">
            <!-- Warm orange radial light backdrop -->
            <div class="absolute bottom-0 right-1/4 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-campfire-orange/10 rounded-full blur-[100px] pointer-events-none"></div>

            <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center space-y-6">
                <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-campfire-gold/10 border border-campfire-gold/30 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-campfire-gold">
                    <i data-lucide="compass" class="w-4 h-4 text-campfire-gold"></i>
                    <span>YOUR EXPEDITION STARTS NOW</span>
                </div>
                
                <h2 class="font-space font-extrabold text-3xl sm:text-5xl text-slate-100 tracking-tight leading-tight max-w-2xl">
                    Ready to pitch your tent under the low-poly stars?
                </h2>
                
                <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm sm:text-base max-w-xl leading-relaxed">
                    Join the cozy community of thousands of calm explorers. Standard entry is free, asynchronous, and designed to relax your mind.
                </p>

                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row space-y-4 sm:space-y-0 sm:space-x-4 w-full justify-center max-w-md pt-4">
                    <a href="#portal" class="px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-campfire-orange to-campfire-gold text-night-950 font-space font-bold tracking-wider uppercase text-sm hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-glow-warm">
                        Get Campfire Access
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- FOOTER -->
        <footer class="border-t border-night-800 bg-night-950 py-12 px-6 relative z-10">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6">
                
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                    <div class="flex flex-col">
                        <span class="font-space font-extrabold text-xl tracking-widest text-slate-100 flex items-center">
                            T<span class="text-campfire-orange">R</span>A<span class="relative">V<span class="absolute -top-1 left-1 w-1 h-1 bg-campfire-gold rounded-full"></span></span>EL
                        </span>
                        <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400">A Relaxed Gaming Experience</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <p class="text-slate-500 text-xs">
                    &copy; 2026 TRAVEL Universe Inc. Hand-crafted with cozy low-poly gradients.
                </p>

                <!-- Social icon links -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                    <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Join our Discord! (Interactive demo alert)')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-night-800 border border-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-campfire-gold hover:border-campfire-gold transition-colors">
                        <i data-lucide="message-square" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                    <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Follow on Twitter! (Interactive demo alert)')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-night-800 border border-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-campfire-gold hover:border-campfire-gold transition-colors">
                        <i data-lucide="twitter" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                    <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="toastAlert('Watch gameplay on YouTube! (Interactive demo alert)')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-night-800 border border-night-700 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-campfire-gold hover:border-campfire-gold transition-colors">
                        <i data-lucide="youtube" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>

            </div>
        </footer>

    </div>

    <!-- Cozy Modern Toast Container -->
    <div id="toast-container" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 flex flex-col space-y-3 pointer-events-none"></div>

    <!-- APP CONTROLS & WEB AUDIO SYNTHESIZER JAVASCRIPT -->
    <script>
        // Init Lucide Icons
        lucide.createIcons();

        // 1. DYNAMIC STARRY SKY GENERATION
        const sky = document.getElementById('star-sky');
        const defaultStarCount = 120;
        let starInstances = [];

        function generateStars(count) {
            // Remove previous stars
            starInstances.forEach(star => star.remove());
            starInstances = [];

            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                const star = document.createElement('div');
                const size = Math.random() * 2 + 0.5; // size between 0.5px and 2.5px
                const x = Math.random() * 100;
                const y = Math.random() * 85; // keep them above the ground line mostly
                const opacity = Math.random() * 0.7 + 0.3;
                const duration = Math.random() * 4 + 2; // duration for fade animation

                star.style.position = 'absolute';
                star.style.width = `${size}px`;
                star.style.height = `${size}px`;
                star.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
                star.style.left = `${x}%`;
                star.style.top = `${y}%`;
                star.style.opacity = opacity;
                star.style.borderRadius = '50%';
                star.style.boxShadow = `0 0 ${size * 2}px #ffffff`;
                
                // Pure CSS inline fade keyframes
                star.style.transition = `opacity ${duration}s ease-in-out`;
                
                sky.appendChild(star);
                starInstances.push(star);
            }

            // Create starry twinkling effect loop
            setInterval(() => {
                starInstances.forEach(star => {
                    if (Math.random() > 0.7) {
                        star.style.opacity = Math.random() * 0.8 + 0.2;
                    }
                });
            }, 1000);
        }

        // Initialize stars
        generateStars(defaultStarCount);

        // Update star density slider action
        function updateStarDensity(val) {
            document.getElementById('star-count-label').innerText = `${val} Stars`;
            generateStars(val);
        }

        // 2. TIMBER FIREWOOD INTERACTIONS
        let timberLogsCount = 5;
        const liveFireRadialGlow = document.getElementById('live-fire-radial-glow');
        const globalFireGlow = document.getElementById('global-fire-glow');
        const fireOuter = document.getElementById('fire-outer');
        const fireMid = document.getElementById('fire-mid');
        const fireInner = document.getElementById('fire-inner');
        const campfireHeatStat = document.getElementById('campfire-heat-stat');

        function updateCampfireVisuals() {
            // Determine scale factor based on timber quantity (1 to 10 logs)
            const scaleFactor = 0.5 + (timberLogsCount * 0.15); // ranges roughly 0.65 to 2
            
            // Apply scale styles to flames
            fireOuter.style.transform = `scaleY(${scaleFactor})`;
            fireMid.style.transform = `scaleY(${scaleFactor * 0.95})`;
            fireInner.style.transform = `scaleY(${scaleFactor * 0.9})`;

            // Modify glowing backdrops
            const fireIntensityPercent = Math.min(timberLogsCount * 10, 100);
            document.getElementById('timber-bar').style.width = `${fireIntensityPercent}%`;
            document.getElementById('timber-count-label').innerText = `${timberLogsCount} Logs in Hearth`;

            // Adjust heat temperature stat
            const heatTemp = 40 + (timberLogsCount * 9);
            campfireHeatStat.innerText = `${heatTemp}°C`;

            // Update radial backdrops
            liveFireRadialGlow.style.opacity = `${0.2 + (timberLogsCount * 0.08)}`;
            globalFireGlow.style.opacity = `${0.3 + (timberLogsCount * 0.06)}`;
            
            if (timberLogsCount <= 0) {
                campfireHeatStat.innerText = `0°C (Cold)`;
                liveFireRadialGlow.style.opacity = '0';
                globalFireGlow.style.opacity = '0';
                toastAlert('The campfire has burned out. Toss some timber to relight!');
            }
        }

        function addTimber() {
            if (timberLogsCount >= 10) {
                toastAlert('The hearth is fully packed! Enjoy the roaring warmth.');
                return;
            }
            timberLogsCount++;
            updateCampfireVisuals();
            toastAlert('🪵 Added fresh pine timber firewood to the hearth.');
            
            // Pitch up campfire sound crackle momentarily if playing
            if (isSoundPlaying && synthGainNode) {
                playCrackleBurst();
            }
        }

        function douseFire() {
            timberLogsCount = 0;
            updateCampfireVisuals();
            toastAlert('💧 Doused campfire with spring water.');
        }

        // Breeze intensity action
        function setBreeze(type) {
            const windLabel = document.getElementById('wind-strength-label');
            const windStat = document.getElementById('ambient-wind-stat');
            
            // Reset button states
            const buttons = event.currentTarget.parentElement.children;
            for (let btn of buttons) {
                btn.className = "flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded bg-night-950 hover:bg-night-900 border border-night-700 text-xs hover:border-campfire-gold transition-all text-slate-400";
            }

            event.currentTarget.className = "flex-1 py-1 px-2 rounded bg-campfire-orange/20 border border-campfire-orange/40 text-xs text-campfire-gold";

            if (type === 'calm') {
                windLabel.innerText = "Calm";
                windStat.innerText = "1 m/s";
                if (isSoundPlaying) adjustWindVolume(0.1);
            } else if (type === 'gentle') {
                windLabel.innerText = "Gentle";
                windStat.innerText = "4 m/s";
                if (isSoundPlaying) adjustWindVolume(0.3);
            } else if (type === 'gusty') {
                windLabel.innerText = "Gusty Wind";
                windStat.innerText = "12 m/s";
                if (isSoundPlaying) adjustWindVolume(0.7);
            }
            toastAlert(`🍃 Wind atmosphere changed to: ${type}`);
        }

        // 3. TOAST MESSAGES EMITTER
        function toastAlert(message) {
            const container = document.getElementById('toast-container');
            const toast = document.createElement('div');
            
            toast.className = "pointer-events-auto flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-3 bg-night-800 border border-night-600 text-slate-100 text-xs font-medium rounded-xl shadow-glow-purple transform translate-y-10 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 max-w-sm";
            toast.innerHTML = `
                <div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-campfire-orange animate-ping"></div>
                <span>${message}</span>
            `;

            container.appendChild(toast);

            // Animate In
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.remove('translate-y-10', 'opacity-0');
            }, 50);

            // Animate Out & Remove
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.add('translate-y-[-10px]', 'opacity-0');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    toast.remove();
                }, 300);
            }, 4000);
        }

        // Form handler simulation
        function handleFormSubmit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const username = document.getElementById('username').value;
            toastAlert(`🎉 Perfect, ${username}! Your campsite slot is now registered.`);
            document.getElementById('username').value = '';
            document.getElementById('password').value = '';
        }

        // 4. ADVANCED AUDIO SYNTHESIZER (WEB AUDIO API)
        // Creating fully synthesized procedurally generated relaxing soundscapes directly in-browser.
        let audioCtx = null;
        let isSoundPlaying = false;
        let windNoiseNode = null;
        let windGainNode = null;
        let synthGainNode = null;

        function toggleAmbientSound() {
            if (!audioCtx) {
                // Initialize context on user gesture
                audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
            }

            if (isSoundPlaying) {
                // Stop Synth
                audioCtx.suspend().then(() => {
                    isSoundPlaying = false;
                    document.getElementById('synth-btn-text').innerText = "Play Campfire Sounds";
                    document.getElementById('sound-indicator').className = "relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-slate-500";
                    toastAlert('🔇 Muted forest camping sounds.');
                });
            } else {
                // Start / Resume Synth
                if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
                    audioCtx.resume();
                } else {
                    setupForestCampfireSynthesizer();
                }
                isSoundPlaying = true;
                document.getElementById('synth-btn-text').innerText = "Mute Ambient Sounds";
                document.getElementById('sound-indicator').className = "relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-campfire-gold animate-pulse";
                toastAlert('🔊 Immersive cozy synth campfire atmosphere started!');
            }
        }

        function setupForestCampfireSynthesizer() {
            // (A) GENERATE NIGHT WIND SOUNDSCAPE
            // Creating white/pink noise for gentle background forest rustle
            const bufferSize = 2 * audioCtx.sampleRate;
            const noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
            const output = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
            
            for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
                output[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
            }

            windNoiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
            windNoiseNode.buffer = noiseBuffer;
            windNoiseNode.loop = true;

            // Wind filtering to make it sound full and deep
            const windFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
            windFilter.type = 'lowpass';
            windFilter.frequency.setValueAtTime(320, audioCtx.currentTime);
            windFilter.Q.setValueAtTime(3.0, audioCtx.currentTime);

            // Modulating wind frequency slightly over time to simulate rustling breezes
            const windLFO = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            windLFO.frequency.setValueAtTime(0.08, audioCtx.currentTime); // very slow cycle
            const windLFOGain = audioCtx.createGain();
            windLFOGain.gain.setValueAtTime(120, audioCtx.currentTime); // intensity range

            windLFO.connect(windLFOGain);
            windLFOGain.connect(windFilter.frequency);
            windLFO.start();

            windGainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
            windGainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.25, audioCtx.currentTime); // moderate wind volume

            windNoiseNode.connect(windFilter);
            windFilter.connect(windGainNode);
            windGainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
            windNoiseNode.start();

            // (B) GENERATE COZY CAMPFIRE CRACKLES
            // Procedurally trigger clicks, pops, and low fire rumbles
            synthGainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
            synthGainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, audioCtx.currentTime);
            synthGainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);

            // Trigger random crackle loop
            triggerCrackleLoop();
        }

        function triggerCrackleLoop() {
            if (!isSoundPlaying) return;

            // Generate instant randomized clicking crackle burst
            playCrackleBurst();

            // Set next randomized trigger delay
            const nextTriggerTime = Math.random() * 250 + 80; // trigger every 80ms - 330ms
            setTimeout(triggerCrackleLoop, nextTriggerTime);
        }

        function playCrackleBurst() {
            if (!audioCtx || audioCtx.state === 'suspended') return;

            // Generate high-frequency snapping click pop node
            const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            const gain = audioCtx.createGain();

            osc.type = 'sine';
            osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(1000 + Math.random() * 3000, audioCtx.currentTime); // snapping pitch range

            // Rapid click envelope
            gain.gain.setValueAtTime(Math.random() * 0.12, audioCtx.currentTime);
            gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.015); // extremely fast decay

            // Snap bandpass filter
            const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
            filter.type = 'bandpass';
            filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(2500, audioCtx.currentTime);

            osc.connect(filter);
            filter.connect(gain);
            gain.connect(synthGainNode);

            osc.start();
            osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.02);

            // Occasionally add a deep bass pop rumble
            if (Math.random() > 0.8) {
                const rumbleOsc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
                const rumbleGain = audioCtx.createGain();

                rumbleOsc.type = 'triangle';
                rumbleOsc.frequency.setValueAtTime(65 + Math.random() * 40, audioCtx.currentTime);

                rumbleGain.gain.setValueAtTime(Math.random() * 0.4, audioCtx.currentTime);
                rumbleGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);

                rumbleOsc.connect(rumbleGain);
                rumbleGain.connect(synthGainNode);

                rumbleOsc.start();
                rumbleOsc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.12);
            }
        }

        function adjustWindVolume(level) {
            if (windGainNode && audioCtx) {
                windGainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(level, audioCtx.currentTime + 1.0); // smooth volume ramp
            }
        }

        // Initialize Campsite Stat Counters ticking dynamically to feel live
        setInterval(() => {
            const campers = document.getElementById('active-campers-stat');
            const randomDelta = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) - 2;
            const currentVal = parseInt(campers.innerText.replace(/,/g, ''));
            const newVal = currentVal + randomDelta;
            campers.innerText = newVal.toLocaleString();
        }, 5000);

    </script>
</body>
</html>
6
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  Palette, 
  Wind, 
  Sun, 
  Moon, 
  Sparkles, 
  Compass, 
  BookOpen, 
  Maximize2, 
  Volume2, 
  VolumeX, 
  ExternalLink, 
  Check, 
  ChevronRight,
  ArrowRight,
  Mail,
  Heart,
  Music
} from 'lucide-react';

// Masterpieces Data (Imbued with Monet's real themes + the mystical Unicorn/Dragon elements of the inspiration deck)
const masterpieces = [
  {
    id: "water-lilies",
    title: "Nymphéas (Water Lilies)",
    period: "1916 - 1926",
    atmosphere: "Serene & Mystical",
    description: "An exploration of water, air, and light. The reflection of clouds and weeping willows on the shimmering surface of the Giverny pond merges reality with abstraction.",
    palette: ["#1B3B48", "#2E5059", "#6B8E83", "#9BB3A8", "#D9CBB6"],
    paletteNames: ["Deep Abyss", "Lilypad Teal", "Willow Sage", "Mist Green", "French Alabaster"],
    dominantHex: "#2E5059",
    category: "Unicorn Sightings",
    number: "01",
    imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783900882-c0d3dad7b119?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", // placeholder artistic feel
    brushstyle: "Broad, horizontal dabs, layered glazes, rich impasto textures."
  },
  {
    id: "japanese-bridge",
    title: "The Water-Lily Pond",
    period: "1899",
    atmosphere: "Verdant & Enchanting",
    description: "The famous green wooden bridge arched over the lilies. Sunlight filters through weeping willows, throwing golden dabs of light onto the emerald water.",
    palette: ["#1F3325", "#3A5C43", "#608A63", "#D2BC82", "#ECE2C6"],
    paletteNames: ["Giverny Shadow", "Emerald Moss", "Olive Ray", "Sunlit Ochre", "Warm Alabaster"],
    dominantHex: "#3A5C43",
    category: "Dragon Taming",
    number: "02",
    imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580136579312-94651dfd596d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
    brushstyle: "Short, quick vertical strokes, thick dabs on foliage."
  },
  {
    id: "venice-twilight",
    title: "San Giorgio Maggiore at Dusk",
    period: "1908",
    atmosphere: "Poetic & Radiant",
    description: "Venetian islands dissolving in a brilliant, fiery haze of orange, pink, and violet. The water catches the blazing sky in liquid gold reflections.",
    palette: ["#241D3B", "#49306B", "#E57C5B", "#F6B352", "#192E46"],
    paletteNames: ["Venetian Dusk", "Royal Purple", "Coral Sol", "Gilded Wave", "Canal Teal"],
    dominantHex: "#E57C5B",
    category: "Wonders",
    number: "03",
    imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783928621-7a13d66a62d1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
    brushstyle: "Vibrant horizontal sweeps, intense wet-on-wet blending."
  },
  {
    id: "rouen-cathedral",
    title: "Rouen Cathedral, Portal in Sun",
    period: "1894",
    atmosphere: "Ethereal & Textured",
    description: "The massive stone facade transformed into a symphony of light and shadow, glowing gold and delicate lilac under the intense afternoon sun.",
    palette: ["#3D3A50", "#76799C", "#C8B195", "#EAD8C1", "#5C5963"],
    paletteNames: ["Cathedral Shadow", "Cobalt Mist", "Gothic Ochre", "Summer Flare", "Weathered Stone"],
    dominantHex: "#C8B195",
    category: "Magic Spells",
    number: "04",
    imageUrl: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1547891654-e66ed7edd96c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80",
    brushstyle: "Encrusted impasto, dry-brushing to mimic ancient stone grain."
  }
];

// Interactive Journal/Secrets Section matching the 3-step right column of the inspiration sheet
const secretGuides = [
  {
    num: "1",
    title: "Discover the secrets",
    desc: "Explore the dark, vibrant forest and uncover the hidden, mystical wildlife that lies within Claude Monet's impressionist shadows."
  },
  {
    num: "2",
    title: "Find your own path",
    desc: "Choose your own paths through the lilies, and discover where they take you as the light shifts from dawn to golden twilight."
  },
  {
    num: "3",
    title: "Meet the creatures",
    desc: "Encounter the mystical beasts that call the canvas forest home—from floating unicorns to ancient, wind-sleeping dragons."
  }
];

export default function App() {
  const [selectedArt, setSelectedArt] = useState(masterpieces[0]);
  const [activeMood, setActiveMood] = useState('giverny'); // 'giverny' (teal/green), 'venice' (warm sunset), 'mist' (ethereal purple/blue)
  const [isMuted, setIsMuted] = useState(true);
  const [copiedColor, setCopiedColor] = useState(null);
  const [customPrompt, setCustomPrompt] = useState("");
  const [generatedArtwork, setGeneratedArtwork] = useState(null);
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [showNotification, setShowNotification] = useState("");

  // Simulated ambient sound loop (Nature/Water/Soft strings)
  const [audio] = useState(() => {
    const aud = new Audio("https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/123/123-200.wav"); // soft chime/sound
    aud.loop = true;
    return aud;
  });

  const toggleAudio = () => {
    setIsMuted(!isMuted);
    triggerToast("Atmospheric music toggled");
  };

  const triggerToast = (msg) => {
    setShowNotification(msg);
    setTimeout(() => setShowNotification(""), 3000);
  };

  const copyColorToClipboard = (hex) => {
    // Standard execution fallback safe for iframe environments
    const textarea = document.createElement("textarea");
    textarea.value = hex;
    document.body.appendChild(textarea);
    textarea.select();
    try {
      document.execCommand("copy");
      setCopiedColor(hex);
      triggerToast(`Copied color ${hex} to clipboard!`);
      setTimeout(() => setCopiedColor(null), 2000);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Failed to copy color", err);
    }
    document.body.removeChild(textarea);
  };

  // Simulated AI Brush Stroke Engine
  const handleGenerateArt = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!customPrompt.trim()) return;

    setIsGenerating(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      // Pick dynamic color meshes depending on the words written
      const keyword = customPrompt.toLowerCase();
      let generatedPalette = ["#1b3127", "#325c48", "#88ab75", "#ded1b3"];
      let title = "Impression: Dream of " + customPrompt;
      
      if (keyword.includes("sun") || keyword.includes("fire") || keyword.includes("red")) {
        generatedPalette = ["#2d141e", "#6b1d2f", "#d95c46", "#fce181"];
      } else if (keyword.includes("water") || keyword.includes("blue") || keyword.includes("rain")) {
        generatedPalette = ["#0c1a2d", "#1f3a5e", "#5688b5", "#cbddec"];
      } else if (keyword.includes("purple") || keyword.includes("dream") || keyword.includes("spirit")) {
        generatedPalette = ["#1f142d", "#3c215e", "#8c56b5", "#e7cbfa"];
      }

      setGeneratedArtwork({
        title: title,
        prompt: customPrompt,
        palette: generatedPalette,
        id: "custom-" + Date.now()
      });
      setIsGenerating(false);
      triggerToast("Your Impressionist Palette has been synthesized.");
    }, 1500);
  };

  // Dynamics of Mood Themes (Directly modifying background gradient meshes)
  const moodStyles = {
    giverny: {
      bgGrad: "from-[#0e171f] via-[#12222b] to-[#071015]",
      accentGlow: "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.12)",
      borderColor: "border-[#627a6c]/20",
      accentText: "text-[#83a992]",
      buttonBg: "bg-[#213f30] hover:bg-[#2b533f]"
    },
    venice: {
      bgGrad: "from-[#1c1219] via-[#2d1b24] to-[#0f0b12]",
      accentGlow: "rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12)",
      borderColor: "border-[#966b59]/20",
      accentText: "text-[#d68565]",
      buttonBg: "bg-[#452726] hover:bg-[#593331]"
    },
    mist: {
      bgGrad: "from-[#101424] via-[#1b213a] to-[#0a0d17]",
      accentGlow: "rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.12)",
      borderColor: "border-[#7780b0]/20",
      accentText: "text-[#939fc9]",
      buttonBg: "bg-[#2c2d4d] hover:bg-[#393b63]"
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className={`min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b ${moodStyles[activeMood].bgGrad} text-[#fcfaf2] font-sans transition-all duration-1000 selection:bg-[#c39b62] selection:text-black relative overflow-hidden`}>
      
      {/* Decorative Canvas Background Texture / Light Spots */}
      <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.06] mix-blend-overlay bg-[radial-gradient(#fff_1px,transparent_1px)] [background-size:16px_16px]"></div>
      <div className="absolute top-1/4 left-1/3 w-[50vw] h-[50vw] rounded-full blur-[120px] pointer-events-none transition-all duration-1000" style={{ background: moodStyles[activeMood].accentGlow }}></div>
      <div className="absolute bottom-1/4 right-1/4 w-[40vw] h-[40vw] rounded-full blur-[150px] pointer-events-none transition-all duration-1000" style={{ background: "rgba(252, 250, 242, 0.03)" }}></div>

      {/* Persistent Toast Notification */}
      {showNotification && (
        <div className="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#16212b] border border-[#d2bc82]/30 text-[#fcfaf2] px-5 py-3 rounded-md shadow-2xl flex items-center space-x-3 animate-fade-in-up">
          <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-[#d2bc82] animate-pulse" />
          <span className="text-sm tracking-wide font-medium">{showNotification}</span>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* --- HEADER --- */}
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 bg-[#0e171f]/60 transition-all duration-300">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-3">
            <span className="font-serif text-2xl tracking-widest text-[#fcfaf2]">CLAUDE MONET</span>
            <span className="h-4 w-[1px] bg-white/20 hidden sm:inline-block"></span>
            <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white/40 hidden sm:inline-block">Digital Atelier v2.5</span>
          </div>

          <nav className="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-light text-white/70">
            <a href="#gallery" className="hover:text-[#fcfaf2] transition-colors">The Masterpieces</a>
            <a href="#secrets" className="hover:text-[#fcfaf2] transition-colors">Impressionist Secrets</a>
            <a href="#palette-tool" className="hover:text-[#fcfaf2] transition-colors">Palette Generator</a>
            <a href="#about" className="hover:text-[#fcfaf2] transition-colors">The Garden</a>
          </nav>

          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            {/* Audio Toggle button */}
            <button 
              onClick={toggleAudio} 
              className="p-2.5 rounded-full border border-white/10 text-white/60 hover:text-[#fcfaf2] hover:border-white/20 transition-all"
              title={isMuted ? "Unmute Ambient Chimes" : "Mute Sound"}
            >
              {isMuted ? <VolumeX className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Volume2 className="w-4 h-4 text-[#d2bc82] animate-bounce" />}
            </button>

            {/* Premium CTA Button */}
            <a 
              href="#palette-tool" 
              className="hidden sm:inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-[#fcfaf2] hover:bg-[#ebd9b4] text-[#0d141b] px-5 py-2.5 rounded-sm font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all shadow-md transform hover:-translate-y-0.5"
            >
              <span>Explore Colors</span>
              <ArrowRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* --- ATMOSPHERE CONTROLLER BAR --- */}
      <div className="w-full bg-[#131d27]/40 border-b border-white/5 py-3">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
            <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40">Canvas Lighting Mood:</span>
            <span className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-[#d2bc82]">{activeMood} light</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex space-x-2">
            <button 
              onClick={() => { setActiveMood('giverny'); triggerToast("Mood altered: Giverny Noon (Soft Greens & Teals)"); }}
              className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded text-xs tracking-widest uppercase transition-all flex items-center space-x-1.5 border ${activeMood === 'giverny' ? 'bg-[#213f30] text-[#fcfaf2] border-green-500/30' : 'bg-transparent text-white/50 border-white/10 hover:border-white/30'}`}
            >
              <Wind className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span>Giverny Noon</span>
            </button>
            <button 
              onClick={() => { setActiveMood('venice'); triggerToast("Mood altered: Venice Sunset (Vibrant Ochres & Purples)"); }}
              className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded text-xs tracking-widest uppercase transition-all flex items-center space-x-1.5 border ${activeMood === 'venice' ? 'bg-[#452726] text-[#fcfaf2] border-orange-500/30' : 'bg-transparent text-white/50 border-white/10 hover:border-white/30'}`}
            >
              <Sun className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span>Venice Sunset</span>
            </button>
            <button 
              onClick={() => { setActiveMood('mist'); triggerToast("Mood altered: Mystic Fog (Ethereal Violet & Cobalts)"); }}
              className={`px-4 py-1.5 rounded text-xs tracking-widest uppercase transition-all flex items-center space-x-1.5 border ${activeMood === 'mist' ? 'bg-[#2c2d4d] text-[#fcfaf2] border-purple-500/30' : 'bg-transparent text-white/50 border-white/10 hover:border-white/30'}`}
            >
              <Moon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span>Mystic Fog</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* --- HERO SECTION: Monet Masterpiece Showcase --- */}
      <section className="relative pt-12 pb-24 px-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
          
          {/* Hero Left Column: Deep atmospheric typography and descriptions */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8 z-10">
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <span className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-[#d2bc82] block">
                Free presentation template by eatemp inspired
              </span>
              <h1 className="font-serif text-5xl md:text-7xl leading-tight text-[#fcfaf2] tracking-tight">
                Claude Monet
              </h1>
              <p className="text-lg text-white/70 font-light leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
                Immerse yourself in a landscape woven from rays of sun, dissolving mists, and fleeting light dabs. Experience the timeless vision of nature recreated in the digital world.
              </p>
            </div>

            {/* Interactive Stats / Artistic Focus block */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 border-t border-b border-white/10 py-6">
              <div>
                <span className="block text-3xl font-serif text-[#d2bc82]">1840-1926</span>
                <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40">Lifespan & Era</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span className="block text-3xl font-serif text-[#d2bc82]">2,000+</span>
                <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40">Masterpieces Painted</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Quick-select carousel list */}
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/50 block font-semibold">
                Explore the canvas realms:
              </span>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {masterpieces.map((art) => (
                  <button
                    key={art.id}
                    onClick={() => {
                      setSelectedArt(art);
                      triggerToast(`Viewing Masterpiece: ${art.title}`);
                    }}
                    className={`px-4 py-2 rounded text-xs tracking-wider uppercase transition-all border ${
                      selectedArt.id === art.id 
                        ? 'bg-[#fcfaf2] text-[#0d141b] border-white font-bold' 
                        : 'bg-white/5 text-white/70 border-white/5 hover:bg-white/10'
                    }`}
                  >
                    {art.title.split(' ')[0]}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Hero Right Column: High-fidelity painterly showcase card reminiscent of the presentation title slide */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-7">
            <div className="relative group rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-white/10 bg-[#16222b] shadow-2xl p-4 sm:p-6 transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-[1.01]">
              
              {/* Image Container with high quality painterly image representation */}
              <div className="relative h-[320px] sm:h-[450px] w-full rounded overflow-hidden">
                <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0d141b] via-transparent to-transparent z-10"></div>
                
                {/* Simulated Impressionist Canvas Backdrop using advanced pure CSS color waves */}
                <div className="absolute inset-0 z-0 overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-cover bg-center mix-blend-color-burn opacity-40 transition-all duration-700" style={{ backgroundImage: `url(${selectedArt.imageUrl})` }}></div>
                  
                  {/* Fluid CSS painting effect matching selected masterpiece theme */}
                  <div 
                    className="absolute inset-0 filter blur-3xl opacity-60 animate-pulse transition-all duration-1000"
                    style={{
                      background: `radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, ${selectedArt.palette[0]} 0%, transparent 50%),
                                   radial-gradient(circle at 70% 60%, ${selectedArt.palette[1]} 0%, transparent 60%),
                                   radial-gradient(circle at 50% 90%, ${selectedArt.palette[2]} 0%, transparent 50%)`
                    }}
                  />
                  
                  {/* Artistic framing element */}
                  <div className="absolute inset-4 border border-white/10 pointer-events-none z-20"></div>
                  <div className="absolute inset-5 border border-white/5 pointer-events-none z-20"></div>
                </div>

                {/* Overlaid Title Plate */}
                <div className="absolute bottom-6 left-6 right-6 z-20 space-y-1">
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2 text-xs text-[#d2bc82] uppercase tracking-[0.25em]">
                    <span>{selectedArt.category}</span>
                    <span>•</span>
                    <span>{selectedArt.period}</span>
                  </div>
                  <h2 className="font-serif text-3xl sm:text-4xl text-[#fcfaf2] tracking-wide">
                    {selectedArt.title}
                  </h2>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Masterpiece Meta Information Box */}
              <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-white/10 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6 text-sm">
                <div>
                  <span className="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-1">Atmospheric Mood</span>
                  <p className="text-white/80 font-light italic">{selectedArt.description}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div>
                    <span className="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-1">Brush Technique</span>
                    <p className="text-[#d2bc82] font-serif text-sm">{selectedArt.brushstyle}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div>
