                {timelineIndex === 1 && "Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte declared the Manufacture de Jouy as a royal purveyor of fine textiles, dressing his palaces in monochrome crimson and cobalt blue silk coverings, establishing toile as the ultimate elite decor standard."}
                {timelineIndex === 2 && "As global trade flourished, artists in Lyon merged classical French pastoral narratives with Japanese botanical screens. Fine branches, pagodas, and weeping willows became permanently embedded in the core Toile DNA."}
                {timelineIndex === 3 && "Today, Maison de Jouy revives these historical blueprints. We use high-precision non-toxic water-soluble natural inks on organic flax and linen. This ensures zero chemical runoff while offering designers customized scales for any project."}
              </p>

              <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 pt-2">
                <span className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${activeTheme.primaryBg}`} />
                <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-500 font-sans font-bold">
                  {timelineIndex === 0 && "Foundry Era"}
                  {timelineIndex === 1 && "Imperial Patronage"}
                  {timelineIndex === 2 && "The Silk Alliance"}
                  {timelineIndex === 3 && "Zero Emission Future"}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>
      </section>

      {/* --- PREMIUM NEWSLETTER & INTERACTIVE INQUIRY BANNER --- */}
      <section className={`py-16 px-6 lg:px-16 ${activeTheme.primaryBg} text-white text-center relative overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-1000`}>
        
        {/* Decorative elements */}
        <div className="absolute top-1/2 -left-16 w-48 h-48 opacity-[0.08] pointer-events-none -translate-y-1/2">
          <RoseAccent className="w-full h-full" color="#FFFFFF" />
        </div>
        <div className="absolute top-1/2 -right-16 w-48 h-48 opacity-[0.08] pointer-events-none -translate-y-1/2">
          <LandscapeMotif className="w-full h-full" color="#FFFFFF" lightColor="#FFFFFF" />
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto space-y-6 relative z-10">
          <RoseAccent className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto" color="#FFFFFF" />
          <h2 className="text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight" style={{ fontFamily: 'Cinzel, serif' }}>
            Join the Archival Circle
          </h2>
          <p className="text-stone-200 text-xs sm:text-sm font-serif italic max-w-md mx-auto">
            "Receive quarterly dossiers detailing new tapestry excavations, color customisation systems, and limited-edition silk releases."
          </p>

          <form onSubmit={handleNewsletterSubmit} className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 pt-4">
            <input 
              type="email" 
              placeholder="Enter your professional email address" 
              required
              value={newsletterEmail}
              onChange={(e) => setNewsletterEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="flex-grow px-5 py-3.5 rounded-none bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white placeholder-white/60 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/40 text-xs font-sans"
            />
            <button 
              type="submit"
              className="px-6 py-3.5 bg-white text-stone-900 font-sans font-bold text-xs tracking-wider uppercase hover:bg-stone-100 transition-all duration-300"
            >
              Subscribe
            </button>
          </form>

          {newsletterSuccess && (
            <p className="text-xs text-stone-100 font-sans tracking-wide bg-white/10 p-2.5 border border-white/20">
              ✓ Successfully subscribed! Your welcome dossier is en route to your inbox.
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* --- FOOTER --- */}
      <footer className="bg-stone-950 text-stone-400 py-16 px-6 lg:px-16 border-t border-stone-800">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12">
          
          {/* Brand Col */}
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <RoseAccent className="w-8 h-8" color="#FAF7F0" />
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold tracking-widest text-white font-serif" style={{ fontFamily: 'Cinzel, serif' }}>
                MAISON DE JOUY
              </h3>
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 leading-relaxed font-sans">
              Ateliers of classical engraving, hand-printed murals, and matched textiles preserving the heritage of Versailles' finest decoration.
            </p>
            <p className="text-[10px] text-stone-600 font-mono">
              © 2026 MAISON DE JOUY S.A. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* Quick Links Col */}
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <h4 className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white font-sans font-bold">THE ARCHIVES</h4>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-xs font-sans text-stone-400">
              <li><a href="#presentation-deck" className="hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200">Catalog Presentation</a></li>
              <li><a href="#fabric-lab" className="hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200">Textile Swatches</a></li>
              <li><a href="#fabric-lab" className="hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200">Organic Dye Criteria</a></li>
              <li><a href="#presentation-deck" className="hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200">Copper-plate Specifications</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          {/* Atelier Addresses */}
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <h4 className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white font-sans font-bold">ATELIER CONTACT</h4>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-xs font-sans text-stone-400">
              <li>Paris: 42 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré</li>
              <li>Kyoto: Higashiyama District, Studio B</li>
              <li>Direct: contact@maisondejouy.atelier</li>
              <li>Tel: +33 (0) 1 42 68 53 00</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          {/* Premium Guarantee Disclaimer */}
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <h4 className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white font-sans font-bold">THE GUARANTEE</h4>
            <p className="text-xs text-stone-500 leading-relaxed font-serif italic">
              "We guarantee that every motif is printed using hand-carved copper rollers or silk screens, utilizing 100% natural water-soluble pigments extracted from organic weld and indigo crop."
            </p>
          </div>

        </div>
      </footer>

      {/* --- BESPOKE INQUIRY & SWATCH REQUEST MODAL (Captures premium feel, avoids standard ugly alerts) --- */}
      {showInquiryModal && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-stone-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-[#FAF7F0] border-2 border-stone-800 rounded-xl p-6 sm:p-8 max-w-lg w-full relative space-y-6 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-fade-in">
            
            {/* Modal Corner Marks */}
            <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 w-3 h-3 border-t-2 border-l-2 border-stone-800" />
            <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-3 h-3 border-t-2 border-r-2 border-stone-800" />
            <div className="absolute bottom-2 left-2 w-3 h-3 border-b-2 border-l-2 border-stone-800" />
            <div className="absolute bottom-2 right-2 w-3 h-3 border-b-2 border-r-2 border-stone-800" />

            <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
              <div>
                <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-400 font-sans font-bold block mb-1">BESPOKE SERVICES</span>
                <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 font-serif" style={{ fontFamily: 'Cinzel, serif' }}>
                  Atelier Consultation
                </h3>
              </div>
              <button 
                onClick={() => {
                  setShowInquiryModal(false);
                  setFormSubmitted(false);
                }}
                className="text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-800 font-bold font-sans text-xl"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            </div>

            {formSubmitted ? (
              <div className="text-center py-8 space-y-4">
                <RoseAccent className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto animate-bounce" color={activeTheme.svgFill} />
                <h4 className={`text-xl font-bold ${activeTheme.primary}`} style={{ fontFamily: 'Cinzel, serif' }}>
                  Swatches Reserved
                </h4>
                <p className="text-xs text-stone-600 font-serif max-w-sm mx-auto">
                  Your bespoke sample dossier is logged in our registers. A dedicated design curator will contact you within 24 hours to confirm shipping.
                </p>
                <div className="text-[10px] text-stone-400 font-sans">Closing window...</div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <form onSubmit={handleFormSubmit} className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500 font-sans mb-1 font-semibold">Your Full Name</label>
                  <input 
                    type="text" 
                    required
                    value={inquiryName}
                    onChange={(e) => setInquiryName(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="e.g. Countess Beatrice de Valois" 
                    className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded bg-white border border-stone-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-stone-600 text-xs font-serif"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500 font-sans mb-1 font-semibold">Professional Email</label>
                  <input 
                    type="email" 
                    required
                    value={inquiryEmail}
                    onChange={(e) => setInquiryEmail(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="e.g. beatrice@valois-interieur.com" 
                    className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded bg-white border border-stone-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-stone-600 text-xs font-serif"
                  />
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500 font-sans mb-1 font-semibold">Consultation Subject</label>
                  <select 
                    value={inquiryType}
                    onChange={(e) => setInquiryType(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded bg-white border border-stone-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-stone-600 text-xs font-sans"
                  >
                    <option>Bespoke Hand-painted Wallcoverings</option>
                    <option>Custom Hand-Painted Porcelain Set</option>
                    <option>Matched Draperies & Fine Silk Upholstery</option>
                    <option>Swatches: Delft Blue Premium Silk</option>
                    <option>Swatches: Sanguine Rose Heavy Linen</option>
                    <option>Swatches: Verdant Sage Classic Velvet</option>
                    <option>Swatches: Charcoal Ink Organic Cotton</option>
                  </select>
                </div>

                <div>
                  <label className="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500 font-sans mb-1 font-semibold">Project Notes / Dimensions (Optional)</label>
                  <textarea 
                    rows="3"
                    value={inquiryMessage}
                    onChange={(e) => setInquiryMessage(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Describe your chamber dimensions, ceiling heights, or preferred historic plate repeat references."
                    className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 rounded bg-white border border-stone-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-stone-600 text-xs font-serif"
                  />
                </div>

                <div className="pt-2">
                  <button 
                    type="submit"
                    className={`w-full py-3.5 text-center text-xs tracking-widest font-sans font-bold uppercase transition-all duration-300 text-white ${activeTheme.primaryBg} ${activeTheme.primaryBgHover}`}
                  >
                    Submit Register Request
                  </button>
                </div>
              </form>
            )}

            <div className="text-center pt-2">
              <span className="text-[9px] text-stone-400 font-sans uppercase tracking-widest block">
                NO FEES APPLY FOR REGISTERED SWATCH PACKAGES
              </span>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      )}

    </div>
  );
}
8
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Howl's Moving Castle — Premium Editorial Showcase</title>
  
  <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  
  <!-- Google Fonts for Editorial & Classic Typography -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@400;700;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  
  <!-- Font Awesome for UI Icons -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            indigoBrand: {
              50: '#f0f4fa',
              100: '#dbe5f5',
              200: '#bdcfe9',
              300: '#8da9c4', // Beautiful periwinkle-blue from the design
              400: '#5c7fa8',
              500: '#3e5f8a',
              600: '#2e496d', // Rich signature blue
              700: '#233753',
              800: '#1a273b', // Deep background dark blue
              900: '#0f1724', // Ultra deep space blue
            },
            parchment: {
              DEFAULT: '#fbfbf9',
              dark: '#f3f1eb',
            }
          },
          fontFamily: {
            serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'],
            display: ['Cinzel Decorative', 'serif'],
            sans: ['Plus Jakarta Sans', 'sans-serif'],
          },
          boxShadow: {
            'book': '0 20px 40px -15px rgba(15, 23, 36, 0.4)',
            'page': '5px 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)',
            'glow-blue': '0 0 25px rgba(141, 169, 196, 0.35)',
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    /* Premium Smooth Scroll & Custom Scrollbar */
    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
      width: 8px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
      background: #0f1724;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: #3e5f8a;
      border-radius: 4px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
      background: #8da9c4;
    }

    /* Wave Background Overlays & Decorative Arches */
    .wave-bg {
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 100% 150%, transparent 24%, #2e496d 24%, #2e496d 28%, transparent 28%, transparent);
      background-size: 40px 40px;
    }

    /* Custom Organic Arches and Wave Dividers inspired by the book margins */
    .arch-mask {
      clip-path: ellipse(100% 100% at 50% 100%);
    }
    
    .wave-cut {
      clip-path: path('M0,32L120,42.7C240,53,480,75,720,74.7C960,75,1200,53,1320,42.7L1440,32L1440,320L1320,320C1200,320,960,320,720,320C480,320,240,320,120,320L0,320Z');
    }

    /* Soft Animated Glow mimicking magical starlight */
    @keyframes pulseGlow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(1); }
      50% { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1.08); }
    }
    .magical-glow {
      animation: pulseGlow 8s infinite ease-in-out;
    }

    /* Tactile Book Fold effect */
    .book-spine {
      background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 100%);
    }

    /* Floating animations for SVGs and UI elements */
    @keyframes floating {
      0% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(1deg); }
      100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
    }
    .float-anim {
      animation: floating 6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    
    @keyframes subtle-pan {
      0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
      50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
      100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    }
    .pan-bg {
      background-size: 200% 200%;
      animation: subtle-pan 20s ease infinite;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-indigoBrand-900 text-indigoBrand-50 font-sans overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-indigoBrand-300 selection:text-indigoBrand-900">

  <!-- ================= HEADER & NAVIGATION ================= -->
  <header class="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 bg-indigoBrand-900/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-indigoBrand-800/60" id="mainHeader">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
      <!-- Logo Branding with Monogram Design from Page Art -->
      <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-3 group">
        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-indigoBrand-300 flex items-center justify-center text-indigoBrand-300 font-display text-lg group-hover:bg-indigoBrand-300 group-hover:text-indigoBrand-900 transition-all duration-300 shadow-glow-blue">
          H
        </div>
        <div>
          <span class="font-display tracking-widest text-sm text-indigoBrand-100 group-hover:text-white transition-colors">ХОДЯЧИЙ ЗАМОК</span>
          <span class="block text-[9px] font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-indigoBrand-400">Concept Showcase</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Desktop Navigation Menu matching the design system -->
      <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8">
        <a href="#concept" class="text-sm font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <span class="text-[9px] opacity-60">01 //</span> Concept Design
        </a>
        <a href="#interactive-book" class="text-sm font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <span class="text-[9px] opacity-60">02 //</span> Interactive Reader
        </a>
        <a href="#editorial-system" class="text-sm font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <span class="text-[9px] opacity-60">03 //</span> Visual Language
        </a>
        <a href="#illustrations" class="text-sm font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5">
          <span class="text-[9px] opacity-60">04 //</span> Art Gallery
        </a>
      </nav>

      <!-- Action Button with Book Theme Styling -->
      <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
        <a href="#interactive-book" class="relative group overflow-hidden px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full border border-indigoBrand-300 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-100 hover:text-indigoBrand-900 transition-all duration-500">
          <span class="absolute inset-0 bg-indigoBrand-300 transform translate-y-full group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out z-0"></span>
          <span class="relative z-10 flex items-center gap-2">
            Open Book <i class="fa-solid fa-book-open text-[10px]"></i>
          </span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- ================= HERO SECTION (Premium Editorial Concept) ================= -->
  <section class="relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center pt-24 pb-16 overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-indigoBrand-900 via-indigoBrand-800 to-indigoBrand-900" id="hero">
    <!-- Starfield/Glow Decorative Background layers -->
    <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0">
      <div class="absolute top-1/4 left-1/4 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-indigoBrand-600/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] magical-glow"></div>
      <div class="absolute bottom-1/3 right-1/4 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-indigoBrand-300/10 rounded-full blur-[140px] magical-glow" style="animation-delay: -3s;"></div>
      <!-- Decorative wavy patterns inspired by book design page margins -->
      <div class="absolute left-0 right-0 bottom-0 h-40 opacity-15 wave-bg"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Content Container -->
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center relative z-10 w-full">
      
      <!-- Text/Introductory Column -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8" data-aos="fade-right">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-800/80 border border-indigoBrand-700/80">
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-300 animate-pulse"></span>
          <span class="text-[10px] font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300">Editorial & Graphic Design Concept</span>
        </div>

        <div class="space-y-4">
          <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-display font-bold text-white leading-tight">
            ХОДЯЧИЙ <br>
            <span class="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-indigoBrand-300 via-indigoBrand-100 to-white">ЗАМОК</span>
          </h1>
          <p class="font-serif italic text-lg text-indigoBrand-200 border-l-2 border-indigoBrand-400 pl-4 py-1">
            "An exquisite design proposal translating Diana Wynne Jones' masterwork into a luxurious, dual-tone tactile universe."
          </p>
        </div>

        <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300/90 leading-relaxed max-w-md">
          Explore the balance of royal indigo inks, soft periwinkle screens, and pristine textured book-stock paper. This interactive concept transforms traditional print mechanics into digital editorial poetry.
        </p>

        <!-- CTAs mimicking classic book-binding labels -->
        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4 pt-4">
          <a href="#interactive-book" class="px-7 py-4 bg-indigoBrand-300 text-indigoBrand-900 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:bg-white hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-3">
            <span>Begin Reading Experience</span>
            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>
          </a>
          <a href="#editorial-system" class="px-7 py-4 bg-indigoBrand-800/60 text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white border border-indigoBrand-700/80 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg hover:bg-indigoBrand-800 transition-all duration-300">
            Design Blueprint
          </a>
        </div>

        <!-- Mini stats / metadata -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 pt-8 border-t border-indigoBrand-800/80">
          <div>
            <span class="block text-xl font-display text-white">DUAL</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-400">Tone Palette</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="block text-xl font-display text-white">100%</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-400">Vector Art</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="block text-xl font-display text-white">O.A.</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-400">Lead Artist</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Isometric Book Visualization Column (Matching the perspective render in the bottom of the upload) -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative py-12">
        
        <!-- Rotating background portal ring -->
        <div class="absolute w-[360px] h-[360px] md:w-[480px] md:h-[480px] border border-indigoBrand-500/20 rounded-full animate-[spin_40s_linear_infinite] pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center">
          <div class="w-[90%] h-[90%] border border-dashed border-indigoBrand-400/10 rounded-full"></div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Shadow base for the floating book model -->
        <div class="absolute bottom-10 w-[320px] h-[30px] bg-black/40 blur-xl rounded-full transform scale-x-125"></div>

        <!-- The Immersive Virtual Book Container -->
        <div class="relative float-anim max-w-full z-10">
          
          <!-- Mock Book Folder Mockup resembling bottom right layout of image -->
          <div class="relative w-[340px] sm:w-[460px] aspect-[4/3] bg-indigoBrand-900 rounded-lg p-3 shadow-book border border-indigoBrand-700/50 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden">
            
            <!-- Book paper layout preview -->
            <div class="w-full h-full bg-parchment rounded border border-parchment-dark p-4 sm:p-6 flex gap-1 relative overflow-hidden text-indigoBrand-900">
              
              <!-- Spine fold separator -->
              <div class="absolute inset-y-0 left-1/2 w-4 -ml-2 book-spine z-10"></div>
              
              <!-- Left Page (Chapter/Story Context) -->
              <div class="w-1/2 pr-3 flex flex-col justify-between relative z-0">
                <div class="space-y-2">
                  <div class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-600 font-semibold">Глава первая</div>
                  <h3 class="font-serif text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold leading-tight text-indigoBrand-800">В которой Софи беседует со шляпками</h3>
                  <div class="h-[1px] bg-indigoBrand-200 w-8 my-1"></div>
                  <p class="text-[7px] sm:text-[9px] text-indigoBrand-700/90 leading-relaxed font-serif">
                    В стране Ингарии, где действительно водятся семимильные сапоги и плащи-невидимки, родиться старшим из троих детей...
                  </p>
                </div>
                <!-- Mini Castle SVG illustration silhouette bottom of page -->
                <div class="w-full flex justify-end">
                  <svg class="w-8 h-8 text-indigoBrand-500 opacity-80" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
                    <!-- Stylized mini outline of castle -->
                    <path d="M20 90h60v-5H20zM30 80h10V45l-5-10-5 10zM60 80h10V35l-5-8-5 8zM45 80h10V20l-5-12-5 12z"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <!-- Right Page (Beautiful Blue Ink Landscape Artwork) -->
              <div class="w-1/2 pl-3 flex flex-col justify-between relative z-0 bg-indigoBrand-50/50 rounded p-2 border border-indigoBrand-100/40">
                
                <!-- Circular character profile cameo matching book layout -->
                <div class="w-16 h-16 sm:w-20 sm:h-20 rounded-full border-2 border-indigoBrand-300 mx-auto overflow-hidden relative flex items-center justify-center bg-indigoBrand-600 text-white shadow-md">
                  <!-- Abstract SVG Silhouette of Howl -->
                  <svg class="w-full h-full text-indigoBrand-100" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
                    <path d="M50 20c-15 0-25 10-25 25 0 10 5 15 10 20l5 15h20l5-15c5-5 10-10 10-20 0-15-10-25-25-25z" opacity="0.8"/>
                    <path d="M35 50s5-10 15-10 15 10 15 10S55 65 50 65s-15-15-15-15z" fill="#fff"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>

                <div class="text-center space-y-1">
                  <span class="text-[8px] sm:text-[10px] font-display uppercase tracking-widest block text-indigoBrand-800">Хаул</span>
                  <p class="text-[6px] sm:text-[8px] text-indigoBrand-600 uppercase tracking-widest">Wizard of the Waste</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Custom decorative wave arches inside book -->
                <div class="w-full h-6 border-t border-indigoBrand-300 opacity-60 relative overflow-hidden">
                  <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-indigoBrand-200 to-transparent opacity-50"></div>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>

          </div>

          <!-- Dynamic interactive control overlay bubble -->
          <div class="absolute -bottom-6 -right-4 bg-indigoBrand-800/90 hover:bg-indigoBrand-700 text-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-lg border border-indigoBrand-600/50 flex items-center gap-3 text-xs backdrop-blur-sm cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300" onclick="scrollToReader()">
            <span class="flex h-2 w-2 relative">
              <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-300 opacity-75"></span>
              <span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-indigoBrand-300"></span>
            </span>
            <span class="font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider pr-1">Try Live Flip Reader</span>
          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Downward wavy arch page separator -->
    <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full overflow-hidden leading-[0] z-20">
      <svg class="relative block w-full h-[60px]" viewBox="0 0 1200 120" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        <path d="M321.39,56.44c58-10.79,114.16-30.13,172-41.86,82.39-16.72,168.19-17.73,250.45-.39C823.78,31,906.67,72,985.66,92.83c70.05,18.48,146.53,26.09,214.34,3V120H0V0C26.9,8.75,57.05,18.3,90.13,27.93,188.66,56.62,263.48,64.21,321.39,56.44Z" fill="#181e29"></path>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= CONCEPT DEEP DIVE SECTION ================= -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-indigoBrand-800 text-white relative" id="concept">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
      
      <!-- Conceptual Heading -->
      <div class="max-w-3xl space-y-4 mb-16">
        <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300">01 // Architectural Project Blueprint</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-display font-bold leading-tight">
          Translating Lit-Art <br>Into Premium Interfaces
        </h2>
        <div class="h-[2px] bg-indigoBrand-300 w-24"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Feature Grid mirroring editorial panels of the book concept -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        
        <!-- Card 1: Monochromatic Design Discipline -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/60 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 hover:border-indigoBrand-300/40 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-indigoBrand-300/5 rounded-full blur-2xl transform translate-x-10 -translate-y-10 group-hover:bg-indigoBrand-300/10 transition-all"></div>
          
          <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-indigoBrand-800 border border-indigoBrand-600 flex items-center justify-center text-indigoBrand-300 text-lg mb-6 shadow-inner">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-palette"></i>
          </div>
          
          <h3 class="text-xl font-display font-bold mb-3 text-white">Monochromatic Blue</h3>
          <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed mb-6">
            Relying entirely on custom layers of dark slate indigo, crisp sky blue, and textured stark whites to produce high cognitive elegance and premium publishing-level visual focus.
          </p>
          <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="h-4 w-12 rounded bg-indigoBrand-900 border border-indigoBrand-700"></span>
            <span class="h-4 w-12 rounded bg-indigoBrand-600"></span>
            <span class="h-4 w-12 rounded bg-indigoBrand-300"></span>
            <span class="h-4 w-12 rounded bg-white"></span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Card 2: Symmetric Editorial Geometry -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/60 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 hover:border-indigoBrand-300/40 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-indigoBrand-300/5 rounded-full blur-2xl transform translate-x-10 -translate-y-10 group-hover:bg-indigoBrand-300/10 transition-all"></div>
          
          <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-indigoBrand-800 border border-indigoBrand-600 flex items-center justify-center text-indigoBrand-300 text-lg mb-6 shadow-inner">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-compass-drafting"></i>
          </div>
          
          <h3 class="text-xl font-display font-bold mb-3 text-white">Editorial Geometry</h3>
          <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed mb-6">
            Drawing inspiration from the beautifully drafted physical book margins, curves, waves, and circular silhouette masks presented in the book layout pages of O.A.'s original design.
          </p>
          <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400 font-mono font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-bezier-curve"></i> Fluid Vector Arches
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Card 3: Intricate Silhouette Art -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/60 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 hover:border-indigoBrand-300/40 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-indigoBrand-300/5 rounded-full blur-2xl transform translate-x-10 -translate-y-10 group-hover:bg-indigoBrand-300/10 transition-all"></div>
          
          <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-indigoBrand-800 border border-indigoBrand-600 flex items-center justify-center text-indigoBrand-300 text-lg mb-6 shadow-inner">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-paintbrush"></i>
          </div>
          
          <h3 class="text-xl font-display font-bold mb-3 text-white">Silhouette Vector Art</h3>
          <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed mb-6">
            Using hand-curated vector graphics of the dynamic Moving Castle and character profiles to reflect the organic energy of high-concept modern art and classic literature.
          </p>
          <div class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400 font-mono font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> 100% Vector Rendering
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= INTERACTIVE DUAL-PAGE BOOK READER SECTION ================= -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-indigoBrand-900 relative" id="interactive-book">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-5 pointer-events-none wave-bg"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Interactive Section Header -->
      <div class="text-center space-y-4 mb-16">
        <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300">02 // Editorial Experience</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-display font-bold text-white">The Interactive Reader</h2>
        <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 max-w-xl mx-auto">
          Immerse yourself in O.A.'s proposed book pages. Flip through Chapters, examine illustrations, and toggle visual modes to appreciate print precision in digital space.
        </p>
        <div class="h-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-indigoBrand-400 to-transparent w-64 mx-auto"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Live Virtual Book Container -->
      <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto">
        
        <!-- Book Utility Toolbar -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-800/80 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 rounded-t-2xl px-6 py-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4">
          <!-- Chapter Selector tab style -->
          <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 font-medium">Select Chapter:</span>
            <div class="inline-flex rounded-lg bg-indigoBrand-950 p-1 border border-indigoBrand-800">
              <button onclick="setChapter(1)" id="btn-chap-1" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium transition-all duration-200 bg-indigoBrand-300 text-indigoBrand-900 shadow-md">
                Chapter I
              </button>
              <button onclick="setChapter(2)" id="btn-chap-2" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200">
                Chapter II
              </button>
              <button onclick="setChapter(3)" id="btn-chap-3" class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200">
                Chapter III
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Quick Display options -->
          <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
            <!-- Theme toggle visual simulation -->
            <button onclick="toggleColorReverse()" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-indigoBrand-600/60 bg-indigoBrand-900/60 text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-all">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-half-stroke"></i>
              <span>Invert Art Colors</span>
            </button>
            <span class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 font-mono">Scale: 100% (High Fidelity)</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- The Physical Book Mock Layout -->
        <div class="relative bg-indigoBrand-950 p-4 sm:p-8 rounded-b-2xl border-x border-b border-indigoBrand-700/60 shadow-book">
          
          <!-- Inner Page Spread -->
          <div class="relative bg-parchment rounded-xl shadow-page border border-parchment-dark p-6 sm:p-10 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 md:gap-0 transition-colors duration-500" id="bookCanvas">
            
            <!-- Spine shadow fold in the absolute center for larger screens -->
            <div class="hidden md:block absolute inset-y-0 left-1/2 w-8 -ml-4 book-spine z-10 pointer-events-none"></div>

            <!-- ================= LEFT PAGE: CHAPTER TEXT ================= -->
            <div class="w-full md:w-1/2 md:pr-10 flex flex-col justify-between text-indigoBrand-900 min-h-[460px] relative z-0">
              
              <!-- Content Section -->
              <div class="space-y-6">
                <!-- Chapter Header -->
                <div class="space-y-2">
                  <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-500">
                    <span class="h-[1px] w-4 bg-indigoBrand-400"></span>
                    <span id="leftPageChapterNum">Глава первая</span>
                  </div>
                  <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold leading-tight text-indigoBrand-900 tracking-tight" id="leftPageTitle">
                    В которой Софи беседует со шляпками
                  </h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Stylized Paragraph Divider -->
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 py-1">
                  <span class="h-[1px] bg-indigoBrand-300 flex-grow"></span>
                  <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full border border-indigoBrand-500 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <span class="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-400"></span>
                  </div>
                  <span class="h-[1px] bg-indigoBrand-300 flex-grow"></span>
                </div>

                <!-- Rich Story Content with gorgeous dropshafts & decorative dropcap -->
                <div class="font-serif text-sm sm:text-base leading-relaxed text-indigoBrand-800 space-y-4 text-justify" id="leftPageContent">
                  <p>
                    <span class="float-left text-5xl font-display font-extrabold text-indigoBrand-700 mr-2.5 mt-1 leading-none">В</span>
                     стране Ингарии, где действительно водятся семимильные сапоги и плащи-невидимки, родиться старшим из троих детей считалось изрядным невезением. Всякий знал, что если трое братьев или сестер отправятся на поиски счастья, именно старшего ждет самый сокрушительный провал, даже если он отправится в путь первым.
                  </p>
                  <p>
                    Софи Хаттер была старшей из трех сестер и жила в небольшом, но весьма процветающем городке Маркет-Чиппинг. Родители ее были не слишком богаты, но содержали отличную дамскую шляпную мастерскую, в которой сами же и работали.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Page Footer (Left) -->
              <div class="pt-6 border-t border-indigoBrand-100 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-indigoBrand-500 font-sans mt-8">
                <span class="font-semibold">Ходячий замок</span>
                <span class="font-mono">Page <span id="leftPageNum">03</span></span>
              </div>
            </div>


            <!-- ================= RIGHT PAGE: HIGH-FIDELITY VECTOR ARTWORKS ================= -->
            <div class="w-full md:w-1/2 md:pl-10 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[460px] relative z-0">
              
              <!-- Artwork Area Container with Custom Arch Frame from visual blueprint -->
              <div class="flex-grow flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative py-6" id="rightPageFrame">
                
                <!-- Dynamic Wave Frame Design inside Page (Simulating the blue vector framing of the character and castle) -->
                <div class="w-full max-w-[340px] aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-indigoBrand-50 border border-indigoBrand-200/50 p-4 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-all duration-500" id="artFrameBg">
                  
                  <!-- Abstract background waves within book layout -->
                  <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10 pointer-events-none wave-bg"></div>

                  <!-- Dynamic Silhouette Graphic Holder (renders the castle or characters matching the art aesthetic) -->
                  <div class="relative z-10 w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center" id="artworkContainer">
                    
                    <!-- DEFAULT ARTWORK: Moving Castle Detailed Silhouette -->
                    <svg id="svgArtCastle" class="w-4/5 h-4/5 text-indigoBrand-600 transition-all duration-500 float-anim" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="currentColor">
                      <!-- Base Platform with moving chicken legs -->
                      <path d="M70 145l-10 25h-5l5-25zM130 145l10 25h5l-5-25z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                      <ellipse cx="100" cy="135" rx="55" ry="18"/>
                      
                      <!-- Intricate mechanical towers and wings -->
                      <rect x="65" y="80" width="20" height="45" rx="2" />
                      <rect x="115" y="70" width="22" height="55" rx="2" />
                      <polygon points="100,50 115,100 85,100" />
                      <ellipse cx="100" cy="85" rx="28" ry="28"/>
                      
                      <!-- Chimneys belching magic steam clouds -->
                      <rect x="70" y="45" width="8" height="35" />
                      <rect x="122" y="30" width="10" height="40" />
                      
                      <!-- Steam Puffs matching blue graphic style -->
                      <circle cx="74" cy="30" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
                      <circle cx="127" cy="15" r="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                      <circle cx="140" cy="10" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>

                      <!-- Eyes/Mouth mimicking the castle's animated structure -->
                      <circle cx="85" cy="115" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
                      <circle cx="115" cy="115" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
                      <path d="M90 130s10 5 20 0" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
                    </svg>

                  </div>

                  <!-- Decorative circular inner border resembling character cameos -->
                  <div class="absolute inset-3 border border-dashed border-indigoBrand-300/40 rounded-xl pointer-events-none"></div>

                </div>

                <!-- Dynamic Character Subtext label -->
                <div class="mt-4 text-center">
                  <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] font-display text-indigoBrand-800 font-bold block" id="rightPageArtTitle">
                    Ходячий ЗамокХаул
                  </span>
                  <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-500 font-medium block mt-1" id="rightPageArtDesc">
                    Original Vector Blueprint No. 042
                  </span>
                </div>

              </div>

              <!-- Page Footer (Right) -->
              <div class="pt-6 border-t border-indigoBrand-100 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-indigoBrand-500 font-sans mt-8">
                <span class="font-mono">Page <span id="rightPageNum">04</span></span>
                <span class="font-semibold">Эскизный проект</span>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>

          <!-- Flip Reader Navigation Controls -->
          <div class="absolute -bottom-14 left-0 right-0 flex items-center justify-center gap-6">
            <button onclick="prevChapter()" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-800 border border-indigoBrand-700/80 hover:border-indigoBrand-300 text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left text-sm"></i>
            </button>
            <span class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-indigoBrand-950/90 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-indigoBrand-800">
              Chapter <span id="activeChapterIndicator">1</span> / 3
            </span>
            <button onclick="nextChapter()" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-indigoBrand-800 border border-indigoBrand-700/80 hover:border-indigoBrand-300 text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right text-sm"></i>
            </button>
          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= DESIGN SYSTEM / VISUAL LANGUAGE BLUEPRINT ================= -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-indigoBrand-800 relative text-white" id="editorial-system">
    <div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-20 bg-gradient-to-b from-indigoBrand-900 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>
    
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
      
      <!-- Grid Section -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
        
        <!-- Interactive Color & Pattern Tester column -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300">03 // Palette & Design System</span>
            <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-display font-bold leading-tight">Visual Integrity & Color Philosophy</h2>
            <div class="h-[2px] bg-indigoBrand-300 w-24"></div>
          </div>

          <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed">
            The design draws directly from deep-indigo letterpress block printing. This restricts the canvas to a disciplined visual system where tone, density, and contrast create high-end luxury layouts.
          </p>

          <!-- Interactive Palette Swatch Card -->
          <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/60 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-indigoBrand-700/80 space-y-6">
            <h4 class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-white mb-2">Color Matrix & Code Breakdown</h4>
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              <!-- Swatch 1 -->
              <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900 border border-indigoBrand-800 rounded-xl p-3 text-center hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer" onclick="copyColor('#0f1724')">
                <div class="w-full h-12 rounded-lg bg-indigoBrand-900 mb-2 border border-indigoBrand-800"></div>
                <span class="block text-[10px] font-mono text-indigoBrand-300">#0F1724</span>
                <span class="text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-500">Midnight Slate</span>
              </div>
              <!-- Swatch 2 -->
              <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900 border border-indigoBrand-800 rounded-xl p-3 text-center hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer" onclick="copyColor('#2e496d')">
                <div class="w-full h-12 rounded-lg bg-indigoBrand-600 mb-2"></div>
                <span class="block text-[10px] font-mono text-indigoBrand-300">#2E496D</span>
                <span class="text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-500">Royal Indigo</span>
              </div>
              <!-- Swatch 3 -->
              <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900 border border-indigoBrand-800 rounded-xl p-3 text-center hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer" onclick="copyColor('#8da9c4')">
                <div class="w-full h-12 rounded-lg bg-indigoBrand-300 mb-2"></div>
                <span class="block text-[10px] font-mono text-indigoBrand-300">#8DA9C4</span>
                <span class="text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-500">Periwinkle</span>
              </div>
              <!-- Swatch 4 -->
              <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900 border border-indigoBrand-800 rounded-xl p-3 text-center hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer" onclick="copyColor('#fbfbf9')">
                <div class="w-full h-12 rounded-lg bg-parchment mb-2"></div>
                <span class="block text-[10px] font-mono text-indigoBrand-300">#FBFBF9</span>
                <span class="text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-500">Book stock</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Copy feedback notification container -->
            <div id="copyFeedback" class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 italic text-center opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-green-400 mr-1.5"></i> Color hex code copied to clipboard!
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Interactive Spec Typography & Arch visualization columns -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-6">
          <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/40 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 rounded-3xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden">
            <!-- Decorative curve mask representing bottom design curve of the inspiration image -->
            <div class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-48 h-48 border-t border-l border-dashed border-indigoBrand-500/15 rounded-tl-full pointer-events-none"></div>

            <h3 class="text-xl font-display font-bold text-white mb-6 flex items-center gap-3">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-pen-nib text-indigoBrand-300"></i>
              <span>Typography Spectrum</span>
            </h3>

            <!-- Typo specimen blocks -->
            <div class="space-y-6">
              <div class="border-b border-indigoBrand-800/80 pb-4">
                <span class="block text-[10px] uppercase font-mono tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400">01 / TITLES / BRAND MONOGRAMS</span>
                <h4 class="text-2xl font-display text-white tracking-widest mt-1">ХОДЯЧИЙ ЗАМОК</h4>
                <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 italic">Cinzel Decorative • Capital Letterpress Weight</p>
              </div>

              <div class="border-b border-indigoBrand-800/80 pb-4">
                <span class="block text-[10px] uppercase font-mono tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400">02 / STORY CONTENT / EXCERPTS</span>
                <p class="text-lg font-serif italic text-indigoBrand-100 mt-1">«В стране Ингарии, где действительно водятся сапоги...»</p>
                <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 italic">Playfair Display • Classic Story Book Serif</p>
              </div>

              <div>
                <span class="block text-[10px] uppercase font-mono tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400">03 / METADATA & LABELS</span>
                <span class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] font-sans font-semibold text-indigoBrand-300 mt-1">ORIGINAL GRAPHIC BLUEPRINT 2026</span>
                <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 italic">Plus Jakarta Sans • Crisp modern structural utility</p>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= EDITORIAL GRAPHICS & ART GALLERY ================= -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-indigoBrand-900 text-white relative" id="illustrations">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
      
      <!-- Section Header -->
      <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-16 gap-4">
        <div class="space-y-4">
          <span class="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300">04 // Editorial Asset Catalog</span>
          <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-display font-bold leading-tight">Artistic Blueprints & Graphics</h2>
          <div class="h-[2px] bg-indigoBrand-300 w-24"></div>
        </div>
        <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 max-w-md">
          A showcase of custom conceptual graphics styled to replicate the dual-tone contrast values of high-grade publishing art.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Vector Art Gallery Cards mimicking original image circles & landscape views -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        
        <!-- Gallery Card 1: The Steampunk Castle silhouette -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-800/40 rounded-2xl border border-indigoBrand-700/60 p-6 flex flex-col justify-between group hover:border-indigoBrand-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue">
          <div class="relative w-full aspect-video rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-indigoBrand-900 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
            <!-- Animated SVG of castle -->
            <svg class="w-1/2 h-full text-indigoBrand-300 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
              <path d="M40 85h20M30 65l10-20V30l10-15 10 15v15l10 20z" opacity="0.8"/>
              <!-- Castle structures -->
              <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="15" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M40 50h20M50 40v20" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-2 px-2.5 py-1 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800/90 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-100 font-mono">
              Castle Portrait
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
            <h4 class="text-lg font-display font-bold text-white group-hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors">Ходячий замок (Symmetric Vector)</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed">
              The mechanical wanderer, composed of geometric segments, steam vents, and complex multi-decked compartments.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Gallery Card 2: Character Portrait Cameo (Howl / Хаул) -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-800/40 rounded-2xl border border-indigoBrand-700/60 p-6 flex flex-col justify-between group hover:border-indigoBrand-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue">
          <div class="relative w-full aspect-video rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-indigoBrand-900 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
            <!-- Cameo mask rendering matching the circle panels in the upload book preview -->
            <div class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full border-2 border-indigoBrand-300 relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-indigoBrand-800 text-white">
              <svg class="w-full h-full text-indigoBrand-300" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
                <!-- Abstract character linework -->
                <path d="M50 25c-8 0-15 5-15 15s8 25 15 25 15-15 15-25-7-15-15-15z" opacity="0.9"/>
                <path d="M25 75s10-10 25-10 25 10 25 10v10H25V75z" opacity="0.6"/>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-2 px-2.5 py-1 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800/90 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-100 font-mono">
              Cameo Profile
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
            <h4 class="text-lg font-display font-bold text-white group-hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors">Howl Pendragon (Wizard Portrait)</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed">
              Stylized character silhouette, utilizing geometric curves to achieve depth without relying on gradients.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Gallery Card 3: Landscape & Mountains (Inspiration Page 2 Right Panel) -->
        <div class="bg-indigoBrand-800/40 rounded-2xl border border-indigoBrand-700/60 p-6 flex flex-col justify-between group hover:border-indigoBrand-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-glow-blue">
          <div class="relative w-full aspect-video rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-indigoBrand-900 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
            <!-- Landscape artwork with waves and peaks -->
            <svg class="w-full h-full text-indigoBrand-300" viewBox="0 0 200 100" fill="currentColor">
              <!-- Mountain peaks -->
              <polygon points="10,80 60,30 110,80" opacity="0.7" />
              <polygon points="80,80 130,20 180,80" opacity="0.9" />
              <!-- Wave ripples -->
              <path d="M0,85 C50,80 100,90 150,85 C180,82 200,87 200,85 L200,100 L0,100 Z" fill="currentColor" />
            </svg>
            <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-2 px-2.5 py-1 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800/90 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-indigoBrand-100 font-mono">
              Landscape View
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
            <h4 class="text-lg font-display font-bold text-white group-hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors">Market-Chipping Valley</h4>
            <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-300 leading-relaxed">
              Beautiful horizontal compositions that grace the chapter heads and editorial dividers of the design layout.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= INTERACTIVE WORKSHOP & FEEDBACK MODAL ================= -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-indigoBrand-800 text-white relative">
    <!-- Fluid wave dividing element top of block -->
    <div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-10 overflow-hidden leading-[0]">
      <svg class="relative block w-full h-[40px]" viewBox="0 0 1200 120" preserveAspectRatio="none">
        <path d="M1200,0H0V120H1200V0Z" fill="#0f1724" opacity="0.3"></path>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 text-center space-y-10 relative z-10">
      
      <div class="space-y-4">
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-display font-bold text-white">Experience Editorial Excellence</h2>
        <p class="text-sm text-indigoBrand-300 max-w-lg mx-auto leading-relaxed">
          Would you like to customize the presentation book canvas layout parameters to experiment with live margins and sizes?
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Live customization knobs -->
      <div class="bg-indigoBrand-900/80 border border-indigoBrand-700/60 p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-2xl grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-8 text-left">
        <!-- Control 1 -->
        <div class="space-y-2">
          <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300 font-bold">Book Cover Frame Width</label>
          <input type="range" min="300" max="420" value="340" class="w-full h-1 bg-indigoBrand-800 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-indigoBrand-300" id="frameWidthRange" oninput="adjustFrameWidth(this.value)">
          <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-indigoBrand-400 font-mono">
            <span>Narrow (300px)</span>
            <span>Wide (420px)</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Control 2 -->
        <div class="space-y-2">
          <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-300 font-bold">Paper Brightness / Tone</label>
          <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
            <button onclick="setPaperTone('#fbfbf9')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800 hover:bg-indigoBrand-700 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-indigoBrand-100 border border-indigoBrand-700">
              Classic Parchment
            </button>
            <button onclick="setPaperTone('#ffffff')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800 hover:bg-indigoBrand-700 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-indigoBrand-100 border border-indigoBrand-700">
              Stark White
            </button>
            <button onclick="setPaperTone('#eef2f7')" class="px-3 py-2 rounded bg-indigoBrand-800 hover:bg-indigoBrand-700 text-[10px] font-mono font-bold text-indigoBrand-100 border border-indigoBrand-700">
              Cool Slate
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="pt-4">
        <span class="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-400 font-mono">Design layout proposal by O.A. • Interactive presentation engineered by Gemini</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>


  <!-- ================= FOOTER ================= -->
  <footer class="bg-indigoBrand-950 border-t border-indigoBrand-800/80 text-indigoBrand-400 py-16">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12">
      
      <!-- Brand & Copyright -->
      <div class="md:col-span-2 space-y-6">
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-3 group">
          <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border border-indigoBrand-300 flex items-center justify-center text-indigoBrand-300 font-display text-lg shadow-glow-blue">
            H
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="font-display tracking-widest text-sm text-indigoBrand-100">ХОДЯЧИЙ ЗАМОК</span>
            <span class="block text-[9px] font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-indigoBrand-400">Concept Project</span>
          </div>
        </a>
        <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 leading-relaxed max-w-md">
          This digital publication serves as an experimental web artifact inspired by O.A.'s physical book layout concepts. All rights to characters and literature belong to their respective creators.
        </p>
        <p class="text-[10px] font-mono text-indigoBrand-500">
          &copy; 2026 Howl's Moving Castle Conceptual Team. All rights reserved.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Quick links inside visual concept -->
      <div class="space-y-4">
        <h4 class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-100 font-bold font-mono">Sections</h4>
        <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs">
          <li><a href="#concept" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Design System Blueprint</a></li>
          <li><a href="#interactive-book" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Dual-Page Book Reader</a></li>
          <li><a href="#editorial-system" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Visual Typography Spec</a></li>
          <li><a href="#illustrations" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Conceptual Art Catalog</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <!-- Editorial Notes -->
      <div class="space-y-4">
        <h4 class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-indigoBrand-100 font-bold font-mono">Curator Notes</h4>
        <p class="text-xs text-indigoBrand-400 leading-relaxed">
          Each digital vector artwork has been engineered with raw SVGs matching the dual-tone letterpress color values specified in the original book mockup plates.
        </p>
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-white text-sm pt-2">
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors"><i class="fa-brands fa-dribbble"></i></a>
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-indigoBrand-300 transition-colors"><i class="fa-brands fa-behance"></i></a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </footer>


  <!-- ================= JAVASCRIPT LOGIC ================= -->
  <script>
    // Chapter database containing the translation text and associated graphic assets
    const chapters = {
      1: {
        chapterNum: "Глава первая",
        title: "В которой Софи беседует со шляпками",
        content: `
          <p><span class="float-left text-5xl font-display font-extrabold text-indigoBrand-700 mr-2.5 mt-1 leading-none">В</span> стране Ингарии, где действительно водятся семимильные сапоги и плащи-невидимки, родиться старшим из троих детей считалось изрядным невезением. Всякий знал, что если трое братьев или сестер отправятся на поиски счастья, именно старшего ждет самый сокрушительный провал, даже если он отправится в путь первым.</p>
          <p>Софи Хаттер была старшей из трех сестер и жила в небольшом, но весьма процветающем городке Маркет-Чиппинг. Родители ее были не слишком богаты, но содержали отличную дамскую шляпную мастерскую, в которой сами же и работали.</p>
        `,
        pageNumLeft: "03",
        pageNumRight: "04",
        artTitle: "Ходячий ЗамокХаул",
        artDesc: "Original Vector Blueprint No. 042",
        svgMarkup: `
          <svg class="w-4/5 h-4/5 text-indigoBrand-600 transition-all duration-500 float-anim" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="currentColor">
            <path d="M70 145l-10 25h-5l5-25zM130 145l10 25h5l-5-25z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
            <ellipse cx="100" cy="135" rx="55" ry="18"/>
            <rect x="65" y="80" width="20" height="45" rx="2" />
            <rect x="115" y="70" width="22" height="55" rx="2" />
            <polygon points="100,50 115,100 85,100" />
            <ellipse cx="100" cy="85" rx="28" ry="28"/>
            <rect x="70" y="45" width="8" height="35" />
            <rect x="122" y="30" width="10" height="40" />
            <circle cx="74" cy="30" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
            <circle cx="127" cy="15" r="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
            <circle cx="140" cy="10" r="8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
            <circle cx="85" cy="115" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
            <circle cx="115" cy="115" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
            <path d="M90 130s10 5 20 0" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
          </svg>
        `
      },
      2: {
        chapterNum: "Глава вторая",
        title: "В которой Софи вынуждена пуститься в путь",
        content: `
          <p><span class="float-left text-5xl font-display font-extrabold text-indigoBrand-700 mr-2.5 mt-1 leading-none">К</span>огда умер господин Хаттер, жизнь сестер круто переменилась. Мачеха Фанни решила отправить Летти в кондитерскую господина Чезари, а Марту — в ученицы к ведьме на болотах. Сама же Софи осталась помогать Фанни в шляпной мастерской.</p>
          <p>Дни тянулись серо и однообразно. Софи шила шляпки, украшая их искусственными розами и вуалями, и тихонько разговаривала с ними, нашептывая каждой её собственную тайную судьбу и предначертанную любовь.</p>
        `,
        pageNumLeft: "15",
        pageNumRight: "16",
        artTitle: "Ведьма Пустоши",
        artDesc: "Portrait Cameo Frame No. 011",
        svgMarkup: `
          <div class="w-32 h-32 rounded-full border-2 border-indigoBrand-400 flex items-center justify-center bg-indigoBrand-600 relative overflow-hidden text-white shadow-lg">
            <svg class="w-full h-full text-indigoBrand-100" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
              <!-- Witch stylized hat and hair -->
              <polygon points="50,15 15,55 85,55" />
              <circle cx="50" cy="55" r="15" />
              <!-- Feather decorations -->
              <path d="M30,35 Q40,20 50,35" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" />
              <path d="M70,35 Q60,20 50,35" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        `
      },
      3: {
        chapterNum: "Глава третья",
        title: "В которой Софи попадает в замок",
        content: `
          <p><span class="float-left text-5xl font-display font-extrabold text-indigoBrand-700 mr-2.5 mt-1 leading-none">П</span>осле роковой встречи с разгневанной Болотной Ведьмой, Софи обнаружила себя дряхлой старухой с изборожденным морщинами лицом. Не видя смысла оставаться в мастерской, она ушла из города, опираясь на суковатую трость.</p>
          <p>Бредя сквозь сумерки по холодным холмам, она неожиданно увидела возвышающийся силуэт. То был огромный Ходячий Замок, окутанный клубами сизого пара и медленно переступающий с холма на холм.</p>
        `,
        pageNumLeft: "29",
        pageNumRight: "30",
        artTitle: "Огненный Демон Кальцифер",
        artDesc: "Embers of the Hearth No. 009",
        svgMarkup: `
          <svg class="w-4/5 h-4/5 text-indigoBrand-500 float-anim" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
            <!-- Calcifer fire flames -->
            <path d="M50 15C50 15 70 35 70 55C70 70 60 85 50 85C40 85 30 70 30 55C30 35 50 15 50 15Z" />
            <path d="M50 35C50 35 62 48 62 60C62 70 56 78 50 78C44 78 38 70 38 60C38 48 50 35 50 35Z" fill="#fff" />
            <!-- Anime-style expressive eyes and mouth -->
            <circle cx="43" cy="55" r="4" fill="currentColor" />
            <circle cx="57" cy="55" r="4" fill="currentColor" />
            <circle cx="43" cy="55" r="1" fill="#fff" />
            <circle cx="57" cy="55" r="1" fill="#fff" />
            <path d="M46 68 Q50 72 54 68" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" />
          </svg>
        `
      }
    };

    let activeChapter = 1;
    let invertedMode = false;

    // Changes the active reader chapter
    function setChapter(chapterId) {
      activeChapter = chapterId;
      const data = chapters[chapterId];

      // Update indicators and buttons
      document.getElementById("activeChapterIndicator").innerText = chapterId;
      
      // Update story text content
      document.getElementById("leftPageChapterNum").innerText = data.chapterNum;
      document.getElementById("leftPageTitle").innerText = data.title;
      document.getElementById("leftPageContent").innerHTML = data.content;
      document.getElementById("leftPageNum").innerText = data.pageNumLeft;
      
      // Update artwork graphic & caption metadata
      document.getElementById("artworkContainer").innerHTML = data.svgMarkup;
      document.getElementById("rightPageArtTitle").innerText = data.artTitle;
      document.getElementById("rightPageArtDesc").innerText = data.artDesc;
      document.getElementById("rightPageNum").innerText = data.pageNumRight;

      // Reset button classes
      for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
        const btn = document.getElementById(`btn-chap-${i}`);
        if (i === chapterId) {
          btn.className = "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium bg-indigoBrand-300 text-indigoBrand-900 shadow-md transition-all duration-200";
        } else {
          btn.className = "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium text-indigoBrand-300 hover:text-white transition-all duration-200";
        }
      }
    }

    function prevChapter() {
      let target = activeChapter - 1;
      if (target < 1) target = 3;
      setChapter(target);
    }

    function nextChapter() {
      let target = activeChapter + 1;
      if (target > 3) target = 1;
      setChapter(target);
    }

    // Scroll helper
    function scrollToReader() {
      document.getElementById("interactive-book").scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }

    // Interactive Theme Inversion simulator
    function toggleColorReverse() {
      invertedMode = !invertedMode;
      const artFrame = document.getElementById("artFrameBg");
      const textCanvas = document.getElementById("bookCanvas");
      
      if (invertedMode) {
        artFrame.classList.remove("bg-indigoBrand-50", "text-indigoBrand-900");
        artFrame.classList.add("bg-indigoBrand-900", "text-white", "border-indigoBrand-600");
      } else {
        artFrame.classList.remove("bg-indigoBrand-900", "text-white", "border-indigoBrand-600");
        artFrame.classList.add("bg-indigoBrand-50", "text-indigoBrand-900");
      }
    }

    // Visual Customizer handles
    function adjustFrameWidth(val) {
      const artFrame = document.getElementById("artFrameBg");
      artFrame.style.maxWidth = `${val}px`;
    }

    function setPaperTone(color) {
      const textCanvas = document.getElementById("bookCanvas");
      textCanvas.style.backgroundColor = color;
    }

    // Color Swatch copy to clipboard simulation (safe implementation without navigator.clipboard fallback)
    function copyColor(hex) {
      const tempInput = document.createElement("input");
      tempInput.value = hex;
      document.body.appendChild(tempInput);
      tempInput.select();
      document.execCommand("copy");
      document.body.removeChild(tempInput);

      const feedback = document.getElementById("copyFeedback");
      feedback.style.opacity = "1";
      setTimeout(() => {
        feedback.style.opacity = "0";
      }, 2500);
    }

    // Dynamic header styling on scroll
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const header = document.getElementById("mainHeader");
      if (window.scrollY > 50) {
        header.classList.add("py-3", "bg-indigoBrand-950/95");
        header.classList.remove("py-5");
      } else {
        header.classList.add("py-5");
        header.classList.remove("py-3", "bg-indigoBrand-950/95");
      }
    });
  </script>

</body>
</html>
9
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>ISLAND SIGNALS // 島群之間 - East Coast Contemporary Art Biennale</title>
  <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <!-- Google Fonts: Space Grotesk, Space Mono, and DotGothic16 (for pixel aesthetic) -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;600;700&family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=DotGothic16&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  
  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            cobalt: '#0033FF',
            ink: '#0D0D0E',
            paper: '#F6F6F4',
            blueprint: 'rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.08)',
          },
          fontFamily: {
            sans: ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
            mono: ['Space Mono', 'monospace'],
            pixel: ['DotGothic16', 'sans-serif'],
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    /* Risograph Noise Overlay */
    .riso-noise {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100vw;
      height: 100vh;
      content: "";
      opacity: 0.06;
      z-index: 9999;
      pointer-events: none;
      background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3联%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.8' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    }

    /* Custom Blueprint Grid background */
    .blueprint-grid {
      background-size: 40px 40px;
      background-image: 
        linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.07) 1px, transparent 1px);
    }

    .blueprint-grid-dense {
      background-size: 10px 10px;
      background-image: 
        linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    }

    /* Rough Halftone Mock-effect */
    .halftone-bg {
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle, #0033FF 1.5px, transparent 1.5px);
      background-size: 8px 8px;
    }

    /* Custom Scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
      width: 8px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
      background: #F6F6F4;
      border-left: 2px solid #0033FF;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: #0033FF;
    }

    /* Extreme contrast borders */
    .border-cobalt-raw {
      border: 2.5px solid #0033FF;
    }
    .border-b-cobalt-raw {
      border-bottom: 2.5px solid #0033FF;
    }
    .border-r-cobalt-raw {
      border-right: 2.5px solid #0033FF;
    }

    /* Pixel glow and vintage screens */
    .crt-scanline {
      background: linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        rgba(255,255,255,0),
        rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%,
        rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.05) 50%,
        rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.05)
      );
      background-size: 100% 4px;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-paper text-ink font-sans relative min-h-screen selection:bg-cobalt selection:text-white overflow-x-hidden">

  <!-- Risograph Paper Noise Overlay -->
  <div class="riso-noise"></div>

  <!-- Top System Bar -->
  <div class="w-full bg-cobalt text-white py-1 px-4 text-xs font-mono flex justify-between items-center border-b-2 border-ink z-50 sticky top-0">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
      <span class="inline-block w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-paper rounded-full animate-ping"></span>
      <span>SYSTEMS: ACTIVE // GRID_COORDINATES: LAT 22.99° N, LON 121.38° E</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hidden md:flex gap-6">
      <span>REF_TIDAL_LEVEL: +1.42M</span>
      <span>BROADCAST_FREQ: 98.4 MHZ</span>
      <span>LOC: TAIWAN EAST COAST // C-LAB</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Navigation / Header -->
  <header class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt bg-paper z-40 relative">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-stretch">
      
      <!-- Brand Logo / Stamp -->
      <div class="p-6 md:p-8 flex items-center justify-between border-b-2 md:border-b-0 md:border-r-2 border-cobalt md:max-w-sm flex-1">
        <div class="flex flex-col">
          <span class="font-pixel text-4xl text-cobalt tracking-tight">島群之間</span>
          <span class="font-mono text-xs tracking-widest text-ink mt-1 font-bold">BETWEEN ISLANDS // SIGNALS.2026</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Stylized Circular Stamp Badge from Image -->
        <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center p-1 animate-spin-slow">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="w-full h-full text-cobalt fill-none stroke-current">
