            <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="45" stroke-dasharray="6,4" />
            <path d="M 25,50 Q 50,20 75,50 Q 50,80 25,50 Z" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Navigation Links styled like a modern blueprint schematic -->
      <nav class="flex-grow flex flex-wrap text-sm font-mono">
        <a href="#about" class="flex-1 min-w-[120px] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between border-r-2 border-b-2 md:border-b-0 border-cobalt hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
          <span class="text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper mb-4">[01]</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">BIENNALE CONCEPT</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#visualizer" class="flex-1 min-w-[120px] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between border-r-2 border-b-2 md:border-b-0 border-cobalt hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
          <span class="text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper mb-4">[02]</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">SIGNAL LABORATORY</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#exhibitions" class="flex-1 min-w-[120px] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between border-r-2 border-b-2 md:border-b-0 border-cobalt hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
          <span class="text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper mb-4">[03]</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">EXHIBITION PROGRAM</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#booking" class="flex-1 min-w-[120px] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
          <span class="text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper mb-4">[04]</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">GATE PASS</span>
        </a>
      </nav>

    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- HERO SECTION: The visual fusion of "Between Islands" (Folk land art) & "Signals" (Technical lab grids) -->
  <section class="relative w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt blueprint-grid overflow-hidden">
    
    <!-- Top Decorative Coordinates Line -->
    <div class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt/30 flex justify-between px-6 py-2 text-[10px] font-mono text-cobalt">
      <span>GRID_SRC: COBALT_WAVE_01</span>
      <span>INDEX_CODE: 0x98FF23_TAIWAN_EAST</span>
      <span>SCALE: 1:1.240.000</span>
    </div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 min-h-[600px] relative">
      
      <!-- HERO LEFT: Organic "Between Islands" Vibe. Raw hand-drawn style mountains, wildlife, clotheslines. -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-7 p-6 md:p-12 flex flex-col justify-between relative border-b-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r-2 border-cobalt">
        
        <!-- Large Artistic Headers with English & Traditional Chinese alignment -->
        <div class="space-y-6">
          <div class="inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-cobalt text-white font-mono text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
            2026 Taiwan East Coast Art Exhibition
          </div>
          <h1 class="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-ink">
            TAIWAN <br/>
            <span class="text-cobalt">EAST COAST</span><br/>
            LAND ARTS
          </h1>
          <p class="font-mono text-sm max-w-lg text-ink/80 leading-relaxed pt-2">
            An intersection of raw topographical ink paintings and digital sound-wave signals. We capture the physical geometry of Taiwan's eastern cliffs and convert them into interactive visual matrices.
          </p>
        </div>

        <!-- The "Between Islands" Linocut Mountain & Sea SVG (Visual recreation of the upper image segment) -->
        <div class="w-full relative mt-12 bg-ink text-paper border-cobalt-raw p-4 rounded shadow-lg overflow-hidden">
          <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-10 pointer-events-none"></div>
          
          <!-- Inner Frame Border -->
          <div class="border border-paper/30 p-4 flex flex-col justify-between h-64 relative">
            
            <!-- SVG of Organic Hand-cut Landscapes -->
            <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-end justify-center pointer-events-none">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 800 300" class="w-full h-auto fill-none stroke-current text-white max-h-full">
                <!-- Mountain Left (Rough Linocut hatching simulated in vector) -->
                <path d="M-50,300 L150,120 L250,220 L350,150 L450,300 Z" fill="#0D0D0E" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                <!-- Hatching details on left mountain -->
                <path d="M50,230 L55,300 M70,210 L80,300 M90,190 L105,300 M110,180 L130,300 M130,170 L155,300" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4" />
                
                <!-- Wild Boar (Linocut motif from inspiration image) -->
                <rect x="250" y="250" width="35" height="20" rx="3" fill="white" stroke="black" stroke-width="1"/>
                <circle cx="280" cy="257" r="1.5" fill="black" />
                <!-- Boar Legs -->
                <line x1="255" y1="270" x2="255" y2="280" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                <line x1="262" y1="270" x2="262" y2="280" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                <line x1="275" y1="270" x2="275" y2="280" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                <line x1="282" y1="270" x2="282" y2="280" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                
                <!-- Standing figure from inspiration image -->
                <path d="M 210,210 Q 212,190 210,170" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                <circle cx="210" cy="164" r="5" fill="white"/>
                <line x1="202" y1="180" x2="218" y2="180" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" />
                <line x1="206" y1="210" x2="204" y2="230" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                <line x1="214" y1="210" x2="216" y2="230" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />

                <!-- Waves in the Middle (Cobalt Blue stylized waves from image) -->
                <path d="M300,240 C350,220 400,260 450,230 C500,200 550,250 600,210 C650,170 700,220 850,180" stroke="#0033FF" stroke-width="6" fill="none" />
                <path d="M300,260 C350,240 400,280 450,250 C500,220 550,270 600,230 C650,190 700,240 850,200" stroke="#0033FF" stroke-width="3" fill="none" />
                <path d="M300,280 C350,260 400,300 450,270 C500,240 550,290 600,250 C650,211 700,260 850,220" stroke="#0033FF" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3,3" />

                <!-- Mountain Right -->
                <path d="M450,300 L580,100 L680,180 L850,50 L850,300 Z" fill="#0D0D0E" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" />
                
                <!-- Screen-print Clothesline simulated with SVG -->
                <line x1="30" y1="180" x2="150" y2="180" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" />
                <line x1="35" y1="180" x2="35" y2="220" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" />
                <line x1="145" y1="180" x2="145" y2="220" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" />
                <!-- Clothes hanging -->
                <rect x="50" y="183" width="15" height="25" fill="white" />
                <rect x="75" y="183" width="10" height="20" fill="white" />
                <rect x="95" y="183" width="20" height="15" fill="white" />

                <!-- Flying Seagulls -->
                <path d="M320,80 Q325,70 330,80 Q335,70 340,80" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
                <path d="M520,50 Q525,40 530,50 Q535,40 540,50" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
              </svg>
            </div>

            <!-- Context Label inside the artwork panel -->
            <div class="flex justify-between items-start text-[10px] font-mono text-paper/80 z-10">
              <span>PLATE_01: BETWEEN_ISLANDS</span>
              <span>BIENNALE EXHIBIT</span>
            </div>
            <div class="flex justify-between items-end text-[10px] font-mono text-paper/80 z-10">
              <span>CONTEMPORARY EAST LAND ART PROJECT</span>
              <span>2026 // MONOCHROME PRINT</span>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- HERO RIGHT: "Signals" Experimental Lab Console. Interactive Signal Visualizer that user can control. -->
      <div id="visualizer" class="lg:col-span-5 p-6 md:p-12 flex flex-col justify-between bg-paper relative crt-scanline">
        
        <!-- High Density Grid Lines to match C-Lab Blueprint visual -->
        <div class="absolute inset-0 blueprint-grid-dense opacity-40 pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-cobalt via-transparent to-cobalt"></div>

        <div>
          <!-- Header for the interactive terminal -->
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center border-b-2 border-cobalt pb-4 mb-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span class="w-3 h-3 bg-cobalt inline-block animate-pulse"></span>
              <span class="font-mono text-sm font-bold tracking-widest text-cobalt">[SIGNAL_CONTROLLER_v2.6]</span>
            </div>
            <span class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/60">REV: 0524</span>
          </div>

          <h2 class="text-3xl font-pixel text-cobalt tracking-wide mb-2">SIGNAL ANALYSIS</h2>
          <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/70 leading-relaxed mb-6">
            Use the dials below to modify parameters. Watch the ocean frequency real-time render map adapt to the input data.
          </p>

          <!-- Interactive Control Console -->
          <div class="space-y-4 font-mono text-xs border-cobalt-raw p-4 bg-paper relative z-10">
            
            <!-- Frequency Slider -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex justify-between mb-1">
                <span>WAVE FREQUENCY: <span id="freq-val" class="text-cobalt font-bold">4.0 Hz</span></span>
                <span class="text-ink/40">RANGE: [1.0 - 10.0]</span>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="freq-slider" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="4" 
                class="w-full h-1 bg-ink/10 appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-cobalt outline-none">
            </div>

            <!-- Amplitude Slider -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex justify-between mb-1">
                <span>WAVE AMPLITUDE: <span id="amp-val" class="text-cobalt font-bold">30.0 V</span></span>
                <span class="text-ink/40">RANGE: [5.0 - 80.0]</span>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="amp-slider" min="5" max="80" step="1" value="30" 
                class="w-full h-1 bg-ink/10 appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-cobalt outline-none">
            </div>

            <!-- Grid Density Control Toggle -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex justify-between mb-2">
                <span>RENDER MODE:</span>
                <span class="text-ink/40">GRID OVERLAYS</span>
              </div>
              <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                <button onclick="setRenderMode('sine')" id="mode-sine" class="bg-cobalt text-white py-1 px-2 border border-cobalt text-center font-bold">PURE SINE</button>
                <button onclick="setRenderMode('tidal')" id="mode-tidal" class="bg-transparent text-cobalt py-1 px-2 border border-cobalt text-center hover:bg-cobalt/10">TIDAL MOD</button>
                <button onclick="setRenderMode('noise')" id="mode-noise" class="bg-transparent text-cobalt py-1 px-2 border border-cobalt text-center hover:bg-cobalt/10">NOISE CAP</button>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Canvas Visualizer Screen (Exactly captures the bottom blueprint style) -->
        <div class="w-full bg-paper border-cobalt-raw mt-8 p-3 relative h-64 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden">
          <div class="absolute inset-0 blueprint-grid opacity-30 pointer-events-none"></div>
          
          <!-- Small corner technical specs -->
          <div class="flex justify-between text-[9px] font-mono text-cobalt/80 z-10">
            <span>MAP_COORDS: [x: 432, y: 108]</span>
            <span>GRID: ENABLED</span>
          </div>

          <!-- The Real-time Interactive Wave Canvas -->
          <canvas id="signalCanvas" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full z-0 pointer-events-none"></canvas>

          <!-- System status readout overlaying canvas -->
          <div class="flex justify-between items-end text-[9px] font-mono text-cobalt/80 z-10 mt-auto">
            <span>STATION: TAITUNG_LAB_01</span>
            <span class="animate-pulse font-bold text-cobalt">● MONITORING SIGNAL STREAMS</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONCEPT & COGNITIVE MAPPING SECTION (The "Signals" Grid style) -->
  <section id="about" class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt bg-paper relative">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12">
      
      <!-- Left Column: The Big Text Title Block -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-4 p-6 md:p-12 border-b-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r-2 border-cobalt flex flex-col justify-between">
        <div class="space-y-4">
          <span class="font-mono text-xs text-cobalt uppercase tracking-widest block font-bold">// RESEARCH & ARCHIVE</span>
          <h3 class="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none">THE COBALT<br/>SPECTRUM OF<br/>EASTERN TAIWAN</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="mt-8 space-y-4 font-mono text-xs text-ink/70">
          <p>
            Historically, cobalt blue has been used in physical stoneware and architectural drawings to depict structural logic and natural beauty. Our 2026 Biennale takes this historical material and translates it into acoustic wave mechanics.
          </p>
          <div class="p-3 border border-cobalt/30 bg-cobalt/5 flex items-center gap-3">
            <span class="font-pixel text-xl text-cobalt">#0033FF</span>
            <span>The official color language of the Pacific shorelines under precise moonlit spectrums.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right Column: Interactive Diagram Block resembling bottom poster image with technical matrix dots -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-8 p-6 md:p-12 blueprint-grid relative flex flex-col justify-between">
        
        <!-- Beautiful Schematic Diagram constructed with SVG & interactive dots -->
        <div class="w-full border-cobalt-raw p-6 bg-paper relative shadow-sm min-h-[350px] flex flex-col justify-between">
          <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none"></div>
          
          <!-- Grid Blueprint Schematic SVG (resembling "Signals" blueprint circular diagrams) -->
          <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none opacity-40">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 500 500" class="w-1/2 h-auto text-cobalt fill-none stroke-current">
              <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="180" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="8,4" />
              <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="120" stroke-width="2" />
              <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="60" stroke-width="1" />
              <line x1="250" y1="20" x2="250" y2="480" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,4" />
              <line x1="20" y1="250" x2="480" y2="250" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,4" />
              <line x1="70" y1="70" x2="430" y2="430" stroke-width="1.5" />
            </svg>
          </div>

          <div class="flex justify-between items-start font-mono text-xs text-cobalt z-10">
            <span>[DIAGRAM_04: COGNITIVE TIDAL NODE MAPPING]</span>
            <span>SCALE: ACTIVE REALTIME</span>
          </div>

          <!-- Grid of interactive Signal Stations (User can click on points to trigger coordinate readout) -->
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 my-12 z-10">
            
            <button onclick="activateNode('Taitung Harbor', '121.15', '22.75', 'STABLE')" class="node-btn text-left p-4 border border-cobalt bg-paper hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
              <span class="block font-mono text-[10px] text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper/85 mb-2">[NODE_01]</span>
              <span class="block font-bold text-sm tracking-tight">TAITUNG HARBOR</span>
              <span class="block font-mono text-[9px] mt-1 opacity-70">LAT 22.75° / LON 121.15°</span>
            </button>

            <button onclick="activateNode('Dulan Shore', '121.23', '22.87', 'INTERMITTENT')" class="node-btn text-left p-4 border border-cobalt bg-paper hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
              <span class="block font-mono text-[10px] text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper/85 mb-2">[NODE_02]</span>
              <span class="block font-bold text-sm tracking-tight">DULAN SHORE</span>
              <span class="block font-mono text-[9px] mt-1 opacity-70">LAT 22.87° / LON 121.23°</span>
            </button>

            <button onclick="activateNode('Chenggong Port', '121.37', '23.12', 'AMPLIFIED')" class="node-btn text-left p-4 border border-cobalt bg-paper hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
              <span class="block font-mono text-[10px] text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper/85 mb-2">[NODE_03]</span>
              <span class="block font-bold text-sm tracking-tight">CHENGGONG PORT</span>
              <span class="block font-mono text-[9px] mt-1 opacity-70">LAT 23.12° / LON 121.37°</span>
            </button>

            <button onclick="activateNode('Sanxiantai Node', '121.41', '23.13', 'RESONANT')" class="node-btn text-left p-4 border border-cobalt bg-paper hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all group">
              <span class="block font-mono text-[10px] text-cobalt group-hover:text-paper/85 mb-2">[NODE_04]</span>
              <span class="block font-bold text-sm tracking-tight">SANXIANTAI CRAG</span>
              <span class="block font-mono text-[9px] mt-1 opacity-70">LAT 23.13° / LON 121.41°</span>
            </button>

          </div>

          <!-- Interactive Readout Box below -->
          <div id="node-readout" class="p-4 border-t-2 border-cobalt bg-paper flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center font-mono text-xs z-10">
            <div>
              <span class="text-cobalt font-bold">ACTIVE SCANNER:</span>
              <span id="readout-title" class="ml-2 font-bold text-ink">TAITUNG HARBOR</span>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-4 mt-2 md:mt-0 text-[11px]">
              <span>COORD: <span id="readout-coord" class="text-cobalt">LAT 22.75 / LON 121.15</span></span>
              <span>STATUS: <span id="readout-status" class="text-cobalt uppercase font-bold">STABLE</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- BIENNALE EXHIBITION & STAGES GRID -->
  <section id="exhibitions" class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt bg-paper relative">
    
    <!-- Title Line -->
    <div class="border-b-2 border-cobalt px-6 py-8 md:px-12 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
      <div>
        <span class="font-mono text-xs text-cobalt uppercase tracking-widest block font-bold mb-1">// EXHIBITIONS & PERFORMANCE STAGES</span>
        <h2 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight">BIENNALE MODULES</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/70 max-w-sm">
        All stages operate in dialogue with natural Pacific tides. Event locations will trigger acoustic generators built in alignment with sea elevations.
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Cards Layout: Ultra high UI density, raw block borders, blue overlays -->
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
      
      <!-- Module 01 -->
      <div class="border-b-2 md:border-r-2 border-cobalt p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-between relative hover:bg-cobalt/5 transition-all group">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.02] pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
            <span class="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-cobalt">[MODULE_01]</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-cobalt text-white font-mono text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider">STAGE: SEA_COAST</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-ink group-hover:text-cobalt transition-colors mb-2">MOONLIT SEA CONCERT</h3>
          <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/70 leading-relaxed">
            Live music echoing across the tide pools of Taitung. Using low-frequency amplifiers that align with incoming lunar swell waves, the performance harmonizes directly with natural marine resonance.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="mt-8 pt-4 border-t border-cobalt/20 flex justify-between items-center text-xs font-mono">
          <span>DATE: JUNE 29 – JULY 1</span>
          <span class="text-cobalt font-bold group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform inline-block">VIEW LINEUP →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Module 02 -->
      <div class="border-b-2 lg:border-r-2 border-cobalt p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-between relative hover:bg-cobalt/5 transition-all group">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.02] pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
            <span class="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-cobalt">[MODULE_02]</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-cobalt text-white font-mono text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider">STAGE: ART_SPACE_III</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-ink group-hover:text-cobalt transition-colors mb-2">TIDAL RESONATOR LAB</h3>
          <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/70 leading-relaxed">
            An indoor contemporary installation translating underwater seismograph frequencies into cobalt blue generative raster matrices. Created in direct collaboration with C-LAB’s technical collective.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="mt-8 pt-4 border-t border-cobalt/20 flex justify-between items-center text-xs font-mono">
          <span>DATE: AUGUST 10 – 25</span>
          <span class="text-cobalt font-bold group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform inline-block">VIEW LAB →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Module 03 -->
      <div class="border-b-2 border-cobalt p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-between relative hover:bg-cobalt/5 transition-all group">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.02] pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
            <span class="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-cobalt">[MODULE_03]</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-cobalt text-white font-mono text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider">STAGE: OPEN_STUDIO</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-ink group-hover:text-cobalt transition-colors mb-2">EPHEMERAL LINOCUT STATIONS</h3>
          <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/70 leading-relaxed">
            Interactive, tactile printmaking workshops on the shore cliffs. Master woodcut creators guide visitors in producing high-contrast block prints using genuine sea salt ink on recycled fibers.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="mt-8 pt-4 border-t border-cobalt/20 flex justify-between items-center text-xs font-mono">
          <span>DATE: DAILY ENGAGEMENT</span>
          <span class="text-cobalt font-bold group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform inline-block">JOIN STUDIO →</span>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CREATORS / ARTISTS LINEUP (Interactivity featuring detailed cards that display overlay coordinates on hover) -->
  <section class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt bg-paper relative">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12">
      
      <!-- Artists title block -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-4 p-6 md:p-12 border-b-2 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r-2 border-cobalt flex flex-col justify-between">
        <div>
          <span class="font-mono text-xs text-cobalt uppercase tracking-widest block font-bold mb-1">// COGNITIVE VOICES</span>
          <h2 class="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-ink">EXHIBITING CREATORS</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="mt-8 font-mono text-xs text-ink/75 space-y-4">
          <p>
            An alliance of sound architects, traditional printmaking masters, and architectural engineers operating inside the eastern coastal grid coordinates.
          </p>
          <div class="p-4 border border-dashed border-cobalt text-cobalt bg-cobalt/5 font-bold">
            "We build blueprints, we paint tides, we capture frequency."
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Artists Lineup list -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col divide-y-2 divide-cobalt">
        
        <!-- Artist 01 -->
        <div class="p-6 hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 group flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6">
            <span class="font-pixel text-2xl text-cobalt group-hover:text-white">[01]</span>
            <div>
              <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Kuan-Sheng Wu (吳冠勝)</h4>
              <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/65 group-hover:text-white/80">Digital Acoustic Synthesist // Sound Sculptor</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6 font-mono text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-white w-full md:w-auto justify-between md:justify-end">
            <span>RESIDENCY: DURAN STATION</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 border border-cobalt group-hover:border-white font-bold">[SPECTRAL_MAP_A]</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Artist 02 -->
        <div class="p-6 hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 group flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6">
            <span class="font-pixel text-2xl text-cobalt group-hover:text-white">[02]</span>
            <div>
              <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Min-An Tseng (曾敏安)</h4>
              <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/65 group-hover:text-white/80">Contemporary Blockprint Master // Folk Historian</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6 font-mono text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-white w-full md:w-auto justify-between md:justify-end">
            <span>RESIDENCY: SHANXIANTAI CRAG</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 border border-cobalt group-hover:border-white font-bold">[BLOCKPRINT_X]</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Artist 03 -->
        <div class="p-6 hover:bg-cobalt hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 group flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6">
            <span class="font-pixel text-2xl text-cobalt group-hover:text-white">[03]</span>
            <div>
              <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">The C-LAB Signals Collective</h4>
              <p class="font-mono text-xs text-ink/65 group-hover:text-white/80">Generative Systems & Coding Engineers</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center gap-6 font-mono text-xs text-cobalt group-hover:text-white w-full md:w-auto justify-between md:justify-end">
            <span>RESIDENCY: ART SPACE III</span>
            <span class="px-2 py-1 border border-cobalt group-hover:border-white font-bold">[GEO_MATRIX_Z]</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- INTERACTIVE BOOKING GATE PASS TERMINAL -->
  <section id="booking" class="w-full border-b-2 border-cobalt blueprint-grid relative py-12 px-6 md:px-12">
    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
      
      <div class="border-cobalt-raw bg-paper relative p-6 md:p-8 shadow-2xl">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1.5 bg-cobalt"></div>

        <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center border-b-2 border-cobalt pb-6 mb-6 gap-4">
          <div>
            <span class="font-mono text-xs text-cobalt uppercase font-bold tracking-widest block mb-1">[MODULE: REGISTRATION]</span>
            <h3 class="text-3xl font-pixel text-cobalt">GATEWAY GENERATOR</h3>
          </div>
          <span class="font-mono text-xs bg-cobalt text-white py-1 px-3">TERM_SESSION: ONLINE</span>
        </div>

        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
          
          <!-- Booking Inputs Terminal -->
          <div class="space-y-4 font-mono text-xs">
            <p class="text-ink/70 leading-relaxed mb-4">
              Register for the contemporary arts pass. Custom cryptographic print passes will be compiled immediately with your unique coastal frequency alignment codes.
            </p>

            <div>
              <label class="block text-cobalt font-bold mb-1 uppercase">PASSENGER NAME / 登記姓名</label>
              <input type="text" id="pass-name" value="ALICE CHEN" oninput="updateTicket()"
                class="w-full bg-paper border-cobalt-raw p-2.5 text-xs text-ink focus:bg-cobalt/5 outline-none font-bold uppercase">
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label class="block text-cobalt font-bold mb-1 uppercase">GRID STATION / 選擇展區</label>
                <select id="pass-station" onchange="updateTicket()"
                  class="w-full bg-paper border-cobalt-raw p-2.5 text-[11px] text-ink focus:bg-cobalt/5 outline-none font-bold">
                  <option value="TAITUNG COAST">TAITUNG COAST</option>
                  <option value="DULAN RESIDENCY">DULAN RESIDENCY</option>
                  <option value="C-LAB SPACE">C-LAB SPACE III</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-cobalt font-bold mb-1 uppercase">SPECTRAL ACCESS / 頻譜類別</label>
                <select id="pass-spectral" onchange="updateTicket()"
                  class="w-full bg-paper border-cobalt-raw p-2.5 text-[11px] text-ink focus:bg-cobalt/5 outline-none font-bold">
                  <option value="FULL RESONANCE">FULL RESONANCE</option>
                  <option value="TIDAL ONLY">TIDAL ACCESS</option>
                  <option value="AEROPHONE PASS">AEROPHONE ONLY</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <button onclick="printTicket()" class="w-full bg-cobalt hover:bg-cobalt-raw hover:text-cobalt hover:bg-transparent text-white font-bold py-3 transition-all border-2 border-transparent hover:border-cobalt text-sm uppercase tracking-wider mt-4">
                COMPILE GATEWAY PASS RECEIPT
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Live Printable Ticket Receipt Preview -->
          <div class="border-2 border-dashed border-cobalt p-6 bg-paper relative flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden min-h-[300px]">
            <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.04] pointer-events-none"></div>
            
            <div class="flex justify-between items-start font-mono text-[10px] text-cobalt">
              <span>GATE PASS ID: <span id="ticket-id" class="font-bold">#4922-TW</span></span>
              <span class="font-bold">島群之間 SIGNALS</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Big ticket aesthetic badge from images -->
            <div class="my-6 py-4 border-y border-cobalt/40 relative">
              <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 text-[10px] font-mono text-cobalt/30">TAIWAN CONTEMPORARY</div>
              
              <div class="font-pixel text-4xl text-cobalt" id="ticket-station-display">TAITUNG COAST</div>
              <div class="font-mono text-sm tracking-widest text-ink mt-2" id="ticket-name-display">ALICE CHEN</div>
            </div>

            <div class="space-y-2 font-mono text-[11px]">
              <div class="flex justify-between">
                <span class="text-ink/65">ACC_MODE:</span>
                <span id="ticket-spectral-display" class="font-bold text-cobalt">FULL RESONANCE</span>
              </div>
              <div class="flex justify-between">
                <span class="text-ink/65">LAT_FREQ:</span>
                <span id="ticket-freq-display" class="font-bold text-cobalt">22.87° N / 98.4 MHz</span>
              </div>
              <div class="flex justify-between">
                <span class="text-ink/65">STATUS:</span>
                <span class="text-emerald-600 font-bold animate-pulse">✓ VERIFIED_COMPILED</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Barcode SVG Simulation for raw technical feel -->
            <div class="mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-cobalt/20 flex flex-col items-center">
              <svg class="w-full h-8 text-cobalt" fill="currentColor">
                <rect x="0" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="8" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="14" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="24" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="30" width="8" height="32" />
                <rect x="42" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="50" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="56" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="66" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="74" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="80" width="8" height="32" />
                <rect x="92" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="98" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="106" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="116" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="124" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="130" width="8" height="32" />
                <rect x="142" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="150" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="156" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="166" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="174" width="8" height="32" />
                <rect x="186" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="192" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="200" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="210" width="10" height="32" />
                <rect x="225" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="232" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="240" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="250" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="258" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="264" width="8" height="32" />
                <rect x="276" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="284" width="2" height="32" />
                <rect x="290" width="6" height="32" />
                <rect x="300" width="4" height="32" />
                <rect x="308" width="12" height="32" />
              </svg>
              <span class="text-[9px] font-mono text-ink/45 mt-1 font-bold">SERIAL: 2026-ISLAND-SIGNAL-SYSTEM</span>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- SPONSORS & AFFILIATION STRIP (Beautiful crisp black-and-blue mini badges) -->
  <section class="w-full bg-paper border-b-2 border-cobalt py-8 px-6 overflow-hidden">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-6">
      <span class="font-mono text-xs text-cobalt font-bold tracking-widest">// COLLABORATING ORGS & CO-SPONSORS</span>
      <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-8 justify-center items-center">
        <!-- Badge 01 -->
        <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border border-cobalt px-3 py-1 bg-paper text-cobalt font-mono text-xs font-bold">
          <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-cobalt inline-block"></span>
          <span>TAIWAN MINISTRY OF CULTURE</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Badge 02 -->
        <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border border-cobalt px-3 py-1 bg-paper text-cobalt font-mono text-xs font-bold">
          <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-cobalt inline-block"></span>
          <span>C-LAB TAIWAN CONTEMPORARY</span>
        </div>
        <!-- Badge 03 -->
        <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border border-cobalt px-3 py-1 bg-paper text-cobalt font-mono text-xs font-bold">
          <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-cobalt inline-block"></span>
          <span>EAST COAST LAND ART SOC.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- NOTIFICATION CONTAINER (Replacement for alerts as required by prompt) -->
  <div id="custom-notification" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-cobalt border-2 border-ink text-white p-4 font-mono text-xs z-50 shadow-xl hidden max-w-sm">
    <div class="flex justify-between items-start gap-4">
      <div>
        <span class="font-bold block uppercase mb-1">▶ COMPILER STATUS</span>
        <p id="notification-message">System updated with fresh coordinates.</p>
      </div>
      <button onclick="closeNotification()" class="text-white hover:text-paper font-bold">[X]</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer class="w-full bg-ink text-paper py-12 px-6 border-t-2 border-cobalt relative">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 halftone-bg opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none"></div>
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 relative z-10">
      
      <div class="md:col-span-4 space-y-4">
        <span class="font-pixel text-3xl text-cobalt">島群之間</span>
        <p class="font-mono text-xs text-paper/70 leading-relaxed max-w-xs">
          A design experiment capturing raw geographic structures and converting them into acoustic, interactive signal installations.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="md:col-span-4 space-y-2 font-mono text-xs">
        <h4 class="font-bold text-cobalt uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">// COORDINATE ARCHIVE</h4>
        <p class="text-paper/70">Main Station: Taitung Coastlands, Taiwan</p>
        <p class="text-paper/70">Secondary Hub: Art Space III, Contemporary Culture Lab (C-LAB), Taipei</p>
        <p class="text-paper/70">Broadcasting: 98.4 MHz, Live Streams Active</p>
      </div>

      <div class="md:col-span-4 space-y-2 font-mono text-xs">
        <h4 class="font-bold text-cobalt uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">// LEGAL & TECHNICAL</h4>
        <p class="text-paper/70">&copy; 2026 Taiwan East Coast Land Arts Festival. All signal arrays, linocut scans, and frequency generators are open-source. Created in digital visual alignment.</p>
      </div>

    </div>
  </footer>

  <!-- DYNAMIC INTERACTION SCRIPTS -->
  <script>
    // Variables for the Signal Lab Wave Controller
    let freq = 4.0;
    let amp = 30.0;
    let mode = 'sine'; // sine, tidal, noise

    // Setup Canvas Visualizer
    const canvas = document.getElementById('signalCanvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    function resizeCanvas() {
      // Set resolution relative to visually rendered block dimensions
      canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;
      canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
    }
    
    // Resize on initialization and on window resize
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      resizeCanvas();
    });

    // Control Elements Integration
    const freqSlider = document.getElementById('freq-slider');
    const ampSlider = document.getElementById('amp-slider');
    const freqVal = document.getElementById('freq-val');
    const ampVal = document.getElementById('amp-val');

    freqSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
      freq = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      freqVal.innerText = `${freq.toFixed(1)} Hz`;
    });

    ampSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
      amp = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      ampVal.innerText = `${amp.toFixed(1)} V`;
      // Dynamically update the ticket preview frequency display as well
      document.getElementById('ticket-freq-display').innerText = `22.87° N / ${(freq * 24.6).toFixed(1)} MHz`;
    });

    function setRenderMode(selectedMode) {
      mode = selectedMode;
      
      // Update UI button visuals
      const buttons = ['sine', 'tidal', 'noise'];
      buttons.forEach(b => {
        const btn = document.getElementById(`mode-${b}`);
        if (b === selectedMode) {
          btn.className = "bg-cobalt text-white py-1 px-2 border border-cobalt text-center font-bold";
        } else {
          btn.className = "bg-transparent text-cobalt py-1 px-2 border border-cobalt text-center hover:bg-cobalt/10";
        }
      });

      triggerNotification(`Render mode set to: ${selectedMode.toUpperCase()}`);
    }

    // Animation Loop for the Blue Visualizer Map (Signals grid reproduction)
    let angle = 0;
    function animate() {
      if (!ctx) return;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      // Draw Blueprint Grid Lines in the canvas
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.09)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      
      // Vertical grid lines
      for (let x = 0; x < canvas.width; x += 20) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(x, canvas.height);
        ctx.stroke();
      }
      // Horizontal grid lines
      for (let y = 0; y < canvas.height; y += 20) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, y);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, y);
        ctx.stroke();
      }

      // Draw Main Visualizing Waves in Electric Cobalt
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0033FF';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
      ctx.beginPath();

      const midY = canvas.height / 2;

      for (let x = 0; x < canvas.width; x++) {
        let y = midY;
        
        if (mode === 'sine') {
          // Pure sine wave synthesis
          y = midY + Math.sin(x * (freq / 100) + angle) * amp;
        } else if (mode === 'tidal') {
          // Double modulated wave representing tidal pull
          y = midY + Math.sin(x * (freq / 100) + angle) * amp + Math.cos(x * 0.01 + angle * 0.5) * (amp / 2);
        } else if (mode === 'noise') {
          // Sharp, raw geometric raster signals reminiscent of the technical blueprints
          const stepValue = Math.floor(x / 12) * 12;
          y = midY + Math.sin(stepValue * (freq / 100) + angle) * amp + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8;
        }

        if (x === 0) {
          ctx.moveTo(x, y);
        } else {
          ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        }
      }
      ctx.stroke();

      // Draw a secondary decorative dashed frequency line
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 51, 255, 0.4)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let x = 0; x < canvas.width; x++) {
        let y = (midY + 40) + Math.sin(x * (freq / 120) - angle * 0.8) * (amp * 0.6);
        if (x === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
        else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
      }
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.setLineDash([]); // Reset line dash

      angle += 0.05;
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    // Cognitive Node Scanner interaction
    function activateNode(name, lon, lat, status) {
      document.getElementById('readout-title').innerText = name;
      document.getElementById('readout-coord').innerText = `LAT ${lat}° N / LON ${lon}° E`;
      document.getElementById('readout-status').innerText = status;
      
      // Trigger temporary frequency spikes in the visualizer controls
      freq = parseFloat((Math.random() * 6 + 3).toFixed(1));
      amp = parseFloat((Math.random() * 40 + 25).toFixed(1));

      freqSlider.value = freq;
      ampSlider.value = amp;
      freqVal.innerText = `${freq} Hz`;
      ampVal.innerText = `${amp} V`;

      triggerNotification(`Scanned coordinates for ${name} [Active Nodes Synchronized]`);
    }

    // Gate Ticket Compilation Logic
    function updateTicket() {
      const name = document.getElementById('pass-name').value || "ALICE CHEN";
      const station = document.getElementById('pass-station').value;
      const spectral = document.getElementById('pass-spectral').value;

      document.getElementById('ticket-name-display').innerText = name.toUpperCase();
      document.getElementById('ticket-station-display').innerText = station.toUpperCase();
      document.getElementById('ticket-spectral-display').innerText = spectral.toUpperCase();
    }

    function printTicket() {
      const randomID = Math.floor(Math.random() * 8999 + 1000);
      document.getElementById('ticket-id').innerText = `#${randomID}-TW`;
      
      triggerNotification("Ticket successfully generated with cryptographic security code.");
    }

    // Notification Handler to replace window alerts
    function triggerNotification(text) {
      const notif = document.getElementById('custom-notification');
      document.getElementById('notification-message').innerText = text;
      notif.classList.remove('hidden');
      
      // Auto-hide after 5 seconds
      setTimeout(() => {
        notif.classList.add('hidden');
      }, 5000);
    }

    function closeNotification() {
      document.getElementById('custom-notification').classList.add('hidden');
    }

    // On Load Initialization
    window.onload = function() {
      resizeCanvas();
      animate();
    };
  </script>

</body>
</html>
10
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Teatro Griego — Immersive Digital Archive</title>
  
  <!-- Tailwind CSS CDN -->
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  
  <!-- Google Fonts: Cinzel Decorative for Headers, Space Grotesk for Technical text, Playfair for elegant bodies -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@400;700;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  
  <!-- FontAwesome Icons via CDN for premium graphical buttons -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            cobalt: {
              DEFAULT: '#102ce6',
              light: '#3b54ff',
              dark: '#08178a',
              glow: 'rgba(16, 44, 230, 0.4)'
            },
            void: '#060608',
            stark: '#ffffff'
          },
          fontFamily: {
            serif: ['"Playfair Display"', 'serif'],
            display: ['"Cinzel Decorative"', 'serif'],
            mono: ['"Space Grotesk"', 'sans-serif']
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>

  <style>
    /* Custom Scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar {
      width: 6px;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
      background: #060608;
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
      background: #102ce6;
      border-radius: 3px;
    }

    /* Screenprint Halftone & Grid Textures */
    .bg-halftone {
      background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 1px, transparent 0);
      background-size: 24px 24px;
    }
    .bg-technical-grid {
      background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(16, 44, 230, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px),
                        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(16, 44, 230, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 40px 40px;
    }
    .screen-noise {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh;
      opacity: 0.04;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 999;
      background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    }

    /* Elegant Text Glow and Outlines to match Risograph print styling */
    .text-outline-stark {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1px #ffffff;
      color: transparent;
    }
    .text-outline-cobalt {
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px #102ce6;
      color: transparent;
    }

    /* Custom Transitions & Hover Effects */
    .transition-premium {
      transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    }
    
    /* Pulses matching divine presence */
    @keyframes subtlePulse {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1); }
      50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.02); }
    }
    .deity-pulse {
      animation: subtlePulse 4s infinite ease-in-out;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-void text-stark font-mono antialiased selection:bg-cobalt selection:text-stark overflow-x-hidden relative">

  <!-- Aesthetic Screen Noise & CRT Filter overlay -->
  <div class="screen-noise"></div>

  <!-- FIXED DECORATIVE ANNOTATIONS (Brutalist Poster Theme) -->
  <div class="hidden lg:flex fixed left-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex-col gap-8 text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] text-cobalt-light/60 writing-mode-vertical z-50 pointer-events-none uppercase">
    <div>ARCHIVE SYSTEM // MODEL.TG.11</div>
    <div class="h-24 w-px bg-cobalt/30 mx-auto"></div>
    <div>LAT: 37.5961° N / LON: 23.0792° E (EPIDAURUS)</div>
  </div>
  <div class="hidden lg:flex fixed right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex-col gap-8 text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] text-cobalt-light/60 writing-mode-vertical z-50 pointer-events-none uppercase">
    <div>DIONYSUS FESTIVAL — ATHENS V.CENTURY B.C.</div>
    <div class="h-24 w-px bg-cobalt/30 mx-auto"></div>
    <div>TEATRO CLÁSICO DE OCCIDENTE</div>
  </div>

  <!-- EXQUISITE HEADER/NAVBAR -->
  <header class="border-b border-cobalt/40 bg-void/95 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-40 transition-premium">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
      <!-- Logo Branding -->
      <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-3 group">
        <div class="relative w-10 h-10 border border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-cobalt transition-premium">
          <span class="text-xs font-bold font-display group-hover:text-stark text-cobalt-light">T</span>
          <div class="absolute -inset-1 border border-cobalt/30 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-premium"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex flex-col">
          <span class="text-sm font-bold tracking-widest font-display text-stark group-hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium">TEATRO GRIEGO</span>
          <span class="text-[9px] text-cobalt-light/70 tracking-widest uppercase">Digital Amphitheater Archive</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- Navigation Links -->
      <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8 text-xs tracking-wider uppercase">
        <a href="#origen" class="hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium flex items-center gap-2">
          <span class="text-[9px] text-cobalt-light">01 //</span> Origen
        </a>
        <a href="#arquitectura" class="hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium flex items-center gap-2">
          <span class="text-[9px] text-cobalt-light">02 //</span> Arquitectura
        </a>
        <a href="#mascaras" class="hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium flex items-center gap-2">
          <span class="text-[9px] text-cobalt-light">03 //</span> El Arte Dramático
        </a>
        <a href="#acustica" class="hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium flex items-center gap-2">
          <span class="text-[9px] text-cobalt-light">04 //</span> Acústica Virtual
        </a>
      </nav>

      <!-- Action Button & Audio Indicator -->
      <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
        <button onclick="toggleAudio()" id="ambient-audio-btn" class="p-2 border border-cobalt/40 rounded-full hover:border-stark text-cobalt-light hover:text-stark transition-premium flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10" title="Activar Ambiente Sonoro">
          <i id="audio-icon" class="fa-solid fa-volume-xmark text-sm"></i>
        </button>
        <a href="#simulador" class="hidden sm:inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest bg-cobalt border border-cobalt-light hover:bg-void hover:border-stark text-stark transition-premium">
          <span>PROMPT ORÁCULO</span>
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right text-[9px]"></i>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- HERO SECTION: THE MAJESTIC PROLOGUE -->
  <section class="relative min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center overflow-hidden border-b border-cobalt/40 bg-technical-grid">
    <!-- Gradient Overlay matching the exact saturated electric blue feel -->
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-cobalt/10 via-void/90 to-void pointer-events-none"></div>
    <div class="absolute -right-40 -top-40 w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-cobalt/20 blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-20 w-full relative z-10 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
      
      <!-- Left Column: The Dramatic Texts -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col justify-center space-y-8">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-3 border border-cobalt/40 px-3 py-1 bg-cobalt/5 self-start">
          <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-stark rounded-full animate-ping"></span>
          <span class="text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] text-cobalt-light uppercase">ESTUDIO HISTÓRICO Y SENSORIAL</span>
        </div>

        <div class="space-y-4">
          <h1 class="text-5xl md:text-8xl font-display font-black leading-none uppercase tracking-tight text-stark">
            Teatro<br>
            <span class="text-outline-stark text-cobalt-light">Griego</span>
          </h1>
          <p class="text-cobalt-light font-bold text-lg md:text-xl tracking-wider font-display max-w-xl">
            La cuna de la catarsis colectiva, la geometría acústica sagrada y el misterio divino de Dioniso.
          </p>
        </div>

        <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif leading-relaxed text-sm md:text-base max-w-2xl">
          El origen de la representación dramática occidental occidental nació en Grecia entre los siglos VI y V a.C. Las fiestas dionisíacas sirvieron de cuna para las primeras tragedias de Esquilo, Sófocles y Eurípides, fusionando música, coro y rito sagrado sobre piedras que desafiaron el paso del tiempo.
        </p>

        <!-- Technical Specs Row -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 border-t border-cobalt/30 pt-6 max-w-lg">
          <div>
            <div class="text-xs text-cobalt-light">DISEÑO</div>
            <div class="text-lg font-bold">100% Acústico</div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="text-xs text-cobalt-light">PROPÓSITO</div>
            <div class="text-lg font-bold">Catarsis Colectiva</div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="text-xs text-cobalt-light">DEIDAD</div>
            <div class="text-lg font-bold">Dioniso</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4 pt-4">
          <button onclick="scrollToId('arquitectura')" class="px-6 py-3 bg-cobalt border border-cobalt-light hover:bg-stark hover:text-void hover:border-stark text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-premium">
            Explorar Arquitectura
          </button>
          <button onclick="scrollToId('simulador')" class="px-6 py-3 border border-cobalt/60 hover:border-stark text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-premium">
            Consultar Oráculo
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right Column: Majestic Statue & Architectural Medallion Hero Art -->
      <div class="lg:col-span-5 relative flex items-center justify-center">
        <!-- Giant background seal representing the circular geometry of the orchestra -->
        <div class="absolute w-[350px] md:w-[480px] h-[350px] md:h-[480px] border border-cobalt/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center animate-spin-slow">
          <div class="w-[85%] h-[85%] border border-dashed border-cobalt/40 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
            <div class="w-[75%] h-[75%] border border-cobalt/20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
              <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-cobalt-light/40">EPIDAURUS • DELOS • ATHENS • EPIDAURUS • DELOS</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Central Decorative Column with Statue Illustration (SVG) -->
        <div class="relative z-10 deity-pulse py-8">
          <!-- Main Greek Statue silhouette + column container -->
          <div class="w-64 h-96 relative flex flex-col items-center justify-end">
            <!-- Classic Statue Art rendered beautifully in white vectors with a glowing cobalt backshadow -->
            <div class="absolute top-0 w-48 h-72 drop-shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(16,44,230,0.6)]">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 150" class="w-full h-full fill-stark" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                <!-- Greek Classical Pose Stylized Art Path -->
                <path d="M50 15 C53 15, 55 18, 54 22 C53 25, 51 27, 49 28 C52 30, 56 34, 57 38 C58 42, 59 48, 57 52 C55 56, 52 58, 48 59 C46 60, 44 60, 42 62 C40 64, 38 68, 36 74 C34 80, 34 88, 33 95 L35 125 L45 128 L52 110 L58 100 C62 95, 64 92, 65 85 L67 60 L62 55 L58 58 L54 62 L50 63 L48 70 L46 72 L45 80 L44 92 L42 105 L41 125 C41 128, 43 130, 46 130 L55 130 C58 130, 60 128, 62 122 L65 110 L68 95 C70 85, 71 78, 70 70 L68 50 C67 45, 66 40, 68 35 L69 32 L66 30 C64 30, 62 32, 61 34 L58 42 L55 46 L52 48 L51 45 C51 40, 52 35, 53 30 Z" />
                <path d="M48 5 C45 5, 43 7, 42 10 C41 12, 41 15, 43 18 C45 20, 48 22, 52 22 C55 22, 57 20, 58 17 C59 14, 58 11, 56 8 C53 6, 51 5, 48 5 Z" />
                <!-- Fold drapery details -->
                <path d="M40 35 L44 55 M42 45 L46 65 M48 50 L52 75 M46 68 L50 95 M38 65 L41 85 M45 90 L48 115" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" />
              </svg>
            </div>

            <!-- Ionic Column base supporting the statue (Matches exact visual aesthetic) -->
            <div class="w-48 h-32 border-2 border-cobalt bg-void/90 flex flex-col items-center justify-between p-2 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,44,230,0.2)]">
              <!-- Column Capital -->
              <div class="w-full flex justify-between px-1">
                <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center"><div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-cobalt"></div></div>
                <div class="h-2 w-2/3 bg-cobalt self-center"></div>
                <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center"><div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-cobalt"></div></div>
              </div>
              <!-- Shaft -->
              <div class="w-11/12 h-16 flex justify-around border-t-2 border-b-2 border-cobalt pt-1 pb-1">
                <div class="w-1.5 h-full bg-cobalt/70"></div>
                <div class="w-1.5 h-full bg-cobalt/70"></div>
                <div class="w-1.5 h-full bg-cobalt/70"></div>
                <div class="w-1.5 h-full bg-cobalt/70"></div>
                <div class="w-1.5 h-full bg-cobalt/70"></div>
              </div>
              <!-- Base -->
              <div class="w-full h-3 bg-cobalt flex items-center justify-center">
                <span class="text-[7px] text-stark font-bold tracking-widest">TEMPLUM DIONYSI</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Float Floating Technical Labels -->
        <div class="absolute left-4 top-1/4 border border-cobalt/40 bg-void/80 px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] space-y-0.5">
          <p class="text-cobalt-light font-bold">ESCULTURA CLÁSICA</p>
          <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif">Mármol Pentélico</p>
        </div>
        <div class="absolute right-4 bottom-1/4 border border-cobalt/40 bg-void/80 px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] space-y-0.5">
          <p class="text-cobalt-light font-bold">COLUMNATA JÓNICA</p>
          <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif">Sección 09/B</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- INTERACTIVE ARCHITECTURE SECTION: THE BLUEPRINT -->
  <section id="arquitectura" class="py-24 border-b border-cobalt/40 relative bg-halftone">
    <!-- Subtle Gradient light -->
    <div class="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-48 bg-gradient-to-t from-cobalt/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
      
      <!-- Section Title & Narrative -->
      <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-16 gap-6">
        <div class="space-y-4">
          <div class="text-xs text-cobalt-light tracking-widest uppercase">// GEOMETRÍA SAGRADA Y ACÚSTICA</div>
          <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-display font-bold uppercase">PARTES DEL TEATRO</h2>
          <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif max-w-xl text-sm md:text-base">
            Pasea el cursor por las diferentes zonas marcadas de la maqueta arquitectónica interactiva para descubrir la función técnica y espiritual de cada elemento del anfiteatro clásico.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="border border-cobalt/40 bg-void p-4 max-w-xs text-[11px] space-y-1">
          <p class="text-cobalt-light font-bold uppercase"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-nodes mr-2"></i>SISTEMA DIGITAL ACTIVO</p>
          <p class="text-gray-400">Haz clic en los nodos de la estructura para ver los análisis profundos correspondientes.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- MAIN INTERACTIVE CONTAINER: Grid containing visual Blueprint and detail panel -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-stretch">
        
        <!-- Interactive Map (Left Panel - 7 columns) -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-7 bg-void border border-cobalt/50 relative p-6 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(16,44,230,0.1)]">
          <!-- Background Grid lines decoration -->
          <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-technical-grid opacity-20 pointer-events-none"></div>
          
          <div class="relative z-10 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-cobalt/20 pb-4 mb-6">
            <span class="text-xs text-cobalt-light tracking-wider"><i class="fa-solid fa-compass mr-1"></i> CARTOGRAFÍA ESTRUCTURAL / AMFITEATRO DE EPIDAURO</span>
            <span class="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-mono">MAP-REF: 104-E</span>
          </div>

          <!-- THE INTERACTIVE SVG BLUEPRINT -->
          <div class="relative z-10 w-full flex items-center justify-center py-6">
            <svg id="theatre-blueprint" viewBox="0 0 500 320" class="w-full max-w-lg h-auto drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,44,230,0.35)]" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <!-- Definitions for patterns & markers if needed -->
              <defs>
                <radialGradient id="highlightGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
                  <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#102ce6" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
                  <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#102ce6" stop-opacity="0"/>
                </radialGradient>
              </defs>

              <!-- Grid overlay helper line visual -->
              <line x1="250" y1="20" x2="250" y2="300" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,3" />
              <line x1="20" y1="160" x2="480" y2="160" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,3" />

              <!-- STAGES & BUILDINGS -->
              <!-- Skene (Stage Building Block) -->
              <g id="node-skene" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('skene')">
                <rect x="130" y="230" width="240" height="40" fill="#060608" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1.5" class="transition-premium group-hover:fill-cobalt/20" />
                <text x="250" y="254" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1.5" class="pointer-events-none font-bold">SKENE</text>
                <!-- Detail lines representing doors -->
                <line x1="180" y1="230" x2="180" y2="270" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="0.8" />
                <line x1="250" y1="230" x2="250" y2="270" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="0.8" />
                <line x1="320" y1="230" x2="320" y2="270" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="0.8" />
                <!-- Indicator Ring -->
                <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="14" fill="transparent" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="2,2" class="animate-spin-slow" />
                <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="3" fill="#ffffff" />
              </g>

              <!-- Proskenion (Front of Stage) -->
              <g id="node-proskenion" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('proskenion')">
                <rect x="150" y="200" width="200" height="24" fill="#060608" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1.2" class="transition-premium group-hover:fill-cobalt/20" />
                <text x="250" y="215" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="7" text-anchor="middle" class="pointer-events-none tracking-widest">PROSKENION</text>
                <!-- Interactive pin -->
                <circle cx="200" cy="212" r="3" fill="#102ce6" class="group-hover:fill-stark transition-premium" />
              </g>

              <!-- ORCHESTRA (Circular Central Floor) -->
              <g id="node-orchestra" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('orchestra')">
                <circle cx="250" cy="145" r="50" fill="#060608" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-dasharray="3,1" class="transition-premium group-hover:fill-cobalt/15" />
                <text x="250" y="148" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1" class="pointer-events-none font-bold">ORCHESTRA</text>
                
                <!-- Thymele (Altar - perfect center of the Orchestra) -->
                <circle cx="250" cy="145" r="10" fill="#102ce6" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" class="transition-premium group-hover:scale-125" />
                <circle cx="250" cy="145" r="2" fill="#ffffff" />
              </g>

              <!-- KOILON (Cavea/Auditorium Seating - Large Arc) -->
              <g id="node-koilon" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('koilon')">
                <!-- Outer Tier arcs -->
                <path d="M 50,140 A 200,200 0 0,1 450,140" fill="none" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="14" stroke-dasharray="4,6" class="transition-premium group-hover:stroke-cobalt-light" />
                <path d="M 75,140 A 175,175 0 0,1 425,140" fill="none" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="12" stroke-dasharray="2,4" class="transition-premium group-hover:stroke-cobalt-light" />
                
                <!-- Diazomata (Dividing corridor arc) -->
                <path d="M 105,140 A 145,145 0 0,1 395,140" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" class="transition-premium group-hover:stroke-cobalt" />
                
                <!-- Inner Tier arcs -->
                <path d="M 125,140 A 125,125 0 0,1 375,140" fill="none" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="10" stroke-dasharray="4,4" class="transition-premium group-hover:stroke-cobalt-light" />
                <path d="M 155,140 A 95,95 0 0,1 345,140" fill="none" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="8" stroke-dasharray="1,3" class="transition-premium group-hover:stroke-cobalt-light" />
                
                <text x="250" y="60" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2" class="pointer-events-none font-bold">KOILON / CAVEA</text>
                
                <!-- Interactive Pin on Auditorium top tier -->
                <circle cx="250" cy="35" r="4" fill="#ffffff" class="animate-bounce" />
              </g>

              <!-- PARODOI (Lateral Entrances left and right) -->
              <g id="node-parodoi" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('parodoi')">
                <!-- Left Parodos -->
                <path d="M 60,195 L 140,195 L 140,210 L 60,210 Z" fill="#060608" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1" class="transition-premium group-hover:fill-cobalt/20" />
                <text x="100" y="205" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="6" text-anchor="middle" class="pointer-events-none">PÁRODOS (I)</text>

                <!-- Right Parodos -->
                <path d="M 360,195 L 440,195 L 440,210 L 360,210 Z" fill="#060608" stroke="#102ce6" stroke-width="1" class="transition-premium group-hover:fill-cobalt/20" />
                <text x="400" y="205" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="6" text-anchor="middle" class="pointer-events-none">PÁRODOS (D)</text>
                
                <!-- Pin Indicators -->
                <circle cx="100" cy="202" r="2.5" fill="#ffffff" />
                <circle cx="400" cy="202" r="2.5" fill="#ffffff" />
              </g>

              <!-- DIAZOMATA annotation pins -->
              <g id="node-diazomata" class="cursor-pointer group" onclick="highlightPart('diazomata')">
                <circle cx="110" cy="135" r="3" fill="#102ce6" />
                <line x1="110" y1="135" x2="80" y2="105" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="0.5" />
                <text x="75" y="100" fill="#ffffff" font-family="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" font-size="6" text-anchor="end">DIAZOMATA</text>
              </g>
            </svg>
          </div>

          <!-- Bottom Legend Info -->
          <div class="relative z-10 border-t border-cobalt/20 pt-4 flex justify-between text-[9px] text-gray-400">
            <div><span class="text-cobalt-light">HINT:</span> Haz clic en cualquiera de las regiones en blanco o azul del mapa.</div>
            <div class="text-cobalt-light font-bold">ESCALA 1:500</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Part Details Panel (Right Panel - 5 columns) -->
        <div id="part-details-card" class="lg:col-span-5 bg-cobalt border border-cobalt-light p-8 flex flex-col justify-between text-stark transition-premium shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,44,230,0.3)]">
          <div class="space-y-6">
            <!-- Part Header Tag / ID -->
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-stark/30 pb-4">
              <span id="detail-id" class="text-xs font-mono bg-void text-stark px-3 py-1 font-bold">PARTE // 01</span>
              <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">SECCIÓN ARQUITECTÓNICA</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Part Title -->
            <h3 id="detail-title" class="text-4xl font-display font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">KOILON / CAVEA</h3>
            
            <!-- Description -->
            <p id="detail-desc" class="font-serif text-sm leading-relaxed text-stark/90">
              La gran gradería semicircular excavada directamente sobre la ladera de la colina. Diseñada con una inclinación milimétrica perfecta que permitía la visibilidad total y un comportamiento acústico asombroso, propagando los susurros de la escena hasta la última fila.
            </p>

            <!-- Specifications / Fun Fact grid -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 bg-void/30 p-4 border border-stark/20 rounded-sm">
              <div>
                <span class="text-[9px] text-stark/70 block uppercase">Capacidad Estimada</span>
                <span id="detail-cap" class="text-sm font-bold font-mono">14,000 espectadores</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="text-[9px] text-stark/70 block uppercase">Material Dominante</span>
                <span id="detail-mat" class="text-sm font-bold font-mono">Piedra caliza / Mármol</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Navigation buttons for Parts inside info card -->
          <div class="pt-8 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-stark/30 mt-6">
            <button onclick="prevPart()" class="hover:text-void flex items-center gap-2 text-xs transition-premium">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i> ANTERIOR
            </button>
            <span id="part-counter" class="text-xs font-mono font-bold">01 / 06</span>
            <button onclick="nextPart()" class="hover:text-void flex items-center gap-2 text-xs transition-premium">
              SIGUIENTE <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- THE DRAMATIC ELEMENTS: THREE-CARD PORTFOLIO Grid -->
  <section id="mascaras" class="py-24 border-b border-cobalt/40 bg-void relative">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
      
      <!-- Section Title Header -->
      <div class="text-center space-y-4 mb-16">
        <div class="text-xs text-cobalt-light tracking-widest uppercase">// EL PODER TRÁGICO Y CÓMICO</div>
        <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-display font-bold uppercase tracking-wide">LOS ELEMENTOS DE LA REPRESENTACIÓN</h2>
        <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif max-w-2xl mx-auto text-sm md:text-base">
          El teatro clásico no dependía de la mímica facial, sino de una sobredimensión dramática sustentada en tres pilares eternos.
        </p>
      </div>

      <!-- Grid of The 3 Pillars -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        
        <!-- CARD 1: MÁSCARAS -->
        <div class="border border-cobalt/40 bg-void hover:border-stark p-8 flex flex-col justify-between space-y-8 transition-premium group hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(16,44,230,0.15)]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 border border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center text-cobalt-light group-hover:bg-cobalt group-hover:text-stark transition-premium text-lg font-bold">
              01
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-display font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-stark group-hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium">MÁSCARAS (PROSOPON)</h3>
            <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif text-sm leading-relaxed">
              Dispositivos sagrados fabricados en lino prensado, corteza o madera. Exageraban los rasgos trágicos y cómicos para ser visibles desde distancias monumentales y actuaban como megáfonos primitivos para proyectar la voz.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- Decorative Mask Illustration (SVG) -->
          <div class="h-32 w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-cobalt/5 border border-cobalt/25 rounded p-2">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="h-24 fill-none stroke-cobalt-light stroke-1 group-hover:stroke-stark transition-premium" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <!-- Tragedy Mask -->
              <circle cx="50" cy="45" r="30" />
              <!-- Eyes -->
              <ellipse cx="40" cy="40" rx="4" ry="6" fill="#102ce6" />
              <ellipse cx="60" cy="40" rx="4" ry="6" fill="#102ce6" />
              <!-- Downward Mouth -->
              <path d="M 35,65 Q 50,50 65,65" stroke-width="2" />
              <!-- Forehead lines representing worry -->
              <line x1="45" y1="23" x2="55" y2="23" />
              <line x1="42" y1="28" x2="58" y2="28" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CARD 2: EL CORO -->
        <div class="border border-cobalt/40 bg-void hover:border-stark p-8 flex flex-col justify-between space-y-8 transition-premium group hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(16,44,230,0.15)]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 border border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center text-cobalt-light group-hover:bg-cobalt group-hover:text-stark transition-premium text-lg font-bold">
              02
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-display font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-stark group-hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium">EL CORO (CHORUS)</h3>
            <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif text-sm leading-relaxed">
              Un grupo homogéneo de actores (entre 12 y 15) que cantaban, danzaban y comentaban los acontecimientos de la obra. Actuaban como la voz de la conciencia comunitaria, el puente entre el héroe trágico y la audiencia.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- Decorative Chorus Group Lines (SVG) -->
          <div class="h-32 w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-cobalt/5 border border-cobalt/25 rounded p-2">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="h-24 fill-none stroke-cobalt-light stroke-1 group-hover:stroke-stark transition-premium" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <!-- 3 figures standing close together representing chorus -->
              <!-- Fig 1 -->
              <path d="M 30,85 L 30,55 C 30,50 35,45 40,45" />
              <circle cx="35" cy="35" r="6" />
              <!-- Fig 2 (Center back) -->
              <path d="M 50,85 L 50,45 C 50,40 55,35 60,35" />
              <circle cx="55" cy="25" r="6" />
              <!-- Fig 3 -->
              <path d="M 70,85 L 70,60 C 70,55 75,50 80,50" />
              <circle cx="75" cy="40" r="6" />
              
              <!-- Connecting flow line showing choral choreography -->
              <path d="M 15,75 Q 40,55 85,75" stroke-dasharray="3,3" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CARD 3: LA CATARSIS -->
        <div class="border border-cobalt/40 bg-void hover:border-stark p-8 flex flex-col justify-between space-y-8 transition-premium group hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(16,44,230,0.15)]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 border border-cobalt flex items-center justify-center text-cobalt-light group-hover:bg-cobalt group-hover:text-stark transition-premium text-lg font-bold">
              03
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-display font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-stark group-hover:text-cobalt-light transition-premium">LA CATARSIS (KATHARSIS)</h3>
            <p class="text-gray-400 font-serif text-sm leading-relaxed">
              El fin supremo de la tragedia griega. A través de la experimentación de la compasión y el terror (eleos y phobos), el público alcanzaba una purificación emocional profunda, saliendo del recinto purgados y renovados éticamente.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- Decorative Flame / Flow of emotion (SVG) -->
          <div class="h-32 w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-cobalt/5 border border-cobalt/25 rounded p-2">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" class="h-24 fill-none stroke-cobalt-light stroke-1 group-hover:stroke-stark transition-premium" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <!-- Flame or rising vapor pathways -->
              <path d="M 50,85 C 40,75 35,60 35,45 C 35,30 50,15 50,15 C 50,15 65,30 65,45 C 65,60 60,75 50,85 Z" />
              <path d="M 50,80 C 45,70 42,60 42,50 C 42,40 50,30 50,30 C 50,30 58,40 58,50 C 58,60 55,70 50,80 Z" />
              <path d="M 50,75 L 50,45" stroke-dasharray="2,2" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- INTERACTIVE SIMULATOR / ORACLE GENERATOR -->
  <section id="simulador" class="py-24 border-b border-cobalt/40 bg-technical-grid relative">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-void/80 via-cobalt/5 to-void/90 pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Card Container with Cobalt Header and High UI Density -->
