                            className="w-full bg-[#070e20] border border-[#dfba73]/30 focus:border-[#dfba73] text-white pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded outline-none transition-all duration-300"
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="space-y-1">
                        <label className="text-[#dfba73] font-mono tracking-widest block uppercase text-[10px]">Date of Solar Ingress</label>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <Calendar className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-[#dfba73]/50" />
                          <input 
                            type="date" 
                            required
                            value={birthDate}
                            onChange={(e) => setBirthDate(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full bg-[#070e20] border border-[#dfba73]/30 focus:border-[#dfba73] text-white pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded outline-none transition-all duration-300"
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="space-y-1">
                        <label className="text-[#dfba73] font-mono tracking-widest block uppercase text-[10px]">Hour of Alignment (Local Time)</label>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <Clock className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-[#dfba73]/50" />
                          <input 
                            type="time" 
                            required
                            value={birthTime}
                            onChange={(e) => setBirthTime(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full bg-[#070e20] border border-[#dfba73]/30 focus:border-[#dfba73] text-white pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded outline-none transition-all duration-300"
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="space-y-1">
                        <label className="text-[#dfba73] font-mono tracking-widest block uppercase text-[10px]">Geographical Coordinates (City, Country)</label>
                        <div className="relative">
                          <MapPin className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-[#dfba73]/50" />
                          <input 
                            type="text" 
                            required
                            placeholder="e.g., Venice, Italy" 
                            value={birthPlace}
                            onChange={(e) => setBirthPlace(e.target.value)}
                            className="w-full bg-[#070e20] border border-[#dfba73]/30 focus:border-[#dfba73] text-white pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 rounded outline-none transition-all duration-300"
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="md:col-span-2 pt-4">
                        <button 
                          type="submit"
                          className="w-full py-3.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#c59d5c] via-[#dfba73] to-[#c59d5c] hover:opacity-90 text-[#050a18] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-xs"
                        >
                          <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin-slow" />
                          Synthesize Celestial Coordinates
                        </button>
                      </div>

                    </form>

                  </div>

                </div>
              </section>

              {/* TAROT CARD DRAW SYSTEM */}
              <section className="space-y-8 relative max-w-5xl mx-auto">
                <div className="text-center space-y-2">
                  <span className="text-xs tracking-[0.3em] uppercase text-[#dfba73]/70 block">Hermetic Guidance</span>
                  <h3 className="text-3xl font-light tracking-wide text-white">Daily Tarot Alignment</h3>
                  <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/60 max-w-md mx-auto font-sans">
                    Reveal the current spiritual influences guiding your past memories, present boundaries, and upcoming future horizons.
                  </p>
                  <button 
                    onClick={drawTarotCards}
                    className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 mt-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-[#dfba73] border border-[#dfba73]/30 rounded-full hover:bg-[#dfba73]/10 transition-all"
                  >
                    <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" /> Reshuffle Celestial Deck
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 pt-4">
                  
                  {/* PAST CARD */}
                  <div 
                    onClick={() => setTarotFlipped(prev => ({ ...prev, past: !prev.past }))}
                    className="cursor-pointer group perspective h-80"
                  >
                    <div className={`relative w-full h-full duration-700 preserve-3d ${tarotFlipped.past ? 'rotate-y-180' : ''}`}>
                      
                      {/* CARD BACK */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden bg-[#0a1228] border-double border-4 border-[#dfba73]/70 rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-between shadow-xl">
                        <div className="w-full flex justify-between text-xs text-[#dfba73]/50 font-mono">
                          <span>PAST</span>
                          <span>✦</span>
                        </div>
                        {/* Elegant Mystic Pattern */}
                        <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/40 flex items-center justify-center animate-spin-slow">
                          <Compass className="w-10 h-10 text-[#dfba73]/40" />
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-[#dfba73]/70 tracking-widest uppercase font-mono">Reveal Past Alignment</span>
                      </div>

                      {/* CARD FRONT */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden rotate-y-180 bg-[#060a16] border border-[#dfba73]/80 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col justify-between shadow-2xl text-[#dfd5c6]">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-[#dfba73]/30 pb-2">
                          <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#dfba73] font-mono">Past Influences</span>
                          <span className="text-lg text-[#dfba73]">{tarotSelected.past?.icon}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2 py-4">
                          <h4 className="text-xl font-bold text-[#dfba73] font-serif">{tarotSelected.past?.name}</h4>
                          <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                            {tarotSelected.past?.meaning}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[9px] text-[#dfba73]/50 tracking-wider text-center block font-mono">AETHELGARD NO. XII</span>
                      </div>

                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* PRESENT CARD */}
                  <div 
                    onClick={() => setTarotFlipped(prev => ({ ...prev, present: !prev.present }))}
                    className="cursor-pointer group perspective h-80"
                  >
                    <div className={`relative w-full h-full duration-700 preserve-3d ${tarotFlipped.present ? 'rotate-y-180' : ''}`}>
                      
                      {/* CARD BACK */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden bg-[#0a1228] border-double border-4 border-[#dfba73]/70 rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-between shadow-xl">
                        <div className="w-full flex justify-between text-xs text-[#dfba73]/50 font-mono">
                          <span>PRESENT</span>
                          <span>✦</span>
                        </div>
                        {/* Elegant Mystic Pattern */}
                        <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/40 flex items-center justify-center animate-spin-reverse">
                          <Moon className="w-10 h-10 text-[#dfba73]/40" />
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-[#dfba73]/70 tracking-widest uppercase font-mono">Reveal Present Alignment</span>
                      </div>

                      {/* CARD FRONT */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden rotate-y-180 bg-[#060a16] border border-[#dfba73]/80 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col justify-between shadow-2xl text-[#dfd5c6]">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-[#dfba73]/30 pb-2">
                          <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#dfba73] font-mono">Present Sphere</span>
                          <span className="text-lg text-[#dfba73]">{tarotSelected.present?.icon}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2 py-4">
                          <h4 className="text-xl font-bold text-[#dfba73] font-serif">{tarotSelected.present?.name}</h4>
                          <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                            {tarotSelected.present?.meaning}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[9px] text-[#dfba73]/50 tracking-wider text-center block font-mono">AETHELGARD NO. VII</span>
                      </div>

                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* FUTURE CARD */}
                  <div 
                    onClick={() => setTarotFlipped(prev => ({ ...prev, future: !prev.future }))}
                    className="cursor-pointer group perspective h-80"
                  >
                    <div className={`relative w-full h-full duration-700 preserve-3d ${tarotFlipped.future ? 'rotate-y-180' : ''}`}>
                      
                      {/* CARD BACK */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden bg-[#0a1228] border-double border-4 border-[#dfba73]/70 rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-between shadow-xl">
                        <div className="w-full flex justify-between text-xs text-[#dfba73]/50 font-mono">
                          <span>FUTURE</span>
                          <span>✦</span>
                        </div>
                        {/* Elegant Mystic Pattern */}
                        <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/40 flex items-center justify-center animate-spin-slow">
                          <Sun className="w-10 h-10 text-[#dfba73]/40" />
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-[#dfba73]/70 tracking-widest uppercase font-mono">Reveal Future Alignment</span>
                      </div>

                      {/* CARD FRONT */}
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 backface-hidden rotate-y-180 bg-[#060a16] border border-[#dfba73]/80 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col justify-between shadow-2xl text-[#dfd5c6]">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-[#dfba73]/30 pb-2">
                          <span className="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#dfba73] font-mono">Future Destinies</span>
                          <span className="text-lg text-[#dfba73]">{tarotSelected.future?.icon}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2 py-4">
                          <h4 className="text-xl font-bold text-[#dfba73] font-serif">{tarotSelected.future?.name}</h4>
                          <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                            {tarotSelected.future?.meaning}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <span className="text-[9px] text-[#dfba73]/50 tracking-wider text-center block font-mono">AETHELGARD NO. XXIV</span>
                      </div>

                    </div>
                  </div>

                </div>
              </section>

            </div>
          )}


          {/* VIEW MODE 2: RECREATION OF THE PRESENTATION SLIDE DECK VIEW */}
          {activeTab === 'deck' && (
            <div className="space-y-8 max-w-[1200px] mx-auto py-4">
              
              {/* SLIDE WINDOW WRAPPER */}
              {/* Framed perfectly inside the beige borders mimicking the exact slide design layout */}
              <div className="w-full aspect-[16/9] bg-[#050a18] border-double border-8 border-[#dfba73] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between p-8 md:p-12 shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.9)] rounded">
                
                {/* Embedded Stars / Constellations details background */}
                <div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-15 pointer-events-none mix-blend-color-dodge bg-[radial-gradient(#dfba73_1px,transparent_1px)] [background-size:20px_20px]"></div>

                {/* SLIDE CONTENT RENDERING SWITCH */}
                {activeSlide === 0 && (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-12 h-full items-center gap-6 relative">
                    {/* SLIDE 1: Title & Hero Cover Slide */}
                    
                    {/* Hanging gold star decoration left */}
                    <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 hidden md:block animate-swing origin-top">
                      <svg width="30" height="150" viewBox="0 0 30 150" fill="none" className="stroke-[#dfba73]/70">
                        <line x1="15" y1="0" x2="15" y2="110" strokeWidth="1" strokeDasharray="1 3" />
                        <polygon points="15,110 18,120 12,120" fill="#dfba73" />
                        <circle cx="15" cy="130" r="4" fill="none" strokeWidth="1" />
                        <path d="M10,140 L20,140 L15,135 Z" fill="#dfba73" />
                      </svg>
                    </div>

                    <div className="col-span-7 space-y-6">
                      <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-7xl font-bold font-serif tracking-wide text-white leading-none">
                        Lorem <br />
                        <span className="font-sans italic text-gradient bg-gradient-to-r from-[#dfba73] to-[#c59d5c] bg-clip-text text-transparent pl-4">
                          Ipsum
                        </span>
                      </h2>
                      <div className="h-[2px] w-64 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#dfba73] to-transparent"></div>
                      <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-[#dfba73] font-sans">
                        Lorem Ipsum &amp; Lorem Ipsum
                      </p>
                    </div>

                    {/* Astrolabe graphic right */}
                    <div className="col-span-5 flex justify-center">
                      <div className="relative w-72 h-72 rounded-full border border-[#dfba73]/30 flex items-center justify-center animate-spin-slow">
                        <div className="absolute inset-2 border border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/20 rounded-full"></div>
                        <div className="absolute inset-6 border border-[#dfba73]/40 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-24 h-24 text-[#dfba73] animate-pulse">
                            <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#dfba73" strokeWidth="0.5" />
                            <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="28" fill="none" stroke="#dfba73" strokeWidth="0.5" />
                            {/* Moon face vector representation */}
                            <path d="M 40,35 A 15,15 0 0,0 60,65 A 10,10 0 1,1 40,35 Z" fill="#dfba73" />
                          </svg>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Info bar */}
                    <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between text-[10px] font-mono text-[#dfba73]/60">
                      <span>PRESENTATION FOR ASTROLOGER</span>
                      <span>@KVIIMA</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {activeSlide === 1 && (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-12 h-full items-center gap-8 relative">
                    {/* SLIDE 2: Solar Sun Eclipse Woodcut slide */}
                    
                    <div className="col-span-7 space-y-4">
                      <h3 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold font-serif text-[#dfd5c6]">Lorem Ipsum</h3>
                      <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                        Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo. Nemo enim ipsam voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit, sed quia consequuntur magni dolores eos qui ratione voluptatem sequi nesciunt.
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-[#dfba73] italic font-serif">
                        "Neque porro quisquam est, qui dolorem ipsum quia dolor sit amet..."
                      </p>
                    </div>

                    <div className="col-span-5 flex justify-center">
                      {/* Sun face and Crescent Moon intersecting (Woodcut Style) */}
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 bg-[#091124] border border-[#dfba73]/40 p-1 rounded-full relative shadow-lg">
                        <div className="w-full h-full border border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
                          <svg viewBox="0 0 120 120" className="w-48 h-48 text-[#dfba73]">
                            {/* Sunrays */}
                            <g className="animate-pulse">
                              {[0, 45, 90, 135, 180, 225, 270, 315].map((angle) => (
                                <line key={angle} x1="60" y1="20" x2="60" y2="5" stroke="#dfba73" strokeWidth="1" transform={`rotate(${angle} 60 60)`} />
                              ))}
                            </g>
                            {/* Moon */}
                            <path d="M 45,30 A 30,30 0 1,0 75,90 A 24,24 0 1,1 45,30 Z" fill="#dfba73" stroke="#050a18" strokeWidth="0.5" />
                            {/* Detailed Star Points */}
                            <polygon points="100,50 102,52 100,54 98,52" fill="#dfba73" />
                            <polygon points="20,40 22,42 20,44 18,42" fill="#dfba73" />
                            {/* Cloud vector base */}
                            <path d="M20,100 C30,90 50,90 60,98 C70,90 90,90 100,100 Z" fill="#050a18" stroke="#dfba73" strokeWidth="0.8" />
                          </svg>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Info bar */}
                    <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between text-[10px] font-mono text-[#dfba73]/60">
                      <span>SLIDE 02 / 05</span>
                      <span>@KVIIMA</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {activeSlide === 2 && (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-12 h-full items-center gap-8 relative">
                    {/* SLIDE 3: Celestial Familiar Cat */}
                    
                    <div className="col-span-5 flex justify-center">
                      {/* Celestial cat woodcut style representation inside crescent moon */}
                      <div className="w-64 h-64 bg-[#091124] border border-[#dfba73]/40 p-1 rounded relative shadow-lg">
                        <div className="w-full h-full border border-dashed border-[#dfba73]/30 p-4 flex items-center justify-center">
                          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-48 h-48 text-[#dfba73]">
                            {/* Moon Cradle */}
                            <path d="M20,20 A35,35 0 1,0 80,80 A30,30 0 1,1 20,20 Z" fill="#dfba73" />
                            {/* Cat Silhouette sitting inside */}
                            <path d="M42,65 C42,55 46,50 50,50 C54,50 56,53 56,58 C56,65 52,70 50,75 Z" fill="#050a18" stroke="#dfba73" strokeWidth="0.5" />
                            <polygon points="48,48 50,43 52,48" fill="#dfba73" />
                            <polygon points="52,48 54,43 56,48" fill="#dfba73" />
                            <circle cx="50" cy="53" r="1" fill="#dfba73" />
                            {/* Stars */}
                            <circle cx="25" cy="85" r="1.5" fill="#dfba73" />
                            <circle cx="75" cy="15" r="1" fill="#dfba73" />
                            <circle cx="85" cy="30" r="2" fill="#dfba73" />
                          </svg>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="col-span-7 space-y-4">
                      <h3 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold font-serif text-[#dfd5c6]">Lorem Ipsum</h3>
                      <p className="text-xs text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                        Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo. Nemo enim ipsam voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit, sed quia consequuntur magni dolores eos qui ratione voluptatem sequi nesciunt.
                      </p>
                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Info bar */}
                    <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between text-[10px] font-mono text-[#dfba73]/60">
                      <span>SLIDE 03 / 05</span>
                      <span>@KVIIMA</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {activeSlide === 3 && (
                  <div className="flex flex-col justify-between h-full relative">
                    {/* SLIDE 4: Two Column Layout */}
                    
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold font-serif text-[#dfd5c6]">Lorem Ipsum</h3>
                      <div className="h-[1px] w-32 bg-[#dfba73]/40"></div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 my-4">
                      {/* Column 1 */}
                      <div className="bg-[#091124] border border-[#dfba73]/30 p-4 rounded relative">
                        <span className="absolute top-1 right-2 text-[8px] text-[#dfba73]">✦</span>
                        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-[#dfba73] uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Lorem Ipsum</h4>
                        <p className="text-[11px] text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                          Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta.
                        </p>
                      </div>

                      {/* Column 2 */}
                      <div className="bg-[#091124] border border-[#dfba73]/30 p-4 rounded relative">
                        <span className="absolute top-1 right-2 text-[8px] text-[#dfba73]">✦</span>
                        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-[#dfba73] uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Lorem Ipsum</h4>
                        <p className="text-[11px] text-[#dfd5c6]/80 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                          Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta.
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Info bar */}
                    <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between text-[10px] font-mono text-[#dfba73]/60 pt-4 border-t border-[#dfba73]/15">
                      <span>SLIDE 04 / 05</span>
                      <span>@KVIIMA</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {activeSlide === 4 && (
                  <div className="flex flex-col justify-between h-full relative">
                    {/* SLIDE 5: Three Column Layout (recreating bottom slide perfectly) */}
                    
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold font-serif text-[#dfd5c6]">Lorem ipsum</h3>
                      <div className="h-[1px] w-32 bg-[#dfba73]/40"></div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 my-3">
                      
                      {/* Card 1 */}
                      <div className="bg-[#091124]/90 border border-[#dfba73]/40 p-4 rounded relative">
                        <div className="absolute top-0 right-4 w-4 h-12 bg-[#dfba73]/20 border-l border-r border-[#dfba73]/30 flex items-end justify-center pb-1">
                          <span className="text-[6px] text-[#dfba73]">✦</span>
                        </div>
                        <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-[#dfba73] uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 pr-6">Lorem ipsum</h4>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-[#dfd5c6]/70 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                          Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
                        </p>
                      </div>

                      {/* Card 2 (Slightly taller with star highlighting) */}
                      <div className="bg-[#0c162f] border-2 border-[#dfba73] p-4 rounded relative transform -translate-y-1 shadow-lg shadow-[#dfba73]/10">
                        <span className="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[#dfba73] text-[8px]">✦</span>
                        <span className="absolute top-1 right-2 text-[#dfba73] text-[8px]">✦</span>
                        <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-[#dfba73] uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Lorem ipsum</h4>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-[#dfd5c6] leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                          Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
                        </p>
                      </div>

                      {/* Card 3 */}
                      <div className="bg-[#091124]/90 border border-[#dfba73]/40 p-4 rounded relative">
                        <div className="absolute top-0 right-4 w-4 h-12 bg-[#dfba73]/20 border-l border-r border-[#dfba73]/30 flex items-end justify-center pb-1">
                          <span className="text-[6px] text-[#dfba73]">✦</span>
                        </div>
                        <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-[#dfba73] uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 pr-6">Lorem ipsum</h4>
                        <p className="text-[9px] text-[#dfd5c6]/70 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light">
                          Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
                        </p>
                      </div>

                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Info bar */}
                    <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full flex justify-between text-[10px] font-mono text-[#dfba73]/60 pt-4 border-t border-[#dfba73]/15">
                      <span>SLIDE 05 / 05</span>
                      <span>@KVIIMA</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

              </div>

              {/* CONTROLS BAR FOR PRESENTATION VIEW */}
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-[#050a18] border border-[#dfba73]/40 px-6 py-4 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="text-xs text-[#dfba73]/80 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">Presenting Mode:</span>
                  <span className="text-xs bg-[#dfba73]/10 text-white px-2.5 py-1 rounded font-semibold border border-[#dfba73]/20">
                    Slide {activeSlide + 1} of 5
                  </span>
                </div>

                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <button 
                    onClick={prevSlide}
                    className="p-2 bg-[#091124] hover:bg-[#dfba73]/20 border border-[#dfba73]/40 text-[#dfba73] rounded-full transition-all"
                    title="Previous Slide"
                  >
                    <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
                  </button>
                  <button 
                    onClick={nextSlide}
                    className="p-2 bg-[#091124] hover:bg-[#dfba73]/20 border border-[#dfba73]/40 text-[#dfba73] rounded-full transition-all"
                    title="Next Slide"
                  >
                    <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          )}

        </main>

        {/* ORACLE OUTPUT MODAL */}
        {oracleModal && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm animate-fadeIn">
            <div className="bg-[#050a18] border-double border-4 border-[#dfba73] w-full max-w-2xl rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(223,186,115,0.3)] flex flex-col max-h-[85vh]">
              
              <div className="border-b border-[#dfba73]/40 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center bg-[#070e20]">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Compass className="w-5 h-5 text-[#dfba73] animate-spin-slow" />
                  <span className="font-serif font-bold text-gradient bg-gradient-to-r from-[#dfba73] to-[#ffdf9e] bg-clip-text text-transparent text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">
                    {loadingOracle ? 'Consulting the High Archives...' : 'Aethelgard Prophecy Placements'}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <button 
                  onClick={() => setOracleModal(false)}
                  className="text-[#dfba73] hover:text-white transition-colors"
                >
                  <X className="w-5 h-5" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="p-6 overflow-y-auto space-y-4 flex-1 text-xs md:text-sm font-sans font-light text-[#dfd5c6] leading-relaxed select-text">
                {loadingOracle ? (
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 space-y-4">
                    <div className="relative w-16 h-16">
                      <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-[#dfba73] animate-spin-slow"></div>
                      <div className="absolute inset-2 rounded-full border border-dotted border-white/40 animate-spin-reverse"></div>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-[#dfba73] animate-pulse">Calculating Stellar Azimuths...</p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="text-center pb-4 border-b border-[#dfba73]/20">
                      <h4 className="font-serif text-2xl font-bold text-[#dfba73]">{oracleResponse?.title}</h4>
                      <span className="text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest text-[#dfba73]/50 uppercase">Scribed on {oracleResponse?.timestamp}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="whitespace-pre-line text-[#dfd5c6]/90 prose prose-invert font-serif italic text-base">
                      {oracleResponse?.text}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="border-t border-[#dfba73]/30 px-6 py-4 bg-[#070e20] flex justify-end">
                <button 
                  onClick={() => setOracleModal(false)}
                  className="px-6 py-2 bg-[#dfba73] text-[#050a18] font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#ffdf9e] transition-all rounded"
                >
                  Seal Prophecy
                </button>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* FOOTER */}
        <footer className="border-t border-[#dfba73]/30 bg-[#050a18]/90 py-8 px-6 text-center text-xs space-y-4 relative overflow-hidden">
          
          {/* Subtle hanging mobile decoration right */}
          <div className="absolute right-10 top-0 opacity-40 animate-swing origin-top">
            <svg width="20" height="80" viewBox="0 0 20 80" fill="none" className="stroke-[#dfba73]">
              <line x1="10" y1="0" x2="10" y2="50" strokeWidth="0.8" />
              <polygon points="10,50 13,58 7,58" fill="#dfba73" />
              <circle cx="10" cy="65" r="3" fill="#dfba73" />
            </svg>
          </div>

          <div className="flex justify-center gap-6 text-[#dfba73]/60 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono text-[10px]">
            <a href="#oracle" className="hover:text-[#dfba73] transition-colors">Natal Oracle</a>
            <span>•</span>
            <span className="cursor-pointer hover:text-[#dfba73] transition-colors" onClick={() => setActiveTab('deck')}>Presentation Deck</span>
            <span>•</span>
            <span className="cursor-pointer hover:text-[#dfba73] transition-colors" onClick={toggleAmbientAudio}>Ambient Drone</span>
          </div>

          <p className="text-[#dfd5c6]/40 font-light max-w-md mx-auto leading-relaxed">
            All astrological alignments computed with classical mathematical coordinate parameters. For amusement of the mind and spirit.
          </p>

          <p className="text-[#dfba73]/70 font-mono tracking-widest text-[9px] uppercase">
            © 2026 Aethelgard Hermetic Society • All Seals Reserved
          </p>
        </footer>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
I3
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Arbor Residences - Transformative Waterfront Living</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        arbor: {
                            green: '#2A5233',      // Deep forest green from the graphic stripe
                            greenlight: '#42704C', // Lighter forest accent
                            cream: '#FAF7F2',      // Luxurious cream/ivory background
                            sand: '#F0EADF',       // Slightly deeper sand color for borders/cards
                            charcoal: '#1C2621',   // Off-black elegant font color
                            gold: '#C5A880'        // Muted gold accents
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        serif: ['Playfair Display', 'Didot', 'Georgia', 'serif'],
                        sans: ['Inter', 'Montserrat', 'sans-serif']
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <!-- Google Fonts for Playfair Display & Inter -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Font Awesome for elegant icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background-color: #FAF7F2;
            color: #1C2621;
        }
        .serif-title {
            font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
        }
        /* Custom smooth scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #FAF7F2;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #2A5233;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        /* Elegant custom animations to mirror architectural lines */
        @keyframes diagonalSlide {
            0% { transform: translateY(-100%) rotate(-15deg); }
            100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-15deg); }
        }
        .diagonal-bg {
            clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 75% 100%, 0% 100%);
        }
        .diagonal-bg-reverse {
            clip-path: polygon(25% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0% 100%);
        }
        .fade-in-up {
            animation: fadeInUp 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
        }
        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-arbor-green selection:text-white">

    <!-- Premium Top Navigation Bar -->
    <nav class="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 bg-arbor-cream/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-arbor-sand transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12 py-5 flex justify-between items-center">
            <!-- Brand Logo with specific styling from prompt image -->
            <a href="#" class="flex flex-col items-center group">
                <span class="serif-title text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-light tracking-widest text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-300">
                    Arbor
                </span>
                <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-arbor-charcoal/70 -mt-1 group-hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-300">
                    ~ residences ~
                </span>
            </a>

            <!-- Navigation Links -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-10 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-medium text-arbor-charcoal/80">
                <a href="#vision" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-200 relative py-1 after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-arbor-green hover:after:w-full after:transition-all after:duration-300">The Vision</a>
                <a href="#residences" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-200 relative py-1 after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-arbor-green hover:after:w-full after:transition-all after:duration-300">Residences</a>
                <a href="#amenities" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-200 relative py-1 after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-arbor-green hover:after:w-full after:transition-all after:duration-300">Amenities</a>
                <a href="#location" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors duration-200 relative py-1 after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-arbor-green hover:after:w-full after:transition-all after:duration-300">Waterfront</a>
            </div>

            <!-- Actions -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-6">
                <a href="#enquire" class="px-6 py-3 border border-arbor-green text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold text-arbor-green hover:bg-arbor-green hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none">
                    Enquire Now
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Mobile Menu Toggle Button -->
            <button onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="md:hidden text-arbor-green focus:outline-none">
                <i id="menuIcon" class="fa-solid fa-bars text-2xl"></i>
            </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Mobile Drawer -->
        <div id="mobileMenu" class="hidden md:hidden absolute top-full left-0 w-full bg-arbor-cream border-b border-arbor-sand px-6 py-8 space-y-6 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300">
            <div class="flex flex-col space-y-5 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-medium text-arbor-charcoal">
                <a href="#vision" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors">The Vision</a>
                <a href="#residences" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors">Residences</a>
                <a href="#amenities" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors">Amenities</a>
                <a href="#location" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="hover:text-arbor-green transition-colors">Waterfront</a>
            </div>
            <div class="pt-4 border-t border-arbor-sand">
                <a href="#enquire" onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="block text-center py-3 bg-arbor-green text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold transition-colors">
                    Enquire Now
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Hero Section: Perfectly capturing the image's dynamic composition, diagonal slice, and color block -->
    <section class="relative min-h-screen pt-24 lg:pt-0 flex items-center overflow-hidden bg-arbor-cream">
        <!-- Background elements & dynamic color accents matching the visual template -->
        <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 flex pointer-events-none">
            <!-- Large decorative forest green stripe mimicking the uploaded design diagonal -->
            <div class="hidden lg:block w-[32%] bg-arbor-green origin-top-left -skew-x-[18deg] transform scale-y-125 opacity-95"></div>
            <div class="flex-1"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12 w-full grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-8 items-center relative z-10 py-12">
            
            <!-- Left Column: Elegant Architectural Visual Mockup (Inspired by structural facade inside circular masks) -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 relative flex justify-center items-center fade-in-up">
                <!-- Circular background outline referencing the frame layout from the original ad -->
                <div class="absolute -bottom-10 -left-10 w-72 h-72 border border-arbor-green/20 rounded-full pointer-events-none"></div>
                <div class="absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-96 h-96 border border-arbor-green/10 rounded-full pointer-events-none"></div>

                <!-- Main Premium Render Container -->
                <div class="relative w-full max-w-lg aspect-[4/5] bg-arbor-sand shadow-2xl overflow-hidden group">
                    <!-- Overlay shadow/gradient -->
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-arbor-charcoal/40 via-transparent to-transparent z-10"></div>
                    
                    <!-- Architectural Imagery Fallback (Pure SVG + Unsplash styling) -->
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1200" 
                         alt="Arbor Residences Exterior Facade" 
                         class="w-full h-full object-cover transform scale-100 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out"
                         onerror="this.onerror=null; this.src='https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1000';" />

                    <!-- Corner architectural label mimicking premium catalogs -->
                    <div class="absolute top-6 left-6 bg-arbor-cream/90 backdrop-blur-sm px-4 py-2 text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-arbor-green font-medium z-20 border-l-2 border-arbor-green">
                        Waterfront Landmark
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Secondary floating detail image mimicking the overlaid circular frame in the inspiration image -->
                <div class="absolute -bottom-8 -right-4 w-44 h-44 rounded-full border-4 border-arbor-cream shadow-xl overflow-hidden hidden md:block z-20">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=500" 
                         alt="Interior Detail" 
                         class="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Column: Exquisite Copy and Grid Table directly from the inspiration design layout -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 flex flex-col justify-center space-y-8 lg:pl-6 fade-in-up" style="animation-delay: 0.2s;">
                
                <!-- Micro Branding Header -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                    <span class="w-8 h-[1px] bg-arbor-green"></span>
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] font-semibold text-arbor-green">Now Presenting</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Grand Logo Text -->
                <div class="space-y-1">
                    <h1 class="serif-title text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light text-arbor-green tracking-wide leading-tight">
                        Arbor
                    </h1>
                    <p class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.45em] text-arbor-charcoal/70 pl-1">
                        ~ Residences ~
                    </p>
                </div>

                <!-- Captivating Transformative Journey Message (From inspiration image header) -->
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <h2 class="text-sm md:text-base tracking-[0.25em] text-arbor-charcoal font-medium uppercase leading-relaxed max-w-md">
                        Embark on a transformative journey through exquisite waterfront <span class="serif-title italic text-arbor-green normal-case font-semibold tracking-normal block text-2xl mt-1">Living!</span>
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/60 leading-relaxed max-w-md font-light">
                        Where architectural majesty converges with serene waves. A private enclave tailored for the design connoisseur, situated in the heart of Dubai's most pristine waterways.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <!-- The Iconic Unit Specification Grid Table (Perfect recreation of the style in your image) -->
                <div class="max-w-md border border-arbor-green/30 bg-arbor-cream/50 backdrop-blur-sm overflow-hidden">
                    <!-- Row 1 -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 border-b border-arbor-green/20">
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 border-r border-arbor-green/20 text-xs tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal/70 uppercase">
                            05 BR
                        </div>
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest text-arbor-green font-semibold uppercase">
                            Sky Palaces
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Row 2 -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 border-b border-arbor-green/20">
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 border-r border-arbor-green/20 text-xs tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal/70 uppercase">
                            04 BR
                        </div>
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest text-arbor-green font-semibold uppercase">
                            Penthouses
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Row 3 -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2">
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 border-r border-arbor-green/20 text-xs tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal/70 uppercase">
                            03 BR
                        </div>
                        <div class="px-5 py-3 text-xs tracking-widest text-arbor-green font-semibold uppercase">
                            Apartments
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Pricing & Action Row matching the original advert format exactly -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-8 pt-2">
                    <!-- Pricing Container -->
                    <div class="space-y-1">
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
                            <span class="w-3 h-[3px] bg-arbor-green"></span>
                            <span class="text-[10px] tracking-widest uppercase text-arbor-charcoal/65">Starting From</span>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold text-arbor-green tracking-wide">
                            AED 30 Million
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Call to Action -->
                    <a href="#enquire" class="px-8 py-4 bg-arbor-green text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-arbor-greenlight shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-[2px]">
                        Request Brochure
                    </a>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Brand Philosophy Section: Building visual depth and context -->
    <section id="vision" class="py-24 bg-arbor-sand/40 relative">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            <!-- Grid Layout mimicking high-end fashion/real estate publications -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Details: Premium text statement -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <p class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-arbor-green font-bold">Uncompromising Standard</p>
                    <h2 class="serif-title text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light text-arbor-charcoal leading-tight">
                        A sanctuary crafted with <span class="italic text-arbor-green font-normal">infinite care</span>.
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-sm text-arbor-charcoal/75 leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Arbor Residences blends the organic textures of stone and timber with state-of-the-art engineering. Nestled directly alongside serene flowing waters, every sunrise becomes an exclusive visual masterpiece.
                    </p>
                    
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 pt-4 border-t border-arbor-sand">
                        <div>
                            <p class="serif-title text-3xl text-arbor-green font-light">360°</p>
                            <p class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/60 mt-1">Waterfront Views</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <p class="serif-title text-3xl text-arbor-green font-light">24</p>
                            <p class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/60 mt-1">Limited Residences</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Details: Interactive Feature Showcase Cards (matching container depth guidelines) -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <!-- Feature Card 1 -->
                    <div class="bg-arbor-cream p-8 border border-arbor-sand shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-arbor-green/10 flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green mb-6">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-water text-lg"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="serif-title text-lg font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal mb-2">Private Marina Access</h3>
                        <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                            Direct boardwalk access with private berths curated for personal luxury vessels.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Feature Card 2 -->
                    <div class="bg-arbor-cream p-8 border border-arbor-sand shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-arbor-green/10 flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green mb-6">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-leaf text-lg"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="serif-title text-lg font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal mb-2">Sustainable Sanctuary</h3>
                        <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                            LEED-certified architectural framework incorporating lush bio-walls and thermal insulation.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Feature Card 3 -->
                    <div class="bg-arbor-cream p-8 border border-arbor-sand shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-arbor-green/10 flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green mb-6">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-hotel text-lg"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="serif-title text-lg font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal mb-2">Sky Butler & Concierge</h3>
                        <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                            Impeccable 24/7 bespoke living assistance responding to every meticulous request.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Feature Card 4 -->
                    <div class="bg-arbor-cream p-8 border border-arbor-sand shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-arbor-green/10 flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green mb-6">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-shapes text-lg"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="serif-title text-lg font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal mb-2">Infinite Pool Deck</h3>
                        <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                            Suspended leisure deck with glass-bottom design offering surreal panoramic skylines.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Exclusive Interactive Residence Finder (The heart of user engagement) -->
    <section id="residences" class="py-24 bg-arbor-cream">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16 space-y-4">
                <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-arbor-green font-bold">Curated Layouts</span>
                <h2 class="serif-title text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light text-arbor-charcoal">
                    Explore the Collection
                </h2>
                <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/60 leading-relaxed">
                    Designed for visual balance, high utility, and an exquisite sense of flow. Select your desired living standard below.
                </p>
                <!-- Switch selectors -->
                <div class="flex justify-center space-x-4 pt-4">
                    <button onclick="switchUnitType('apartments')" id="btn-apartments" class="px-6 py-2.5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold bg-arbor-green text-white border border-arbor-green transition-all duration-300">
                        03 BR Apartments
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="switchUnitType('penthouses')" id="btn-penthouses" class="px-6 py-2.5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold bg-transparent text-arbor-green border border-arbor-green/30 hover:border-arbor-green transition-all duration-300">
                        04 BR Penthouses
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="switchUnitType('sky')" id="btn-sky" class="px-6 py-2.5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold bg-transparent text-arbor-green border border-arbor-green/30 hover:border-arbor-green transition-all duration-300">
                        05 BR Sky Palaces
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Dynamic Showcase Layout Area -->
            <div id="unit-display-box" class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center bg-arbor-sand/20 p-8 lg:p-12 border border-arbor-sand/50 shadow-sm">
                <!-- Data will populate dynamically via JS, but starts with 03 BR Apartments -->
                <!-- Left Side: Floorplan or Render Visual -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 space-y-4">
                    <div class="relative overflow-hidden bg-arbor-cream p-4 border border-arbor-sand shadow-inner aspect-[4/3] flex items-center justify-center">
                        <img id="unit-image" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502672260266-1c1ef2d93688?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1000" 
                             alt="Residence Interior Render" 
                             class="w-full h-full object-cover transition-opacity duration-500" />
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Side: Details list -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <div>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-green font-bold" id="unit-badge">Collection Tier A</span>
                        <h3 class="serif-title text-3xl font-light text-arbor-charcoal mt-1" id="unit-title">03 BR Signature Waterfront Apartments</h3>
                    </div>
                    
                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light" id="unit-description">
                        An immaculate fusion of luxury space and pristine waterfront vistas. Features bespoke modern kitchens, open terrace lounges, and double-glazed soundproof glass walls.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Technical Specs Table -->
                    <div class="border-t border-b border-arbor-sand py-4 space-y-3">
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-xs">
                            <span class="text-arbor-charcoal/60">Total Area</span>
                            <span class="font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal" id="unit-area">4,250 SQ. FT.</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-xs">
                            <span class="text-arbor-charcoal/60">Views</span>
                            <span class="font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal" id="unit-views">Panoramic Marina & Canal</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-xs">
                            <span class="text-arbor-charcoal/60">Private Pools</span>
                            <span class="font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal" id="unit-pools">1 Infinity Terrace Pool</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Pricing & Button -->
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-2">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-[10px] tracking-widest uppercase text-arbor-charcoal/60">Indicative Price</p>
                            <p class="text-2xl font-semibold text-arbor-green" id="unit-price">AED 30,000,000</p>
                        </div>
                        <a href="#enquire" class="px-6 py-3 bg-arbor-green text-white text-[11px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-arbor-greenlight transition-colors">
                            Book Viewing
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Visual Splendor/Atmosphere Showcase with architectural grid (using the brand identity colors) -->
    <section id="amenities" class="py-24 bg-arbor-green text-arbor-cream relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background accents -->
        <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10 pointer-events-none">
            <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-white rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
            <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-96 h-96 bg-white rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12 relative z-10">
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-end mb-16">
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 space-y-4">
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-arbor-gold font-bold">Resort-Style Amenities</span>
                    <h2 class="serif-title text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light text-white">
                        Curated experiences, <br>limitless convenience.
                    </h2>
                </div>
                <div class="lg:col-span-5">
                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-cream/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Step out of your private elevator directly into a sanctuary of wellness, dining, and premium lifestyle services managed by world-class concierges.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Showcase Grid -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                <!-- Amenity 1 -->
                <div class="group relative overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] bg-arbor-greenlight border border-white/10 flex flex-col justify-end p-8 transition-transform duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent z-10"></div>
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540555700478-4be289fbecef?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800" 
                         alt="Therapeutic Spa" 
                         class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity duration-500" />
                    
                    <div class="relative z-20 space-y-2">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-gold font-bold">Wellness</span>
                        <h4 class="serif-title text-2xl text-white font-light">L'Oasis Wellness Spa</h4>
                        <p class="text-[11px] text-arbor-cream/80 leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">
                            Thermal pools, salt rooms, and professional therapists offering curated holistic sensory rituals.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Amenity 2 -->
                <div class="group relative overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] bg-arbor-greenlight border border-white/10 flex flex-col justify-end p-8 transition-transform duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent z-10"></div>
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543007630-9710e4a00a20?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800" 
                         alt="Cigar Lounge" 
                         class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity duration-500" />
                    
                    <div class="relative z-20 space-y-2">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-gold font-bold">Leisure</span>
                        <h4 class="serif-title text-2xl text-white font-light">Sommelier's Lounge</h4>
                        <p class="text-[11px] text-arbor-cream/80 leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">
                            Temperature-controlled cellars and luxury lounges hosting masterclass events for estate residents.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Amenity 3 -->
                <div class="group relative overflow-hidden aspect-[4/5] bg-arbor-greenlight border border-white/10 flex flex-col justify-end p-8 transition-transform duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent z-10"></div>
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517248135467-4c7edcad34c4?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800" 
                         alt="Private Dining" 
                         class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity duration-500" />
                    
                    <div class="relative z-20 space-y-2">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-gold font-bold">Gastronomy</span>
                        <h4 class="serif-title text-2xl text-white font-light">Chef's Atelier</h4>
                        <p class="text-[11px] text-arbor-cream/80 leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">
                            An exclusive, high-concept test kitchen bookable for bespoke private catering and culinary displays.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Map & Location section -->
    <section id="location" class="py-24 bg-arbor-sand/30">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Map Left: Copy information -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8">
                    <div>
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-arbor-green font-bold">Perfect Connection</span>
                        <h2 class="serif-title text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light text-arbor-charcoal mt-2">
                            Perfectly Positioned
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Located along the pristine water banks of Dubai, Arbor Residences perfectly isolates you from urban noise while guaranteeing that major business districts and luxury lifestyle hubs are only minutes away.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Interactive Location Accordions -->
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <!-- Location item 1 -->
                        <div class="border-b border-arbor-green/20 pb-4">
                            <button onclick="toggleMapInfo('landmark-1')" class="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal hover:text-arbor-green focus:outline-none">
                                <span>The Marina Boardwalk (Direct Access)</span>
                                <i id="icon-landmark-1" class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down transition-transform"></i>
                            </button>
                            <p id="desc-landmark-1" class="hidden text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/60 mt-2 leading-relaxed font-light">
                                Instantly step outside your private residence into a luxury marina strip containing award-winning bistros, yacht docks, and quiet seaside walking pathways.
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Location item 2 -->
                        <div class="border-b border-arbor-green/20 pb-4">
                            <button onclick="toggleMapInfo('landmark-2')" class="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal hover:text-arbor-green focus:outline-none">
                                <span>Downtown Core (12 Minutes)</span>
                                <i id="icon-landmark-2" class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down transition-transform"></i>
                            </button>
                            <p id="desc-landmark-2" class="hidden text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/60 mt-2 leading-relaxed font-light">
                                Effortless accessibility to primary corporate towers, exquisite luxury retail landmarks, and fine dining hotspots.
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Location item 3 -->
                        <div class="border-b border-arbor-green/20 pb-4">
                            <button onclick="toggleMapInfo('landmark-3')" class="w-full flex justify-between items-center text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal hover:text-arbor-green focus:outline-none">
                                <span>International Airport (15 Minutes)</span>
                                <i id="icon-landmark-3" class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down transition-transform"></i>
                            </button>
                            <p id="desc-landmark-3" class="hidden text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/60 mt-2 leading-relaxed font-light">
                                Fast transit pathways ensuring seamless travel coordination, returning to your safe oasis with ease.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Map Right: Artistic styled map visual or interactive vector representation -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                    <div class="relative bg-arbor-cream p-4 border border-arbor-sand shadow-lg overflow-hidden aspect-video group">
                        <!-- Custom designed graphic vector map with beautiful overlay markers for that high-end architect look -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-[#E8E2D5] opacity-30 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <!-- Artistic minimal map grid styling -->
                            <div class="w-full h-full bg-[radial-gradient(#2A5233_1px,transparent_1px)] [background-size:16px_16px]"></div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Mock Waterfront Graphic Map lines -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 opacity-40">
                            <!-- Stylized river/canal curved element -->
                            <svg class="w-full h-full" viewBox="0 0 500 300" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                <path d="M-50,150 Q120,50 250,180 T550,120" stroke="#2A5233" stroke-width="45" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Interactive map markers -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 z-10 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <!-- Arbor Residences Prime Marker -->
                            <div class="absolute top-[48%] left-[45%] flex flex-col items-center">
                                <div class="relative flex h-5 w-5">
                                    <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-arbor-green opacity-75"></span>
                                    <span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-5 w-5 bg-arbor-green border-2 border-white"></span>
                                </div>
                                <span class="bg-arbor-green text-white text-[9px] tracking-widest uppercase font-bold px-2 py-1 mt-1 shadow-md">Arbor Residences</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Marker Landmark 1 -->
                            <div class="absolute top-[20%] left-[20%] flex items-center space-x-1">
                                <span class="h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-arbor-charcoal border border-white"></span>
                                <span class="bg-white/90 text-arbor-charcoal text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider px-1.5 py-0.5">International Hub</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Marker Landmark 2 -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-[30%] right-[25%] flex items-center space-x-1">
                                <span class="h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-arbor-charcoal border border-white"></span>
                                <span class="bg-white/90 text-arbor-charcoal text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider px-1.5 py-0.5">Yacht Club</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Overlay instructions -->
                        <div class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 z-20 bg-arbor-cream/95 backdrop-blur-md px-4 py-2 text-[10px] tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal uppercase border border-arbor-sand flex items-center space-x-2">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot text-arbor-green"></i>
                            <span>Dubai Waterfront Enclave</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Testimonials Section with elegant editorial quotes -->
    <section class="py-24 bg-arbor-cream relative border-t border-b border-arbor-sand">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            
            <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center space-y-8">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-quote-left text-4xl text-arbor-green/35"></i>
                
                <p class="serif-title text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-light italic text-arbor-charcoal leading-relaxed">
                    "Arbor Residences represents a masterclass in organic architecture. The way the dynamic diagonal lines frame the natural light makes it feel more like a living sculpture than an elite apartment complex."
                </p>

                <div class="space-y-1">
                    <p class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-arbor-green">Sir Alistair Sterling</p>
                    <p class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-arbor-charcoal/50">Architectural Digest Contributor & Patron</p>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Contact & Enquiry Section using precise layout from prompt -->
    <section id="enquire" class="py-24 bg-arbor-cream">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-16 items-start">
                
                <!-- Left Details: Brand alignment information -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8">
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-arbor-green font-bold">Secure Your Sanctuary</span>
                        <h2 class="serif-title text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light text-arbor-charcoal leading-tight">
                            Schedule a Private Viewing
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Given our extremely limited collection of 24 waterfront estates, viewings are conducted purely through certified invitation. Complete the form to establish communications with your personal relations agent.
                    </p>

                    <div class="space-y-4 pt-6 border-t border-arbor-sand">
                        <!-- Detail 1 -->
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-arbor-sand flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-phone text-xs"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal/50">Inquire via Phone</p>
                                <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal">+971 4 800 ARBOR</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Detail 2 -->
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-arbor-sand flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope text-xs"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-arbor-charcoal/50">Official Correspondence</p>
                                <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-arbor-charcoal">private@arborresidences.ae</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Details: Premium Input Form with custom feedback instead of alerts -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 bg-arbor-sand/35 p-8 lg:p-12 border border-arbor-sand/70 shadow-sm relative">
                    
                    <form id="enquiryForm" onsubmit="handleFormSubmit(event)" class="space-y-6">
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <!-- First Name -->
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">First Name</label>
                                <input type="text" required class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand px-4 py-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all" placeholder="Enter first name">
                            </div>
                            <!-- Last Name -->
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">Last Name</label>
                                <input type="text" required class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand px-4 py-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all" placeholder="Enter last name">
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
