                            <!-- Email -->
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">Email Address</label>
                                <input type="email" required class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand px-4 py-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all" placeholder="name@domain.com">
                            </div>
                            <!-- Phone -->
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">Phone Number</label>
                                <input type="tel" required class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand px-4 py-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all" placeholder="+971 50 000 0000">
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Residence Preference Selection -->
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">Collection Preference</label>
                            <select class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand px-4 py-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all">
                                <option value="apartments">03 BR Apartments (From AED 30M)</option>
                                <option value="penthouses">04 BR Penthouses (From AED 45M)</option>
                                <option value="sky-palaces">05 BR Sky Palaces (From AED 75M)</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Message -->
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-arbor-charcoal/70 font-semibold">Additional Details</label>
                            <textarea rows="4" class="w-full bg-arbor-cream border border-arbor-sand p-4 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-arbor-green transition-all" placeholder="Preferred dates for viewing or questions..."></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Custom verification disclaimer matching premium aesthetic -->
                        <p class="text-[9px] text-arbor-charcoal/50 leading-relaxed font-light">
                            By clicking submit, you authorize Arbor Residences to verify and share your details with our exclusive partner brokers to coordinate customized hospitality logistics.
                        </p>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full py-4 bg-arbor-green hover:bg-arbor-greenlight text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg">
                            Request Invitation
                        </button>
                    </form>

                    <!-- Success Feedback Box (Hidden Initially) -->
                    <div id="successBox" class="hidden absolute inset-0 bg-arbor-cream/95 backdrop-blur-md flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center space-y-4">
                        <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-arbor-green/10 flex items-center justify-center text-arbor-green text-2xl">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h4 class="serif-title text-2xl text-arbor-green">Invitation Received</h4>
                        <p class="text-xs text-arbor-charcoal/70 max-w-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Thank you. A senior relations coordinator will contact you directly within 2 hours to verify your credentials and arrange luxury transport for your tour.
                        </p>
                        <button onclick="resetEnquiryForm()" class="px-6 py-2 border border-arbor-green text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold text-arbor-green hover:bg-arbor-green hover:text-white transition-all">
                            Back
                        </button>
                    </div>

                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Exquisite Premium Footer matching exact visual design identity -->
    <footer class="bg-arbor-charcoal text-arbor-cream py-16 border-t border-arbor-green/10">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-8 items-start mb-16">
                
                <!-- Col 1: Brand Identifier -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-4 space-y-6">
                    <a href="#" class="flex flex-col items-start">
                        <span class="serif-title text-3xl font-light tracking-widest text-white">
                            Arbor
                        </span>
                        <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-arbor-gold -mt-1">
                            ~ residences ~
                        </span>
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-xs text-arbor-cream/60 leading-relaxed font-light max-w-xs">
                        An elite residential development providing pristine architecture and tranquil waterfront tranquility.
                    </p>
                    <div class="flex space-x-4 text-sm text-arbor-cream/50">
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-arbor-gold transition-colors"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-arbor-gold transition-colors"><i class="fa-brands fa-youtube"></i></a>

                <div class="lg:col-span-3 space-y-4">
                    <h5 class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-arbor-gold">Navigation</h5>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs text-arbor-cream/60">
                        <li><a href="#vision" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">The Vision</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#residences" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Elite Collection</a></li>

                    </ul>

                <!-- Col 3: Legal & Admin -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-3 space-y-4">
                    <h5 class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-arbor-gold">Legal Framework</h5>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs text-arbor-cream/60">
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Privacy Charter</a></li>

                    <a href="https://www.arborresidences.ae" target="_blank" class="block text-xs hover:text-white underline tracking-wider text-arbor-cream/60">
                        www.arborresidences.ae
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-[9px] text-arbor-cream/40 leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Designed with perfection for modern luxury browsers.

            <!-- Bottom Credits -->
            <div class="border-t border-white/5 pt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center space-y-4 md:space-y-0 text-[10px] text-arbor-cream/40 uppercase tracking-widest">
                <p>&copy; 2026 Arbor Residences Ltd. All Rights Reserved.</p>
                <p>Designed in collaboration with Luxury Architects</p>

    <!-- Scripting for fully interactive high-end details -->
    <script>
        // Toggle Mobile Navigation
        function toggleMobileMenu() {
            const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
            const icon = document.getElementById('menuIcon');
            menu.classList.toggle('hidden');
            if (menu.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                icon.className = 'fa-solid fa-bars text-2xl';
            } else {
                icon.className = 'fa-solid fa-xmark text-2xl';
            }
        }

        // Data Structure representing the actual real-estate items from inspiration image
        const unitData = {
            apartments: {
                badge: "Collection Tier A",
                title: "03 BR Signature Waterfront Apartments",
                description: "An immaculate fusion of luxury space and pristine waterfront vistas. Features bespoke modern kitchens, open terrace lounges, and double-glazed soundproof glass walls that open up to catch the marina breezes.",
                area: "4,250 SQ. FT.",
                views: "Panoramic Marina & Canal",
                pools: "1 Infinity Terrace Pool",
                price: "AED 30,000,000",
                image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502672260266-1c1ef2d93688?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1000"
            },
            penthouses: {
                badge: "Collection Tier Gold",
                title: "04 BR Premium Waterfront Penthouses",
                description: "Spanning the upper tiers of Arbor Residences, these homes boast majestic double-height ceilings, a dedicated butler suite, temperature-controlled outdoor spas, and complete customized timber finishings.",
                area: "6,800 SQ. FT.",
                views: "360° Skyline & Full Canal",
                pools: "1 Deepwater Rooftop Pool",
                price: "AED 45,000,000",
                image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600607687939-ce8a6c25118c?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1000"
            },
            sky: {
                badge: "Collection Elite Majestic",
                title: "05 BR Grand Waterfront Sky Palaces",
                description: "A crowning luxury landmark. These ultra-exclusive triplex residences include fully integrated private yacht docks, indoor waterfall features, automated smart lighting systems, and expansive private wellness decks.",
                area: "11,500 SQ. FT.",
                views: "Full Sea, Marina & Skyline",
                pools: "2 Outdoor Infinity Pools",
                price: "AED 75,000,000",
                image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600566753376-12c8ab7fb75b?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1000"
            }
        };

        // Switch active Unit details smoothly
        function switchUnitType(tier) {
            // Update buttons visually
            const buttons = ['apartments', 'penthouses', 'sky'];
            buttons.forEach(b => {
                const element = document.getElementById('btn-' + b);
                if (b === tier) {
                    element.className = "px-6 py-2.5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold bg-arbor-green text-white border border-arbor-green transition-all duration-300";
                } else {
                    element.className = "px-6 py-2.5 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold bg-transparent text-arbor-green border border-arbor-green/30 hover:border-arbor-green transition-all duration-300";
                }
            });

            // Transition content out/in smoothly
            const imgElement = document.getElementById('unit-image');
            imgElement.style.opacity = 0;

            setTimeout(() => {
                // Change Data fields
                document.getElementById('unit-badge').innerText = unitData[tier].badge;
                document.getElementById('unit-title').innerText = unitData[tier].title;
                document.getElementById('unit-description').innerText = unitData[tier].description;
                document.getElementById('unit-area').innerText = unitData[tier].area;
                document.getElementById('unit-views').innerText = unitData[tier].views;
                document.getElementById('unit-pools').innerText = unitData[tier].pools;
                document.getElementById('unit-price').innerText = unitData[tier].price;
                imgElement.src = unitData[tier].image;
                
                // Show again
                imgElement.style.opacity = 1;
            }, 300);
        }

        // Toggle interactive Map Accordion details
        function toggleMapInfo(id) {
            const p = document.getElementById('desc-' + id);
            const icon = document.getElementById('icon-' + id);
            
            p.classList.toggle('hidden');
            if (p.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                icon.style.transform = "rotate(0deg)";
            } else {
                icon.style.transform = "rotate(180deg)";
            }
        }

        // Handle Custom Form Submit gracefully (Avoiding annoying browser alerts)
        function handleFormSubmit(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            // Perform simulated network action
            const successBox = document.getElementById('successBox');
            successBox.classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        // Reset Form to clear states
        function resetEnquiryForm() {
            document.getElementById('enquiryForm').reset();
            document.getElementById('successBox').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        // Smooth Nav Background transition during scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                nav.classList.add('shadow-md', 'py-4');
                nav.classList.remove('py-5');
            } else {
                nav.classList.remove('shadow-md', 'py-4');
                nav.classList.add('py-5');
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
14
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Verdant Hexagonals — Premium Editorial Design System</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts for Editorial aesthetic -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Courier+Prime&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Reenie+Beanie&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Font Awesome Icons for premium UI details -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        sage: {
                            50: '#F4F6F2',
                            100: '#E7EBE0',
                            200: '#D1DAC8',
                            300: '#B5C4AA',
                            400: '#94A786',
                            500: '#798C6B', // Core sage tone
                            600: '#5E6E52',
                            700: '#47533E',
                            800: '#323B2B',
                            900: '#1D221A',
                        },
                        oatmeal: {
                            50: '#FAFBF8',
                            100: '#F3F5EE',
                            200: '#E5EAD9',
                            300: '#D3DCBE',
                            400: '#BECBA2',
                        },
                        charcoal: '#22281D'
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['"Plus Jakarta Sans"', 'sans-serif'],
                        serif: ['"Cormorant Garamond"', 'serif'],
                        handwritten: ['"Reenie Beanie"', 'cursive'],
                        typewriter: ['"Courier Prime"', 'monospace'],
                        display: ['"Playfair Display"', 'serif']
                    },
                    backgroundImage: {
                        'hex-pattern': "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDQwIDQwIj48ZyBmaWxsPSJub25lIiBzdHJva2U9IiM3OThDNkIiIHN0cm9rZS13aWR0aD0iMC4zIiBzdHJva2Utb3BhY2l0eT0iMC4xNSI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTIwIDBMMzAgMTBMMzAgMzBMMjAgNDBMMTAgMzBMMTAgMTBaIi8+PC9nPjwvc3ZnPg==')"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>

    <style>
        /* Signature font styling adjustments */
        .signature-font {
            font-family: 'Reenie Beanie', cursive;
            line-height: 0.85;
        }
        /* Custom smooth scrollbar in alignment with sage theme */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #E5EAD9;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #798C6B;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #5E6E52;
        }
        /* Custom animation delay classes */
        .animation-delay-200 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .animation-delay-400 { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
        .animation-delay-600 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }

        /* Polaroid layout effect styling */
        .polaroid-card {
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(45, 51, 40, 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(45, 51, 40, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
        }
        .polaroid-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(1deg) scale(1.02);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 35px -5px rgba(45, 51, 40, 0.15), 0 12px 16px -8px rgba(45, 51, 40, 0.15);
        }

        /* Glassmorphism utility aligned with the organic tone */
        .organic-glass {
            background: rgba(243, 245, 238, 0.75);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(148, 167, 134, 0.2);
        }

        /* Ambient Hexagonal glow lines */
        .hex-glow {
            position: absolute;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(181, 196, 170, 0.25) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Paper textured background overlay */
        .paper-grain {
            position: relative;
        }
        .paper-grain::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            opacity: 0.045;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 1;
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.8' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#F3F5EE] text-charcoal font-sans overflow-x-hidden paper-grain">

    <!-- Hex Decorative Floating Elements -->
    <div class="fixed top-20 left-[-100px] w-[350px] h-[350px] hex-glow z-0"></div>
    <div class="fixed bottom-20 right-[-100px] w-[450px] h-[450px] hex-glow z-0"></div>

    <!-- Navigation Bar -->
    <header class="sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300 w-full" id="main-header">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <!-- Brand Logo -->
            <a href="#" class="flex flex-col group">
                <span class="font-serif italic text-2xl tracking-wide text-sage-800 font-semibold group-hover:text-sage-600 transition-colors">
                    Verdant Hexagonals
                </span>
                <span class="text-[9px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase text-sage-600 -mt-1 pl-0.5">
                    Premium Instagram Puzzle Framework
                </span>
            </a>

            <!-- Mid Navigation Links -->
            <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-10 text-sm font-medium text-sage-800">
                <a href="#philosophy" class="hover:text-sage-500 transition-colors relative py-1 group">
                    Our Philosophy
                    <span class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-0 h-[1.5px] bg-sage-500 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full"></span>
                </a>
                <a href="#puzzle-experience" class="hover:text-sage-500 transition-colors relative py-1 group">
                    The Puzzle Board
                    <span class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-0 h-[1.5px] bg-sage-500 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full"></span>
                </a>
                <a href="#features" class="hover:text-sage-500 transition-colors relative py-1 group">
                    Visual Archetypes
                    <span class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-0 h-[1.5px] bg-sage-500 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full"></span>
                </a>
                <a href="#designer" class="hover:text-sage-500 transition-colors relative py-1 group">
                    Live Palette Builder
                    <span class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-0 h-[1.5px] bg-sage-500 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:w-full"></span>
                </a>
            </nav>

            <!-- CTA Actions -->
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                <a href="#puzzle-experience" class="hidden sm:inline-flex items-center justify-center px-5 py-2.5 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold border border-sage-400 text-sage-800 hover:bg-sage-800 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm">
                    Interactive Grid
                </a>
                <a href="#pricing" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-5 py-2.5 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold bg-sage-800 hover:bg-sage-600 text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm shadow-md shadow-sage-900/10">
                    Get Template
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Header Shadow Controller -->
    <script>
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const header = document.getElementById('main-header');
            if (window.scrollY > 30) {
                header.classList.add('bg-[#F3F5EE]/95', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'shadow-md', 'shadow-sage-800/5', 'py-3');
                header.classList.remove('py-4');
            } else {
                header.classList.remove('bg-[#F3F5EE]/95', 'backdrop-blur-md', 'shadow-md', 'shadow-sage-800/5', 'py-3');
                header.classList.add('py-4');
            }
        });
    </script>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section class="relative pt-12 pb-24 md:pt-20 md:pb-36 overflow-hidden">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Hero Text Intro -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 px-3 py-1 bg-sage-100/80 border border-sage-300/60 rounded-full text-xs text-sage-700 tracking-wide">
                            <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-sage-500 animate-pulse"></span>
                            <span>Aesthetic Harmony for Mindful Creators</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <h1 class="font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl leading-[1.05] text-charcoal font-light">
                            Where natural <br>
                            <span class="italic font-normal text-sage-600">geometry</span> <br>
                            meets layout.
                        </h1>
                    </div>

                    <p class="text-sage-700 font-light text-base md:text-lg leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
                        Verdant Hexagonals is a meticulously structured Instagram grid layout designed to elevate your brand story into a museum-grade visual exhibition. Built with organic sage gradients, delicate hexagonal frame guides, and nostalgic typewriter typefaces.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Hand Drawn Script Highlight -->
                    <div class="relative py-4 pr-10">
                        <p class="signature-font text-5xl md:text-6xl text-sage-600 rotate-[-4deg] origin-left select-none">
                            Morning Spirit & Daily Grace
                        </p>
                        <div class="absolute right-12 bottom-0 w-24 h-[1px] bg-sage-400"></div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Hero Call to Actions -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 pt-2">
                        <a href="#puzzle-experience" class="flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-sage-800 hover:bg-sage-600 text-white font-medium rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 text-sm tracking-wider uppercase group shadow-lg shadow-sage-900/10">
                            Explore Puzzle Grid
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right ml-3 text-xs transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-1.5"></i>
                        </a>
                        <a href="#video-tour" class="flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-white hover:bg-sage-50 border border-sage-200 text-sage-800 font-medium rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 text-sm tracking-wider uppercase">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-play mr-3 text-xs text-sage-500"></i>
                            Live Walkthrough
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Client Trust Badges -->
                    <div class="pt-8 border-t border-sage-200/80 space-y-3">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-sage-500 block">Trusted by Organic Brands and Visual Artists</span>
                        <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-x-8 gap-y-4 opacity-75 grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all">
                            <span class="font-serif italic font-semibold text-lg text-sage-800">Verdant Studio</span>
                            <span class="font-sans font-light tracking-[0.2em] text-sm text-sage-800">SOLSTICE CO.</span>
                            <span class="font-typewriter text-xs text-sage-800">Oatmeal & Co.</span>
                            <span class="font-serif text-sm font-light text-sage-800">THE MINDFUL LAB</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Hero visual composition reflecting the Inspiration image layout -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 relative flex justify-center">
                    
                    <!-- Decorative Hex grid alignment overlay -->
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hex-pattern scale-110 pointer-events-none opacity-85 z-0"></div>

                    <!-- Composite visual stack -->
                    <div class="relative w-full max-w-[550px] aspect-[4/5] bg-sage-200/45 rounded-2xl border border-sage-300/40 p-4 sm:p-8 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden shadow-2xl shadow-sage-900/5 backdrop-blur-sm">
                        
                        <!-- Top Hexagonal Line Art Background overlay -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-30 pointer-events-none">
                            <svg class="w-full h-full text-sage-600" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.3">
                                <polygon points="50,15 80,32.5 80,67.5 50,85 20,67.5 20,32.5" />
                                <polygon points="50,2 91,26 91,74 50,98 9,74 9,26" />
                                <polygon points="50,28 69,39 69,61 50,72 31,61 31,39" />
                                <line x1="50" y1="2" x2="50" y2="98" />
                                <line x1="9" y1="26" x2="91" y2="74" />
                                <line x1="9" y1="74" x2="91" y2="26" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Top row elements mirroring inspiration -->
                        <div class="relative z-10 flex justify-between items-start">
                            
                            <!-- Polaroid 1 - Plant and phone -->
                            <div class="polaroid-card p-2.5 pb-8 rounded-sm w-[45%] rotate-[-4deg] transform origin-top-left">
                                <div class="aspect-[4/5] bg-[#E1E5D7] relative overflow-hidden group">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512428559087-560fa5ceab42?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=600" alt="Minimal desk" class="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale brightness-105 contrast-[0.95] group-hover:scale-110 transition duration-700">
                                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-sage-500/10 mix-blend-multiply"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="mt-2 text-center text-[10px] font-handwritten text-sage-600 scale-110">Saturday Morning Vibes</div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Styled text block -->
                            <div class="w-[50%] pt-4 text-right pr-2">
                                <h4 class="signature-font text-5xl text-sage-800 leading-none">Morning Spirit</h4>
                                <p class="font-typewriter text-[11px] text-sage-600 mt-2">Every post, link and tag designed in perfect, calm sync.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Mid row elements mirroring the main inspiration card layout -->
                        <div class="relative z-10 flex justify-center items-center my-4">
                            
                            <!-- Wide Landscape Polar Photo frame in the middle -->
                            <div class="polaroid-card p-3 pb-6 rounded-sm w-[90%] rotate-[2deg] transform">
                                <div class="aspect-[16/10] bg-[#ECEFE2] relative overflow-hidden group">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800" alt="Workspace setup" class="w-full h-full object-cover brightness-95 contrast-[1.05] group-hover:scale-105 transition duration-700">
                                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-sage-600/10 mix-blend-multiply"></div>
                                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/20 via-transparent to-transparent"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="mt-2 flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-500 px-1">
                                    <span>[ Frame No. 047 ]</span>
                                    <span>the day after tomorrow</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Bottom Row elements -->
                        <div class="relative z-10 flex justify-between items-end">
                            <div class="w-[45%] text-left pl-2">
                                <p class="font-typewriter text-[11px] text-sage-700">
                                    five hundred twenty five
                                </p>
                                <span class="text-xs font-serif italic text-sage-500 block mt-1">understandings —</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Polaroid 2 - Coffee and laptop -->
                            <div class="polaroid-card p-2.5 pb-8 rounded-sm w-[45%] rotate-[3deg] transform origin-bottom-right">
                                <div class="aspect-[4/5] bg-[#E1E5D7] relative overflow-hidden group">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497032628192-86f99bcd76bc?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=600" alt="Quiet morning with laptop" class="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale brightness-105 contrast-[0.95] group-hover:scale-110 transition duration-700">
                                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-sage-500/10 mix-blend-multiply"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="mt-2 text-center text-[10px] font-handwritten text-sage-600 scale-110">creative process</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Premium visual tag absolute element -->
                        <div class="absolute bottom-4 right-1/2 translate-x-1/2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm border border-sage-200 text-sage-800 text-[10px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase font-bold py-1.5 px-4 rounded-full shadow-lg">
                            Live UI Preview
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Decorative background geometry lines -->
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-10 -left-10 w-24 h-24 border border-sage-300/40 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                        <div class="w-16 h-16 border border-sage-300/30 rounded-full"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute -top-6 -right-6 w-32 h-32 border border-sage-300/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                        <div class="w-20 h-20 border border-sage-300/20 rounded-full"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Philosophy & Mood Section -->
    <section id="philosophy" class="py-24 bg-oatmeal-100 relative overflow-hidden border-y border-sage-200">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hex-pattern opacity-40"></div>
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Graphic mood blocks inspired by the Instagram grid feel -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="bg-sage-500 text-oatmeal-100 p-8 rounded-sm aspect-square flex flex-col justify-between shadow-md">
                            <span class="font-typewriter text-xs opacity-75">/ mood-01</span>
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="font-serif italic text-3xl leading-tight font-normal">Tranquil Sage</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs opacity-80 mt-2 font-light">Grounding your brand in earthy tones that signify growth, breathing room, and organic clarity.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-sm border border-sage-200 shadow-sm">
                            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#E5EAD9] flex items-center justify-center text-sage-700 mb-4">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-shapes"></i>
                            </div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">Sacred Geometry</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 mt-1 font-light leading-relaxed">Elegant hexagonal pathways that guide your audience’s eyes across posts continuously.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="space-y-4 pt-8">
                        <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-sm border border-sage-200 shadow-sm">
                            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#E5EAD9] flex items-center justify-center text-sage-700 mb-4">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-signature"></i>
                            </div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">Written Word</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 mt-1 font-light leading-relaxed">Integrated editorial quotes, handwritten signatures, and organic text boxes that whisper premium detail.</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="bg-sage-800 text-oatmeal-50 p-8 rounded-sm aspect-square flex flex-col justify-between shadow-md">
                            <span class="font-typewriter text-xs opacity-75">/ mood-02</span>
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="font-serif italic text-3xl leading-tight font-normal">Golden Ratio</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs opacity-80 mt-2 font-light">Asymmetrical visual weights designed for creative minds who value deep artistic integrity over busy trends.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

                <!-- Text presentation -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8">
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-sage-500 font-bold block">Design Architecture</span>
                        <h2 class="font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl text-charcoal font-light leading-tight">
                            Elevating the common grid into a <span class="italic text-sage-600 font-normal">masterpiece of continuity</span>.
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <p class="text-sage-700 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Most modern grids are a chaotic collection of random uploads. We conceptualize Instagram as a continuous puzzle canvas. This design system bridges individual posts so that when viewed as a whole, they form a unified, continuous work of art.
                    </p>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 pt-4">
                        <div class="border-l-2 border-sage-400 pl-4">
                            <span class="font-serif italic text-3xl text-sage-800 font-bold">12-Post</span>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-500 mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">Seamless Continuous Loop</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="border-l-2 border-sage-400 pl-4">
                            <span class="font-serif italic text-3xl text-sage-800 font-bold">100%</span>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-500 mt-1 uppercase tracking-wider">Customizable in Canva & Figma</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="pt-4">
                        <a href="#puzzle-experience" class="inline-flex items-center text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold text-sage-800 hover:text-sage-600 group transition-all">
                            <span>Interact with the Canvas Simulator</span>
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right ml-2 text-[10px] transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-1"></i>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Puzzle Board Simulator (Core Experience) -->
    <section id="puzzle-experience" class="py-24 bg-white relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16 space-y-4">
                <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-sage-500 font-bold">Live Sandbox</span>
                <h2 class="font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl text-charcoal font-light">
                    The Instagram Puzzle Simulator
                </h2>
                <p class="text-sage-600 font-light text-sm md:text-base">
                    Preview your visual story before posting. Click on grid blocks below to edit content, cycle through placeholder images, toggle the continuous hexagonal background overlay, and watch the layout sync harmoniously.
                </p>
            </div>

            <!-- Dashboard Controls -->
            <div class="organic-glass p-4 rounded-lg mb-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-between shadow-sm">
                
                <!-- Left controls -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4">
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-sage-800">Layout Controls:</span>
                    
                    <!-- Toggle Hex Grid Overlay -->
                    <button onclick="toggleHexLines()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-sage-800 text-white rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold hover:bg-sage-600 transition-all flex items-center">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-bezier-curve mr-2"></i>
                        Toggle Hex Guide Lines
                    </button>

                    <!-- Toggle Color Mood -->
                    <button onclick="cycleBackground()" class="px-4 py-2 border border-sage-300 text-sage-700 bg-white rounded-sm text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold hover:bg-sage-50 transition-all flex items-center">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-palette mr-2"></i>
                        Theme: <span id="theme-label" class="ml-1 font-bold">Olive Sage</span>
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Status Tag -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-xs text-sage-600">
                    <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span>
                    <span class="font-typewriter">Status: Grid Balanced</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- The Grid Playground (3x5 Instagram Grid representing the Inspiration Image) -->
            <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto bg-sage-100/40 p-4 sm:p-8 rounded-xl border border-sage-200 shadow-inner relative">
                
                <!-- Simulated phone border elements -->
                <div class="absolute -top-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-28 h-4 bg-sage-200 rounded-full opacity-60"></div>
                
                <!-- Instagram feed Grid (3 columns, representing blocks) -->
                <!-- The hexagon visual paths are rendered inside utilizing CSS overlays and absolute elements -->
                <div id="puzzle-grid" class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 sm:gap-4 relative bg-[#94A786] p-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-500 overflow-hidden">
                    
                    <!-- SVG Seamless Hexagon Vector Overlay across the whole feed -->
                    <div id="hex-grid-overlay" class="absolute inset-0 z-10 pointer-events-none transition-opacity duration-300">
                        <!-- Dynamic SVG drawing custom paths connecting grid nodes -->
                        <svg class="w-full h-full text-white/30" viewBox="0 0 600 1000" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
                            <!-- Left Hexagon -->
                            <polygon points="100,100 250,180 250,340 100,420 -50,340 -50,180" />
                            <!-- Mid Right Hexagon -->
                            <polygon points="450,250 600,330 600,490 450,570 300,490 300,330" />
                            <!-- Bottom Left Hexagon -->
                            <polygon points="150,600 300,680 300,840 150,920 0,840 0,680" />
                            <!-- Abstract connecting lines to simulate infinite puzzle space -->
                            <line x1="250" y1="180" x2="450" y2="250" />
                            <line x1="100" y1="420" x2="150" y2="600" />
                            <line x1="300" y1="490" x2="300" y2="680" />
                            <line x1="450" y1="570" x2="150" y2="920" />
                        </svg>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 1, Col 1: Photo Polaroid Block -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-1.5 sm:p-3 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer transition hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(1)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-01</div>
                        
                        <!-- Internal Polaroid -->
                        <div class="polaroid-card p-1 sm:p-1.5 pb-4 sm:pb-6 rounded-sm w-[90%] mx-auto mt-2 rotate-[-3deg] transform origin-top-left z-20">
                            <div class="aspect-square bg-oatmeal-100 overflow-hidden">
                                <img id="img-tile-1" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512428559087-560fa5ceab42?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300" alt="Plant on desk" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="signature-font text-xs sm:text-lg text-white/80 text-center mt-1 z-20">Morning Vibes</div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 1, Col 2: Elegant Text / Script Block -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(2)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-02</div>
                        <div class="space-y-1 z-20">
                            <h4 id="script-tile-2" class="signature-font text-3xl sm:text-5xl text-white/90">Morning Spirit</h4>
                            <p id="sub-tile-2" class="text-[8px] sm:text-[10px] font-typewriter text-white/70 max-w-[120px] mx-auto">Create beautiful stories continuously.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 1, Col 3: Elegant Photo Display -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(3)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-03</div>
                        
                        <!-- Small Mini Polaroid Frame -->
                        <div class="polaroid-card p-1 pb-3 rounded-sm w-[75%] mx-auto mt-2 z-20">
                            <div class="aspect-square bg-[#E5EAD9] overflow-hidden">
                                <img id="img-tile-3" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300" alt="Camera lens" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="font-typewriter text-[8px] text-white/70 text-center mt-1 z-20">Frame #04</div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 2, Col 1: Clean Editorial Script -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(4)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-04</div>
                        <div class="z-20 space-y-2">
                            <p id="text-tile-4" class="font-typewriter text-[9px] sm:text-xs text-white/95 uppercase tracking-widest">Saturday<br>Morning</p>
                            <div class="w-6 h-[1px] bg-white/30 mx-auto"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 2, Col 2: Large Continuous Middle Landscape Image (Spans into other tiles conceptually) -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(5)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-05</div>
                        
                        <div class="polaroid-card p-1.5 pb-4 rounded-sm w-[95%] mx-auto z-20 rotate-[1deg]">
                            <div class="aspect-[16/10] bg-oatmeal-100 overflow-hidden">
                                <img id="img-tile-5" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497032628192-86f99bcd76bc?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300" alt="Workspace" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                            </div>
                            <div class="text-[7px] text-center text-sage-600 mt-1 font-typewriter">Quiet Workspace Study</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 2, Col 3: Elegant Typewriter Poem Block -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(6)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-06</div>
                        <div class="z-20 space-y-1">
                            <p id="text-tile-6" class="font-typewriter text-[9px] sm:text-xs text-white/90">the day<br>after<br>tomorrow</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 3, Col 1: Small Polaroid Frame Left -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-1.5 sm:p-3 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(7)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-07</div>
                        
                        <div class="polaroid-card p-1 pb-3 rounded-sm w-[80%] mx-auto mt-2 z-20 rotate-[-2deg]">
                            <div class="aspect-[4/5] bg-oatmeal-100 overflow-hidden">
                                <img id="img-tile-7" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531346878377-a5be20888e57?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300" alt="Notebook" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[7px] font-typewriter text-white/60 text-center z-20">Creative Notes</span>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 3, Col 2: Author Credit Block -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(8)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-08</div>
                        <div class="z-20 space-y-1">
                            <p id="text-tile-8" class="font-typewriter text-[8px] text-white/80 max-w-[100px] leading-tight">Every post, link, and tag impact to build your feed.</p>
                            <p class="font-serif italic text-[10px] text-white/90 pt-1">Author Name</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Row 3, Col 3: Beautiful Text Focus Box -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white/5 border border-white/15 aspect-square rounded-sm p-2 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center overflow-hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" onclick="editTile(9)">
                        <div class="absolute top-1 left-2 text-[8px] font-typewriter text-white/40">/ post-09</div>
                        <div class="z-20 space-y-1">
                            <p id="text-tile-9" class="font-typewriter text-[11px] sm:text-sm text-white/90 font-bold">your daily<br>activities</p>
                            <div class="w-4 h-[1px] bg-white/50 mx-auto mt-2"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

                <!-- Touch Alternative Guide Alert -->
                <p class="text-center text-[11px] text-sage-500 font-typewriter mt-4">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info mr-1"></i> Tip: Tap any block in the canvas to live-edit text or rotate image themes.
                </p>
            </div>

            <!-- Interactive Modal / Control Box for Editing Grid Items -->
            <div id="tile-edit-modal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-sage-950/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
                <div class="bg-white rounded-lg border border-sage-200 p-6 w-full max-w-md shadow-xl relative">
                    <button onclick="closeEditModal()" class="absolute top-4 right-4 text-sage-400 hover:text-sage-700">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i>
                    </button>

                    <h3 class="font-serif text-2xl text-charcoal mb-2">Edit Block Content</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-sage-500 mb-6">Modify text, visual accents, or swap placeholder images live in this Instagram puzzle layout slot.</p>

                    <!-- ID hidden tracker -->
                    <input type="hidden" id="edit-tile-id">

                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <!-- Text editing block (conditional) -->
                        <div id="modal-text-field-group">
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-sage-700 mb-1">Display Text</label>
                            <textarea id="modal-tile-text" rows="2" class="w-full p-2.5 bg-oatmeal-50 border border-sage-200 rounded text-sm text-charcoal focus:ring-1 focus:ring-sage-500 focus:outline-none"></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Image Swap (conditional) -->
                        <div id="modal-image-field-group">
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-sage-700 mb-1">Placeholder Image Theme</label>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                                <button onclick="setPlaceholderImage('desk')" class="p-1 border border-sage-200 rounded hover:border-sage-500 bg-oatmeal-50">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512428559087-560fa5ceab42?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=120" class="h-10 w-full object-cover rounded-sm">
                                    <span class="text-[9px] text-sage-600 block mt-1">Minimalist</span>
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="setPlaceholderImage('nature')" class="p-1 border border-sage-200 rounded hover:border-sage-500 bg-oatmeal-50">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1448375240586-882707db888b?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=120" class="h-10 w-full object-cover rounded-sm">
                                    <span class="text-[9px] text-sage-600 block mt-1">Verdant</span>
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="setPlaceholderImage('coffee')" class="p-1 border border-sage-200 rounded hover:border-sage-500 bg-oatmeal-50">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497032628192-86f99bcd76bc?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=120" class="h-10 w-full object-cover rounded-sm">
                                    <span class="text-[9px] text-sage-600 block mt-1">Quiet Cafe</span>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-sage-100 flex justify-end space-x-2">
                        <button onclick="closeEditModal()" class="px-4 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-sage-500 hover:text-sage-800">
                            Cancel
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="applyTileChanges()" class="px-5 py-2 bg-sage-800 hover:bg-sage-600 text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold rounded-sm">
                            Save Changes
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Visual Archetypes / Design Assets Section -->
    <section id="features" class="py-24 bg-[#E7EBE0] relative overflow-hidden border-t border-sage-200">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Details -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-8">
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-sage-500 font-bold block">Tailored Components</span>
                        <h2 class="font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl text-charcoal font-light leading-tight">
                            Crafted for quiet, mindful <span class="italic text-sage-600">brand presence</span>.
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <p class="text-sage-700 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Every single block is pre-balanced. You don't have to think about visual weight; our algorithmic framework determines which block hosts visual depth, which card gets dynamic script text, and where layout guides belong.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Feature Bullet Points with Premium Icons -->
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-start">
                            <div class="mt-1 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-sage-700 shrink-0 text-xs shadow-sm">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ml-4">
                                <h4 class="font-serif text-base font-semibold text-charcoal">Pre-Compiled Aesthetic Harmony</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 mt-0.5 font-light">The color coordinates are extracted straight from natural lichen, sagebrush, and parchment paper.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="flex items-start">
                            <div class="mt-1 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-sage-700 shrink-0 text-xs shadow-sm">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-crop-simple"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ml-4">
                                <h4 class="font-serif text-base font-semibold text-charcoal">Lossless Grid Exporting</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 mt-0.5 font-light">Includes sliced files mapped out for quick, pixel-perfect uploading on Instagram.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="flex items-start">
                            <div class="mt-1 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-sage-700 shrink-0 text-xs shadow-sm">
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-font"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div class="ml-4">
                                <h4 class="font-serif text-base font-semibold text-charcoal">Integrated Web Fonts Included</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 mt-0.5 font-light">Features editorial standard, beautifully licensed typefaces optimized for mobile displays.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Interactive Visual Cards Accordion/Grid -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    
                    <!-- Card 1: Polaroid Frame Showcase -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-sage-300/40 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between space-y-4 group hover:shadow-md transition duration-300">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-400">Asset type: Frame</span>
                            <span class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-sage-100 text-sage-700 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold rounded">Polaroid Style</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="polaroid-card p-2 pb-6 rounded-sm w-[80%] mx-auto shadow-sm">
                            <div class="aspect-[4/3] bg-sage-50 overflow-hidden relative">
                                <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hex-pattern opacity-30"></div>
                                <div class="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-sage-300">
                                    <i class="fa-regular fa-image text-2xl"></i>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">The Tactile Frame</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 font-light mt-1">Imbues a nostalgic, tangible Polaroid look with customizable drop-shadow offsets.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 2: Typographic Accents Showcase -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-sage-300/40 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between space-y-4 group hover:shadow-md transition duration-300">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-400">Asset type: Lettering</span>
                            <span class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-sage-100 text-sage-700 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold rounded font-typewriter">Typewriter</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="py-6 text-center space-y-2">
                            <p class="font-handwritten text-4xl text-sage-700">Saturday Morning</p>
                            <p class="font-typewriter text-xs text-sage-400">one hundred sixty seven</p>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">Editorial Accent Blocks</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 font-light mt-1">Pre-styled signature handwriting combined with monospaced text blocks for deep contrast.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 3: Hexagonal Overlays Showcase -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-sage-300/40 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between space-y-4 group hover:shadow-md transition duration-300">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-400">Asset type: Vector Path</span>
                            <span class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-sage-100 text-sage-700 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold rounded">Infinite Loop</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="py-4 flex justify-center items-center">
                            <svg class="w-16 h-16 text-sage-400" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                                <polygon points="50,10 90,32.5 90,77.5 50,100 10,77.5 10,32.5" />
                                <polygon points="50,25 75,39 75,69 50,83 25,69 25,39" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">Geometric Grid Lines</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 font-light mt-1">Interlocking hexagons that bridge different social media posts into a cohesive whole.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 4: Organic Color Palettes Showcase -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-sage-300/40 shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between space-y-4 group hover:shadow-md transition duration-300">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-400">Asset type: Palette</span>
                            <span class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-sage-100 text-sage-700 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold rounded">Lichen Earth</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="flex justify-center items-center space-x-2 py-6">
                            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-sage-800 ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm"></div>
                            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-sage-500 ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm"></div>
                            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-sage-300 ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm"></div>
                            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-[#E5EAD9] ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm"></div>
                            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-[#FAFBF8] ring-2 ring-white shadow-sm"></div>
                        </div>

                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-serif text-lg font-bold text-charcoal">Organic Color System</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-600 font-light mt-1">A highly cohesive color harmony that builds calm, premium trust instantly with visual buyers.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>

            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Organic Color Palette Generator Sandbox (Premium Detail) -->
    <section id="designer" class="py-24 bg-white relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            
            <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto text-center mb-16 space-y-4">
                <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-sage-500 font-bold">Aesthetic Design Playground</span>
                <h2 class="font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl text-charcoal font-light">
                    The Moodboard Palette Builder
                </h2>
                <p class="text-sage-600 font-light text-sm md:text-base">
                    Adjust the slider below to shift the lighting mood of your design theme. Instantly watch the color system re-balance across warm morning, misty afternoon, and rich dusk parameters.
                </p>
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center max-w-5xl mx-auto">
                
                <!-- Live Preview Canvas -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-6">
                    <div id="palette-mock-card" class="p-8 rounded-xl border border-sage-200 transition-colors duration-500 shadow-lg bg-[#F3F5EE] flex flex-col justify-between aspect-[4/3] relative overflow-hidden">
                        
                        <!-- Mini Hex backdrop -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hex-pattern opacity-15 pointer-events-none"></div>

                        <div class="flex justify-between items-start z-10">
                            <div>
                                <span id="palette-theme-tag" class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest font-mono bg-sage-800 text-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded">Active Theme: Sage Forest</span>
                                <h3 id="palette-display-title" class="font-serif text-3xl font-light text-charcoal mt-2">The Quiet Landscape</h3>
                            </div>
                            <span class="font-handwritten text-4xl text-sage-700/80 rotate-[-8deg] block">pure spirit</span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="z-10 space-y-2">
                            <p class="text-xs text-sage-700 font-light leading-relaxed max-w-sm">
                                "In all things of nature there is something of the marvelous." — An understated collection designed to elevate simple truths.
                            </p>
                            <div class="w-12 h-[1px] bg-sage-400"></div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Mini Palette swatches representation -->
                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 z-10">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-500">Palette:</span>
                            <div class="flex -space-x-1">
                                <div id="swatch-1" class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border border-white bg-sage-800"></div>
                                <div id="swatch-2" class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border border-white bg-sage-500"></div>
                                <div id="swatch-3" class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border border-white bg-sage-300"></div>
                                <div id="swatch-4" class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border border-white bg-sage-100"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Custom Slider Controls -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8 bg-sage-100/40 p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-xl border border-sage-200">
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                        <label class="block text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-sage-800">Select Lighting Mood Preset:</label>
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                            <button onclick="setPaletteTheme('sage-forest')" class="px-3 py-2 bg-white hover:bg-sage-100 rounded text-xs font-semibold text-sage-800 border border-sage-200 transition">Sage Forest</button>
                            <button onclick="setPaletteTheme('misty-morning')" class="px-3 py-2 bg-white hover:bg-sage-100 rounded text-xs font-semibold text-sage-800 border border-sage-200 transition">Misty Morning</button>
                            <button onclick="setPaletteTheme('desert-oat')" class="px-3 py-2 bg-white hover:bg-sage-100 rounded text-xs font-semibold text-sage-800 border border-sage-200 transition">Desert Oat</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Slider Input -->
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-xs font-semibold text-sage-700">
                            <span>Cool Lichen (0%)</span>
                            <span>Warm Earth (100%)</span>
                        </div>
                        <input type="range" id="palette-slider" min="0" max="100" value="50" oninput="handlePaletteSlider(this.value)" class="w-full accent-sage-700 h-2 bg-sage-200 rounded-lg cursor-pointer">
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-typewriter text-sage-500">Active Fine Tuning Balance: <span id="slider-val">50%</span></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Hex value readout -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-4 rounded border border-sage-200 space-y-2">
                        <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-sage-400 block font-bold">Palette Color Codes</span>
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2 font-mono text-[10px] text-sage-700">
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5 bg-oatmeal-50 p-1.5 rounded">
                                <div id="hex-box-1" class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-sage-800"></div>
                                <span id="hex-text-1">#2D3328</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5 bg-oatmeal-50 p-1.5 rounded">
                                <div id="hex-box-2" class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-sage-500"></div>
                                <span id="hex-text-2">#798C6B</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5 bg-oatmeal-50 p-1.5 rounded">
                                <div id="hex-box-3" class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-sage-300"></div>
                                <span id="hex-text-3">#B5C4AA</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex items-center space-x-1.5 bg-oatmeal-50 p-1.5 rounded">
                                <div id="hex-box-4" class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-[#F3F5EE]"></div>
                                <span id="hex-text-4">#F3F5EE</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Showcase Walkthrough Section -->
    <section id="video-tour" class="py-24 bg-oatmeal-100 relative overflow-hidden border-t border-sage-200">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 relative z-10">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Video Preview Block -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                    <div class="aspect-video bg-[#E5EAD9] rounded-xl border border-sage-300/60 p-4 relative overflow-hidden shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center group">
                        <!-- Simulated video scene overlay -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-sage-800/20 to-transparent"></div>
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1200" alt="Video cover" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover grayscale brightness-95 opacity-80 mix-blend-multiply group-hover:scale-105 transition duration-700">
                        
                        <!-- Overlay Hex Art -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-hex-pattern opacity-25"></div>

                        <!-- Central Play Button -->
                        <button onclick="playWalkthroughVideo()" class="relative z-10 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white text-sage-800 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-115 transition-transform duration-300">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-play text-lg ml-1 text-sage-700"></i>
                        </button>

                        <div class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 bg-white/90 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold text-sage-800 rounded">
                            Interactive Guide • 1:45
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Video description -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-sage-500 font-bold">Behind the Canvas</span>
                    <h2 class="font-serif text-4xl text-charcoal font-light leading-tight">
                        How to slice, edit, and schedule your puzzle feed.
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-sage-700 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed font-light">
                        Discover the seamless workflow built for busy creative entrepreneurs. In this short walkthrough, we demonstrate how to import the Verdant Hexagonals system into Canva, customize the text strings, drop in your custom imagery, and export all sliced assets in just under two minutes.
                    </p>

                    <div class="pt-2">
                        <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs text-sage-600 font-typewriter">
                            <li class="flex items-center">
                                <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-sage-500 mr-2"></span> No graphic design degree required
                            </li>
                            <li class="flex items-center">
                                <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-sage-500 mr-2"></span> Fully editable layer hierarchies
                            </li>
                            <li class="flex items-center">
                                <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-sage-500 mr-2"></span> Scalable vectors for infinite grids
                            </li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Playground Application Code -->
    <script>
        // Core state management for interactive sandbox
        let currentThemeIndex = 0;
        const themes = [
            { name: "Olive Sage", class: "bg-[#94A786]" },
            { name: "Sandalwood Oatmeal", class: "bg-[#C4B7A6]" },
            { name: "Tranquil Forest", class: "bg-[#5D6B54]" },
            { name: "Charcoal Slate", class: "bg-[#2D3328]" }
        ];

        // 1. Toggle continuous guide lines
        function toggleHexLines() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('hex-grid-overlay');
            if (overlay.classList.contains('opacity-0')) {
                overlay.classList.remove('opacity-0');
                showAlert("Seamless hexagonal visual guides enabled.");
            } else {
                overlay.classList.add('opacity-0');
                showAlert("Seamless visual guides minimized for output preview.");
            }
        }

        // 2. Cycle simulated phone background
        function cycleBackground() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('puzzle-grid');
            const label = document.getElementById('theme-label');
            
            // Remove previous theme class
            grid.classList.remove(themes[currentThemeIndex].class);
            
            // Increment
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            
            // Apply new theme class
            grid.classList.add(themes[currentThemeIndex].class);
            label.innerText = themes[currentThemeIndex].name;
            
            showAlert(`Grid theme transformed to ${themes[currentThemeIndex].name}.`);
        }

        // 3. Edit individual puzzle tile content (Text or image focus)
        function editTile(id) {
            const modal = document.getElementById('tile-edit-modal');
            const textFieldGroup = document.getElementById('modal-text-field-group');
            const imageFieldGroup = document.getElementById('modal-image-field-group');
            const hiddenIdInput = document.getElementById('edit-tile-id');
            const textInput = document.getElementById('modal-tile-text');

            hiddenIdInput.value = id;
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');

            // Configure modal options based on which tile is selected
            if ([1, 3, 5, 7].includes(id)) {
