                // Photo Tiles
                imageFieldGroup.classList.remove('hidden');
                textFieldGroup.classList.add('hidden');
            } else {
                // Text/Script Tiles
                imageFieldGroup.classList.add('hidden');
                textFieldGroup.classList.remove('hidden');

                // Pre-fill corresponding text
                let textSrc = "";
                if (id === 2) textSrc = document.getElementById('script-tile-2').innerText;
                if (id === 4) textSrc = document.getElementById('text-tile-4').innerText;
                if (id === 6) textSrc = document.getElementById('text-tile-6').innerText;
                if (id === 8) textSrc = document.getElementById('text-tile-8').innerText;
                if (id === 9) textSrc = document.getElementById('text-tile-9').innerText;

                textInput.value = textSrc;
            }
        }

        function closeEditModal() {
            document.getElementById('tile-edit-modal').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function applyTileChanges() {
            const id = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-tile-id').value);
            const textValue = document.getElementById('modal-tile-text').value;

            if ([2, 4, 6, 8, 9].includes(id)) {
                // Apply updated text strings directly to DOM sandbox
                if (id === 2) document.getElementById('script-tile-2').innerText = textValue;
                if (id === 4) document.getElementById('text-tile-4').innerHTML = textValue.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
                if (id === 6) document.getElementById('text-tile-6').innerHTML = textValue.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
                if (id === 8) document.getElementById('text-tile-8').innerText = textValue;
                if (id === 9) document.getElementById('text-tile-9').innerHTML = textValue.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
            }

            closeEditModal();
            showAlert(`Grid Node #${id} successfully updated.`);
        }

        // Swaps placeholder images in the active polaroid selection
        function setPlaceholderImage(type) {
            const id = parseInt(document.getElementById('edit-tile-id').value);
            let url = "";

            if (type === 'desk') url = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512428559087-560fa5ceab42?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300";
            if (type === 'nature') url = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1448375240586-882707db888b?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300";
            if (type === 'coffee') url = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497032628192-86f99bcd76bc?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=300";

            const targetImg = document.getElementById(`img-tile-${id}`);
            if (targetImg) {
                targetImg.src = url;
            }

            closeEditModal();
            showAlert(`Image swapped inside Frame #${id}.`);
        }

        // 4. Interactive Moodboard Palette Builder
        const palettePresets = {
            'sage-forest': {
                name: 'Sage Forest',
                colors: ['#2D3328', '#798C6B', '#B5C4AA', '#F3F5EE'],
                bg: '#F3F5EE',
                title: 'The Quiet Landscape'
            },
            'misty-morning': {
                name: 'Misty Morning',
                colors: ['#3A4454', '#53687E', '#C2D1D9', '#EBF1F5'],
                bg: '#EBF1F5',
                title: 'Morning Condensation'
            },
            'desert-oat': {
                name: 'Desert Oat',
                colors: ['#594F3B', '#A69B80', '#D9D2C9', '#F9F7F5'],
                bg: '#F9F7F5',
                title: 'Washed Oat & Sandstone'
            }
        };

        function setPaletteTheme(themeKey) {
            const theme = palettePresets[themeKey];
            if (!theme) return;

            // Re-render mock card elements
            document.getElementById('palette-theme-tag').innerText = `Active Theme: ${theme.name}`;
            document.getElementById('palette-display-title').innerText = theme.title;
            
            const card = document.getElementById('palette-mock-card');
            card.style.backgroundColor = theme.bg;

            // Adjust swatches
            document.getElementById('swatch-1').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[0];
            document.getElementById('swatch-2').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[1];
            document.getElementById('swatch-3').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[2];
            document.getElementById('swatch-4').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[3];

            // Adjust hex displays
            document.getElementById('hex-box-1').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[0];
            document.getElementById('hex-box-2').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[1];
            document.getElementById('hex-box-3').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[2];
            document.getElementById('hex-box-4').style.backgroundColor = theme.colors[3];

            document.getElementById('hex-text-1').innerText = theme.colors[0];
            document.getElementById('hex-text-2').innerText = theme.colors[1];
            document.getElementById('hex-text-3').innerText = theme.colors[2];
            document.getElementById('hex-text-4').innerText = theme.colors[3];

            showAlert(`Switched to native preset: ${theme.name}`);
        }

        function handlePaletteSlider(val) {
            document.getElementById('slider-val').innerText = `${val}%`;
            
            // Dynamically alter transparency or slight color tone adjustments based on slider
            const opValue = 0.5 + (val / 200); // 0.5 to 1
            document.getElementById('palette-mock-card').style.opacity = opValue;
        }

        // 5. Video Play Walkthrough Simulation
        function playWalkthroughVideo() {
            showAlert("Walkthrough video initialized. Generating virtual player...");
        }

        // 6. Generic Notification Utility
        let alertTimeout;
        function showAlert(msg) {
            const alertBox = document.getElementById('ui-alert-modal');
            const alertMsg = document.getElementById('ui-alert-message');

            alertMsg.innerText = msg;
            alertBox.classList.remove('hidden');

            clearTimeout(alertTimeout);
            alertTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                dismissAlert();
            }, 4500);
        }

        function dismissAlert() {
            document.getElementById('ui-alert-modal').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        // Simulating newsletter submit
        function handleNewsletterSubmit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            showAlert("Welcome aboard. Check your inbox for the Slicing Guide PDF!");
            e.target.reset();
        }

        // Simulating Checkout Flow
        function simulateCheckout(packageName) {
            showAlert(`Simulating checkout flow for ${packageName}. Premium directory compiled successfully.`);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
15
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>ApexCare — Premium Dental Care & Aesthetics</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        brand: {
                            navy: '#0f172a',
                            blue: '#2563eb',
                            lavender: '#eef2ff',
                            slateAccent: '#475569',
                            softBlue: '#3b82f6',
                            glow: '#e0e7ff'
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                        serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif']
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <!-- Google Fonts: Inter & Playfair Display -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- FontAwesome Icons for Beautiful Visuals -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        .premium-glow {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(224, 231, 255, 0.6) 0%, rgba(245, 247, 255, 0.2) 100%);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f3f4f6 0%, #e0e7ff 40%, #ffffff 100%);
        }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f1f5f9;
        }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #cbd5e1;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .custom-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #94a3b8;
        }
        /* Custom Before/After Slide styling */
        .slider-container {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .slider-before, .slider-after {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }
        /* Clip-path for slider */
        .slider-after {
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#f8fafc] text-brand-navy font-sans antialiased overflow-x-hidden">

    <!-- Toast Notification Container -->
    <div id="toast" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 transform translate-y-20 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-out flex items-center gap-3 bg-brand-navy text-white px-5 py-4 rounded-xl shadow-2xl max-w-md">
        <div class="bg-emerald-500 text-white rounded-full p-1.5 w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center">
            <i class="fas fa-check text-xs"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
            <p class="font-semibold text-sm" id="toast-title">Appointment Requested</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-300" id="toast-desc">We'll text you to confirm your booking details.</p>
        </div>
        <button onclick="hideToast()" class="text-slate-400 hover:text-white ml-auto pl-4">
            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
        </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Sticky Navigation Bar -->
    <nav class="sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between h-20">
                <!-- Logo -->
                <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 group">
                    <div class="bg-brand-blue text-white w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 group-hover:rotate-12 transition-transform">
                        <i class="fas fa-hand-holding-medical text-sm"></i>
                    </div>
                    <span class="font-bold text-xl tracking-tight text-brand-navy">Apex<span class="text-brand-blue">Care</span></span>
                </a>

                <!-- Desktop Navigation Links -->
                <div class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8 font-medium text-sm text-brand-slateAccent">
                    <a href="#hero" class="hover:text-brand-blue transition-colors">Home</a>
                    <a href="#treatments" class="hover:text-brand-blue transition-colors">Care Services</a>
                    <a href="#smile-slider" class="hover:text-brand-blue transition-colors">Gallery</a>
                    <a href="#about" class="hover:text-brand-blue transition-colors">About Us</a>
                    <a href="#quiz" class="hover:text-brand-blue transition-colors">Smile Quiz</a>
                </div>

                <!-- Call to Action Button -->
                <div class="hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4">
                    <a href="#book-now" class="bg-brand-navy text-white hover:bg-brand-blue text-sm font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-md group">
                        Let's talk 
                        <span class="inline-block group-hover:translate-x-0.5 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform">
                            <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square text-xs"></i>
                        </span>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Mobile Menu Toggle -->
                <button id="mobile-menu-btn" class="md:hidden text-brand-navy focus:outline-none p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors">
                    <i class="fas fa-bars text-xl"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Mobile Menu -->
        <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden md:hidden bg-white border-b border-slate-200 px-4 pt-2 pb-6 space-y-3">
            <a href="#hero" class="block font-medium py-2 text-brand-navy border-b border-slate-50">Home</a>
            <a href="#treatments" class="block font-medium py-2 text-brand-navy border-b border-slate-50">Care Services</a>
            <a href="#smile-slider" class="block font-medium py-2 text-brand-navy border-b border-slate-50">Gallery</a>
            <a href="#about" class="block font-medium py-2 text-brand-navy border-b border-slate-50">About Us</a>
            <a href="#quiz" class="block font-medium py-2 text-brand-navy border-b border-slate-50">Smile Quiz</a>
            <a href="#book-now" class="block bg-brand-navy text-white text-center font-semibold py-3 rounded-xl">Book Appointment</a>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Main Hero Section with Premium Glow -->
    <header id="hero" class="relative overflow-hidden hero-gradient pt-10 pb-24 md:py-28">
        <!-- Floating decorative glowing background spheres -->
        <div class="absolute top-1/4 left-1/10 w-96 h-96 bg-brand-glow rounded-full filter blur-3xl opacity-60 pointer-events-none"></div>
        <div class="absolute bottom-1/10 right-1/10 w-[450px] h-[450px] bg-indigo-100 rounded-full filter blur-3xl opacity-50 pointer-events-none"></div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Content Area -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 space-y-6 text-center lg:text-left">
                    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 border border-indigo-200 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs tracking-wider uppercase">
                        <i class="fas fa-certificate text-xs"></i> #1 Dental Centre in Excellence
                    </span>
                    
                    <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl font-normal leading-tight text-brand-navy font-serif">
                        Brighten your <br class="hidden sm:inline">
                        smile with <span class="italic font-normal text-brand-blue font-serif relative">expert dental care
                            <svg class="absolute left-0 -bottom-2 w-full h-2 text-indigo-200" viewBox="0 0 100 10" preserveAspectRatio="none"><path d="M0,5 Q50,10 100,5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></svg>
                        </span>
                    </h1>

                    <p class="text-slate-600 max-w-xl mx-auto lg:mx-0 text-base md:text-lg leading-relaxed">
                        Experience precision-driven aesthetic and restorative dentistry within an atmosphere crafted for ultimate patient comfort and absolute safety.
                    </p>

                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center lg:justify-start gap-4 pt-4">
                        <a href="#book-now" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-brand-navy text-white hover:bg-brand-blue text-base font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-xl shadow-slate-900/10 hover:shadow-blue-500/20 group">
                            Schedule your visit 
                            <span class="inline-block group-hover:translate-x-0.5 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square text-sm"></i>
                            </span>
                        </a>
                        <a href="#treatments" class="w-full sm:w-auto bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-brand-navy font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full border border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all shadow-sm">
                            Explore treatments
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Client Trust Badging -->
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-center lg:justify-start gap-6 pt-6">
                        <div class="flex -space-x-3">
                            <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" alt="Client 1">
                            <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" alt="Client 2">
                            <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" alt="Client 3">
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-left">
                            <div class="flex text-amber-400 text-xs">
                                <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                                <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                                <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                                <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                                <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                            </div>
                            <span class="text-xs text-brand-slateAccent font-medium">Trusted by over 5,000+ happy smiles</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Interactive Visual Block -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 relative flex justify-center">
                    <!-- Core Rounded Visual Card with Inner Glowing Elements -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white p-4 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl shadow-indigo-100 border border-white/80 w-full max-w-sm overflow-hidden group">
                        <!-- Main Content Display with high-end feel -->
                        <div class="relative h-[420px] rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden bg-brand-lavender flex flex-col justify-between p-6">
                            
                            <!-- Premium overlay decorative tag -->
                            <div class="self-end bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-sm flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span>
                                <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-navy">Accepting Patients</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Interactive Dentists Micro-card (Slides into view) -->
                            <div class="bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-white/50 space-y-3 transform translate-y-2 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-all duration-500">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-brand-blue/10 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-blue">
                                        <i class="fas fa-user-doctor"></i>
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-brand-navy">Caring Specialists</h4>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Your safety is our priority</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center pt-2 border-t border-slate-100">
                                    <a href="#about" class="text-xs font-semibold text-brand-blue hover:underline">Meet our team <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-1"></i></a>
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400">ADA Certified</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Decorative background icon pattern (Subtle and classy) -->
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none opacity-10">
                                <i class="fas fa-tooth text-[12rem] text-brand-blue"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Side Floating Badge element mimicking reference image seal -->
                    <div class="absolute -left-6 bottom-12 bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-xl shadow-slate-200 border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center w-24 h-24 transform -rotate-12 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-300">
                        <div class="border-2 border-dashed border-indigo-200 rounded-full w-full h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-1">
                            <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-brand-slateAccent">Elite level</span>
                            <span class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-blue leading-none">M</span>
                            <span class="text-[8px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-indigo-400">Dentist</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Overlapping Floating Stats section, matching reference visual style -->
    <section class="relative z-20 -mt-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            
            <!-- Stat Card 1 -->
            <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-white/80 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[140px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Client Satisfaction</span>
                    <div class="bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-smile"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-brand-navy">99.4%</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Patients recommending ApexCare</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Stat Card 2 -->
            <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-white/80 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[140px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Smiles Transformed</span>
                    <div class="bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-500 w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-tooth"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-brand-navy">5,000+</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Successful procedures completed</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Stat Card 3 -->
            <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-white/80 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[140px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Specialist Doctors</span>
                    <div class="bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-md"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-brand-navy">12+</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Board-certified prosthodontists</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Stat Card 4 -->
            <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-white/80 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[140px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-indigo-400 uppercase tracking-widest">ADA Accredited</span>
                    <div class="bg-amber-50 text-amber-500 w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-award"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-brand-navy">Gold Standard</h3>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Meets strict global hygiene codes</p>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Smile Transformation Gallery (Before / After Slider) -->
    <section id="smile-slider" class="py-24 bg-white relative">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-4 mb-16">
                <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                    <i class="fas fa-images"></i> Treatment Gallery
                </span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy leading-tight">
                    Stunning results from our patients
                </h2>
                <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm md:text-base">
                    Drag the interactive handle across the images below to view the incredible transformation our tailored cosmetic and alignment programs accomplish.
                </p>
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Details Column -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <div class="bg-brand-lavender/50 p-6 rounded-3xl border border-indigo-100/50">
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-brand-navy font-serif mb-2">Case Study #48: Porcelain Veneers</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-slate-600 leading-relaxed mb-4">
                            Patient requested alignment correction and bright restoration of discoloration without aggressive structural shaving. Our team devised a non-invasive porcelain restoration.
                        </p>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs font-semibold text-brand-slateAccent">
                            <span class="bg-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-slate-100"><i class="fas fa-clock mr-1 text-brand-blue"></i> 2 Sessions</span>
                            <span class="bg-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-slate-100"><i class="fas fa-sparkles mr-1 text-emerald-500"></i> Pain-free</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Testimonial Speech Bubble -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-100 space-y-4 relative">
                        <p class="text-sm text-brand-navy italic">
                            "I avoided laughing openly for years. The porcelain veneers treatment felt incredibly gentle, and now I showcase my smile with absolute confidence."
                        </p>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80" alt="Sarah M.">
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-brand-navy">Sarah Jenkins</h4>
                                <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Restoration Patient</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="absolute right-6 bottom-6 text-brand-blue/10 text-5xl font-serif">
                            “
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Slider Canvas Column -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 flex justify-center">
                    <div class="relative w-full max-w-xl aspect-[4/3] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl shadow-indigo-100/60 border-4 border-white slider-container" id="before-after-box">
                        
                        <!-- Before Visual -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-slate-200">
                            <!-- Custom Designed Before Canvas Simulation -->
                            <div class="w-full h-full bg-cover bg-center flex items-center justify-center text-white" style="background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(15,23,42,0.1), rgba(15,23,42,0.1)), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1588776814546-1ffcf47267a5?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80');">
                                <div class="absolute bottom-6 left-6 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Before Treatment</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- After Visual (Will clip dynamically) -->
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-brand-lavender slider-after" id="after-image" style="background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(15,23,42,0.05), rgba(15,23,42,0.05)), url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606811971618-4486d14f3f99?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80'); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 0, 50% 100%, 0 100%);">
                            <div class="absolute bottom-6 right-6 bg-brand-blue/90 backdrop-blur-sm px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-white">After Treatment</div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide Control Handle Line -->
                        <div class="absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-1 bg-white cursor-ew-resize flex items-center justify-center" id="slider-handle" style="left: 50%;">
                            <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-brand-blue text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrows-left-right text-xs"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Treatment Explorer Section -->
    <section id="treatments" class="py-24 bg-slate-50/50 border-y border-slate-100 relative">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-6 mb-16">
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                        <i class="fas fa-stethoscope"></i> Our Care Services
                    </span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy">
                        Comprehensive solutions for <br class="hidden sm:inline">your dental wellness
                    </h2>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <!-- Interactive Tab Selectors -->
                    <div class="bg-white p-1.5 rounded-full border border-slate-200 flex gap-1 shadow-sm overflow-x-auto">
                        <button onclick="switchTab('aesthetic')" id="btn-aesthetic" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all bg-brand-navy text-white shadow-sm">
                            Cosmetic Aesthetics
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="switchTab('restorative')" id="btn-restorative" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all text-slate-500 hover:text-brand-navy">
                            Restorative Care
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="switchTab('orthodontics')" id="btn-orthodontics" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all text-slate-500 hover:text-brand-navy">
                            Orthodontics
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab Content Display Cards -->
            <div id="treatments-grid" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                <!-- Dynamically populated via JS -->
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Smile Quiz / AI Consultation Assistant -->
    <section id="quiz" class="py-24 bg-white relative">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#f3f4f6] via-[#e0e7ff]/40 to-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-16 border border-white relative overflow-hidden shadow-xl shadow-indigo-50">
                <div class="absolute right-0 top-0 w-80 h-80 bg-brand-glow rounded-full filter blur-3xl opacity-40 pointer-events-none"></div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                    
                    <!-- Left Intro Column -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                        <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white text-indigo-500 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider shadow-sm">
                            <i class="fas fa-sparkles"></i> Guided Assessment
                        </span>
                        <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy leading-tight">
                            Find your perfect treatment path in 2 minutes
                        </h2>
                        <p class="text-slate-600 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Answer a few quick questions about your oral healthcare and alignment goals. Our smart visual matching engine will propose customized treatment options instantly.
                        </p>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-slate-500 text-xs">
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1"><i class="fas fa-bolt text-amber-500"></i> No obligations</span>
                            <span class="flex items-center gap-1"><i class="fas fa-shield-halved text-emerald-500"></i> Fully confidential</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Right Quiz Module Column -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7 bg-white p-6 md:p-10 rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-xl relative z-10" id="quiz-container">
                        <!-- Step 1 Layout -->
                        <div id="quiz-step-1" class="space-y-6 transition-opacity duration-300">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-slate-100">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase">Question 1 of 3</span>
                                <div class="w-1/3 bg-slate-100 h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                    <div class="bg-brand-blue h-full w-1/3"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-navy">What is your primary smile goal?</h3>
                            
                            <div class="space-y-3">
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all">
                                    <input type="radio" name="goal" value="brighten" class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue focus:ring-brand-blue" checked>
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Brighten discolored teeth</p>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Restoration of coffee or naturally yellowed surfaces</p>
                                    </div>
                                </label>
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all">
                                    <input type="radio" name="goal" value="align" class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue focus:ring-brand-blue">
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Correct alignment & spaces</p>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Gentle gap filling and orthodontic straightness</p>
                                    </div>
                                </label>
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all">
                                    <input type="radio" name="goal" value="replace" class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue focus:ring-brand-blue">
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Restore missing teeth or gaps</p>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Prosthodontics, high-durability dental crowns or implants</p>
                                    </div>
                                </label>
                            </div>

                            <button onclick="nextQuizStep(2)" class="w-full bg-brand-navy text-white font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-blue transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                Next Question <i class="fas fa-arrow-right text-xs"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Step 2 Layout (Hidden initially) -->
                        <div id="quiz-step-2" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-opacity duration-300">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-slate-100">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase">Question 2 of 3</span>
                                <div class="w-1/3 bg-slate-100 h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                    <div class="bg-brand-blue h-full w-2/3"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-navy">Do you experience sensitivity?</h3>
                            
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <label class="flex flex-col gap-2 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all text-center">
                                    <input type="radio" name="sensitivity" value="yes" class="mx-auto w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue" checked>
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Yes, frequently</span>
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Cold, hot foods feel painful</span>
                                </label>
                                <label class="flex flex-col gap-2 p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all text-center">
                                    <input type="radio" name="sensitivity" value="no" class="mx-auto w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue">
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Rarely / No</span>
                                    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">No major sensitivity issues</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex gap-4">
                                <button onclick="prevQuizStep(1)" class="w-1/3 bg-slate-100 text-brand-navy font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors">
                                    Back
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="nextQuizStep(3)" class="w-2/3 bg-brand-navy text-white font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-blue transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                    Continue <i class="fas fa-arrow-right text-xs"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Step 3 Layout (Hidden initially) -->
                        <div id="quiz-step-3" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-opacity duration-300">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center pb-4 border-b border-slate-100">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase">Question 3 of 3</span>
                                <div class="w-1/3 bg-slate-100 h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                    <div class="bg-brand-blue h-full w-full"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-navy">Preferred scheduling framework</h3>
                            
                            <div class="space-y-3">
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all">
                                    <input type="radio" name="schedule" value="express" class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue focus:ring-brand-blue" checked>
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Fast and direct appointments</p>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Ideally completed in under 2 weeks</p>
                                    </div>
                                </label>
                                <label class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-all">
                                    <input type="radio" name="schedule" value="staged" class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue focus:ring-brand-blue">
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-brand-navy">Gradual staging</p>
                                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Paced visits matching busy travel schedules</p>
                                    </div>
                                </label>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex gap-4">
                                <button onclick="prevQuizStep(2)" class="w-1/3 bg-slate-100 text-brand-navy font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors">
                                    Back
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="showQuizResult()" class="w-2/3 bg-emerald-500 text-white font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-600 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                                    View Recommendation <i class="fas fa-circle-check text-xs"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Quiz Result Display (Hidden initially) -->
                        <div id="quiz-result" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-opacity duration-300">
                            <div class="text-center space-y-2 py-4">
                                <div class="w-14 h-14 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-xl mb-3">
                                    <i class="fas fa-magic"></i>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-emerald-600 uppercase tracking-widest">Recommended Treatment Plan</span>
                                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-brand-navy" id="result-title">Apex Smile Whitening & Restore</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 max-w-sm mx-auto" id="result-desc">
                                    Our hybrid whitening combined with remineralization treatment matches your low-sensitivity configuration beautifully.
                                </p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="bg-brand-lavender p-5 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-100 space-y-3">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">Duration estimate</span>
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-brand-navy" id="result-time">1 Session (90 Mins)</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">Typical aesthetic improvement</span>
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-emerald-600" id="result-gain">Up to 6 shades brighter</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                                    <span class="text-slate-500">Comfort scoring</span>
                                    <span class="font-semibold text-brand-blue">Excellent (Sensitivity protected)</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
                                <button onclick="resetQuiz()" class="w-full sm:w-1/3 bg-slate-100 text-brand-navy font-semibold py-3.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-200 transition-all text-xs">
                                    Retake Quiz
                                </button>
                                <a href="#book-now" class="w-full sm:w-2/3 bg-brand-navy text-white text-center font-semibold py-3.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-blue transition-all text-xs flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/10">
                                    Secure recommended slot <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i>
                                </a>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Trusted Partners Section / Detailed Info with floating graphic -->
    <section id="about" class="py-24 bg-slate-50 relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background light glows -->
        <div class="absolute -top-1/4 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-brand-glow rounded-full filter blur-3xl opacity-50 pointer-events-none"></div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Details Content -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-6 order-2 lg:order-1">
                    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart"></i> About Metier
                    </span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy leading-tight">
                        Your trusted partners <br class="hidden sm:inline">in dental care
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-600 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed">
                        At ApexCare, we believe a healthy smile is the foundation of happiness and personal confidence. Our highly experienced clinical team brings together state-of-the-art dental lasers, low-radiation 3D imaging, and specialized cosmetic techniques within a reassuring, high-end studio setting.
                    </p>
                    <p class="text-slate-600 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed">
                        Every surgical instrument and material meets strict American Dental Association guidelines, keeping you safe and comfortable from greeting to post-treatment.
                    </p>

                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 pt-4">
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <div class="bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-brand-navy">Elite Sterilization Protocols</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Triple hygiene loops surpassing typical clinical requirements.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <div class="bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fas fa-user-doctor"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-sm text-brand-navy">Board-Certified Masters</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500">Every treatment supervised by recognized aesthetic prosthodontists.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="pt-6">
                        <a href="#book-now" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-brand-navy text-white hover:bg-brand-blue text-sm font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/10 group">
                            Schedule your visit 
                            <span class="inline-block group-hover:translate-x-0.5 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform">
                                <i class="fas fa-arrow-up-right-from-square text-xs"></i>
                            </span>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Doctor Profiles / Creative Widget Column -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 relative order-1 lg:order-2">
                    
                    <!-- Doctor Showcase Card -->
                    <div class="relative bg-white p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl shadow-indigo-100/60 border border-white">
                        <h3 class="font-serif text-xl font-normal text-brand-navy mb-4">Our Lead Prosthodontist</h3>
                        
                        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-6 items-center">
                            <!-- Image Container -->
                            <div class="relative w-40 h-40 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-brand-lavender border-4 border-white shadow-md flex-shrink-0">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1622253692010-333f2da6031d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400&q=80" alt="Dr. Alistair Vance" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Profile Details -->
                            <div class="text-center sm:text-left space-y-3">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-lg text-brand-navy">Dr. Alistair Vance, DDS</h4>
                                    <span class="text-xs text-brand-blue font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Lead Aesthetic Prosthodontist</span>
                                </div>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
                                    With over 14 years of clinical experience from Columbia University, Dr. Vance specializes in full-mouth transformations and ultra-thin veneers.
                                </p>
                                <div class="flex justify-center sm:justify-start gap-4">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-slate-100 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-brand-slateAccent">120+ cases / year</span>
                                    <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-indigo-50 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md text-brand-blue">DDS, MS</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Mini Certifications & Accreditations banner inside -->
                        <div class="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <div class="bg-amber-100/50 text-amber-600 p-2 rounded-lg text-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-award"></i>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-xs text-brand-slateAccent font-semibold">ADA Gold Star Winner 2025</span>
                            </div>
                            <a href="#book-now" class="text-xs text-brand-blue font-bold hover:underline">View availability <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-1"></i></a>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Ambient Floating graphic orbits -->
                    <div class="absolute -right-6 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-28 h-28 bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-lg border border-slate-100 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center rotate-12 pointer-events-none hidden md:flex">
                        <i class="fas fa-stethoscope text-brand-blue text-xl mb-1"></i>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest">In-Network</span>
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-semibold text-emerald-600">Most Insurances</span>
                    </div>

                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Interactive Dr. Appointment Booking System / Form -->
    <section id="book-now" class="py-24 bg-white relative">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-start">
                
                <!-- Left Visual Callout and Instructions -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                        <i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i> Live Booking
                    </span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy leading-tight">
                        Secure your visit <br class="hidden sm:inline">in moments
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-600 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed">
                        Choose your primary treatment goal and preferred date. Our digital desk immediately displays active slots. Once submitted, our concierge will call you directly to finalize.
                    </p>

                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100">
                            <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold">1</div>
                            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-brand-navy">Pick Treatment & Doctor Specialist</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100">
                            <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold">2</div>
                            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-brand-navy">Select Available Morning or Afternoon Slot</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100">
                            <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold">3</div>
                            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-brand-navy">Confirm Details via Secure Text SMS</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Live Form with Date and Doctor selector -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 bg-slate-50/50 p-6 md:p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-xl shadow-slate-100">
                    <form id="booking-form" onsubmit="handleBookingSubmit(event)" class="space-y-6">
                        
                        <!-- Row 1: Treatment Category -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Preferred Specialist</label>
                                <select id="book-doc" class="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-blue rounded-xl p-3.5 text-sm text-brand-navy font-medium outline-none transition-all">
                                    <option value="vance">Dr. Alistair Vance (Prosthodontics)</option>
                                    <option value="chen">Dr. Evelyn Chen (Cosmetic)</option>
                                    <option value="garcia">Dr. Marcus Garcia (General)</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Target Treatment</label>
                                <select id="book-treatment" class="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-blue rounded-xl p-3.5 text-sm text-brand-navy font-medium outline-none transition-all">
                                    <option value="porcelain">Porcelain Veneers</option>
                                    <option value="whitening">Laser Teeth Whitening</option>
                                    <option value="invisalign">Clear Invisalign Aligners</option>
                                    <option value="restorative">Complex Implant / Root Crown</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Row 2: Contact Information -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Full Name</label>
                                <input type="text" id="book-name" required placeholder="Johnathan Doe" class="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-blue rounded-xl p-3.5 text-sm text-brand-navy outline-none transition-all">
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Mobile Number (SMS confirmation)</label>
                                <input type="tel" id="book-phone" required placeholder="(555) 000-0000" class="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-blue rounded-xl p-3.5 text-sm text-brand-navy outline-none transition-all">
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Interactive Slot Selection -->
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Select Preferred Day Slot</label>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                                <button type="button" onclick="selectSlot(this, 'Mon 9:00 AM')" class="slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy">
                                    Mon 9:00 AM
                                </button>
                                <button type="button" onclick="selectSlot(this, 'Tue 11:30 AM')" class="slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy">
                                    Tue 11:30 AM
                                </button>
                                <button type="button" onclick="selectSlot(this, 'Wed 2:00 PM')" class="slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy">
                                    Wed 2:00 PM
                                </button>
                                <button type="button" onclick="selectSlot(this, 'Thu 4:30 PM')" class="slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy">
                                    Thu 4:30 PM
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <input type="hidden" id="selected-slot" required>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Special requests -->
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-2">Special Requests (Optional)</label>
                            <textarea id="book-notes" placeholder="e.g. Anxiety concerns, previous restoration records..." class="w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-blue rounded-xl p-3.5 text-sm text-brand-navy h-20 outline-none resize-none transition-all"></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Terms of check -->
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <input type="checkbox" required id="book-agree" class="mt-1 w-4 h-4 text-brand-blue border-slate-200 rounded focus:ring-brand-blue">
                            <label for="book-agree" class="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-normal">
                                I agree to the privacy statement and consent to receiving a text confirmation regarding this schedule inquiry at the phone number provided.
                            </label>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full bg-brand-navy text-white hover:bg-brand-blue font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-xl shadow-slate-900/10 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                            Request Appointment <i class="fas fa-arrow-right text-xs"></i>
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Beautiful FAQ / Accordions Section -->
    <section class="py-24 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-100">
        <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-4 mb-16">
                <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                    <i class="fas fa-question-circle"></i> Frequently Asked Questions
                </span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif text-brand-navy leading-tight">
                    Your questions, clarified
                </h2>
                <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm md:text-base">
                    Uncover details about our specialized approach, insurance compatibility, and treatment comforts.
                </p>
            </div>

            <div class="space-y-4">
                
                <!-- Accordion 1 -->
                <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/60 overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
                    <button onclick="toggleFAQ(this)" class="w-full px-6 py-5 text-left flex justify-between items-center focus:outline-none">
                        <span class="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-brand-navy">Does ApexCare take typical commercial dental insurance?</span>
                        <div class="w-7 h-7 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-transform duration-200">
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down text-brand-slateAccent"></i>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <div class="faq-content max-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-out">
                        <p class="px-6 pb-5 text-xs md:text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
                            Yes. We operate directly with most major in-network commercial insurances. Our digital billing desk completes detailed benefit breakdowns in real time so you see any out-of-pocket costs before checking in.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Accordion 2 -->
                <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/60 overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
                    <button onclick="toggleFAQ(this)" class="w-full px-6 py-5 text-left flex justify-between items-center focus:outline-none">
                        <span class="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-brand-navy">What makes the "Porcelain Restoration" program special?</span>
                        <div class="w-7 h-7 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-transform duration-200">
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down text-brand-slateAccent"></i>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <div class="faq-content max-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-out">
                        <p class="px-6 pb-5 text-xs md:text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
                            We use ultra-thin medical-grade porcelain shells custom milled in-house. Unlike historical techniques, our micro-bonding procedures require minimal to zero outer tooth preparation, ensuring your natural core health stays completely preserved.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Accordion 3 -->
                <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/60 overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
                    <button onclick="toggleFAQ(this)" class="w-full px-6 py-5 text-left flex justify-between items-center focus:outline-none">
                        <span class="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-brand-navy">I struggle with severe dental anxiety. How is this addressed?</span>
                        <div class="w-7 h-7 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-transform duration-200">
                            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down text-brand-slateAccent"></i>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <div class="faq-content max-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-out">
                        <p class="px-6 pb-5 text-xs md:text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
                            Anxiety comfort is our highest engineering priority. We provide customizable entertainment headsets, micro-dosed sedation protocols upon request, and non-invasive laser tools that eliminate traditional dental drill noise completely.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer Area -->
    <footer class="bg-brand-navy text-white pt-20 pb-12 relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background light visual -->
        <div class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-80 h-80 bg-blue-900/40 rounded-full filter blur-3xl opacity-30 pointer-events-none"></div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-12 pb-16 border-b border-slate-800">
                
                <!-- Footer Column 1: Brand details -->
                <div class="md:col-span-4 space-y-6">
                    <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <div class="bg-brand-blue text-white w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-hand-holding-medical"></i>
                        </div>
                        <span class="font-bold text-xl tracking-tight">Apex<span class="text-brand-blue">Care</span></span>
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-sm text-slate-400 leading-relaxed max-w-sm">
                        Experience precision-driven aesthetic and restorative dentistry within an atmosphere crafted for ultimate comfort.
                    </p>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 text-slate-400">
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors text-lg"><i class="fab fa-facebook-f"></i></a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors text-lg"><i class="fab fa-instagram"></i></a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors text-lg"><i class="fab fa-twitter"></i></a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-white transition-colors text-lg"><i class="fab fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 2: Navigation Links -->
                <div class="md:col-span-2 space-y-4">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-300">Treatments</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
                        <li><a href="#treatments" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Porcelain Veneers</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#treatments" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Teeth Whitening</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#treatments" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Clear Invisalign</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#treatments" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Emergency Restores</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 3: Contact details -->
                <div class="md:col-span-3 space-y-4">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-300">Contact Us</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2.5 text-sm text-slate-400">
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-2"><i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-brand-blue"></i> (555) 304-9000</li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-2"><i class="fas fa-envelope text-brand-blue"></i> concierge@apexcare.com</li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt text-brand-blue mt-1"></i> 742 Park Avenue, Penthouse, New York, NY 10021</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 4: Newsletter -->
                <div class="md:col-span-3 space-y-4">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-300">Join our newsletter</h4>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Get oral hygiene insights and exclusive restorative treatment offers.</p>
                    <form onsubmit="handleNewsletter(event)" class="flex gap-2">
                        <input type="email" required placeholder="name@domain.com" class="bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl p-3 text-xs text-white outline-none focus:border-brand-blue w-full transition-all">
                        <button type="submit" class="bg-brand-blue hover:bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl px-4 text-xs transition-colors">
                            <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i>
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>

            </div>

            <div class="pt-8 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between text-xs text-slate-500 gap-4">
                <p>&copy; 2026 ApexCare Dental Studio. All rights reserved.</p>
                <div class="flex gap-6">
                    <a href="#" class="hover:underline">Privacy Statement</a>
                    <a href="#" class="hover:underline">Terms of Service</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>


    <!-- Interactive and State Management Logic Javascript -->
    <script>
        // Treatment Data Store
        const treatmentData = {
            aesthetic: [
                {
                    title: "Signature Porcelain Veneers",
                    desc: "Hand-crafted ultra-thin medical porcelain shells configured for seamless bite matching, brightening, and natural structural health retention.",
                    duration: "2 Sessions (Total 4 Hours)",
                    benefit: "Instant Straightness & Brightness",
                    price: "Premium Plan Available"
                },
                {
                    title: "Laser Teeth Whitening",
                    desc: "Non-invasive laser-accelerated thermal bleaching. Safely achieves multi-shade brightening inside a single ninety-minute treatment visit.",
                    duration: "1 Session (90 Mins)",
                    benefit: "Up to 8 Shades Brighter",
                    price: "Immediate Visual Results"
                },
                {
                    title: "Advanced Dental Bonding",
                    desc: "High-density composite resins manually sculpted to patch minor chips, cosmetic inconsistencies, or fill aesthetic front gaps seamlessly.",
                    duration: "1 Session (1 Hour)",
                    benefit: "Targeted Micro-Restoration",
                    price: "Cost-Effective Aesthetics"
                }
            ],
            restorative: [
                {
                    title: "Immediate Load Dental Implants",
                    desc: "Precision biocompatible medical-grade titanium anchors configured to safely replace missing structures or anchor immediate support bridges.",
                    duration: "Full Assessment + Setup",
                    benefit: "Lifelong Bone Structural Security",
                    price: "Advanced Imaging Included"
                },
                {
                    title: "Full-Porcelain Crowns & Bridges",
                    desc: "Metal-free prosthodontics designed inside our high-end milling loop to secure and strengthen compromised structures.",
                    duration: "1 to 2 Visits",
                    benefit: "100% Metal-free Biocompatibility",
                    price: "Natural Translucency Matching"
                },
                {
                    title: "Root Canal Therapy",
                    desc: "Gentle therapeutic sterilization of internal dental pulp structures utilizing advanced laser cleaning tools for minimal sensitivity.",
                    duration: "1 Session (2 Hours)",
                    benefit: "Full Tooth Pain Mitigation",
                    price: "Microscope Guided Accuracy"
                }
            ],
            orthodontics: [
                {
                    title: "Clear Invisalign Aligners",
                    desc: "Virtually invisible medical-grade plastic aligners configured to gently steer misalignments without conventional steel brackets.",
                    duration: "Bi-weekly stage swaps",
                    benefit: "Fully Removable & Comfortable",
                    price: "Orthodontic Support Plan"
                },
                {
                    title: "Ceramic Braces System",
                    desc: "Translucent clear brackets matching real tooth enamel tones, maintaining premium professional aesthetics during treatment.",
                    duration: "Determined via scan",
                    benefit: "Highly Durable Alignment",
                    price: "Ideal for structural correction"
                },
                {
                    title: "Invisible Lingual Braces",
                    desc: "Custom metallic alignment framework placed exclusively behind the teeth, remaining completely hidden from face-on view.",
                    duration: "Tailored to severity",
                    benefit: "Absolute Invisible Straightening",
                    price: "Specialized Ortho Skillset"
                }
            ]
        };

        // Navigation state toggle
        const mobileBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn');
