        const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');

        mobileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('hidden');
        });

        // Initialize treatments tab
        function switchTab(tabName) {
            // Update active state class on buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.className = 'tab-btn px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all text-slate-500 hover:text-brand-navy';
            });
            const activeBtn = document.getElementById(`btn-${tabName}`);
            if (activeBtn) {
                activeBtn.className = 'tab-btn px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all bg-brand-navy text-white shadow-sm';
            }

            // Populate cards inside grid
            const grid = document.getElementById('treatments-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = '';
            
            const data = treatmentData[tabName];
            data.forEach((item, index) => {
                grid.innerHTML += `
                    <div class="bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-100 border border-white/85 flex flex-col justify-between hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform duration-300">
                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <span class="inline-block bg-indigo-50 text-brand-blue text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full">${item.benefit}</span>
                            <h3 class="font-serif text-xl font-normal text-brand-navy">${item.title}</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">${item.desc}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-semibold">
                            <div class="text-slate-400">
                                <i class="fas fa-hourglass-half mr-1 text-brand-blue"></i> ${item.duration}
                            </div>
                            <span class="text-brand-blue font-bold">${item.price}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
        }

        // Before & After Interactive Slider Control
        const sliderBox = document.getElementById('before-after-box');
        const handle = document.getElementById('slider-handle');
        const afterImg = document.getElementById('after-image');

        function updateSlider(xPos) {
            const rect = sliderBox.getBoundingClientRect();
            let position = ((xPos - rect.left) / rect.width) * 100;
            if (position < 0) position = 0;
            if (position > 100) position = 100;

            handle.style.left = `${position}%`;
            afterImg.style.clipPath = `polygon(0 0, ${position}% 0, ${position}% 100%, 0 100%)`;
        }

        sliderBox.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            updateSlider(e.clientX);
        });

        sliderBox.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
            if (e.touches[0]) {
                updateSlider(e.touches[0].clientX);
            }
        });

        // Interactive Quiz States
        let quizGoals = 'brighten';
        let quizSensitivity = 'yes';
        let quizSchedule = 'express';

        function nextQuizStep(step) {
            // Collect selected radio states
            const activeGoal = document.querySelector('input[name="goal"]:checked');
            if (activeGoal) quizGoals = activeGoal.value;

            const activeSens = document.querySelector('input[name="sensitivity"]:checked');
            if (activeSens) quizSensitivity = activeSens.value;

            const activeSched = document.querySelector('input[name="schedule"]:checked');
            if (activeSched) quizSchedule = activeSched.value;

            // Manage visible containers
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-1').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-2').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-3').classList.add('hidden');

            document.getElementById(`quiz-step-${step}`).classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function prevQuizStep(step) {
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-1').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-2').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-3').classList.add('hidden');

            document.getElementById(`quiz-step-${step}`).classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function showQuizResult() {
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-3').classList.add('hidden');
            const resultBox = document.getElementById('quiz-result');
            resultBox.classList.remove('hidden');

            // Formulate recommendations based on answers
            const title = document.getElementById('result-title');
            const desc = document.getElementById('result-desc');
            const time = document.getElementById('result-time');
            const gain = document.getElementById('result-gain');

            if (quizGoals === 'brighten') {
                if (quizSensitivity === 'yes') {
                    title.innerText = "Sensi-Safe Whitening Restores";
                    desc.innerText = "Features low-intensity therm-activators & remineralization treatments safeguarding hypersensitive pulp tissue.";
                    time.innerText = "2 Sessions (60 Mins each)";
                    gain.innerText = "Up to 5 shades brighter safely";
                } else {
                    title.innerText = "Ultra-Fast Laser Teeth Whitening";
                    desc.innerText = "Uncompromised laser energy activation targeting deeply set natural enamel yellowings inside a comfortable single-stage ninety-minute procedure.";
                    time.innerText = "1 Session (90 Mins)";
                    gain.innerText = "Up to 8 shades brighter instantly";
                }
            } else if (quizGoals === 'align') {
                title.innerText = "Invisalign Clear Alignment Plan";
                desc.innerText = "Completely transparent alignment series engineered specifically to slide teeth back into optimal geometric symmetry comfortably.";
                time.innerText = "Flexible bi-weekly stages";
                gain.innerText = "Flawless parallel alignment";
            } else {
                title.innerText = "Premium Porcelain Restoration Program";
                desc.innerText = "For complex chips or missing structures. Utilizes high durability custom bio-porcelains matching real translucency levels.";
                time.innerText = "1 to 2 visits total";
                gain.innerText = "Permanent restoration of full bite power";
            }
        }

        function resetQuiz() {
            document.getElementById('quiz-result').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('quiz-step-1').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        // Live Appointment Booking System Handles
        let lastSelectedBtn = null;

        function selectSlot(btn, time) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.slot-btn').forEach(b => {
                b.className = 'slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy';
            });
            btn.className = 'slot-btn bg-brand-blue text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold transition-all border border-brand-blue shadow-md';
            document.getElementById('selected-slot').value = time;
        }

        function handleBookingSubmit(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            const doctor = document.getElementById('book-doc').value;
            const treatment = document.getElementById('book-treatment').value;
            const name = document.getElementById('book-name').value;
            const slot = document.getElementById('selected-slot').value;

            if (!slot) {
                showToast("Slot Required", "Please tap on one of the available daytime booking slots before submitting.", "red");
                return;
            }

            // Mock success representation with Toast system
            showToast("Appointment Requested", `Hi ${name}, our concierge will text you to confirm your slot (${slot}) shortly.`, "emerald");
            document.getElementById('booking-form').reset();
            // Deselect active slots
            document.querySelectorAll('.slot-btn').forEach(b => {
                b.className = 'slot-btn bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold hover:border-brand-blue hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-brand-navy';
            });
        }

        // Toast notifications logic
        function showToast(title, description, colorTheme) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
            const tTitle = document.getElementById('toast-title');
            const tDesc = document.getElementById('toast-desc');
            
            tTitle.innerText = title;
            tDesc.innerText = description;
            
            toast.classList.remove('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
            toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');

            setTimeout(() => {
                hideToast();
            }, 5000);
        }

        function hideToast() {
            const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
            toast.classList.add('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0');
            toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
        }

        // Newsletter handler
        function handleNewsletter(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            showToast("Subscribed!", "Thank you for joining our aesthetic hygiene newsletter.", "emerald");
            e.target.reset();
        }

        // FAQ accordion toggle logic
        function toggleFAQ(btn) {
            const content = btn.nextElementSibling;
            const icon = btn.querySelector('.fa-chevron-down');
            
            if (content.style.maxHeight && content.style.maxHeight !== '0px') {
                content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
            } else {
                // Close all other accordions first
                document.querySelectorAll('.faq-content').forEach(c => c.style.maxHeight = '0px');
                document.querySelectorAll('.fa-chevron-down').forEach(i => i.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)');

                content.style.maxHeight = `${content.scrollHeight}px`;
                icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
            }
        }

        // Window On-Load setups
        window.onload = function() {
            switchTab('aesthetic');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
I6
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Chinnic — Your Health is Our Priority</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS CDN -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts: Plus Jakarta Sans for premium typography feel -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Lucide Icons for high-fidelity clinical icons -->
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Plus Jakarta Sans', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        brand: {
                            50: '#f0f7ff',
                            100: '#e0effe',
                            500: '#3b82f6',
                            600: '#2563eb',
                            700: '#1d4ed8',
                            900: '#1e3a8a',
                        },
                        accent: {
                            50: '#f0fdf4',
                            100: '#dcfce7',
                            500: '#22c55e',
                            600: '#16a34a',
                        }
                    },
                    borderRadius: {
                        'brand': '2rem',
                    },
                    boxShadow: {
                        'premium': '0 10px 40px -10px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.06), 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)',
                        'glow': '0 20px 50px -12px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)',
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        body {
            background-color: #fafbfc;
        }
        /* Custom scrollbar to keep layout clean */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f1f5f9;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #cbd5e1;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #94a3b8;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="font-sans text-slate-800 antialiased overflow-x-hidden">

    <!-- Top Soft Glowing Ambient Blobs (Visual Vibe Matching) -->
    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[50vw] h-[50vw] bg-gradient-to-bl from-blue-100/40 via-emerald-100/30 to-transparent rounded-full blur-[120px] pointer-events-none -z-10"></div>
    <div class="absolute top-[30vh] left-0 w-[40vw] h-[40vw] bg-gradient-to-tr from-emerald-50/40 via-blue-50/30 to-transparent rounded-full blur-[100px] pointer-events-none -z-10"></div>

    <!-- NAVBAR -->
    <header class="sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100/80 transition-all duration-300">
        <nav class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
            <!-- Brand Logo -->
            <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2.5 group">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-brand-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-md shadow-brand-500/20 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300">
                    <svg class="w-5.5 h-5.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M19 14c1.49-1.46 3-3.21 3-5.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 16.5 3c-1.76 0-3 .5-4.5 2-1.5-1.5-2.74-2-4.5-2A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 2 8.5c0 2.3 1.5 4.05 3 5.5l7 7Z"/>
                    </svg>
                </div>
                <span class="text-xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-brand-900">Chinnic</span>
            </a>

            <!-- Navigation Links -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8">
                <a href="#services" class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Services</a>
                <a href="#doctors" class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Our Doctors</a>
                <a href="#about" class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Why Chinnic</a>
                <div class="relative group">
                    <button class="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">
                        Resources
                        <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </button>
                    <!-- Dropdown Menu -->
                    <div class="absolute left-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl shadow-premium opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200 transform translate-y-1 group-hover:translate-y-0 z-50">
                        <div class="p-2">
                            <a href="#" class="block px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-50/50 rounded-xl transition-all">Health Blog</a>
                            <a href="#" class="block px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-50/50 rounded-xl transition-all">Patient Guide</a>
                            <a href="#" class="block px-4 py-2.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-50/50 rounded-xl transition-all">FAQs</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- CTA & Contact -->
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                <a href="#book-appointment" class="hidden sm:inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full bg-brand-600 text-sm font-bold text-white hover:bg-brand-700 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-brand-500/20 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all">
                    Book Consultation
                </a>
                <button onclick="toggleMobileMenu()" class="p-2.5 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full md:hidden transition-colors">
                    <i data-lucide="menu" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <!-- Mobile Menu Panel -->
        <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden border-b border-slate-100 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-lg px-6 py-6 space-y-4 md:hidden">
            <a href="#services" class="block text-base font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600">Services</a>
            <a href="#doctors" class="block text-base font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600">Our Doctors</a>
            <a href="#about" class="block text-base font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600">Why Chinnic</a>
            <a href="#book-appointment" class="block text-center py-3 rounded-full bg-brand-600 text-base font-bold text-white">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- HERO SECTION -->
    <section class="relative pt-8 pb-20 md:py-24 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 overflow-hidden">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
            <!-- Left Hero Content -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8 text-left">
                <!-- Highlight Pill Tag -->
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-brand-100/50 border border-brand-200/40 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold tracking-wide">
                    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-brand-500 animate-pulse"></span>
                    24/7 Digital Health Companion
                </div>

                <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-[4rem] font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-[1.1] text-brand-900">
                    Your health is <br class="hidden sm:inline">
                    <span class="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-600 to-emerald-600">our priority</span>
                </h1>

                <p class="text-slate-500 text-base sm:text-lg max-w-xl leading-relaxed">
                    Access expert online healthcare consultations, customized patient treatment frameworks, and around-the-clock diagnostic reports directly from clinical specialists.
                </p>

                <!-- Interactive Hero CTA & Trust Segment -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 pt-2">
                    <a href="#book-appointment" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 px-8 py-4.5 rounded-full bg-brand-600 text-base font-extrabold text-white hover:bg-brand-700 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-brand-500/25 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all">
                        <i data-lucide="calendar" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        Find Doctor Now
                    </a>
                    <a href="#services" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-4.5 rounded-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-base font-bold hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors">
                        Explore Services
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Live Metrics Badge -->
                <div class="flex items-center gap-6 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100">
                    <div class="flex -space-x-3">
                        <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559839734-2b71ea197ec2?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150" alt="Doctor avatar">
                        <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1622253692010-333f2da6031d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150" alt="Doctor avatar">
                        <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594824813573-246434e33963?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150" alt="Doctor avatar">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span class="text-slate-800 font-extrabold text-lg">99.8%</span>
                            <div class="flex text-amber-400">
                                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-400 text-xs font-semibold">Positive patient feedback score</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Hero Visual Card (Matching exact styling format) -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 flex justify-center relative">
                <!-- Gradient glow rings in backdrop -->
                <div class="absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-72 h-72 bg-emerald-300/20 rounded-full blur-[80px] pointer-events-none"></div>
                <div class="absolute -bottom-10 -left-10 w-72 h-72 bg-brand-300/20 rounded-full blur-[80px] pointer-events-none"></div>

                <!-- Composite Clinical Illustration Card -->
                <div class="relative w-full max-w-[500px]">
                    <!-- Rounded organic container for doctor photo -->
                    <div class="aspect-[4/5] rounded-brand bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-100 via-emerald-100 to-blue-50 overflow-hidden shadow-premium relative border border-white/60">
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612349317150-e413f6a5b16d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=600" 
                             alt="Primary Clinic Doctor" 
                             class="absolute bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 h-[95%] w-auto object-cover transform hover:scale-[1.03] transition-transform duration-500">
                        
                        <!-- Mini Active Badge -->
                        <div class="absolute top-6 right-6 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-center text-emerald-500 shadow-md">
                            <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-5 h-5 animate-pulse"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Left floating micro-card (Matches the little visual details) -->
                    <div class="absolute top-1/3 -left-8 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-premium border border-slate-100 max-w-[180px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform duration-300 hidden sm:block">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-brand-50 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-600">
                                <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold text-slate-800">100% Secure</h4>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">HIPAA Compliant</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Bottom floating consultation schedule card -->
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-6 right-6 left-6 sm:left-auto sm:right-[-20px] sm:w-72 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md p-5 rounded-2xl shadow-premium border border-slate-100/90 hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform duration-300">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-100 pb-3 mb-3">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <img class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1622253692010-333f2da6031d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150" alt="Doctor">
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold text-slate-800">Dr. Adrian Hayes</h4>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] text-emerald-600 font-bold">Online Now</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-ping"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                            <span class="text-slate-400">Available Session</span>
                            <span class="font-extrabold text-brand-600 bg-brand-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">Today, 4:30 PM</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- TRIPLE FEATURE / INTRO DOCK (Matches 3 elements row in inspiration image) -->
    <section id="services" class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            <!-- Card 1: Visual Professional Badge -->
            <div class="bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-8 shadow-premium flex flex-col justify-between group hover:border-brand-100 hover:shadow-glow transition-all duration-300">
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-50 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-600 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                        <i data-lucide="shield-alert" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-extrabold text-slate-800">Immediate Clinical Response</h3>
                    <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                        No appointment necessary for instant chat assistance. Resolve basic medical doubts instantly with qualified general practitioners.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <div class="pt-6">
                    <a href="#book-appointment" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-extrabold text-brand-600 hover:text-brand-700">
                        Initiate Chat
                        <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 2: Interactive Service Hub Features -->
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-600 to-brand-700 text-white rounded-brand p-8 shadow-glow flex flex-col justify-between group hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-center text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="stethoscope" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-extrabold">Virtual Diagnostics</h3>
                    <p class="text-blue-100 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                        Utilize state of the art tele-health frameworks to consult, receive prescription updates, and track wellness metrics cleanly.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <div class="pt-6">
                    <a href="#book-appointment" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-extrabold text-brand-100 hover:text-white transition-colors">
                        Reserve Video Call
                        <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Card 3: Interactive Doctor Stats & Custom Quick Action Dock -->
            <div class="bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-8 shadow-premium flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-brand-100 hover:shadow-glow transition-all duration-300">
                <div class="space-y-5">
                    <h4 class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase">Live Medical Resources</h4>
                    
                    <!-- Grid of mini circular action buttons -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                        <button class="aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 hover:bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors" title="Cardiology">
                            <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 hover:bg-emerald-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 hover:text-emerald-600 transition-colors" title="Diagnostics">
                            <i data-lucide="dna" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 hover:bg-amber-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 hover:text-amber-50 transition-colors" title="Neurology">
                            <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button class="aspect-square rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 hover:bg-purple-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-600 hover:text-purple-50 transition-colors" title="Prescriptions">
                            <i data-lucide="pill" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    <div class="pt-2">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-slate-500 mb-1">
                            <span>Clinical Staff Online</span>
                            <span class="font-bold text-slate-800">18 Available</span>
                        </div>
                        <!-- Micro progress bar -->
                        <div class="w-full bg-slate-100 h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                            <div class="bg-brand-600 h-full rounded-full" style="width: 82%;"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="pt-6">
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 block">Need custom assistance?</span>
                    <a href="#book-appointment" class="text-xs font-extrabold text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-700 inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                        Contact Support desk <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- PREMIUM DOCTOR PROFILES & SEARCH FILTER -->
    <section id="doctors" class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
        <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-12 space-y-3">
            <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-brand-600 bg-brand-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">Our Team</span>
            <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold text-brand-900">Highly qualified experts</h2>
            <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm sm:text-base">Filter physicians by specialized clinical practices to book appropriate treatment pathways.</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Filter Tab Buttons -->
        <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2 mb-10">
            <button onclick="filterDoctors('all')" class="doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-brand-600 text-white border-brand-600 shadow-sm" data-category="all">
                All Specialities
            </button>
            <button onclick="filterDoctors('Cardiology')" class="doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50" data-category="Cardiology">
                Cardiology
            </button>
            <button onclick="filterDoctors('Neurology')" class="doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50" data-category="Neurology">
                Neurology
            </button>
            <button onclick="filterDoctors('Pediatrics')" class="doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50" data-category="Pediatrics">
                Pediatrics
            </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Doctors Cards Grid -->
        <div id="doctors-grid" class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            <!-- Doctor Card 1 -->
            <div class="doctor-card bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-6 shadow-premium hover:shadow-glow hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300" data-category="Cardiology">
                <div class="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden aspect-[4/3] bg-slate-100 mb-6">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559839734-2b71ea197ec2?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=400" alt="Dr. Eliana Ross" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                    <span class="absolute top-4 left-4 px-3 py-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <i data-lucide="star" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 fill-amber-400 text-amber-400"></i>
                        4.9 (124 reviews)
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-800">Dr. Eliana Ross</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">Senior Cardiologist</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg uppercase">Remote Enabled</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs pt-4 border-t border-slate-50">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-slate-400">Availability</p>
                            <p class="font-bold text-slate-700">Mon - Wed</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="selectDoctorAndScroll('Dr. Eliana Ross', 'Cardiology')" class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-50 hover:bg-brand-100 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-full transition-colors">
                            Book Slot
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Doctor Card 2 -->
            <div class="doctor-card bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-6 shadow-premium hover:shadow-glow hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300" data-category="Neurology">
                <div class="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden aspect-[4/3] bg-slate-100 mb-6">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1622253692010-333f2da6031d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=400" alt="Dr. Adrian Hayes" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                    <span class="absolute top-4 left-4 px-3 py-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <i data-lucide="star" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 fill-amber-400 text-amber-400"></i>
                        4.8 (98 reviews)
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-800">Dr. Adrian Hayes</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">Neurosurgeon</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg uppercase">In-Clinic</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs pt-4 border-t border-slate-50">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-slate-400">Availability</p>
                            <p class="font-bold text-slate-700">Tue - Fri</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="selectDoctorAndScroll('Dr. Adrian Hayes', 'Neurology')" class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-50 hover:bg-brand-100 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-full transition-colors">
                            Book Slot
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Doctor Card 3 -->
            <div class="doctor-card bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-6 shadow-premium hover:shadow-glow hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300" data-category="Pediatrics">
                <div class="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden aspect-[4/3] bg-slate-100 mb-6">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594824813573-246434e33963?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=400" alt="Dr. Sofia Ramirez" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                    <span class="absolute top-4 left-4 px-3 py-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <i data-lucide="star" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 fill-amber-400 text-amber-400"></i>
                        5.0 (142 reviews)
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-800">Dr. Sofia Ramirez</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400">Senior Pediatrician</p>
                        </div>
                        <span class="px-2.5 py-1 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-[10px] font-bold rounded-lg uppercase">Remote Enabled</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs pt-4 border-t border-slate-50">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-slate-400">Availability</p>
                            <p class="font-bold text-slate-700">Mon - Fri</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="selectDoctorAndScroll('Dr. Sofia Ramirez', 'Pediatrics')" class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-50 hover:bg-brand-100 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-full transition-colors">
                            Book Slot
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERACTIVE SECTION: APPOINTMENT SCHEDULER & VALUE POINTS -->
    <section id="book-appointment" class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-16 scroll-mt-24">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
            <!-- Left Info Cards / Process Segment -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">Patient Dashboard</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold text-brand-900 leading-tight">Book an expert reservation in seconds</h2>
                <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm">Follow our streamlined workflow to reserve critical clinical checkups with ease. HIPAA secure data transmission.</p>

                <!-- Step Elements -->
                <div class="space-y-4 pt-4">
                    <div class="flex gap-4">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-50 border border-brand-100 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-600 font-extrabold text-xs shrink-0">1</div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="text-sm font-extrabold text-slate-800">Choose Medical Specialty</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Select standard cardiac, general neuro, pediatric, or comprehensive wellness checkups.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-4">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-50 border border-brand-100 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-600 font-extrabold text-xs shrink-0">2</div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="text-sm font-extrabold text-slate-800">Reserve Date & Time</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Choose online consultations or physical clinical visits from calendar slots.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-4">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-50 border border-brand-100 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-600 font-extrabold text-xs shrink-0">3</div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="text-sm font-extrabold text-slate-800">Instant Digital Confirmation</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Receive text notifications and clinical instructions directly to your device.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Interactive Form Block (Exactly styling from inspiration image) -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                <div class="bg-white rounded-brand border border-slate-100 p-8 shadow-premium relative overflow-hidden">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-emerald-400"></div>
                    <div class="mb-6">
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-extrabold text-slate-800">Appointment Reservation</h3>
                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Fill out your diagnostic needs below for instant booking slot allocation.</p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Appointment Form -->
                    <form id="appointment-form" onsubmit="handleAppointmentSubmit(event)" class="space-y-5">
                        <!-- Select Department -->
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">Medical Specialty</label>
                            <div class="relative">
                                <select id="form-dept" onchange="updateDoctorsDropdown()" class="w-full px-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:bg-white transition-colors appearance-none">
                                    <option value="" disabled selected>Select Department</option>
                                    <option value="Cardiology">Cardiology</option>
                                    <option value="Neurology">Neurology</option>
                                    <option value="Pediatrics">Pediatrics</option>
                                </select>
                                <div class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none text-slate-400">
                                    <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Select Doctor -->
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">Assigned Practitioner</label>
                            <div class="relative">
                                <select id="form-doctor" class="w-full px-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:bg-white transition-colors appearance-none" disabled>
                                    <option value="" disabled selected>Please select a department first</option>
                                </select>
                                <div class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none text-slate-400">
                                    <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Date and Time Picker Grid -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">Preferred Date</label>
                                <input type="date" id="form-date" class="w-full px-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:bg-white transition-colors" required>
                            </div>
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">Preferred Time Slot</label>
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <select id="form-time" class="w-full px-4 py-3.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:bg-white transition-colors appearance-none" required>
                                        <option value="" disabled selected>Select Time</option>
                                        <option value="09:00 AM">09:00 AM</option>
                                        <option value="11:30 AM">11:30 AM</option>
                                        <option value="02:00 PM">02:00 PM</option>
                                        <option value="04:30 PM">04:30 PM</option>
                                    </select>
                                    <div class="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none text-slate-400">
                                        <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit CTA -->
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full py-4 px-6 bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-extrabold text-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-brand-500/20 active:scale-[0.99] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                            <i data-lucide="check" class="w-4.5 h-4.5"></i>
                            Confirm Appointment
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- TESTIMONIALS SECTION -->
    <section class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
        <div class="bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-900 to-slate-900 rounded-brand p-8 md:p-14 text-white relative overflow-hidden shadow-glow">
            <!-- Background lights inside testimonial card -->
            <div class="absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-96 h-96 bg-brand-500/20 rounded-full blur-[100px] pointer-events-none"></div>
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-10 items-center relative z-10">
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-5">
                    <span class="text-[10px] font-extrabold tracking-widest uppercase px-3 py-1 bg-white/10 rounded-full inline-block">Real Feedback</span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold leading-tight">What patients say about Chinnic</h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">Hear from individuals who replaced stressful clinic wait times with rapid, high-quality professional consultations.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="lg:col-span-7 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <!-- Feedback card 1 -->
                    <div class="bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-2xl space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-400">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-200 text-xs leading-relaxed">"The digital card system allowed me to easily consult a neurosurgeon in minutes without driving back and forth."</p>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 pt-2">
                            <img class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=100" alt="Marcus Thompson">
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold">Marcus Thompson</h4>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Patient since 2024</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Feedback card 2 -->
                    <div class="bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-2xl space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-400">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-amber-400"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-slate-200 text-xs leading-relaxed">"Booking our pediatric slot took under 30 seconds. Dr. Ramirez resolved all our safety concerns clearly."</p>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 pt-2">
                            <img class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=100" alt="Sarah Jenkins">
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold">Sarah Jenkins</h4>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Parent of two</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- FOOTER SECTION -->
    <footer class="bg-white border-t border-slate-100">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 md:py-16">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 mb-12">
                <!-- Branding column -->
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 group">
                        <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-brand-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white">
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
                                <path d="M19 14c1.49-1.46 3-3.21 3-5.5A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 16.5 3c-1.76 0-3 .5-4.5 2-1.5-1.5-2.74-2-4.5-2A5.5 5.5 0 0 0 2 8.5c0 2.3 1.5 4.05 3 5.5l7 7Z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-lg font-bold text-brand-900">Chinnic</span>
                    </a>
                    <p class="text-slate-400 text-xs leading-relaxed max-w-xs">Connecting clinical healthcare and direct tele-consultancy in modern visual packages.</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 2 -->
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800 uppercase tracking-widest">Medical Services</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-semibold">
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Cardiology Clinics</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Emergency Neurology</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">General Diagnostics</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Prescriptions & Testing</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 3 -->
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800 uppercase tracking-widest">Patients</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-semibold">
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Virtual Portal Login</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">Emergency Contacts</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand-600 transition-colors">HIPAA Compliance Act</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>

                <!-- Footer Column 4 (Newsletter/Contact) -->
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800 uppercase tracking-widest">Updates</h4>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Subscribe for medical updates & clinical reports.</p>
                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                        <input type="email" placeholder="Your email" class="px-3.5 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 w-full">
                        <button onclick="alertNotification('Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter updates!')" class="p-2.5 bg-brand-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-700 transition-all">
                            <i data-lucide="send" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center pt-8 border-t border-slate-100 gap-4 text-xs text-slate-400">
                <p>&copy; 2026 Chinnic Healthcare Inc. All rights reserved.</p>
                <div class="flex gap-4">
                    <a href="#" class="hover:text-slate-600">Privacy Policy</a>
                    <a href="#" class="hover:text-slate-600">Terms of Service</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- INTERACTIVE SUCCESS NOTIFICATION / TOAST (No Alert rule) -->
    <div id="custom-toast" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-slate-900 text-white px-5 py-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl flex items-center gap-3.5 border border-white/10 opacity-0 pointer-events-none transform translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white shrink-0">
            <i data-lucide="check" class="w-4.5 h-4.5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
            <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold" id="toast-title">Success</h4>
            <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-300" id="toast-message">Operation successful!</p>
        </div>
        <button onclick="closeToast()" class="text-slate-400 hover:text-white ml-2">
            <i data-lucide="x" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
        </button>
    </div>

    <!-- JAVASCRIPT FOR INTERACTIVE LOGIC -->
    <script>
        // Initialize Lucide Icons
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            lucide.createIcons();
        });

        // Toggle mobile menu visibility
        function toggleMobileMenu() {
            const menu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
            menu.classList.toggle('hidden');
        }

        // Filter medical professionals interactively
        function filterDoctors(category) {
            // Update filter button styling
            const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.doctor-filter-btn');
            buttons.forEach(btn => {
                if (btn.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
                    btn.className = 'doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-brand-600 text-white border-brand-600 shadow-sm';
                } else {
                    btn.className = 'doctor-filter-btn px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border transition-all bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50';
                }
            });

            // Filter actual cards
            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.doctor-card');
            cards.forEach(card => {
                if (category === 'all' || card.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
                    card.style.display = 'block';
                    // Trigger simple reflow to re-enable entry animations if needed
                    card.classList.add('animate-fade-in');
                } else {
                    card.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }

        // Select a Doctor from list and update appointment form directly
        const doctorsByDept = {
            'Cardiology': ['Dr. Eliana Ross'],
            'Neurology': ['Dr. Adrian Hayes'],
            'Pediatrics': ['Dr. Sofia Ramirez']
        };

        function selectDoctorAndScroll(docName, deptName) {
            // Set Department
            const deptSelect = document.getElementById('form-dept');
            deptSelect.value = deptName;
            
            // Re-populate doctors select
            updateDoctorsDropdown();

            // Set Doctor
            const docSelect = document.getElementById('form-doctor');
            docSelect.value = docName;

            // Scroll to form smoothly
            document.getElementById('book-appointment').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });

            // Display feedback
            triggerToast('Doctor Selected', `${docName} has been loaded in your scheduler.`);
        }

        // Dynamically update Doctor Dropdown based on Department Select
        function updateDoctorsDropdown() {
            const deptSelect = document.getElementById('form-dept');
            const docSelect = document.getElementById('form-doctor');
            const selectedDept = deptSelect.value;

            // Clear previous options
            docSelect.innerHTML = '';

            if (selectedDept && doctorsByDept[selectedDept]) {
                docSelect.disabled = false;
                
                // Add initial selection prompt
                const selectOption = document.createElement('option');
                selectOption.value = '';
                selectOption.disabled = true;
                selectOption.selected = true;
                selectOption.textContent = 'Select Specialist';
                docSelect.appendChild(selectOption);

                // Add specialists
                doctorsByDept[selectedDept].forEach(doctor => {
                    const option = document.createElement('option');
                    option.value = doctor;
                    option.textContent = doctor;
                    docSelect.appendChild(option);
                });
            } else {
                docSelect.disabled = true;
                const option = document.createElement('option');
                option.value = '';
                option.textContent = 'Please select a department first';
                docSelect.appendChild(option);
            }
        }

        // Submit appointment trigger custom toast (No Alert rule)
        function handleAppointmentSubmit(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            
            const dept = document.getElementById('form-dept').value;
            const doctor = document.getElementById('form-doctor').value;
            const date = document.getElementById('form-date').value;
            const time = document.getElementById('form-time').value;

            if (!dept || !doctor || !date || !time) {
                triggerToast('Incomplete Form', 'Please enter all department and schedule credentials.', true);
                return;
            }

            // Success feedback
            triggerToast(
                'Slot Reserved Successfully!', 
                `Your appointment with ${doctor} for ${date} at ${time} has been scheduled.`
            );

            // Reset form
            document.getElementById('appointment-form').reset();
            updateDoctorsDropdown();
        }

        // Custom alert/notification system to avoid native browser popups
        function alertNotification(text) {
            triggerToast('Notification Update', text);
        }

        // Toast Trigger Core Logic
        let toastTimeout;
        function triggerToast(title, msg, isError = false) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('custom-toast');
            const toastTitle = document.getElementById('toast-title');
            const toastMsg = document.getElementById('toast-message');

            toastTitle.textContent = title;
            toastMsg.textContent = msg;

            // Simple visual indicator if error
            const iconContainer = toast.querySelector('.rounded-full');
            if (isError) {
                iconContainer.classList.remove('bg-emerald-500');
                iconContainer.classList.add('bg-rose-500');
            } else {
                iconContainer.classList.remove('bg-rose-500');
                iconContainer.classList.add('bg-emerald-500');
            }

            // Show Toast
            toast.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none', 'translate-y-2');
            toast.classList.add('opacity-100', 'translate-y-0');

            // Clear previous timeouts
            clearTimeout(toastTimeout);
            toastTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                closeToast();
            }, 6000);
        }

        function closeToast() {
            const toast = document.getElementById('custom-toast');
            toast.classList.remove('opacity-100', 'translate-y-0');
            toast.classList.add('opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none', 'translate-y-2');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
I7
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>CuraCare — Premium Personalized Health</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Plus Jakarta Sans Font for that premium editorial/tech hybrid feel -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- Lucide Icons -->
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        forest: {
                            DEFAULT: '#163925',
                            light: '#1e4c33',
                            dark: '#0e2417',
                            soft: '#2a5a40'
                        },
                        cream: {
                            DEFAULT: '#f8f5ee',
                            light: '#fdfbfa',
                            dark: '#eee8dd',
                            accent: '#f2eae1'
                        },
                        ochre: {
                            DEFAULT: '#e5b25d',
                            light: '#ebd09e',
                            dark: '#c48f39'
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Plus Jakarta Sans', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    boxShadow: {
                        'premium': '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(22, 57, 37, 0.08)',
                        '3d-light': '0 10px 30px -5px rgba(22, 57, 37, 0.06), 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)',
                        '3d-dark': '0 20px 40px -10px rgba(14, 36, 23, 0.4), inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)',
                        'glow-gold': '0 10px 25px -5px rgba(229, 178, 93, 0.4)'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>

    <style>
        /* Smooth scrolling and premium custom scrollbar */
        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
            background-color: #f8f5ee;
            color: #163925;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        /* Custom scrollbar matching forest theme */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 10px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f8f5ee;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #163925;
            border-radius: 5px;
            border: 2px solid #f8f5ee;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #1e4c33;
        }

        /* 3D claymorphic wave custom clipping */
        .wave-bottom {
            clip-path: ellipse(80% 60% at 50% 40%);
        }

        /* Subtle float animation for hero 3D visuals */
        @keyframes float-gentle {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(1deg); }
        }
        @keyframes float-slow {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) scale(1); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02); }
        }
        @keyframes pulse-glowing {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); }
        }
        .animate-float {
            animation: float-gentle 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .animate-float-slow {
            animation: float-slow 8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .animate-pulse-glow {
            animation: pulse-glowing 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="selection:bg-ochre selection:text-forest-dark">

    <!-- TOP ANNOUNCEMENT BAR -->
    <div class="bg-forest-dark text-cream-light text-center py-2 px-4 text-xs tracking-wider font-semibold border-b border-forest-light/30 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
        <span class="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-ochre animate-ping"></span>
        <span>NOW INTRODUCING PERSONALIZED LONGEVITY THERAPY PIPELINES.</span>
        <button onclick="scrollToDiagnostic()" class="underline hover:text-ochre transition-all ml-1 font-bold">START ASSESSMENT &rarr;</button>
    </div>

    <!-- MAIN NAVBAR -->
    <nav class="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-cream/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-cream-dark/40 py-4 px-6 md:px-12 transition-all">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex items-center justify-between">
            <!-- Logo area mimicking the "1048" design style with neat geometric icon -->
            <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-3 group">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-forest flex items-center justify-center text-ochre shadow-3d-light group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300">
                    <svg class="w-6 h-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <rect x="4" y="4" width="6" height="6" rx="2" fill="currentColor"/>
                        <rect x="14" y="4" width="6" height="6" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                        <rect x="4" y="14" width="6" height="6" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/>
                        <circle cx="17" cy="17" r="3" fill="currentColor"/>
                    </svg>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <span class="text-xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-forest block leading-none">CuraCare</span>
                    <span class="text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-ochre uppercase">Studio 1048</span>
                </div>
            </a>

            <!-- Central Nav Links with minimalist pill styling -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1 bg-cream-accent/60 p-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark/60">
                <a href="#services" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold text-forest hover:bg-cream-light hover:text-forest transition-all">Services</a>
                <a href="#specialists" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold text-forest hover:bg-cream-light hover:text-forest transition-all">Specialists</a>
                <a href="#diagnostic" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold text-forest hover:bg-cream-light hover:text-forest transition-all">Diagnostic Tool</a>
                <a href="#preview" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold text-forest hover:bg-cream-light hover:text-forest transition-all">Mobile Portal</a>
            </div>

            <!-- Header Action Buttons -->
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <a href="#diagnostic" class="hidden sm:inline-flex px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-cream-dark text-forest hover:bg-cream-accent border border-cream-dark transition-all">
                    Patient Portal
                </a>
                <button onclick="openBookingModal()" class="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-ochre hover:bg-ochre-dark text-forest-dark shadow-glow-gold hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 transform active:scale-95">
                    Consult Now
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- HERO SECTION (Incorporates the custom wavy background and dual pane visual balance) -->
    <header class="relative bg-forest pt-12 pb-24 md:pb-36 px-6 md:px-12 text-cream-light overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background decorative vectors mimicking the rounded fluid universe -->
        <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10 pointer-events-none">
            <svg width="100%" height="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="absolute -top-1/4 -right-1/4 w-3/4 animate-pulse-glow">
                <circle cx="400" cy="400" r="350" fill="url(#grad1)" />
                <defs>
                    <radialGradient id="grad1" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
                        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e5b25d" />
                        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent" />
                    </radialGradient>
                </defs>
            </svg>
        </div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-8 items-center relative z-10">
            <!-- Left Grid: Headline, Concept intro, Beautiful Pill Actions -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8">
                <!-- Glowing Premium Tag -->
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-forest-light/80 border border-forest-soft/60 px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-3d-dark">
                    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-pulse-glow"></span>
                    <span class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-cream-light/90">E-Healthcare Redefined</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Forest green style premium typography -->
                <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-[1.1] text-cream-light">
                    Your Path to <br>
                    <span class="text-ochre">Premium Organic</span><br>
                    Clinical Care.
                </h1>

                <p class="text-cream-light/80 text-lg leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
                    CuraCare blends advanced diagnostic technology with premium organic therapies to construct customized health pathways tailored for longevity, recovery, and daily peace of mind.
                </p>

                <!-- Dual Action Capsule Buttons matching reference -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 pt-2">
                    <button onclick="scrollToDiagnostic()" class="px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-ochre text-forest-dark font-bold text-sm tracking-wider uppercase shadow-glow-gold hover:bg-ochre-light hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                        Select Care Pathway
                    </button>
                    <a href="#services" class="px-8 py-4 rounded-full border border-cream-light/20 bg-forest-light/40 hover:bg-forest-light/80 transition-all font-bold text-sm tracking-wider uppercase text-cream-light">
                        Discover Benefits
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Small Trust Indicator with organic shapes -->
                <div class="pt-6 border-t border-forest-light/40 flex items-center gap-8 text-cream-light/70 text-sm">
                    <div>
                        <span class="block text-2xl font-black text-ochre">99.4%</span>
                        <span>Patient Trust Score</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="w-px h-8 bg-forest-light/60"></div>
                    <div>
                        <span class="block text-2xl font-black text-ochre">12 Min</span>
                        <span>Average Response Time</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="w-px h-8 bg-forest-light/60"></div>
                    <div>
                        <span class="block text-2xl font-black text-ochre">24/7</span>
                        <span>Doctor Availability</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Grid: 3D-styled doctor avatar visual mimicking the reference setup -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative">
                
                <!-- Main organic golden frame hosting a 3D claymorphic styled representation -->
                <div class="relative w-full max-w-md bg-forest-light/40 border border-forest-soft/40 p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-3d-dark animate-float">
                    
                    <!-- Top Floating Pill Counter -->
                    <div class="absolute -top-4 -left-4 bg-ochre text-forest-dark text-xs font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center gap-1.5 border-2 border-forest">
                        <i data-lucide="shield-check" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Certified Expert
                    </div>

                    <!-- Interactive status dot -->
                    <div class="absolute -top-3 -right-3 bg-forest px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-forest-soft/50 text-xs text-emerald-400 flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-md">
                        <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-ping"></span> Live Specialist
                    </div>

                    <!-- 3D Avatar Area constructed with clean high-end CSS gradients & SVGs -->
                    <div class="relative h-80 rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-forest-soft to-forest-dark flex items-end justify-center border border-forest-soft/50">
                        <!-- Custom CSS SVG Male Doctor Representation in 3D Minimalist style -->
                        <svg class="w-64 h-64 drop-shadow-2xl translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-105" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <!-- Background Aura Glow -->
                            <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="70" fill="url(#avatarGlow)" opacity="0.4"/>
                            <defs>
                                <radialGradient id="avatarGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
                                    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e5b25d"/>
                                    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
                                </radialGradient>
                            </defs>
                            
                            <!-- Body Coat -->
                            <path d="M50 160C50 135 68 120 100 120C132 120 150 135 150 160V190H50V160Z" fill="#e2e8f0"/>
                            <!-- Inner Scrub / Shirt -->
                            <path d="M85 120C85 135 115 135 115 120H85Z" fill="#0f766e"/>
                            <!-- Stethoscope -->
                            <path d="M78 120C78 145 122 145 122 120" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                            <!-- Neck -->
                            <rect x="88" y="98" width="24" height="25" rx="6" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                            <!-- Head with Claymorphic shading style -->
                            <rect x="75" y="45" width="50" height="60" rx="20" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                            <circle cx="75" cy="45" r="10" fill="#fbcfe8"/> <!-- Ears -->
                            <circle cx="125" cy="45" r="10" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                            <!-- Hair -->
                            <path d="M72 48C72 30 82 25 100 25C118 25 128 30 128 48C128 48 123 38 115 38C100 38 100 45 85 45C77 45 72 48 72 48Z" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <!-- Cheerful Minimal Facial Features -->
                            <circle cx="90" cy="72" r="3.5" fill="#1e293b"/> <!-- Eyes -->
                            <circle cx="110" cy="72" r="3.5" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <path d="M92 84C92 90 108 90 108 84" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/> <!-- Smile -->
                            <rect x="94" y="55" width="12" height="4" rx="2" fill="#334155"/> <!-- Specs bridge (if subtle styling is needed, let's keep clean & professional) -->
                        </svg>

                        <!-- Float Overlay Icons mimicking the original learning atmosphere -->
                        <!-- Heart Rate Overlay -->
