                        <div class="absolute bottom-6 left-6 bg-cream-light text-forest p-3 rounded-2xl shadow-premium border border-cream-dark flex items-center gap-2 animate-float-slow">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-red-100 flex items-center justify-center text-red-500">
                                <i data-lucide="heart-pulse" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <div>
                                <span class="block text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Pulse Rate</span>
                                <span class="font-extrabold text-xs text-forest">72 BPM (Optimal)</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Pill tracker overlay -->
                        <div class="absolute top-20 right-4 bg-cream-light text-forest p-3 rounded-2xl shadow-premium border border-cream-dark flex items-center gap-2 animate-float">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-teal-100 flex items-center justify-center text-teal-600">
                                <i data-lucide="droplet" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <div>
                                <span class="block text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Hydration</span>
                                <span class="font-extrabold text-xs text-forest">94% Hydrated</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Meta text below Doctor Card matching Reference Layout exactly -->
                    <div class="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-extrabold text-lg text-cream-light">Dr. Gabriel Benetiun</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-ochre font-semibold">Chief Medical Director • Integrative Longevity</p>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="openBookingModal()" class="px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full bg-cream-light text-forest text-xs font-bold hover:bg-ochre hover:text-forest-dark transition-all">
                            Book Slot
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Circular organic badges floating in space to frame the 3D grid layout -->
                <div class="absolute bottom-10 -right-8 bg-forest-light border border-forest-soft p-4 rounded-full shadow-3d-dark text-center animate-bounce duration-[4000ms] hidden xl:block">
                    <span class="block text-xl font-black text-ochre">98%</span>
                    <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-cream-light/60">Efficacy Rate</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Custom Claymorphic Curved Wave Waveform separating header from body -->
        <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-12 md:h-20 bg-cream" style="clip-path: ellipse(70% 100% at 50% 100%);"></div>
    </header>

    <!-- TRUSTED CLINICAL BRANDS BAR -->
    <section class="bg-cream py-6 border-b border-cream-dark/30">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 text-center">
            <p class="text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-forest/50 mb-4">Empowering Premium Care Ecosystems</p>
            <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16 opacity-60">
                <span class="font-extrabold tracking-widest text-forest/70 text-lg uppercase">BioLoom Lab</span>
                <span class="font-extrabold tracking-widest text-forest/70 text-lg uppercase">PharmaCura</span>
                <span class="font-extrabold tracking-widest text-forest/70 text-lg uppercase">HealTech AI</span>
                <span class="font-extrabold tracking-widest text-forest/70 text-lg uppercase">Aura Clinical</span>
                <span class="font-extrabold tracking-widest text-forest/70 text-lg uppercase">Veris Medical</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- CLINICAL SERVICES SECTION (The "Featured Course" equivalent with custom content density) -->
    <section id="services" class="bg-cream py-16 md:py-24 px-6 md:px-12">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <div class="max-w-xl space-y-3 mb-12">
                <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-ochre bg-cream-accent px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">What We Excel In</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold text-forest tracking-tight">Personalized Clinical Pathways Designed For Longevity</h2>
                <p class="text-forest/70 text-sm">Our modern healthcare ecosystem integrates certified primary physicians with functional health plans, enabling proactive prevention instead of reactive treatments.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                <!-- Service Card 1 -->
                <div class="group bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/60 p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-3d-light hover:shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between">
                    <div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-forest text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-3d-light">
                            <i data-lucide="video" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-forest mb-3">On-Demand Telehealth</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-forest/70 leading-relaxed">
                            Connect immediately with our network of premier internal medicine specialists within minutes. Fully integrated digital prescription renewals and medical note issuance.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-cream-dark/60 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-forest tracking-wider">Premium Care Tier</span>
                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-ochre flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">Learn more <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i></span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Service Card 2 -->
                <div class="group bg-forest text-cream-light border border-forest-soft p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between relative overflow-hidden">
                    <div class="absolute -right-8 -top-8 w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-forest-light opacity-30"></div>
                    <div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-ochre text-forest-dark flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-glow-gold">
                            <i data-lucide="dna" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-cream-light mb-3">Biometric Longevity Plans</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-cream-light/80 leading-relaxed">
                            Unlock DNA and deep metabolic sequencing pipelines. We configure optimized nutrition, hormonal balancing schedules, and cellular health protocols just for you.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-forest-light/60 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-ochre tracking-wider">Elite Longevity Tier</span>
                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-ochre flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">Learn more <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i></span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Service Card 3 -->
                <div class="group bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/60 p-8 rounded-[2rem] shadow-3d-light hover:shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between">
                    <div>
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-forest text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-3d-light">
                            <i data-lucide="shield-alert" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-forest mb-3">Preventative Cardio Care</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-forest/70 leading-relaxed">
                            Proactive cardiovascular risk mapping utilizing AI-driven diagnostics, smart monitoring partnerships, and holistic daily cardiovascular therapy schedules.
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-cream-dark/60 flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-forest tracking-wider">Clinical Care Tier</span>
                        <span class="text-xs font-bold text-ochre flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">Learn more <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i></span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SPECIALIST GRID (Equivalent to the right hand 3D cards in the inspiration visual) -->
    <section id="specialists" class="bg-cream-accent/40 py-16 md:py-24 px-6 md:px-12 border-t border-b border-cream-dark/50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-12 gap-6">
                <div class="max-w-xl space-y-3">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-ochre bg-cream-light px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark/50">Renowned Clinicians</span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold text-forest tracking-tight">Consult With Our Clinical Visionaries</h2>
                    <p class="text-forest/70 text-sm">Each specialist undergoes rigorous functional medicine boarding to offer comprehensive organic and traditional care pipelines.</p>
                </div>
                <!-- Mini Pill Badge Navigation matching the simple sub-headers in inspiration -->
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span class="px-4 py-2 bg-forest text-cream-light rounded-full text-xs font-bold cursor-pointer">All Experts</span>
                    <span class="px-4 py-2 hover:bg-cream-dark text-forest rounded-full text-xs font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all">Longevity</span>
                    <span class="px-4 py-2 hover:bg-cream-dark text-forest rounded-full text-xs font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all">Therapy</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Custom 3D Styled Specialist Cards Grid -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                <!-- Specialist Card 1 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light rounded-[2rem] p-6 border border-cream-dark/60 shadow-3d-light hover:shadow-premium transition-all duration-300">
                    <div class="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-cream-dark to-cream-accent rounded-2xl h-64 flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden border border-cream-dark">
                        <!-- Custom vector claymorphic avatar illustration -->
                        <svg class="w-48 h-48 drop-shadow-lg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="50" rx="10" fill="#0f766e"/>
                            <rect x="85" y="100" width="30" height="50" fill="#fed7aa"/>
                            <!-- Head -->
                            <circle cx="100" cy="80" r="30" fill="#fed7aa"/>
                            <!-- Hair -->
                            <path d="M70 80C70 60 80 50 100 50C120 50 130 60 130 80H70Z" fill="#78350f"/>
                            <circle cx="92" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <circle cx="108" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <path d="M94 92C94 95 106 95 106 92" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
                        </svg>
                        <div class="absolute bottom-3 left-3 bg-forest text-cream-light text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                            Cardiologist
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-forest">Dr. Sophia Mercer</h3>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-ochre">
                                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre text-ochre"></i>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-forest">4.9</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-forest/70">12+ Years Experience • Oxford Clinical Research Lead</p>
                        <div class="pt-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Telehealth</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">In-Person</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Specialist Card 2 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light rounded-[2rem] p-6 border border-cream-dark/60 shadow-3d-light hover:shadow-premium transition-all duration-300">
                    <div class="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-cream-dark to-cream-accent rounded-2xl h-64 flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden border border-cream-dark">
                        <!-- Custom vector claymorphic avatar illustration -->
                        <svg class="w-48 h-48 drop-shadow-lg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="50" rx="10" fill="#163925"/>
                            <rect x="85" y="100" width="30" height="50" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                            <circle cx="100" cy="80" r="30" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                            <path d="M70 70C70 45 130 45 130 70H70Z" fill="#111827"/>
                            <circle cx="92" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <circle cx="108" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <path d="M94 92C94 95 106 95 106 92" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
                        </svg>
                        <div class="absolute bottom-3 left-3 bg-forest text-cream-light text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                            Longevity & DNA
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-forest">Dr. Marcus Vance</h3>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-ochre">
                                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre text-ochre"></i>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-forest">5.0</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-forest/70">8+ Years Experience • Chief Genetics Researcher</p>
                        <div class="pt-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Telehealth Only</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">VIP Cohort</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Specialist Card 3 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light rounded-[2rem] p-6 border border-cream-dark/60 shadow-3d-light hover:shadow-premium transition-all duration-300">
                    <div class="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-cream-dark to-cream-accent rounded-2xl h-64 flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden border border-cream-dark">
                        <!-- Custom vector claymorphic avatar illustration -->
                        <svg class="w-48 h-48 drop-shadow-lg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="50" rx="10" fill="#4b5563"/>
                            <rect x="85" y="100" width="30" height="50" fill="#ffedd5"/>
                            <circle cx="100" cy="80" r="30" fill="#ffedd5"/>
                            <path d="M70 75C70 50 85 40 100 40C115 40 130 50 130 75H70Z" fill="#b45309"/>
                            <circle cx="92" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <circle cx="108" cy="78" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                            <path d="M94 92C94 95 106 95 106 92" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
                        </svg>
                        <div class="absolute bottom-3 left-3 bg-forest text-cream-light text-[10px] font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
                            Psychiatry & Wellness
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-6 space-y-2">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-forest">Dr. Elena Rostova</h3>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-ochre">
                                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre text-ochre"></i>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-forest">4.8</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-forest/70">15+ Years Experience • Holistic Mental Wellbeing Advisor</p>
                        <div class="pt-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Telehealth</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold bg-cream px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Group Therapy</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERACTIVE CLINICAL PATHWAY DIAGNOSTIC TOOL -->
    <section id="diagnostic" class="bg-forest py-20 md:py-28 px-6 md:px-12 text-cream-light relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Organic wavy separator on top -->
        <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-10 bg-cream" style="clip-path: ellipse(60% 100% at 50% 0%);"></div>

        <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto relative z-10 pt-8">
            <div class="text-center space-y-4 mb-12">
                <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-ochre bg-forest-light border border-forest-soft/80 px-4 py-2 rounded-full">Interactive Session Builder</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight">Interactive Care Matcher</h2>
                <p class="text-cream-light/70 text-sm max-w-xl mx-auto">Answer three rapid criteria inputs to dynamically discover your targeted organic diagnostic pathway and custom medical experts.</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Interactivity Box mimicking rich 3D layout -->
            <div class="bg-forest-light/90 border border-forest-soft p-8 md:p-12 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-3d-dark">
                <!-- Step Indicator Pill -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8 border-b border-forest-soft/60 pb-6">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-widest text-ochre" id="stepIndicator">Step 1 of 3</span>
                    <div class="flex gap-1">
                        <span class="w-6 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-ochre" id="dot1"></span>
                        <span class="w-6 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-forest" id="dot2"></span>
                        <span class="w-6 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-forest" id="dot3"></span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- STEP 1: Focus Area -->
                <div id="step1Content" class="space-y-6 transition-all duration-300">
                    <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">What is your primary clinical health focus?</h3>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                        <button onclick="setFocus('Longevity & Anti-aging')" class="focus-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><i data-lucide="infinity" class="w-5 h-5"></i></span>
                            <span class="block font-bold">Longevity & Anti-aging</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Cellular regeneration pipelines</span>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="setFocus('Daily Health & Prevention')" class="focus-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><i data-lucide="activity" class="w-5 h-5"></i></span>
                            <span class="block font-bold">Daily Wellness</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Comprehensive primary prevention</span>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="setFocus('Cardio & Fitness Optimization')" class="focus-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><i data-lucide="heart" class="w-5 h-5"></i></span>
                            <span class="block font-bold">Cardio & Physical</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Metabolic & performance mapping</span>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- STEP 2: Delivery Medium -->
                <div id="step2Content" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-all duration-300">
                    <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">Preferred care consult environment?</h3>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <button onclick="setMedium('Pure Virtual Telehealth')" class="medium-btn p-6 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><i data-lucide="video" class="w-5 h-5"></i></span>
                            <span class="block font-bold text-lg">On-Demand Telehealth</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Video consultations, quick medication dispatch</span>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="setMedium('Hybrid In-person & Digital')" class="medium-btn p-6 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center mb-4"><i data-lucide="home" class="w-5 h-5"></i></span>
                            <span class="block font-bold text-lg">Hybrid Premium Clinic</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Comprehensive home diagnostics with video backups</span>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <button onclick="prevStep(1)" class="mt-4 text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-ochre hover:underline uppercase flex items-center gap-1"><i data-lucide="arrow-left" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Back to Focus Area</button>
                </div>

                <!-- STEP 3: Timeline expectation -->
                <div id="step3Content" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-all duration-300">
                    <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">When would you like to launch your pathway?</h3>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                        <button onclick="submitDiagnostic('Urgent Consultation')" class="time-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block font-bold text-lg text-ochre">ASAP</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Within next 24 Hours</span>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="submitDiagnostic('Standard Schedule')" class="time-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block font-bold text-lg text-cream-light">This Week</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Standard Onboarding window</span>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="submitDiagnostic('Preventative Exploration')" class="time-btn p-5 rounded-2xl bg-forest border border-forest-soft/60 text-left hover:bg-forest-soft hover:border-ochre hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all duration-300">
                            <span class="block font-bold text-lg text-cream-light">Exploratory</span>
                            <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/60">Receiving informational packets only</span>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <button onclick="prevStep(2)" class="mt-4 text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-ochre hover:underline uppercase flex items-center gap-1"><i data-lucide="arrow-left" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Back to Consul Environment</button>
                </div>

                <!-- RESULTS / OUTPUT PANEL -->
                <div id="resultsContent" class="hidden space-y-6 transition-all duration-300">
                    <div class="bg-forest-dark border-2 border-ochre/30 p-6 rounded-2xl space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center">
                                <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <span class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-ochre tracking-widest">Recommended Pathway Found</span>
                                <h4 class="text-lg font-bold" id="pathwayTitle">Precision Longevity Protocol</h4>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-sm text-cream-light/80" id="pathwayDescription">Based on your anti-aging goals and digital delivery preference, your recommended route features automated cellular assessments paired with virtual appointments.</p>
                        
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-forest-soft flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4">
                            <div>
                                <span class="block text-xs text-cream-light/50">Primary Matched Specialist</span>
                                <span class="font-bold text-ochre" id="matchedDoctor">Dr. Marcus Vance (Genetics Lead)</span>
                            </div>
                            <button onclick="openBookingModal()" class="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full bg-ochre text-forest-dark font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-ochre-light shadow-glow-gold transition-all">
                                Confirm Direct Booking
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <button onclick="resetDiagnostic()" class="text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-ochre hover:underline uppercase flex items-center gap-1"><i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Retake Pathway Assessment</button>
                        <span class="text-xs text-cream-light/40">Secure & Confidential Clinical Output</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- TRIPLE PHONE PREVIEW PORTAL (Recreating the realistic interactive mockups from bottom of reference) -->
    <section id="preview" class="bg-cream py-20 md:py-28 px-6 md:px-12 border-t border-cream-dark/50 overflow-hidden">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            
            <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-4 mb-16">
                <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-ochre bg-cream-accent px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Intuitive Tech Integration</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-forest">The Clinical Universe in Your Pocket</h2>
                <p class="text-forest/70 text-sm">Experience our premium telehealth system. Use the interactive phones below to preview actual dashboard pipelines and medical logs.</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Triple Phone Grid with high depth shadows -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-center justify-center">
                
                <!-- Phone Card 1: Live Patient File -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/80 p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-premium transform hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-500">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold text-ochre uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 block">Interactive Screens</span>
                    <!-- Realistic Phone Border Container -->
                    <div class="relative mx-auto max-w-[280px] rounded-[2.2rem] border-[8px] border-forest bg-cream overflow-hidden shadow-3d-light aspect-[9/18]">
                        <!-- Camera Notch Mockup -->
                        <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-28 h-4 bg-forest rounded-b-xl z-20 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-gray-800"></span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Internal App UI Screen -->
                        <div class="p-4 pt-8 space-y-4 h-full flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div class="space-y-4">
                                <!-- Top profile bar -->
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-cream-dark/60 pb-3">
                                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-forest text-ochre flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold">JD</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <h5 class="text-xs font-extrabold text-forest">Patient Folder</h5>
                                        <span class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">ID: #883-201</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Current Treatment Bio-Pill -->
                                <div class="bg-cream-accent p-3 rounded-xl space-y-1 border border-cream-dark/80">
                                    <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-forest/60">Active Pathway</span>
                                    <span class="block font-bold text-xs text-forest">Longevity Cellular Plan</span>
                                    <span class="block text-[10px] text-emerald-600 font-bold flex items-center gap-1"><span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span> Active Diagnostics</span>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Checklist diagnostics -->
                                <div class="space-y-2">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-forest/70 uppercase">Weekly Milestones</span>
                                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/40 text-[10px] font-semibold">
                                        <span>Metabolic DNA Swap</span>
                                        <span class="text-emerald-600 font-bold">COMPLETED</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/40 text-[10px] font-semibold">
                                        <span>Initial Cardiac Scan</span>
                                        <span class="text-ochre font-bold">PENDING</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Screen button -->
                            <button onclick="openBookingModal()" class="w-full py-2 bg-forest text-cream-light rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                                View Profile
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-center mt-6">
                        <h4 class="font-bold text-lg text-forest">Digital Health Dossier</h4>
                        <p class="text-xs text-forest/70 mt-1">Real-time telemetry reports updated daily by lab technicians.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Phone Card 2: Interactive Video Consult simulator -->
                <div class="bg-forest text-cream-light p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-premium transform hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-500">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold text-ochre uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 block">Interactive Screens</span>
                    <!-- Phone Frame -->
                    <div class="relative mx-auto max-w-[280px] rounded-[2.2rem] border-[8px] border-forest-soft bg-forest-dark overflow-hidden shadow-3d-dark aspect-[9/18]">
                        <!-- Camera Notch Mockup -->
                        <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-28 h-4 bg-forest-soft rounded-b-xl z-20"></div>

                        <!-- Video Call interface simulated -->
                        <div class="relative h-full flex flex-col justify-between p-4 pt-8">
                            <!-- Call Timer -->
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between text-white z-10 bg-forest-light/60 backdrop-blur-md p-2 rounded-xl">
                                <span class="text-[10px] font-extrabold tracking-widest uppercase">Consultation</span>
                                <span class="text-[10px] font-mono bg-red-500/80 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-white animate-pulse">09:14</span>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Big simulated Doctor Image (Simulated in stylized SVG) -->
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-70">
                                <svg class="w-full h-full" viewBox="0 0 200 400" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                    <rect width="200" height="400" fill="#1e293b"/>
                                    <circle cx="100" cy="180" r="45" fill="#fbcfe8"/>
                                    <!-- Hair -->
                                    <path d="M70 180C70 140 130 140 130 180H70Z" fill="#1e293b"/>
                                    <path d="M40 340C40 280 160 280 160 340V400H40V340Z" fill="#0f766e"/>
                                    <!-- Smile -->
                                    <path d="M96 195C96 198 104 198 104 195" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="2"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Patient Self View Mini-window -->
                            <div class="absolute bottom-16 right-4 w-16 h-24 rounded-lg bg-cream border border-forest-soft z-10 overflow-hidden shadow-lg">
                                <div class="w-full h-full bg-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center text-[8px] font-bold text-forest uppercase">You</div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Action bar -->
                            <div class="z-10 bg-forest-light/95 backdrop-blur-md p-3 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-around border border-forest-soft/40">
                                <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-red-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform"><i data-lucide="phone-off" class="w-4 h-4"></i></span>
                                <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-forest-soft flex items-center justify-center text-white cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform"><i data-lucide="mic" class="w-4 h-4"></i></span>
                                <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-forest-soft flex items-center justify-center text-white cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform"><i data-lucide="message-square" class="w-4 h-4"></i></span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-center mt-6">
                        <h4 class="font-bold text-lg text-cream-light">High-Definition Telehealth</h4>
                        <p class="text-xs text-cream-light/70 mt-1">Zero latency video integrations connected right to your practitioner.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Phone Card 3: Prescription Delivery tracking -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/80 p-6 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-premium transform hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-500">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold text-ochre uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 block">Interactive Screens</span>
                    <!-- Phone Frame -->
                    <div class="relative mx-auto max-w-[280px] rounded-[2.2rem] border-[8px] border-forest bg-cream overflow-hidden shadow-3d-light aspect-[9/18]">
                        <!-- Camera Notch Mockup -->
                        <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-28 h-4 bg-forest rounded-b-xl z-20"></div>

                        <!-- Delivery tracking UI -->
                        <div class="p-4 pt-8 space-y-4 h-full flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div class="space-y-4">
                                <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-cream-dark/60 pb-3">
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-extrabold text-forest">Prescription Hub</h5>
                                    <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-ochre">TRACKING</span>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Logistics Pipeline layout representation -->
                                <div class="space-y-4 relative pl-4 border-l border-cream-dark">
                                    <div class="relative">
                                        <span class="absolute -left-[21px] top-1 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
                                        <span class="block text-[11px] font-bold text-forest">Dispatched from Apothecary</span>
                                        <span class="block text-[9px] text-gray-400">Today at 1:40 PM</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="relative opacity-60">
                                        <span class="absolute -left-[21px] top-1 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-cream-dark"></span>
                                        <span class="block text-[11px] font-bold text-forest">En route to Residence</span>
                                        <span class="block text-[9px] text-gray-400">ETA: 45 Minutes</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <!-- Pill details card -->
                                <div class="bg-cream-accent p-3 rounded-xl border border-cream-dark/80 flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-ochre/10 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center"><i data-lucide="pill" class="w-4 h-4"></i></span>
                                    <div>
                                        <span class="block text-[10px] font-bold text-forest leading-none">Liposomal Multi-Complex</span>
                                        <span class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Custom Formulation ID #4928</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <button onclick="openBookingModal()" class="w-full py-2 bg-forest text-cream-light rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">
                                Track Delivery
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-center mt-6">
                        <h4 class="font-bold text-lg text-forest">Custom Apothecary Dispatch</h4>
                        <p class="text-xs text-forest/70 mt-1">Same-day secure shipping of custom formulated compounds directly to you.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- PROVEN RESULTS STATS SECTION -->
    <section class="bg-forest py-20 px-6 md:px-12 text-cream-light relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-forest-dark to-forest opacity-80"></div>
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto relative z-10 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 text-center">
            <div class="p-6 space-y-2">
                <span class="block text-5xl font-black text-ochre tracking-tight">240K+</span>
                <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-cream-light/60">Resolved Patient Consults</span>
            </div>
            <div class="p-6 space-y-2">
                <span class="block text-5xl font-black text-ochre tracking-tight">140+</span>
                <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-cream-light/60">Premium Active Specialists</span>
            </div>
            <div class="p-6 space-y-2">
                <span class="block text-5xl font-black text-ochre tracking-tight">94.8%</span>
                <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-cream-light/60">Reversed Cardiovascular Markers</span>
            </div>
            <div class="p-6 space-y-2">
                <span class="block text-5xl font-black text-ochre tracking-tight">30 Min</span>
                <span class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-cream-light/60">Apothecary Dispatch Times</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- PREMIUM FAQ SECTION -->
    <section class="bg-cream py-16 md:py-24 px-6 md:px-12 border-t border-cream-dark/50">
        <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
            <div class="text-center space-y-4 mb-12">
                <span class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-ochre bg-cream-accent px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-cream-dark">Knowledge Center</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold text-forest tracking-tight">Frequently Asked Queries</h2>
                <p class="text-forest/70 text-sm">Have inquiries regarding pricing, insurance parameters, or specialist certifications?</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Accordion items -->
            <div class="space-y-4">
                <!-- FAQ Item 1 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all">
                    <button onclick="toggleFaq(1)" class="w-full text-left p-6 font-bold text-forest flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-cream-accent/40">
                        <span>How does the Organic Care model differ from standard clinics?</span>
                        <i id="faq-icon-1" data-lucide="plus" class="w-5 h-5 text-ochre transition-transform duration-300"></i>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-content-1" class="hidden p-6 pt-0 text-sm text-forest/70 leading-relaxed border-t border-cream-dark/30">
                        Traditional clinics treat illness retroactively. CuraCare couples certified primary care physicians with functional nutrition, genetics, and preventative cellular tracking to isolate concerns months before physical biomarkers change.
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- FAQ Item 2 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all">
                    <button onclick="toggleFaq(2)" class="w-full text-left p-6 font-bold text-forest flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-cream-accent/40">
                        <span>Are the clinical procedures eligible for standard insurance?</span>
                        <i id="faq-icon-2" data-lucide="plus" class="w-5 h-5 text-ochre transition-transform duration-300"></i>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-content-2" class="hidden p-6 pt-0 text-sm text-forest/70 leading-relaxed border-t border-cream-dark/30">
                        All traditional telehealth services and board-certified physician consults are covered under standard PPO/HSA parameters. Specialized anti-aging longevity panels are billed privately as custom clinical therapies.
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- FAQ Item 3 -->
                <div class="bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all">
                    <button onclick="toggleFaq(3)" class="w-full text-left p-6 font-bold text-forest flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-cream-accent/40">
                        <span>How quickly are prescription pharmaceuticals dispatched?</span>
                        <i id="faq-icon-3" data-lucide="plus" class="w-5 h-5 text-ochre transition-transform duration-300"></i>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-content-3" class="hidden p-6 pt-0 text-sm text-forest/70 leading-relaxed border-t border-cream-dark/30">
                        Once cleared during video consults, standard prescriptions are sent digitally to your local apothecary immediately. Custom organic compounds are formulated inside Studio 1048 and shipped directly to your door in 24 hours.
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="bg-cream-accent/20 py-16 md:py-24 px-6 md:px-12 border-t border-cream-dark/40">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">

                        </p>
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-cream-dark/60">
                            <h5 class="font-extrabold text-forest text-sm">Sarah Jenkins</h5>

                        </div>

                    <div class="bg-cream-light p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-cream-dark/60 shadow-3d-light space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex gap-1 text-ochre">
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre"></i>
                            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-ochre"></i>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-sm text-forest/85 italic leading-relaxed">
                            "The direct virtual consultation with Dr. Mercer solved my high-blood-pressure anxiety in one morning. The digital prescription dispatch took under an hour."

                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-cream-dark/60">
                            <h5 class="font-extrabold text-forest text-sm">Alexander Dupont</h5>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-ochre font-bold">Client Pathway • Cardio Care</span>

                </div>

            </div>

    <!-- PREMIUM CONTACT & BOOKING FORM IN THE FOOTER REGION -->
    <section class="bg-forest pt-20 pb-12 px-6 md:px-12 text-cream-light relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Floating shapes mimicking the reference layout background -->
        <div class="absolute -right-16 -bottom-16 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-forest-soft/30 blur-2xl"></div>
        <div class="absolute -left-16 -top-16 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-forest-dark/50 blur-2xl"></div>

        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto relative z-10">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 pb-16 border-b border-forest-light/60">
                
                <!-- Footer Info / Branding column mimicking Studio 1048 -->

                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-cream text-forest flex items-center justify-center text-ochre shadow-lg">
                            <svg class="w-6 h-6" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

                            <span class="text-xl font-black tracking-tight text-cream-light block">CuraCare</span>

    <!-- FLOATING INTERACTIVE TELEHEALTH LIVE CHAT WIDGET (Bottom Right) -->
    <div class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50">
        <!-- Interactive Chat button with soft notification ping -->
        <button id="chatToggle" onclick="toggleChatWindow()" class="relative w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-ochre hover:bg-ochre-dark text-forest-dark flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow-gold hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all">
            <i data-lucide="message-square" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
            <span class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-red-500 border-2 border-cream text-[9px] font-black text-white flex items-center justify-center">1</span>
        </button>

        <!-- Simulated Premium Chat Window -->
        <div id="chatWindow" class="hidden absolute bottom-18 right-0 w-80 bg-cream-light border border-cream-dark/80 rounded-[2rem] shadow-premium overflow-hidden z-50 flex flex-col justify-between">
            <!-- Header bar with doctor meta details -->
            <div class="bg-forest text-cream-light p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-ochre text-forest-dark flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold">CC</div>
                    <div>
                        <h6 class="text-xs font-extrabold">CuraCare Live Desk</h6>
                        <span class="text-[9px] text-emerald-400 font-bold flex items-center gap-1"><span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400"></span> Online Now</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button onclick="toggleChatWindow()" class="text-cream-light/60 hover:text-white"><i data-lucide="x" class="w-4 h-4"></i></button>
            </div>

            <!-- Chat Content area -->
            <div class="p-4 space-y-4 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto" id="chatMessages">
                <div class="bg-cream-accent/50 p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none text-xs text-forest/90">
                    Hello! Welcome to Studio 1048 Support. I can help map your wellness pathway immediately. How should we proceed?
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Quick replies -->
            <div class="px-4 pb-2 flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                <button onclick="sendQuickReply('Schedule with Dr. Gabriel')" class="text-[10px] bg-cream border border-cream-dark/60 text-forest px-2 py-1 rounded-full hover:bg-cream-dark transition-all">Schedule with Dr. Gabriel</button>
                <button onclick="sendQuickReply('Longevity Pricing')" class="text-[10px] bg-cream border border-cream-dark/60 text-forest px-2 py-1 rounded-full hover:bg-cream-dark transition-all">Longevity Pricing</button>
            </div>

            <!-- Message write line -->
            <div class="p-3 border-t border-cream-dark/60 flex items-center bg-cream-light gap-2">
                <input type="text" id="chatInput" placeholder="Write query..." class="bg-cream-accent/40 rounded-full py-1.5 px-4 text-xs text-forest focus:outline-none w-full border border-cream-dark/40" onkeypress="handleChatPress(event)">
                <button onclick="sendMessage()" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-forest text-cream-light flex items-center justify-center"><i data-lucide="send" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i></button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- BOOKING APPOINTMENT DIALOG MODAL -->
    <div id="bookingModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-forest/80 backdrop-blur-md z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
        <div class="bg-cream-light border-2 border-ochre/40 w-full max-w-lg rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-premium overflow-hidden transform transition-all duration-300">
            <!-- Modal header -->
            <div class="bg-forest p-6 text-cream-light flex items-center justify-between border-b border-forest-light">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i data-lucide="calendar" class="w-5 h-5 text-ochre"></i>
                    <h3 class="text-lg font-bold">Confirm Instant Consult Slot</h3>
                </div>
                <button onclick="closeBookingModal()" class="text-cream-light/60 hover:text-white"><i data-lucide="x" class="w-5 h-5"></i></button>
            </div>

            <!-- Modal body form -->
            <div class="p-8 space-y-6">
                <p class="text-sm text-forest/70">Enter your core credentials to reserve an instant on-demand telehealth consultation.</p>
                
                <div class="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-xs uppercase font-extrabold text-forest/60 mb-1.5">Full Name</label>
                        <input type="text" id="bookingName" placeholder="e.g. Eleanor Vance" class="w-full bg-cream border border-cream-dark/80 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-ochre text-forest">
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase font-extrabold text-forest/60 mb-1.5">Phone Number</label>
                            <input type="tel" id="bookingPhone" placeholder="+1 (555) 000-0000" class="w-full bg-cream border border-cream-dark/80 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-ochre text-forest">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-xs uppercase font-extrabold text-forest/60 mb-1.5">Consult Specialty</label>
                            <select id="bookingSpecialty" class="w-full bg-cream border border-cream-dark/80 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-ochre text-forest">
                                <option>Anti-aging Longevity</option>
                                <option>Preventative Cardiovascular</option>
                                <option>Mental Wellness & Therapy</option>
                                <option>Urgent Telehealth Consultation</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="p-4 bg-cream border border-cream-dark rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3">
                    <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-ochre/15 text-ochre flex items-center justify-center"><i data-lucide="info" class="w-4 h-4"></i></span>
                    <span class="text-[11px] text-forest/70">Your secure patient connection remains fully HIPPA & PIPEDA compliant.</span>
                </div>

                <div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 pt-4 border-t border-cream-dark/60">
                    <button onclick="closeBookingModal()" class="px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-forest/60 hover:text-forest">Cancel</button>
                    <button onclick="submitBooking()" class="px-8 py-3 rounded-full bg-ochre hover:bg-ochre-dark text-forest-dark font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider shadow-glow-gold">Book Consultation</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- CLIENT SIDE INTERACTIVE SCRIPTS -->
    <script>
        // Start Lucide Icons replacements
        window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            lucide.createIcons();
        });

        // Interactive Diagnostic Tool Logic (Step-by-step custom wizard)
        let focusArea = '';
        let careMedium = '';
        let timeline = '';

        function setFocus(val) {
            focusArea = val;
            document.getElementById('step1Content').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('step2Content').classList.remove('hidden');
            
            // Adjust dots and text indicator
            document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Step 2 of 3";
            document.getElementById('dot2').classList.replace('bg-forest', 'bg-ochre');
        }

        function setMedium(val) {
            careMedium = val;
            document.getElementById('step2Content').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('step3Content').classList.remove('hidden');

            document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Step 3 of 3";
            document.getElementById('dot3').classList.replace('bg-forest', 'bg-ochre');
        }

        function prevStep(step) {
            if (step === 1) {
                document.getElementById('step2Content').classList.add('hidden');
                document.getElementById('step1Content').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Step 1 of 3";
                document.getElementById('dot2').classList.replace('bg-ochre', 'bg-forest');
            } else if (step === 2) {
                document.getElementById('step3Content').classList.add('hidden');
                document.getElementById('step2Content').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Step 2 of 3";
                document.getElementById('dot3').classList.replace('bg-ochre', 'bg-forest');
            }
        }

        function submitDiagnostic(val) {
            timeline = val;
            document.getElementById('step3Content').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('resultsContent').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Results Generated";

            // Configure custom matching parameters dynamically
            let title = '';
            let desc = '';
            let doctor = '';

            if (focusArea.includes('Longevity')) {
                title = 'Cellular Gene Sequencing & Recovery Plan';
                desc = `Based on your chosen delivery medium (${careMedium}), you have been matched with Dr. Vance. Your initial intake packet includes testing kits dispatched by apothecary within ${timeline === 'Urgent Consultation' ? '2 hours' : '24 hours'}.`;
                doctor = 'Dr. Marcus Vance (Genetics Lead)';
            } else if (focusArea.includes('Daily')) {
                title = 'Primary Core Integrative Health Program';
                desc = `Your ${timeline} schedule features daily biome telemetry trackers synchronizing instantly with your patient portal for on-demand consultations.`;
                doctor = 'Dr. Elena Rostova (Wellness Advisor)';
            } else {
                title = 'Vascular Biometric Risk Evaluation';
                desc = `Focuses on stress optimization, ECG telemetries, and hybrid testing. Scheduled onboarding prioritized via: ${timeline}.`;
                doctor = 'Dr. Sophia Mercer (Oxford Clinical Lead)';
            }

            document.getElementById('pathwayTitle').innerText = title;
            document.getElementById('pathwayDescription').innerText = desc;
            document.getElementById('matchedDoctor').innerText = doctor;
        }

        function resetDiagnostic() {
            focusArea = '';
            careMedium = '';
            timeline = '';

            document.getElementById('resultsContent').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('step1Content').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('stepIndicator').innerText = "Step 1 of 3";
            
            document.getElementById('dot2').classList.replace('bg-ochre', 'bg-forest');
            document.getElementById('dot3').classList.replace('bg-ochre', 'bg-forest');
        }

        // Scroll helper
        function scrollToDiagnostic() {
            document.getElementById('diagnostic').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }

        // Accordion FAQs toggle logic
        function toggleFaq(id) {
            const content = document.getElementById(`faq-content-${id}`);
            const icon = document.getElementById(`faq-icon-${id}`);

            if (content.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                content.classList.remove('hidden');
                icon.style.transform = 'rotate(45deg)';
            } else {
                content.classList.add('hidden');
                icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
            }
        }

        // Chat widget logic
        function toggleChatWindow() {
            const win = document.getElementById('chatWindow');
            win.classList.toggle('hidden');
        }

        function handleChatPress(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                sendMessage();
            }
        }

        function sendMessage() {
            const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
            const val = input.value.trim();
            if (!val) return;

            addChatMessage(val, true);
            input.value = '';

            // Simulated response
            setTimeout(() => {
                addChatMessage("Understood. I will pass your notes onto Dr. Gabriel's administrative team. Your assessment is flagged for follow up.", false);
            }, 1000);
        }

        function sendQuickReply(val) {
            addChatMessage(val, true);
            setTimeout(() => {
                if (val.includes('Dr. Gabriel')) {
                    addChatMessage("Opening direct booking slots now...", false);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        openBookingModal();
                    }, 500);
                } else {
                    addChatMessage("Longevity therapy pathways start at $149/mo. We'll mail detailed information packets to your default address.", false);
                }
            }, 1000);
        }

        function addChatMessage(msg, isUser) {
            const container = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            
            if (isUser) {
                div.className = "bg-forest text-cream-light p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none text-xs text-right ml-auto max-w-[80%]";
            } else {
                div.className = "bg-cream-accent/50 p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none text-xs text-forest/90 mr-auto max-w-[80%]";
            }
            div.innerText = msg;
            container.appendChild(div);
            container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
        }

        // Booking Modal triggers
        function openBookingModal() {
            document.getElementById('bookingModal').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function closeBookingModal() {
            document.getElementById('bookingModal').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        function submitBooking() {
            const name = document.getElementById('bookingName').value.trim();
            const phone = document.getElementById('bookingPhone').value.trim();
            const specialty = document.getElementById('bookingSpecialty').value;

            if (!name || !phone) {
                alert("Please fill out your name and primary contact details.");
                return;
            }

            alert(`Appointment requested successfully for ${name} under [${specialty}]. Our concierge coordinator will dial ${phone} shortly.`);
            closeBookingModal();
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
I8
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { 
  Phone, 
  ArrowRight, 
  Star, 
  Check,

  User, 
  MessageSquare, 
  X, 
  Send, 
  ShieldCheck, 
  Heart, 
  Calculator, 
  Activity, 
  MapPin, 
  Info,
  Menu,
  Globe
} from 'lucide-react';

// --- TRANSLATION DICTIONARY ---
const TRANSLATIONS = {

    heroSubtitle: "Наши цены на 30% ниже, чем в большинстве клиник. Без потери качества: сертифицированные материалы, врачи с опытом 10+ лет, гарантия лечения.",
    btnSelectService: "Выбрать услугу",

    aiInputPlaceholder: "Задайте вопрос AI...",

  en: {

    card3Title: "Check-up",

    card5Title: "50% Discount",

    card5Desc: "When installing two or more implants — highly favorable conditions for the next ones.",
    btnMore: "Details",

    trustCard1Title: "Years of Experience",
    trustCard1Desc: "Caring for patients for over 10 years, providing dependable state-of-the-art dental care.",
    trustCard2Title: "Customer Trust",
    trustCard2Desc: "10,000+ satisfied patients successfully treated in our clinic since opening.",
    trustCard3Title: "Advanced Equipment",
    trustCard3Desc: "High-precision diagnosis & treatment using top German and Japanese hardware.",
    trustCard4Title: "Safety & Sterility",
    trustCard4Desc: "Triple sterilization control of all instruments matching absolute clinical standards.",
    calcTitle: "Interactive Savings Calculator",
    calcSubtitle: "Select treatments to instantly calculate your total discount and final cost:",
    calcTotal: "Total price",
    calcSaving: "You save",
    calcPlaceholder: "Select at least one treatment",
    aiTitle: "GlowDent AI Assistant",
    aiGreeting: "Hello! I am GlowDent's virtual assistant. Ask me anything about dental treatments, appointment preparation, or pricing!",
    aiInputPlaceholder: "Ask AI a question...",
    modalTitle: "Book Your Appointment",
    modalSubtitle: "Fill out the form, and our representative will contact you within 5 minutes to confirm.",
    inputName: "Your name",
    inputPhone: "Phone number",
    inputService: "Select service",
    service1: "General Treatment",
    service2: "Hygiene & Whitening",
    service3: "Implants & Prosthetics",
    service4: "Orthodontics (Braces/Aligners)",
    service5: "Pediatric Dentistry",
    modalSuccess: "Request submitted successfully! We will contact you shortly.",
    btnSubmit: "Schedule Appointment",
    footerText: "© 2026 GlowDent Clinic. All rights reserved. State License No. LO-77-01-021045."
  }
};

const SERVICES_PRICES = {
  ru: [
    { id: 'hygiene', name: 'Профгигиена Air Flow + Ультразвук', original: 6500, current: 4550, promo: '30%' },
    { id: 'consult', name: 'Первичный прием + КТ диагностика', original: 2500, current: 0, promo: 'FREE' },
    { id: 'implant', name: 'Имплантат (вторая единица)', original: 45000, current: 22500, promo: '50%' },
    { id: 'filling', name: 'Лечение кариеса & Эстетическая пломба', original: 5500, current: 4400, promo: '20%' },
    { id: 'whitening', name: 'Клиническое отбеливание Zoom4', original: 28000, current: 21000, promo: '25%' },
  ],
  en: [
    { id: 'hygiene', name: 'Professional Hygiene Air Flow', original: 100, current: 70, promo: '30%' },
    { id: 'consult', name: 'Initial Consult + 3D Scan', original: 45, current: 0, promo: 'FREE' },
    { id: 'implant', name: 'Implant (second unit)', original: 800, current: 400, promo: '50%' },
    { id: 'filling', name: 'Caries Treatment & Aesthetic Filling', original: 120, current: 96, promo: '20%' },
    { id: 'whitening', name: 'Teeth Whitening Zoom4', original: 400, current: 300, promo: '25%' },
  ]
};

const apiKey = ""; // Will be populated by context automatically

export default function App() {
  const [lang, setLang] = useState('ru');
  const t = TRANSLATIONS[lang];

  // Modals & Booking State
  const [isBookModalOpen, setIsBookModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedServiceType, setSelectedServiceType] = useState('service1');
  const [bookingName, setBookingName] = useState('');
  const [bookingPhone, setBookingPhone] = useState('');
  const [bookingSuccess, setBookingSuccess] = useState(false);

  // Active Promo Calculator State
  const [selectedCalcServices, setSelectedCalcServices] = useState(['hygiene']);

  // Chatbot State
  const [isChatOpen, setIsChatOpen] = useState(false);
  const [chatMessages, setChatMessages] = useState([
    { sender: 'ai', text: t.aiGreeting, time: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) }
  ]);
  const [chatInput, setChatInput] = useState('');
  const [aiTyping, setAiTyping] = useState(false);
  const chatEndRef = useRef(null);

  // Sync initial chat greeting when language toggles
  useEffect(() => {
    setChatMessages([
      { sender: 'ai', text: TRANSLATIONS[lang].aiGreeting, time: new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) }
    ]);
  }, [lang]);

  // Scroll to bottom of AI chat window
  useEffect(() => {
    chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [chatMessages]);

  const toggleLang = () => {
    setLang(prev => prev === 'ru' ? 'en' : 'ru');
  };

  const handleBookingSubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setBookingSuccess(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setIsBookModalOpen(false);
      setBookingSuccess(false);
      setBookingName('');
      setBookingPhone('');
    }, 3000);
  };

  const toggleCalcService = (id) => {
    setSelectedCalcServices(prev => 
      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(item => item !== id) : [...prev, id]
    );
  };

  // Savings Calculator Math
  const activeCalculatorServices = SERVICES_PRICES[lang];
  const totalOriginalPrice = activeCalculatorServices
    .filter(s => selectedCalcServices.includes(s.id))
    .reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.original, 0);

  const totalCurrentPrice = activeCalculatorServices
    .filter(s => selectedCalcServices.includes(s.id))
    .reduce((sum, s) => sum + s.current, 0);

  const totalSavings = totalOriginalPrice - totalCurrentPrice;

  // AI Chat API integration with Gemini
  const handleSendMessage = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!chatInput.trim()) return;

    const userMsg = chatInput;
    const userTime = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
    setChatMessages(prev => [...prev, { sender: 'user', text: userMsg, time: userTime }]);
    setChatInput('');
    setAiTyping(true);

    const systemPrompt = `You are a virtual AI assistant representing GlowDent premium dental clinic. 
    You are warm, expert, caring, and professional. 
    Provide informative answers to patient inquiries about treatments, dental care tips, and procedures.
    Always guide the user on how they can book an appointment or check-up if relevant.
    Answer in the same language the patient used to ask the question (Russian or English).
    Keep responses concise, limited to 2-3 sentences.`;

    let responseText = "";
    let retries = 5;
    let delay = 1000;

    while (retries > 0) {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(`https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            contents: [{ parts: [{ text: userMsg }] }],
            systemInstruction: { parts: [{ text: systemPrompt }] }
          })
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`API returned status ${response.status}`);
        }

        const data = await response.json();
        responseText = data.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || "Thank you for reaching out! Please contact our desk directly at +7 (495) 123-45-67.";
        break; 
      } catch (err) {
        retries--;
        if (retries === 0) {
          responseText = lang === 'ru' 
            ? "Извините, сейчас я испытываю трудности с соединением. Пожалуйста, напишите нам позже или позвоните нашему оператору!" 
            : "Apologies, I am experiencing a temporary connection issue. Please feel free to try again or call our front desk directly.";
        } else {
          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
          delay *= 2; 
        }
      }
    }

    const aiTime = new Date().toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
    setChatMessages(prev => [...prev, { sender: 'ai', text: responseText, time: aiTime }]);
    setAiTyping(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 font-sans selection:bg-blue-200 antialiased overflow-x-hidden">
      
      {/* HEADER / NAVIGATION */}
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 transition-all duration-300">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-20">
            
            {/* Logo */}
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-3 cursor-pointer">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-600 to-blue-400 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 text-white font-bold text-xl">
                G
              </div>
              <div>
                <span className="font-extrabold text-2xl tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-700 to-blue-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
                  {t.brand}
                </span>
                <span className="block text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400 font-bold">
                  {t.tagline}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Desktop Nav */}
            <nav className="hidden lg:flex items-center space-x-8 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600">
              <a href="#about" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navAbout}</a>
              <a href="#promo" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navPromo}</a>
              <a href="#services" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navServices}</a>
              <a href="#calculator" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navInstallments}</a>
              <a href="#doctors" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navDoctors}</a>
              <a href="#articles" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navArticles}</a>
              <a href="#footer" className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{t.navContacts}</a>
            </nav>

            {/* Right Header Options */}
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
              {/* Language Switcher */}
              <button 
                onClick={toggleLang}
                className="flex items-center space-x-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 transition"
              >
                <Globe className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-blue-600" />
                <span>{lang.toUpperCase()}</span>
              </button>

              {/* Phone */}
              <a 
                href="tel:+74951234567" 
                className="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-2 text-slate-700 hover:text-blue-600 font-bold transition text-sm"
              >
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-50 flex items-center justify-center text-blue-600">
                  <Phone className="w-4 h-4" />
                </div>
                <span>+7 (495) 123-45-67</span>
              </a>

              {/* Book Button */}
              <button 
                onClick={() => setIsBookModalOpen(true)}
                className="relative group overflow-hidden bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-blue-600/25 transition duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] text-sm flex items-center space-x-2"
              >
                <span>{t.btnBook}</span>
                <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
              </button>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* HERO SECTION */}
      <section className="relative overflow-hidden pt-6 pb-20 md:pb-28">
        
        {/* Curved Blue Backdrop */}
        <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 via-blue-600 to-blue-700 text-white h-[680px] rounded-br-[80px] md:rounded-br-[220px] -z-10 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
          {/* Subtle light reflections */}
          <div className="absolute -top-40 -left-40 w-96 h-96 bg-blue-500 rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[120px] opacity-40"></div>
          <div className="absolute top-1/2 right-1/4 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-blue-400 rounded-full mix-blend-screen filter blur-[150px] opacity-30"></div>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
