                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-[#2b59ff] mb-2 block">Premium Cardiac</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Dolcia Ceain Cocle</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">
                                Deep visual cardiovascular telemetry processing mapping cardiac flow parameters in absolute real-time.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-slate-100/80 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STATUS: CALIBRATED</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Cardiovascular telemetry')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 2 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="oeonino noder genetic sequencing">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-indigo-100 flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-600">
                                <i data-lucide="dna" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-indigo-600 mb-2 block">Genomics</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Oeonino Noder</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">
                                Micro-molecular gene-sequencing engines mapped with generative intelligence to isolate structural faults.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-slate-100/80 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STATUS: DEPLOYED</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Molecular gene sequencing')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 3 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="notliaia morre cellular therapy">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 flex items-center justify-center text-emerald-600">
                                <i data-lucide="biohazard" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-emerald-600 mb-2 block">Cellular</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Notliaia Morre</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">
                                Advanced cellular-level regenerative modeling simulating long-term adaptation and cell survival rates.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-slate-100/80 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-emerald-500">STATUS: LIVE RHYTHM</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Cellular regeneration')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 4 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="oante hloier neuro diagnostics">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">

                                <i data-lucide="brain" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-amber-600 mb-2 block">Neurology</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Oante Hloier</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">

                            </p>

                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 5 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="mitof to noor oncology tracking">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-rose-100 flex items-center justify-center text-rose-600">
                                <i data-lucide="target" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-rose-600 mb-2 block">Oncology</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Mitof To Noor</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">
                                Advanced micro-tumor spatial intelligence systems to evaluate early tissue dynamics and metabolic states.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-slate-100/80 flex items-center justify-between">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STATUS: STANDBY</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Oncology Tissue Modeling')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 6 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="soanter neder microscopic profiling">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-teal-100 flex items-center justify-center text-teal-600">
                                <i data-lucide="microscope" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>

                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-teal-600 mb-2 block">Microbiology</span>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-[#2b59ff] transition-colors">Soanter Neder</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed font-light mb-4">
                                Microscopic fluid flow analytics displaying bacterial interaction rates under varying medical environments.
                            </p>
                        </div>

                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STATUS: ACTIVE FLUIDS</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Fluid Flow Diagnostics')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 7 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="mkuo mefived metabolic analytics">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-pink-100 flex items-center justify-center text-pink-600">
                                <i data-lucide="test-tube" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>

                            <span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-extrabold text-pink-600 mb-2 block">Metabolism</span>

                                Continuous glycemic and metabolic profiling algorithms designed to isolate early stage diabetic triggers.

                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 8 -->
                    <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-[24px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between group shadow-sm" data-service-name="comotil cclotstot pharmacology index">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                            <span class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-violet-100 flex items-center justify-center text-violet-600">
                                <i data-lucide="pill" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </span>
                            <button onclick="toggleFavorite(this)" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </button>

                            </p>

                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STATUS: CALIBRATING</span>
                            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:text-[#2b59ff] cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-1" onclick="viewServiceDetail('Pharmacology Kinetics')">Configure <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-3 h-3"></i></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- INTERACTIVE DIAGNOSTIC SIMULATOR SECTION -->
        <section id="diagnostics" class="w-full max-w-7xl px-6 md:px-12 py-24 relative">
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                
                <!-- Left Details Text Content -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-5">
                    <span class="text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-[#2b59ff] uppercase block mb-3">Live Telemetry Visualization</span>
                    <h2 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight mb-6">
                        Interact With Realtime Telemetry
                    </h2>
                    <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed font-light mb-8">
                        Experience the responsive diagnostic system. Select alternate medical branches to switch our deep generative models. Notice how the visual charts, response indicators, and output variables adapt automatically.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Interactive Department Buttons -->
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <button onclick="switchDiagnosticDept('neuro')" id="dept-btn-neuro" class="w-full p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-[#2b59ff] flex items-center gap-4 text-left transition-all shadow-sm">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-blue-100 flex items-center justify-center text-[#2b59ff]">
                                <i data-lucide="brain" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                            </span>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">Neural Sync Resonance</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Dynamic tracking of synapse density indicators</p>
                            </div>
                        </button>

                        <button onclick="switchDiagnosticDept('cardio')" id="dept-btn-cardio" class="w-full p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/40 hover:bg-white border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 flex items-center gap-4 text-left transition-all">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-rose-100 flex items-center justify-center text-rose-600">
                                <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                            </span>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">Arterial Fluid Pressure</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Pressure metrics mapped with micro-sensors</p>
                            </div>
                        </button>

                        <button onclick="switchDiagnosticDept('genetics')" id="dept-btn-genetics" class="w-full p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/40 hover:bg-white border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 flex items-center gap-4 text-left transition-all">
                            <span class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-purple-100 flex items-center justify-center text-purple-600">
                                <i data-lucide="dna" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                            </span>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-900">Genomic Sequencing Matrix</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Generative model tracing genetic variants</p>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Right Visual Telemetry Display Panel -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                    <div class="glass-card rounded-[32px] p-8 shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden">
                        
                        <!-- Top header for console panel -->
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between pb-6 mb-6 border-b border-slate-200/60">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-ping"></span>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 tracking-wider uppercase" id="diag-console-title">Neuro Sync Active</span>
                            </div>
                            <span class="text-xs font-semibold text-[#2b59ff]" id="telemetry-timer">Refreshed 0s ago</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Main Visualization Charts Area -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            
                            <!-- Large Circular Telemetry Progress Gauge -->
                            <div class="bg-white/70 border border-slate-100 p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center">
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-4">Core Signal Integrity</span>
                                
                                <div class="relative w-40 h-40 flex items-center justify-center">
                                    <!-- Simple SVG circular progress bar -->
                                    <svg class="w-full h-full transform -rotate-90">
                                        <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="65" stroke="#f1f5f9" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent" />
                                        <circle id="diag-circle-progress" cx="80" cy="80" r="65" stroke="#2b59ff" stroke-width="12" fill="transparent" stroke-dasharray="408" stroke-dashoffset="81" stroke-linecap="round" class="transition-all duration-1000" />
                                    </svg>
                                    <div class="absolute flex flex-col items-center">
                                        <span class="text-3xl font-black text-slate-900" id="diag-percentage-text">80%</span>
                                        <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400">STABLE FEED</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Diagnostic telemetry stat details -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col justify-between gap-4">
                                <div class="bg-white/70 border border-slate-100 p-5 rounded-2xl">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 block mb-1">Latency Index</span>
                                    <div class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-900" id="diag-stat-latency">4.2 ms</div>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-normal">Sensor data reflection latency across secure networks</p>
                                </div>

                                <div class="bg-white/70 border border-slate-100 p-5 rounded-2xl">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 block mb-1">Dynamic Entropy Scale</span>
                                    <div class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-slate-900" id="diag-stat-entropy">0.244 μs</div>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1 leading-normal">Systemic noise levels calculated in response pathways</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                        </div>

                        <!-- Interactive Diagnostic Test Switch -->
                        <div class="mt-8 p-5 bg-[#1a1d24] text-white rounded-2xl flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-bold">Inject Simulated Diagnostic Trigger</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-normal mt-0.5">Test real-time systemic adaptation response metrics</p>
                            </div>
                            <button onclick="triggerDiagPulse()" class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-[#2b59ff] hover:bg-[#1a2cfc] text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg transition-all shadow-md uppercase tracking-wider">
                                Pulse Signal
                            </button>
                        </div>

                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>

        </section>

        <!-- BOOKING / CONTACT FOOTER FORM SECTION -->
        <section id="contact" class="w-full bg-slate-100/90 border-t border-slate-200/60 py-24 relative overflow-hidden">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 relative z-10">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-stretch">
                    
                    <!-- Left Side Pitch -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col justify-between">
                        <div>
                            <span class="text-xs font-extrabold tracking-widest text-[#2b59ff] uppercase block mb-3">Reach Our Solutions Office</span>
                            <h2 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight leading-tight mb-6">
                                Experience Tomorrow's Medical Visualizers Today
                            </h2>
                            <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed font-light mb-8">
                                Connect with our technical integration engineers to learn how Aurelius Systems can augment your clinical diagnostic systems with responsive telemetry pipelines.
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Brand Statement mimicking bottom artwork elements -->
                        <div class="pt-8 border-t border-slate-300/60">
                            <h4 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900">Aurelius Integration Labs</h4>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">
                                Globally distributed healthcare infrastructure systems. Optimized in real-time.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Right Side Interactive Inquiry Form Card -->
                    <div class="lg:col-span-7">
                        <div class="glass-card rounded-[32px] p-8 md:p-10 shadow-lg">
                            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-6">Secure Diagnostic Access Request</h3>
                            
                            <!-- Success message state (hidden by default) -->
                            <div id="booking-success" class="hidden mb-6 p-5 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 rounded-2xl">
                                <h4 class="text-sm font-bold mb-1">Access Request Filed Successfully!</h4>
                                <p class="text-xs leading-normal">Your simulation credentials and clinical profile tracking key will be delivered to your email shortly.</p>
                            </div>

                            <form id="contact-form" onsubmit="handleFormSubmit(event)" class="space-y-5">
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
                                    <div>
                                        <label class="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-2">First Name</label>
                                        <input type="text" required placeholder="Alexander" class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white/70 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2b59ff]/20 focus:border-[#2b59ff] transition-all">
                                    </div>
                                    <div>
                                        <label class="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-2">Primary Speciality</label>
                                        <select class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white/70 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2b59ff]/20 focus:border-[#2b59ff] transition-all">
                                            <option>Cardiology Telemetry</option>
                                            <option>Neuro Resonance</option>
                                            <option>Molecular Biology</option>
                                            <option>Oncology Modeling</option>
                                            <option>System Integrations</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div>
                                    <label class="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-2">Work Email Address</label>
                                    <input type="email" required placeholder="alexander@medical-institutions.org" class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white/70 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2b59ff]/20 focus:border-[#2b59ff] transition-all">
                                </div>

                                <div>
                                    <label class="block text-xs font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-2">Message Description</label>
                                    <textarea rows="4" placeholder="Briefly describe your diagnostic visualization objectives..." class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-white/70 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2b59ff]/20 focus:border-[#2b59ff] transition-all resize-none"></textarea>
                                </div>

                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 py-2">
                                    <input type="checkbox" id="compliance-check" required class="w-4 h-4 rounded text-[#2b59ff] focus:ring-[#2b59ff]/20 accent-[#2b59ff]">
                                    <label for="compliance-check" class="text-xs text-slate-400">I consent to secure processing under medical regulatory parameters.</label>
                                </div>

                                <button type="submit" class="w-full py-4 bg-[#2b59ff] hover:bg-[#1a2cfc] text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-xl transition-all shadow-md uppercase tracking-wider">
                                    Submit Core Diagnostic Request
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- FOOTER SECTION (Styling exactly matching footer formatting of reference) -->
        <footer class="w-full bg-[#1a1d24] text-slate-400 py-16 px-6 md:px-12 border-t border-slate-800">
            <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col gap-12">
                
                <!-- Main Grid Section -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 pb-12 border-b border-slate-800/60">
                    
                    <!-- Left Section: Title and Bio -->
                    <div class="md:col-span-4 space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div class="w-8 h-8 bg-white/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-[#2b59ff]">
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-[#2b59ff]" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4.871 4A17.926 17.926 0 003 12c0 2.871.67 5.585 1.871 8m14.13 0a17.93 17.93 0 01-14.13 0m14.13 0A17.926 17.926 0 0021 12c0-2.871-.67-5.585-1.871-8m-14.13 0a17.93 17.93 0 0114.13 0M9 9h.01M15 9h.01M9 15h.01M15 15h.01" />
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <span class="text-lg font-bold text-white tracking-widest uppercase">Aurelius</span>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 max-w-sm leading-relaxed">
                            Pioneering micro-digital diagnostic visualizers and premium responsive interface frameworks for demanding medical networks worldwide.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Middle Column: Service Category A -->
                    <div class="md:col-span-3 space-y-4">
                        <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-slate-300 tracking-widest">Medical Services</h4>
                        <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs font-medium">
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Cardiovascular Diagnostic</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Genomics & Sequencing</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Cellular Adaptation Modeling</a></li>

                        </ul>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Middle Column: Service Category B -->
                    <div class="md:col-span-2 space-y-4">
                        <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-slate-300 tracking-widest">Global Support</h4>
                        <ul class="space-y-2 text-xs font-medium">
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Pharmacokinetics</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Oncology Modeling</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Fluid Analytics</a></li>
                            <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Developer Console</a></li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Right Column: Premium Contacts with custom alignment -->
                    <div class="md:col-span-3 space-y-4 flex flex-col justify-between">
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold uppercase text-slate-300 tracking-widest mb-2">Central Telephony</h4>
                            <span class="text-2xl font-black text-white block">4983-99020</span>
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-slate-500">Available 24/7 for urgent clinical support</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Premium Clean Social Media Icons mimicking alignment -->
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <a href="#" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-800 hover:bg-[#2b59ff] hover:text-white text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center transition-all">
                                <i data-lucide="twitter" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </a>
                            <a href="#" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-800 hover:bg-[#2b59ff] hover:text-white text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center transition-all">
                                <i data-lucide="facebook" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </a>
                            <a href="#" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-800 hover:bg-[#2b59ff] hover:text-white text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center transition-all">
                                <i data-lucide="instagram" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                            </a>
                            <a href="#" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-800 hover:bg-[#2b59ff] hover:text-white text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center transition-all">
