                </div>

                <!-- Footer Fine Print -->
                <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">
                    <span>© 2026 Aurelius Health System. Developed for absolute design fidelity.</span>
                    <div class="flex gap-6">
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">Privacy Shield</a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">HIPAA Compliance</a>
                        <a href="#" class="hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">System Diagnostics</a>
                    </div>
                </div>

            </div>
        </footer>

    </div>

    <!-- SCRIPT FOR DYNAMIC INTERACTIONS -->
    <script>
        // Initiate Lucide Icons
        lucide.createIcons();

        // Preset data and state
        let currentBPM = 74;
        let simulationActive = true;
        let activeDept = 'neuro';
        const themes = ['theme-deep-blue', 'theme-aurora', 'theme-sunset'];
        let currentThemeIndex = 0;

        // Diagnostic Data Store
        const diagnosticDepts = {
            neuro: {
                title: "Neural Sync Resonance",
                consoleTitle: "Neuro Sync Active",
                percentage: 80,
                latency: "4.2 ms",
                entropy: "0.244 μs",
                statusText: "Stable neuronal synapses synced successfully."
            },
            cardio: {
                title: "Arterial Fluid Pressure",
                consoleTitle: "Arterial Engine Engaged",
                percentage: 92,
                latency: "2.1 ms",
                entropy: "0.108 μs",
                statusText: "Fluid pressure telemetry calibrated successfully."
            },
            genetics: {
                title: "Genomic Sequencing Matrix",
                consoleTitle: "Genomic Engine Sequenced",
                percentage: 67,
                latency: "12.8 ms",
                entropy: "0.591 μs",
                statusText: "Genetic variant sequencing mapped successfully."
            }
        };

        // Live cardiac simulator
        setInterval(() => {
            if (simulationActive) {
                // Modulate cardiac BPM slightly
                const variation = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) - 2;
                currentBPM = Math.min(Math.max(currentBPM + variation, 60), 120);
                document.getElementById('live-bpm').innerText = `${currentBPM} BPM`;
            }
        }, 1500);

        // Adjust heart rate manually
        function adjustBPM(amount) {
            currentBPM = Math.min(Math.max(currentBPM + amount, 60), 120);
            document.getElementById('live-bpm').innerText = `${currentBPM} BPM`;
            triggerNotification(`Cardiac Telemetry forced override: ${currentBPM} BPM`);
        }

        // Live Telemetry Duration timer
        let lastRefreshSeconds = 0;
        setInterval(() => {
            lastRefreshSeconds++;
            document.getElementById('telemetry-timer').innerText = `Refreshed ${lastRefreshSeconds}s ago`;
        }, 1000);

        // Slider logic
        const slider = document.getElementById('biometric-slider');
        const telemetryPercentage = document.getElementById('telemetry-percentage');
        const sliderStatus = document.getElementById('slider-status');

        slider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            const val = e.target.value;
            telemetryPercentage.innerText = `Level: ${val}%`;
            
            if (val < 35) {
                sliderStatus.innerText = "Symptom Warning: Critical threshold low";
                sliderStatus.previousElementSibling.className = "w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-rose-500";
            } else if (val < 75) {
                sliderStatus.innerText = "Systemic adaptation sequence ongoing";
                sliderStatus.previousElementSibling.className = "w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500";
            } else {
                sliderStatus.innerText = "System load balanced";
                sliderStatus.previousElementSibling.className = "w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#2b59ff]";
            }
        });

        function triggerSliderAction() {
            const currentValue = slider.value;
            triggerNotification(`Biometric calibration locked at ${currentValue}%. Sync completed successfully.`);
        }

        // Toggle simulation engines
        function toggleSimState() {
            simulationActive = !simulationActive;
            triggerNotification(simulationActive ? 'Cardiac simulation engine restarted.' : 'Cardiac simulation engine suspended.');
        }

        function resetTelemetry() {
            currentBPM = 74;
            document.getElementById('live-bpm').innerText = "74 BPM";
            slider.value = 80;
            telemetryPercentage.innerText = "Level: 80%";
            sliderStatus.innerText = "System load balanced";
            sliderStatus.previousElementSibling.className = "w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#2b59ff]";
            triggerNotification("Systemic diagnostic telemetries restored to factory metrics.");
        }

        // Dose scheduler pill selector
        function setSchedule(num) {
            const buttons = [
                document.getElementById('sched-1'),
                document.getElementById('sched-2'),
                document.getElementById('sched-3')
            ];
            const descriptions = [
                "First sequence: Morning high-density neuroprotection release vector.",
                "Second sequence: Afternoon balanced hormonal calibration agent.",
                "Third sequence: Evening metabolic repair and restorative cellular cycle."
            ];

            buttons.forEach((btn, index) => {
                if (index === num - 1) {
                    btn.className = "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#2b59ff] text-white text-xs font-bold transition-all";
                } else {
                    btn.className = "px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all";
                }
            });

            document.getElementById('schedule-desc').innerText = descriptions[num - 1];
            triggerNotification(`Dosage timeline calibrated to ${buttons[num-1].innerText}`);
        }

        // Search filtering logic for Services
        function filterServices() {
            const q = document.getElementById('service-search').value.toLowerCase();
            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('#services-grid > div');
            
            cards.forEach(card => {
                const nameAttr = card.getAttribute('data-service-name');
                if (nameAttr.includes(q)) {
                    card.style.display = 'flex';
                } else {
                    card.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }

        // Favorites toggle system
        function toggleFavorite(button) {
            const isFaved = button.classList.contains('text-rose-500');
            const icon = button.querySelector('svg');
            
            if (isFaved) {
                button.className = "w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200/80 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 transition-colors";
                triggerNotification("Service removed from customized observation panel.");
            } else {
                button.className = "w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-rose-50 hover:bg-rose-100 flex items-center justify-center text-rose-500 transition-colors";
                triggerNotification("Service pinned directly to core dashboard telemetry.");
            }
        }

        // Switch Diagnostics tabs
        function switchDiagnosticDept(deptKey) {
            activeDept = deptKey;
            const config = diagnosticDepts[deptKey];
            
            // Highlight current button
            const buttons = {
                neuro: document.getElementById('dept-btn-neuro'),
                cardio: document.getElementById('dept-btn-cardio'),
                genetics: document.getElementById('dept-btn-genetics')
            };

            Object.keys(buttons).forEach(key => {
                const btn = buttons[key];
                if (key === deptKey) {
                    btn.className = "w-full p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-[#2b59ff] flex items-center gap-4 text-left transition-all shadow-sm";
                } else {
                    btn.className = "w-full p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/40 hover:bg-white border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 flex items-center gap-4 text-left transition-all";
                }
            });

            // Update visuals
            document.getElementById('diag-console-title').innerText = config.consoleTitle;
            document.getElementById('diag-percentage-text').innerText = `${config.percentage}%`;
            document.getElementById('diag-stat-latency').innerText = config.latency;
            document.getElementById('diag-stat-entropy').innerText = config.entropy;

            // Animate Circle Graph
            // Circumference of 65px radius circle is 2 * PI * 65 = ~408px
            const offset = 408 - (408 * config.percentage / 100);
            document.getElementById('diag-circle-progress').setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset', offset);

            lastRefreshSeconds = 0;
            document.getElementById('telemetry-timer').innerText = `Refreshed 0s ago`;
            triggerNotification(config.statusText);
        }

        // Pulse action in diagnostics
        function triggerDiagPulse() {
            triggerNotification(`Pulsing test signals. Review latency fluctuations below...`);
            const latencyElement = document.getElementById('diag-stat-latency');
            const prevLatencyVal = latencyElement.innerText;
            latencyElement.innerText = "CALIBRATING...";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                const randomLatency = (Math.random() * 8 + 1).toFixed(1);
                latencyElement.innerText = `${randomLatency} ms`;
            }, 800);
        }

        // Form Submission System
        function handleFormSubmit(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById('contact-form').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('booking-success').classList.remove('hidden');
            triggerNotification("Clinical profile successfully integrated.");
        }

        // Dynamic theme glow switcher
        function toggleTheme() {
            const body = document.body;
            body.classList.remove(themes[currentThemeIndex]);
            currentThemeIndex = (currentThemeIndex + 1) % themes.length;
            body.classList.add(themes[currentThemeIndex]);
            
            const currentThemeName = themes[currentThemeIndex].replace('theme-', '').replace('-', ' ');
            triggerNotification(`Ambient glow theme updated to ${currentThemeName.toUpperCase()}.`);
        }

        // Scroll helper
        function scrollToElement(id) {
            document.getElementById(id).scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }

        // View single service detail callback
        function viewServiceDetail(serviceName) {
            triggerNotification(`Initiated interactive sandbox module for: ${serviceName}`);
        }

        // Notifications helper
        function triggerNotification(message) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('service-toast');
            const messageField = document.getElementById('toast-message');
            messageField.innerText = message;
            toast.classList.remove('hidden');
            
            // Auto hide after 6 seconds
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.classList.add('hidden');
            }, 6000);
        }

        function closeToast() {
            document.getElementById('service-toast').classList.add('hidden');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
2I
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Apin57 — Your Partner in Smarter Financial Decisions</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts: Plus Jakarta Sans for ultra-modern look -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Sora:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- FontAwesome for Premium Icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        brand: {
                            bg: '#f3f4ec', // Primary off-white cream background
                            bgDarker: '#eaece2', // Slightly darker cream for contrast
                            forest: '#0f3d23', // Deep forest/dark green accent
                            forestLight: '#185c36', // Lighter forest green
                            lime: '#a3e635', // Vibrant neon-lime green
                            limeHover: '#8be314',
                            emerald: '#059669',
                            darkCard: '#141816', // Dark interface color
                        }
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['"Plus Jakarta Sans"', 'sans-serif'],
                        sora: ['"Sora"', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    boxShadow: {
                        'premium': '0 25px 60px -15px rgba(15, 61, 35, 0.08)',
                        'cardGlow': '0 0 40px rgba(163, 230, 53, 0.15)',
                        'emeraldGlow': '0 20px 40px rgba(15, 61, 35, 0.12)',
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>

    <style>
        /* Custom Animations and Complex Gradients */
        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(0deg); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(1deg); }
        }
        @keyframes orbit {
            0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        @keyframes pulse-slow {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.2; transform: scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1.05); }
        }
        .animate-float {
            animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .animate-float-delayed {
            animation: float 8s ease-in-out infinite;
            animation-delay: 2s;
        }
        .animate-orbit-slow {
            animation: orbit 120s linear infinite;
        }
        .animate-pulse-slow {
            animation: pulse-slow 8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* 3D Perspective Setup for Cards */
        .perspective-lg {
            perspective: 1000px;
        }
        .preserve-3d {
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            transition: transform 0.15s ease-out;
        }

        /* Custom Scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f3f4ec;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #0f3d23;
            border-radius: 999px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-brand-bg text-brand-forest antialiased min-h-screen relative overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-brand-lime selection:text-brand-forest">

    <!-- Global Background Elements (Ambient lighting & Orbits) -->
    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[80vw] h-[80vw] max-w-[1200px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-bl from-brand-lime/10 via-brand-forest/5 to-transparent filter blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none"></div>
    <div class="absolute top-[40%] left-[-200px] w-[600px] h-[600px] rounded-full bg-brand-lime/5 filter blur-[100px] -z-10 pointer-events-none"></div>

    <!-- NOTIFICATION SYSTEM (Custom Premium Modal Toast) -->
    <div id="toast" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-brand-forest text-white px-6 py-4 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex items-center gap-3 border border-brand-lime/20 transform translate-y-24 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 pointer-events-none">
        <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-brand-forest">
            <i class="fa-solid id-badge fa-check font-bold"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
            <p class="font-bold text-sm text-brand-lime" id="toast-title">Notification</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-300" id="toast-msg">Action performed successfully.</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODAL POPUP FOR CONVENIENCE (WATCH VIDEO SIMULATION) -->
    <div id="videoModal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-brand-forest/80 backdrop-blur-md z-50 flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 pointer-events-none transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="bg-brand-bg text-brand-forest rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 max-w-2xl w-full mx-4 border border-brand-forest/10 shadow-2xl relative">
            <button onclick="toggleVideoModal(false)" class="absolute top-6 right-6 w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-brand-forest/5 hover:bg-brand-forest/10 flex items-center justify-center text-xl transition-all">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>
            </button>
            <div class="mb-6">
                <span class="bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime text-xs font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider">Product Showcase</span>
                <h3 class="text-3xl font-bold font-sora mt-3">Welcome to Apin57</h3>
                <p class="text-sm text-brand-forest/70 mt-1">Discover how our dynamic cards, predictive wallets, and real-time planning tools adapt to your financial style.</p>
            </div>
            <!-- Dynamic Simulated Player -->
            <div class="relative aspect-video rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-brand-forest flex flex-col justify-between p-6 group shadow-lg border border-brand-lime/10">
                <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent z-10"></div>
                <!-- Abstract visual art simulation inside video player -->
                <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-40">
                    <div class="w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-brand-lime border-4 border-brand-lime/30 animate-pulse-slow"></div>
                    <div class="w-96 h-96 absolute rounded-full border border-dashed border-white/20 animate-spin-slow"></div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="z-20 self-end w-full flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-white text-lg font-bold">Smart Onboarding Video</p>
                        <p class="text-brand-lime text-xs">Apin57 Platform • 1 min 24 secs</p>
                    </div>
                    <button onclick="playSimulation(this)" class="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-brand-lime text-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-brand-lime/20">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-play text-xl ml-1"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="mt-6 flex justify-end gap-3">
                <button onclick="toggleVideoModal(false)" class="px-6 py-3 rounded-full bg-brand-forest text-white text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forestLight transition-all">Close Window</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- HEADER / NAVIGATION -->
    <header class="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex items-center justify-between relative z-40">
        <!-- Brand Logo (Apin57 Style) -->
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 group">
            <div class="flex items-center">
                <!-- SVG styled precisely matching Apin57 brand structure -->
                <svg width="44" height="44" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="group-hover:rotate-[10deg] transition-transform duration-300">
                    <rect width="100" height="100" rx="26" fill="#0f3d23"/>
                    <path d="M30 65V35H45C52 35 56 39 56 46C56 53 52 57 45 57H38V65H30ZM38 49H45C48 49 49.5 48 49.5 46C49.5 44 48 43 45 43H38V49Z" fill="#a3e635"/>
                    <path d="M68 35L54 65H60L74 35H68Z" fill="#a3e635"/>
                    <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="45" stroke="#a3e635" stroke-opacity="0.15" stroke-width="4"/>
                </svg>
                <div class="ml-3 flex flex-col justify-center">
                    <span class="font-sora text-2xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-brand-forest">APIN<span class="text-brand-lime filter drop-shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(15,61,35,0.2)]">57</span></span>
                    <span class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.3em] font-semibold text-brand-forest/50 leading-none mt-1">Smart Wealth</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Desktop Navigation Menu -->
        <nav class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1 bg-brand-bgDarker/60 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-2 rounded-full border border-brand-forest/5 shadow-inner">
            <a href="#features" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">Features</a>
            <a href="#how-it-works" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">How it Works</a>
            <a href="#pricing" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">Pricing</a>
            <a href="#about" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">About</a>
            <a href="#testimonials" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">Testimonials</a>
            <a href="#contact" class="px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300">Contact</a>
        </nav>

        <!-- Right Buttons -->
        <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
            <a href="#wallet" class="hidden sm:inline-block text-sm font-semibold hover:text-emerald-700 transition-colors">Log In</a>
            <button onclick="triggerCTA()" class="bg-transparent border border-brand-forest text-brand-forest px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold hover:bg-brand-forest hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-sm">
                Get Started
            </button>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- MAIN BODY CONTAINER -->
    <main class="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pt-10 pb-24">
        
        <!-- HERO SECTION -->
        <section class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center min-h-[75vh]">
            <!-- Hero Left: Text Content & Tags -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-8 flex flex-col justify-center">
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-brand-forest/5 border border-brand-forest/5 pl-3 pr-4 py-1.5 rounded-full max-w-fit">
                    <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-brand-lime animate-ping"></span>
                    <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-brand-lime absolute"></span>
                    <span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-brand-forest/80 ml-1">v2.5 Platform Online</span>
                </div>

                <h1 class="text-5xl md:text-6xl xl:text-7xl font-bold font-sora tracking-tight leading-[1.08] text-brand-forest">
                    Your Partner in Smarter <span class="bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-forestLight to-brand-emerald bg-clip-text text-transparent">Financial</span> <br>
                    <span class="relative inline-block mt-1">
                        <span class="relative z-10 text-brand-forest">Decisions</span>
                        <!-- Abstract underline vector simulation -->
                        <span class="absolute bottom-1.5 left-0 w-full h-3 bg-brand-lime/40 rounded-full -z-10 transform scale-x-105"></span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <p class="text-base md:text-lg text-brand-forest/70 max-w-lg leading-relaxed font-sans">
                    Take control of your money with tools designed to help you save more, invest wisely, and plan ahead — effortlessly.
                </p>

                <!-- Hero Action Buttons -->
                <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4">
                    <button onclick="triggerCTA()" class="bg-brand-lime hover:bg-brand-limeHover text-brand-forest px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold shadow-premium hover:shadow-brand-lime/20 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-2">
                        Talk to an Expert
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right text-xs"></i>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="toggleVideoModal(true)" class="group flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-forest/5 transition-all">
                        <div class="w-11 h-11 rounded-full border border-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-sm group-hover:bg-brand-forest group-hover:text-white transition-all">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-play"></i>
                        </div>
                        <span class="font-bold text-sm">Watch Video</span>
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- Custom Dividers & Filter Tags (Direct copy of aesthetic tags from image) -->
                <div class="pt-6 space-y-4 border-t border-brand-forest/10">
                    <p class="text-xs uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-brand-forest/50">Explore Dynamic Analytics</p>
                    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2.5" id="hero-tags">
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('insights', this)" class="tag-btn active px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest text-white bg-brand-forest shadow-sm hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Market Insights
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('invest', this)" class="tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Invest
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('grow', this)" class="tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Grow
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('plan', this)" class="tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Plan
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('budget', this)" class="tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Budget
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="filterMetrics('tips', this)" class="tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">
                            Expert Tips
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Hero Right: Interactive 3D Orbit Graphics -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-6 relative h-[600px] flex items-center justify-center">
                <!-- Glowing central backdrop -->
                <div class="absolute w-[450px] h-[450px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-lime/20 via-transparent to-brand-emerald/10 animate-pulse-slow filter blur-3xl"></div>

                <!-- Orbit lines (SVG matching design precision) -->
                <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                    <div class="absolute w-[500px] h-[500px] rounded-full border border-brand-forest/5 animate-orbit-slow flex items-center justify-center">
                        <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/2 -ml-2 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-brand-lime shadow-premium"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute w-[360px] h-[360px] rounded-full border border-dashed border-brand-forest/10 animate-spin-slow"></div>
                </div>

                <!-- Dynamic Live Interactive Cards with Tilt Support -->
                <div class="relative w-full max-w-[480px] h-[400px] perspective-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    
                    <!-- Floating Widget 1: Statistics Micro-Widget -->
                    <div class="absolute top-4 left-6 z-30 bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-premium border border-brand-forest/5 w-48 transition-all hover:scale-105" id="stats-mini-widget">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-3">
                            <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-brand-forest/60 uppercase tracking-widest">Live Performance</span>
                            <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-end gap-1.5 h-14" id="stats-bars">
                            <!-- Dynamically controlled stats bars -->
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-t-sm h-[40%]" title="Jan"></div>
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-t-sm h-[65%]" title="Feb"></div>
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-t-sm h-[50%]" title="Mar"></div>
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-lime rounded-t-sm h-[85%] relative" title="Apr">
                                <span class="absolute top-[-15px] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 text-[8px] font-bold">+85%</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-forest rounded-t-sm h-[70%]" title="May"></div>
                            <div class="w-full bg-brand-forestLight rounded-t-sm h-[95%]" title="Jun"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mt-3 flex justify-between text-[10px] font-semibold text-brand-forest/50">
                            <span>Q1 Metrics</span>
                            <span id="metric-value" class="text-brand-forestLight font-bold">$34,204.00</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- CARD 1: Forest/Vibrant Teal Card with Mouse Hover Tilt -->
                    <div id="card-forest" class="absolute w-[290px] h-[180px] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0c2b1a] to-[#124d2c] rounded-[1.5rem] p-5 text-white shadow-emeraldGlow z-20 border border-white/10 preserve-3d cursor-pointer transform -rotate-12 translate-x-[-40px] translate-y-[-20px] hover:translate-y-[-30px] transition-transform duration-300">
                        <div class="h-full flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] uppercase opacity-60 tracking-wider">Apin Platinum</p>
                                    <h4 class="text-xs font-semibold mt-0.5">VISA Gold</h4>
                                </div>
                                <svg class="w-10 h-7" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                    <circle cx="7" cy="12" r="7" fill="#F97316" fill-opacity="0.9"/>
                                    <circle cx="17" cy="12" r="7" fill="#F59E0B" fill-opacity="0.8"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <div class="my-3">
                                <p class="text-base font-mono tracking-widest">5337 8662 4901 3294</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[8px] uppercase opacity-50 tracking-wider">Card Holder</p>
                                    <p class="text-xs font-bold font-sora">Maria Smith</p>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[8px] uppercase opacity-50 tracking-wider">Expiry</p>
                                    <p class="text-xs font-bold">10/31</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- CARD 2: Neon Lime Card (Highly prominent, placed dynamically below) -->
                    <div id="card-lime" class="absolute w-[290px] h-[180px] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#a3e635] via-[#86efac] to-[#a3e635] rounded-[1.5rem] p-5 text-brand-forest shadow-premium z-10 border border-white/40 preserve-3d cursor-pointer transform rotate-6 translate-x-[40px] translate-y-[50px] hover:translate-y-[40px] transition-transform duration-300">
                        <div class="h-full flex flex-col justify-between">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-extrabold opacity-70 tracking-wider">Apin Premium</p>
                                    <h4 class="text-xs font-extrabold mt-0.5">VISA Infinite</h4>
                                </div>
                                <i class="fa-solid fa-wifi text-lg opacity-80"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div class="my-3">
                                <p class="text-base font-bold font-mono tracking-widest text-brand-forest/90">5337 8662 4901 3294</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[8px] uppercase font-bold opacity-60 tracking-wider">Card Holder</p>
                                    <p class="text-xs font-black font-sora">Bianca Taylor</p>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <p class="text-[8px] uppercase font-bold opacity-60 tracking-wider">Expiry</p>
                                    <p class="text-xs font-black">03/24</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Decorative Floating UI Badges -->
                    <div class="absolute bottom-6 left-12 z-30 bg-brand-forest text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all text-xs">
                        <div class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] text-brand-forest">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-up"></i>
                        </div>
                        <span class="font-bold">Income Tracking</span>
                        <span class="text-brand-lime font-black">+14.2%</span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="absolute top-1/2 right-4 z-30 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg text-brand-forest hover:scale-110 transition-all cursor-pointer" onclick="toggleActiveStats()">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-chart-pie"></i>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- BRAND LOGO MARQUEE (PARTNER COMPANIES) -->
        <section class="py-16 border-t border-b border-brand-forest/10 mt-12 bg-brand-bgDarker/40 rounded-[2.5rem] px-8">
            <p class="text-center text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-brand-forest/50 mb-10">Trusted &amp; Integrated with the Best</p>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-8 items-center justify-center opacity-80">
                <!-- Plaid Logo Style SVG -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 group cursor-pointer">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-shuffle text-2xl text-brand-forest group-hover:text-brand-emerald transition-colors"></i>
                    <span class="font-sora font-extrabold text-xl group-hover:text-brand-emerald transition-colors">PLAID</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Visa Modern SVG -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 group cursor-pointer">
                    <i class="fa-brands fa-cc-visa text-3xl text-brand-forest group-hover:text-blue-700 transition-colors"></i>
                    <span class="font-sans font-black text-xl italic group-hover:text-blue-700 transition-colors">VISA</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Mastercard Modern SVG -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 group cursor-pointer">
                    <i class="fa-brands fa-cc-mastercard text-3xl text-brand-forest group-hover:text-orange-500 transition-colors"></i>
                    <span class="font-sans font-bold text-lg group-hover:text-orange-500 transition-colors">Mastercard</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Forbes SVG-like text -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center group cursor-pointer">
                    <span class="font-serif font-black text-2xl tracking-tighter text-brand-forest group-hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity">Forbes</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Deloitte style text -->
                <div class="flex items-center justify-center group cursor-pointer">
                    <span class="font-sans font-extrabold text-xl tracking-tight text-brand-forest group-hover:text-emerald-600 transition-colors">Deloitte<span class="text-brand-lime text-2xl leading-none">.</span></span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- PRODUCT PHILOSOPHY & SUB-HERO -->
        <section id="features" class="py-24 space-y-16">
            <div class="max-w-4xl space-y-6">
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime text-xs font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Features
                </div>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold font-sora tracking-tight leading-snug">
                    Achieve <span class="text-brand-emerald">financial clarity</span> and take control of your future with tools designed to simplify, streamline, and personalize your <span class="bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-emerald to-brand-forestLight bg-clip-text text-transparent">money management</span> — all in one secure platform.
                </h2>
                <p class="text-brand-forest/60 max-w-xl text-sm font-semibold">Everything you need, nothing you don't. Experience intelligent planning that adjusts dynamically to your transaction flows.</p>
            </div>

            <!-- FEATURE GRID CARDS (Matching aesthetic color layout & illustrations) -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
                <!-- Feature Card 1: Visual Art Style Card -->
                <div class="bg-brand-lime/30 rounded-[2rem] p-8 border border-brand-lime/40 flex flex-col justify-between h-[420px] shadow-sm hover:shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 group">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-md">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-wallet"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-sora">Dynamic Wallet Adaptability</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-brand-forest/80 leading-relaxed">Instantly adjust cards, thresholds, and limits to customize your dynamic daily transactions with zero delay.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Minimal simulated aesthetic vector illustration of hand holding wallet -->
                    <div class="relative w-full h-32 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest/5 border border-brand-forest/10 overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center mt-6">
                        <div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-brand-lime/80 absolute -bottom-4 -left-4 animate-pulse-slow"></div>
                        <div class="w-24 h-16 bg-brand-forest rounded-xl z-10 flex flex-col justify-between p-3 text-white shadow-lg">
                            <div class="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-brand-lime/40"></div>
                            <div class="h-1.5 w-12 bg-white/20 rounded"></div>
                        </div>
                        <!-- Tiny coin SVGs -->
                        <div class="absolute right-8 top-6 text-brand-forest opacity-30 text-xl"><i class="fa-solid fa-coins animate-float"></i></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Feature Card 2: Green Gradient Aesthetic Card -->
                <div class="bg-brand-forest text-white rounded-[2rem] p-8 border border-brand-forestLight/20 flex flex-col justify-between h-[420px] shadow-emeraldGlow hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-brand-lime/10 rounded-full filter blur-xl pointer-events-none"></div>
                    <div class="space-y-4 z-10">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-lime text-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-md">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-sora">Automated Budgeting &amp; Alerts</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-white/80 leading-relaxed">Create custom budgets and get real-time alerts to stay on track every month with automated intelligence.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Minimal Abstract Chart Representation -->
                    <div class="mt-6 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl p-4 border border-white/10 z-10">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-brand-lime font-bold mb-2">
                            <span>Dynamic Budget Limit</span>
                            <span>78% Met</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="w-full bg-white/10 h-2.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                            <div class="bg-brand-lime h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-1000" style="width: 78%;"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mt-3 flex gap-2 text-[10px] text-white/60 font-semibold justify-between">
                            <span>Spent: $3,240</span>
                            <span class="text-brand-lime">Remaining: $860</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Feature Card 3: Soft Cream Minimal Card -->
                <div class="bg-[#eaece2] rounded-[2rem] p-8 border border-brand-forest/5 flex flex-col justify-between h-[420px] shadow-sm hover:shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 group">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-md">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-grip-vertical"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-sora">Unified Account Dashboard</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-brand-forest/80 leading-relaxed">View all your bank accounts, credit cards, and transactions in one completely intuitive and modern environment.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Interactive Visual Dashboard mockup element -->
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-brand-forest/5 shadow-inner space-y-2 mt-6">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                            <span class="font-bold text-brand-forest">Checking Acct</span>
                            <span class="text-emerald-600 font-bold">$12,401.90</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="h-[1px] bg-brand-forest/5 w-full"></div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs">
                            <span class="font-bold text-brand-forest">Investment Index</span>
                            <span class="text-emerald-600 font-bold">$41,080.45</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Feature Card 4: Light Accent Yellowish/Lime Highlight Card -->
                <div class="bg-brand-lime/10 rounded-[2rem] p-8 border border-brand-lime/20 flex flex-col justify-between h-[420px] shadow-sm hover:shadow-premium hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 group">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-md">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold font-sora">Personalized Insights</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-brand-forest/80 leading-relaxed">Get smart, actionable advice based on your precise spending habits, monthly goals, and long term investments.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Dynamic Tip Trigger simulation -->
                    <div class="bg-brand-forest text-white rounded-2xl p-4 space-y-2 text-xs mt-6 border border-brand-forestLight/20 relative overflow-hidden">
                        <span class="absolute top-[-10px] right-[-10px] text-brand-lime/10 text-6xl font-black font-sora">$</span>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-brand-lime font-bold">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-lightbulb"></i>
                            <span>Apin Intelligence</span>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-white/80 leading-relaxed font-semibold">"Reduce dining expense by 4% to achieve your 'Vacation Fund' goal 12 days faster!"</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- INTERACTIVE ROI PLANNER / GROWTH CALCULATOR (Premium Add-On Section) -->
        <section class="py-16 bg-[#eaece2]/60 rounded-[3rem] border border-brand-forest/5 px-8 md:px-12 my-12 relative overflow-hidden">
            <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[400px] h-[400px] bg-brand-lime/10 rounded-full filter blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
                <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
                    <span class="bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime text-xs font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider">Growth Planner</span>
                    <h3 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold font-sora tracking-tight leading-snug">Calculate your wealth trajectory in seconds</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm text-brand-forest/70 leading-relaxed">Adjust your initial balance and recurring monthly deposits to see the compound intelligence of investing with Apin57's automated market models.</p>
                    
                    <!-- Dynamic inputs -->
                    <div class="space-y-5 pt-4">
                        <div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between text-xs font-bold text-brand-forest uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
                                <span>Initial Investment</span>
                                <span class="text-brand-emerald text-sm" id="val-initial">$10,000</span>
                            </div>
                            <input id="range-initial" type="range" min="1000" max="100000" step="1000" value="10000" class="w-full h-2 bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-brand-forest" oninput="calculateWealth()">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between text-xs font-bold text-brand-forest uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
                                <span>Monthly Contribution</span>
                                <span class="text-brand-emerald text-sm" id="val-monthly">$500</span>
                            </div>
                            <input id="range-monthly" type="range" min="50" max="5000" step="50" value="500" class="w-full h-2 bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-brand-forest" oninput="calculateWealth()">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between text-xs font-bold text-brand-forest uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
                                <span>Time Horizon (Years)</span>
                                <span class="text-brand-emerald text-sm" id="val-years">10 Years</span>
                            </div>
                            <input id="range-years" type="range" min="1" max="30" step="1" value="10" class="w-full h-2 bg-brand-forest/10 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-brand-forest" oninput="calculateWealth()">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Calculator Display -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-7 bg-brand-forest text-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-8 md:p-10 shadow-premium relative overflow-hidden border border-brand-forestLight/20">
                    <div class="absolute -top-12 -right-12 w-48 h-48 bg-brand-lime/10 rounded-full filter blur-2xl"></div>
                    
                    <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-6 mb-8 pb-8 border-b border-white/10">
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-brand-lime">Estimated Total Wealth</p>
                            <h4 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black font-sora tracking-tight text-white mt-1" id="wealth-result">$112,492.00</h4>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-2xl text-xs">
                            <p class="text-white/60">Total Profit Earned</p>
                            <p class="text-brand-lime font-black text-lg mt-0.5" id="profit-result">$42,492.00</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Dynamic SVG Line Chart Simulation -->
                    <div class="relative w-full h-48 bg-white/5 rounded-2xl p-4 overflow-hidden border border-white/10">
                        <div class="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col justify-between p-4 opacity-10 pointer-events-none">
                            <div class="w-full h-[1px] bg-white"></div>
                            <div class="w-full h-[1px] bg-white"></div>
                            <div class="w-full h-[1px] bg-white"></div>
                        </div>
                        <!-- SVG line drawn dynamically by JS code -->
                        <svg id="wealth-chart" class="w-full h-full" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none">
                            <path id="chart-path" d="M 0 90 Q 25 75, 50 60 T 100 20" fill="none" stroke="#a3e635" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"></path>
                            <!-- Fill Area -->
                            <path id="chart-fill" d="M 0 90 Q 25 75, 50 60 T 100 20 L 100 100 L 0 100 Z" fill="url(#lime-gradient)" opacity="0.15"></path>
                            
                            <defs>
                                <linearGradient id="lime-gradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
                                    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#a3e635" />
                                    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#a3e635" stop-opacity="0" />
                                </linearGradient>
                            </defs>
                        </svg>
                        
                        <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-4 text-[9px] font-bold text-white/50">Year 0</div>
                        <div class="absolute bottom-2 right-4 text-[9px] font-bold text-white/50" id="chart-year-label">Year 10</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mt-6 flex flex-wrap gap-4 justify-between items-center text-xs">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-brand-lime"></div>
                            <span class="text-white/80 font-semibold">Assuming 8.2% annual growth rate</span>
                        </div>
                        <button onclick="saveProjection()" class="bg-brand-lime hover:bg-brand-limeHover text-brand-forest font-bold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-bookmark text-[10px]"></i>
                            Save Projection
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- INTERACTIVE WALLET SYSTEM (3 Easy Steps to Start) -->
        <section id="how-it-works" class="py-24 space-y-16">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
                
                <!-- Wallet interactive widget (Left side) -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 relative flex justify-center lg:justify-start" id="wallet">
                    <!-- Subtle Glow Ring surrounding wallet -->
                    <div class="absolute w-[440px] h-[440px] rounded-full bg-brand-lime/10 border-4 border-dashed border-brand-lime/20 animate-spin-slow"></div>
                    
                    <!-- THE WIDGET (Direct Replication from image style with complete interactive mechanics) -->
                    <div class="relative w-full max-w-[420px] bg-[#141816] text-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-7 md:p-8 shadow-2xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden">
                        
                        <!-- Top Header inside card widget -->
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-8">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-2.5">
                                <div class="w-8 h-5 rounded bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10">
                                    <span class="text-[9px] font-bold">USD</span>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-xs font-bold text-white/70">US Dollar Available Balance</span>
                            </div>
                            <!-- Eye Mask Toggle -->
                            <button onclick="toggleBalanceMask()" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-sm hover:bg-white/10 transition-all text-slate-300" title="Mask Account Balance">
                                <i id="mask-icon" class="fa-regular fa-eye-slash"></i>
                            </button>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Current Balance Dynamic Value -->
                        <div class="space-y-1 mb-8 relative">
                            <p class="text-xs uppercase font-extrabold tracking-widest text-brand-lime/80">Available Total Balance</p>
                            <h3 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black font-sora tracking-tight mt-1 transition-all duration-300" id="wallet-balance">$ 47,586.32</h3>
                        </div>

                        <!-- QUICK ACTIONS BAR -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-8">
                            <button onclick="openActionModal('request')" class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl py-3.5 px-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all group">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-lime text-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold group-hover:scale-110 transition-all">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-down"></i>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-[11px] font-bold">Request</span>
                            </button>
                            <button onclick="openActionModal('transfer')" class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl py-3.5 px-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all group">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-lime text-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold group-hover:scale-110 transition-all">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up"></i>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-[11px] font-bold">Transfer</span>
                            </button>
                            <!-- Plus / Deposit Trigger -->
                            <button onclick="openActionModal('deposit')" class="bg-brand-lime hover:bg-brand-limeHover text-brand-forest rounded-2xl py-3.5 px-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all group">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold group-hover:rotate-90 transition-all">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-[11px] font-black">Quick Deposit</span>
                            </button>
                        </div>

                        <!-- INTERACTIVE DIALOG OVERLAYS (Simulated action states in widget) -->
                        <div id="widget-overlay" class="h-0 opacity-0 bg-[#0c2b1a]/95 absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 rounded-t-[2.5rem] p-6 transition-all duration-300 z-30 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden">
                            <div class="space-y-4">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <h4 class="text-lg font-bold font-sora text-brand-lime" id="overlay-title">Action</h4>
                                    <button onclick="closeActionModal()" class="text-white/60 hover:text-white"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i></button>
                                </div>
                                <div id="overlay-input-container" class="space-y-3">
                                    <!-- Dynamic Inputs Inserted Here -->
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <button id="overlay-submit-btn" onclick="executeWidgetAction()" class="w-full bg-brand-lime text-brand-forest font-bold py-3.5 rounded-2xl hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Confirm Transaction</button>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Mini Transaction History log -->
                        <div class="space-y-3 pt-6 border-t border-white/10">
                            <p class="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-white/40">Recent Activity</p>
                            <div class="space-y-2 max-h-24 overflow-y-auto pr-1" id="transaction-list">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs py-1">
                                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i></div>
                                        <span class="font-bold text-white/80">Received from Alice</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="text-emerald-500 font-bold">+$250.00</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs py-1">
                                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></div>
                                        <span class="font-bold text-white/80">Monthly Subscription</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="text-white/60">-$14.99</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Three steps list description (Right side) -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-6 space-y-10">
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <span class="bg-brand-forest text-brand-lime text-xs font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider">How to Start</span>
                        <h3 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold font-sora tracking-tight leading-tight">Start Managing Your Money in 3 Easy Steps</h3>
                        <p class="text-brand-forest/70 text-sm">Follow these simple phases to integrate Apin57 with your current banking style seamlessly.</p>

                        <!-- Step 1 -->

                                02

                        <!-- Step 3 -->

                            <div class="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-[#eaece2] text-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-black shadow-md flex-shrink-0 group-hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300">

                                <h4 class="text-lg font-bold font-sora">Secure Multi-Account Sync</h4>

    <!-- INTERACTIVE JAVASCRIPT MECHANICS -->
    <script>
        // WALLET DATA & CONTROL SYSTEM
        let balance = 47586.32;
        let isMasked = false;
        let activeOverlayAction = null;

        // Interactive dynamic tags metrics mapping
        const tagMetrics = {
            insights: { label: "Insights Q2 Forecast", value: "$52,890.00", bars: [30, 45, 60, 90, 80, 95] },
            invest: { label: "Index Investment Total", value: "$41,080.45", bars: [10, 20, 40, 50, 75, 88] },
            grow: { label: "Estimated Compound Growth", value: "$112,492.00", bars: [20, 35, 55, 75, 85, 99] },
            plan: { label: "Retirement Baseline Goal", value: "$250,000.00", bars: [15, 25, 45, 60, 70, 90] },
            budget: { label: "Current Budget Safe Limit", value: "$4,200.00", bars: [70, 80, 50, 40, 30, 20] },
            tips: { label: "Weekly Advisory Savings", value: "$640.00", bars: [50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100] }
        };

        // Initialize functions
        window.onload = function() {
            calculateWealth();
            setupCardTilt();
        }

        // Show premium toast notifications
        function showNotification(title, msg) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
            document.getElementById('toast-title').innerText = title;
            document.getElementById('toast-msg').innerText = msg;
            
            toast.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            toast.style.opacity = '1';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.style.transform = 'translateY(24px)';
                toast.style.opacity = '0';
            }, 4000);
        }

        // 3D Card Hover / Mouse Move Tilt logic
        function setupCardTilt() {
            const cardForest = document.getElementById('card-forest');
            const cardLime = document.getElementById('card-lime');

            const applyTilt = (element, factorX = 15, factorY = 15) => {
                element.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                    const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                    const rx = ((y / rect.height) - 0.5) * -factorX;
                    const ry = ((x / rect.width) - 0.5) * factorY;
                    
                    element.style.transform = `rotateX(${rx}deg) rotateY(${ry}deg) scale(1.04) translateZ(10px)`;
                });

                element.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    element.style.transform = '';
                    element.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease';
                });
                
                element.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                    element.style.transition = 'none';
                });
            };

            applyTilt(cardForest, 20, 20);
            applyTilt(cardLime, 20, 20);
        }

        // Toggle balance hiding
        function toggleBalanceMask() {
            isMasked = !isMasked;
            const balanceEl = document.getElementById('wallet-balance');
            const maskIcon = document.getElementById('mask-icon');
            
            if (isMasked) {
                balanceEl.innerText = "$ ••••••••";
                maskIcon.className = "fa-regular fa-eye";
                showNotification("Privacy Activated", "Available balance has been masked.");
            } else {
                balanceEl.innerText = `$ ${balance.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
                maskIcon.className = "fa-regular fa-eye-slash";
                showNotification("Privacy Deactivated", "Wallet balance visible.");
            }
        }

        // Open Wallet Dialog overlays
        function openActionModal(action) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('widget-overlay');
            const title = document.getElementById('overlay-title');
            const container = document.getElementById('overlay-input-container');
            activeOverlayAction = action;

            let html = '';
            if (action === 'request') {
                title.innerText = 'Request Payment';
                html = `
                    <p class="text-xs text-white/60 mb-2">Generate a quick secure request link.</p>
                    <input id="modal-amount" type="number" placeholder="Enter Amount ($)" class="w-full bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-brand-lime" value="100">
                    <input id="modal-note" type="text" placeholder="Sender Name or Reason" class="w-full bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-brand-lime" value="Request from Business">
                `;
            } else if (action === 'transfer') {
                title.innerText = 'Secure Transfer';
                html = `
                    <p class="text-xs text-white/60 mb-2">Send money instantly to other verified accounts.</p>
                    <input id="modal-amount" type="number" placeholder="Enter Amount ($)" class="w-full bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-brand-lime" value="500">
                    <input id="modal-destination" type="text" placeholder="Recipient routing, email or phone" class="w-full bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-brand-lime" value="alice@apindesign.com">
                `;
            } else if (action === 'deposit') {
                title.innerText = 'Quick Deposit';
                html = `
                    <p class="text-xs text-white/60 mb-2">Deposit instant liquidity into this USD available balance.</p>
                    <input id="modal-amount" type="number" placeholder="Amount to add ($)" class="w-full bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-brand-lime" value="1000">
                    <select id="modal-source" class="w-full bg-brand-forestLight text-white rounded-xl p-3 text-sm outline-none">
                        <option value="Checking">Plaid linked Savings Acct</option>
                        <option value="Card">Visa Platinum Debit</option>
                    </select>
                `;
            }

            container.innerHTML = html;
            overlay.style.height = '100%';
            overlay.style.opacity = '1';
        }

        // Close Action Modal inside widget
        function closeActionModal() {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('widget-overlay');
            overlay.style.height = '0';
            overlay.style.opacity = '0';
            activeOverlayAction = null;
        }

        // Execute dynamic action inside wallet
        function executeWidgetAction() {
            const amountVal = parseFloat(document.getElementById('modal-amount').value);
            if (isNaN(amountVal) || amountVal <= 0) {
                showNotification("Invalid Transaction", "Please specify a correct payment amount.");
                return;
            }

            const transactionList = document.getElementById('transaction-list');
            const newLog = document.createElement('div');
            newLog.className = "flex justify-between items-center text-xs py-1";

            if (activeOverlayAction === 'transfer') {
                if (amountVal > balance) {
                    showNotification("Insufficient Funds", "Your available balance is insufficient to process this transfer.");
                    return;
                }
                balance -= amountVal;
                const dest = document.getElementById('modal-destination').value;
                newLog.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i></div>
                        <span class="font-bold text-white/80">Sent to ${dest}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-white/60">-$${amountVal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}</span>
                `;
                showNotification("Transfer Complete", `Successfully sent $${amountVal.toLocaleString()} to ${dest}.`);
            } else if (activeOverlayAction === 'deposit') {
                balance += amountVal;
                const source = document.getElementById('modal-source').value;
                newLog.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i></div>
                        <span class="font-bold text-white/80">Deposit from ${source}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-emerald-500 font-bold">+$${amountVal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}</span>
                `;
                showNotification("Deposit Received", `Successfully added $${amountVal.toLocaleString()} to available balance.`);
            } else if (activeOverlayAction === 'request') {
                const note = document.getElementById('modal-note').value;
                newLog.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]"><i class="fa-solid fa-link"></i></div>
                        <span class="font-bold text-white/80">Requested link: ${note}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-amber-500 font-bold">$${amountVal.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}</span>
                `;
                showNotification("Request Created", `Link copied to clipboard for $${amountVal.toLocaleString()} to ${note}.`);
            }

            // Update balance display
            if (!isMasked) {
                document.getElementById('wallet-balance').innerText = `$ ${balance.toLocaleString('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
            }
            
            // Insert log at the top of recent history
            transactionList.insertBefore(newLog, transactionList.firstChild);
            closeActionModal();
        }

        // Toggle pricing plan periods
        let isYearlyPricing = false;
        function togglePricingDuration() {
            isYearlyPricing = !isYearlyPricing;
            const dot = document.getElementById('pricing-dot');
            const lblMonthly = document.getElementById('label-monthly');
            const lblYearly = document.getElementById('label-yearly');

            const priceBasic = document.getElementById('price-basic');
            const pricePlus = document.getElementById('price-plus');
            const priceExecutive = document.getElementById('price-executive');

            if (isYearlyPricing) {
                dot.style.left = '24px';
                lblMonthly.className = "text-sm font-bold text-brand-forest/50";
                lblYearly.className = "text-sm font-bold text-brand-forest";
                
                // 20% discount on prices
                priceBasic.innerText = "$0";
                pricePlus.innerText = "$11";
                priceExecutive.innerText = "$39";
                showNotification("Yearly Discount", "Applied 20% discount to all recurring pricing plans!");
            } else {
                dot.style.left = '4px';
                lblMonthly.className = "text-sm font-bold text-brand-forest";
                lblYearly.className = "text-sm font-bold text-brand-forest/50";
                
                // Normal prices
                priceBasic.innerText = "$0";
                pricePlus.innerText = "$14";
                priceExecutive.innerText = "$49";
            }
        }

        // Hero Filter Tags Interaction
        function filterMetrics(tag, btn) {
            // Remove active classes
            const btns = document.querySelectorAll('.tag-btn');
            btns.forEach(b => {
                b.className = "tag-btn px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest/20 text-brand-forest hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-brand-forest/5 hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300";
            });

            // Set active
            btn.className = "tag-btn active px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full border border-brand-forest text-white bg-brand-forest shadow-sm hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300";

            // Grab metric map
            const data = tagMetrics[tag];
            if (data) {
                document.getElementById('metric-value').innerText = data.value;
                const statsBars = document.getElementById('stats-bars').children;
                
                // Transition bars inside micro-widget
                for (let i = 0; i < statsBars.length; i++) {
                    const barValue = data.bars[i] || 50;
                    statsBars[i].style.height = `${barValue}%`;
                }
                showNotification("Filtered View", `Displaying dynamic trajectory analytics for ${data.label}.`);
            }
        }

        // ROI Calculator Growth Simulator
        function calculateWealth() {
            const initial = parseFloat(document.getElementById('range-initial').value);
            const monthly = parseFloat(document.getElementById('range-monthly').value);
            const years = parseInt(document.getElementById('range-years').value);

            // Display values
            document.getElementById('val-initial').innerText = `$${initial.toLocaleString()}`;
            document.getElementById('val-monthly').innerText = `$${monthly.toLocaleString()}`;
            document.getElementById('val-years').innerText = `${years} ${years === 1 ? 'Year' : 'Years'}`;
            document.getElementById('chart-year-label').innerText = `Year ${years}`;

            // Compute compound intelligence wealth (8.2% annual growth mapped monthly)
            const r = 0.082 / 12;
            const months = years * 12;
            let total = initial;
            let totalDeposited = initial;

            let points = [];
            for (let i = 1; i <= months; i++) {
                total = (total * (1 + r)) + monthly;
                totalDeposited += monthly;
                // sample 6 points for SVG mapping
                if (i % Math.ceil(months / 6) === 0 || i === months) {
                    points.push(total);
                }
            }

            const profit = Math.max(0, total - totalDeposited);

            // Update UI displays
            document.getElementById('wealth-result').innerText = `$${Math.round(total).toLocaleString()}`;
            document.getElementById('profit-result').innerText = `$${Math.round(profit).toLocaleString()}`;

            // Re-draw dynamic SVG paths based on projections
            const maxVal = Math.max(...points) || 1000;
            const minVal = initial;
            const svgWidth = 100;
            const svgHeight = 100;

            let dPath = `M 0 90`; // Start coordinates
            let fPath = `M 0 90`;

            points.forEach((val, idx) => {
                const x = ((idx + 1) / points.length) * svgWidth;
                // normalized height mapping high values towards top (lower Y in SVG space)
                const y = 90 - (((val - minVal) / (maxVal - minVal || 1)) * 70);
                dPath += ` L ${x} ${y}`;
                fPath += ` L ${x} ${y}`;
            });

            fPath += ` L 100 100 L 0 100 Z`;

            document.getElementById('chart-path').setAttribute('d', dPath);
