            <div class="space-y-3">
                <h5 class="text-white font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Product</h5>
                <ul class="space-y-2">
                    <li><a href="#features" class="hover:text-white transition-colors">Debit Cards</a></li>

    <!-- Video Demo Modal Component -->
    <div id="video-modal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-[#03030d]/95 backdrop-blur-md z-[100] items-center justify-center p-6 transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="relative w-full max-w-3xl bg-[#0b0c1e] rounded-3xl p-1 border border-white/10 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
            <!-- Modal Header -->
            <div class="p-4 flex justify-between items-center bg-white/[0.01]">
                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">UIXSHUVO Concept Tour</h4>
                <button onclick="closeVideoModal()" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:text-white flex items-center justify-center transition-colors">
                    <i data-lucide="x" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
            <!-- Video Simulation Container -->
            <div class="aspect-video bg-[#03030d] relative flex flex-col justify-center items-center p-8 text-center space-y-4">
                <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-brand-500/20 text-brand-500 flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-brand-500/30 animate-pulse-soft">
                    <i data-lucide="play" class="w-8 h-8 fill-current"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="space-y-2">
                    <h5 class="text-base font-bold text-white">Interactive Video Simulation Activated</h5>
                    <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 max-w-sm mx-auto">Witness the smooth flow of smart card assets, compounding interest models, and secure AI partner integrations instantly.</p>
                </div>
                <button onclick="closeVideoModal()" class="px-6 py-2 bg-brand-500 hover:bg-brand-600 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all">Dismiss Preview</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- Status Toast Notification Box -->
    <div id="status-toast" class="fixed bottom-6 left-6 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/95 border border-white/10 z-[120] shadow-2xl max-w-xs flex items-center gap-3 transition-all duration-500 transform translate-y-24 opacity-0">
        <div id="toast-icon-bg" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-500/10 text-brand-100">
            <i id="toast-icon" data-lucide="info" class="w-4.5 h-4.5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
            <p id="toast-title" class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Event Triggered</p>
            <p id="toast-msg" class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Simulation action completed successfully.</p>
        </div>
    </div>


    <!-- JavaScript Controllers -->
    <script>
        // Initialize Lucide icons
        lucide.createIcons();

        // Mobile Nav Drawer Toggle
        const mobileMenuBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn');
        const mobileDrawer = document.getElementById('mobile-drawer');
        mobileMenuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            mobileDrawer.classList.toggle('hidden');
        });

        // Hide mobile drawer when clicking nav links
        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-link').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                mobileDrawer.classList.add('hidden');
            });
        });

        // Hero Card Designer Controller
        const cardNameInput = document.getElementById('card-name-input');
        const cardHolderName = document.getElementById('card-holder-name');
        const interactiveCard = document.getElementById('interactive-card');
        const cardGlowBg = document.getElementById('card-glow-bg');

        cardNameInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            const val = e.target.value.toUpperCase();
            cardHolderName.textContent = val || 'ARIFIN SHUVO';
        });

        function setCardTheme(theme) {
            interactiveCard.className = 'absolute inset-0 rounded-3xl p-8 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transition-all duration-700 border';
            
            if (theme === 'neon') {
                interactiveCard.classList.add('bg-gradient-to-tr', 'from-brand-500', 'via-purple-500', 'to-indigo-800', 'border-white/20');
                cardGlowBg.className = 'absolute w-[350px] h-[220px] bg-brand-500/40 rounded-3xl filter blur-[80px] transition-all duration-700';
                showToast('Theme Updated', 'Premium Neon selected', 'palette');
            } else if (theme === 'cyber') {
                interactiveCard.classList.add('bg-gradient-to-tr', 'from-cyan-500', 'via-teal-500', 'to-blue-600', 'border-cyan-300/30');
                cardGlowBg.className = 'absolute w-[350px] h-[220px] bg-cyan-500/35 rounded-3xl filter blur-[80px] transition-all duration-700';
                showToast('Theme Updated', 'Cyber Teal selected', 'palette');
            } else if (theme === 'sunset') {
                interactiveCard.classList.add('bg-gradient-to-tr', 'from-pink-500', 'via-red-500', 'to-yellow-500', 'border-orange-300/30');
                cardGlowBg.className = 'absolute w-[350px] h-[220px] bg-pink-500/30 rounded-3xl filter blur-[80px] transition-all duration-700';
                showToast('Theme Updated', 'Sunset Flare selected', 'palette');
            } else if (theme === 'titanium') {
                interactiveCard.classList.add('bg-gradient-to-tr', 'from-[#1a1b23]', 'via-[#303241]', 'to-[#0d0e14]', 'border-white/[0.08]');
                cardGlowBg.className = 'absolute w-[350px] h-[220px] bg-slate-500/10 rounded-3xl filter blur-[80px] transition-all duration-700';
                showToast('Theme Updated', 'Matte Titanium selected', 'palette');
            }
            lucide.createIcons();
        }

        // Live Interactive Dashboard Controllers
        function switchDashboardTab(tabId) {
            // Un-highlight active tab button states
            const tabs = ['overview', 'wallet', 'messages', 'analytics'];
            tabs.forEach(t => {
                const btn = document.getElementById(`tab-${t}`);
                if (btn) {
                    btn.className = 'w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/[0.03] text-xs font-semibold transition-all';
                }
            });

            // Highlight selected tab
            const activeBtn = document.getElementById(`tab-${tabId}`);
            if (activeBtn) {
                activeBtn.className = 'w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-xl bg-brand-500 text-white text-xs font-semibold transition-all';
            }

            const mainContent = document.getElementById('dashboard-main-content');
            
            // Dynamic render simulated contents
            if (tabId === 'overview') {
                location.reload(); // Quick restore of home dashboard view state
            } else if (tabId === 'wallet') {
                mainContent.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="space-y-6">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white">Your Smart Wallet</h3>
                                <p class="text-xs text-gray-400">Manage digital credit cards, checking accounts and vaults.</p>
                            </div>
                            <button onclick="simulateAddCard()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-brand-500 hover:bg-brand-600 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 transition-all">
                                <i data-lucide="plus" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Add Smart Card
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <!-- Premium Virtual Platinum -->
                            <div class="p-6 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-600 to-indigo-900 border border-white/10 space-y-4">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wider text-white">Platinum Vault Active</span>
                                    <i data-lucide="shield-check" class="text-emerald-400 w-5 h-5"></i>
                                </div>
                                <h4 class="text-xl font-mono tracking-widest text-white">**** **** **** 8892</h4>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-gray-300">Available Checking Balance</p>
                                        <p class="text-lg font-bold text-white">$24,098.00</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold bg-white/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">VISA</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Premium Business Card -->
                            <div class="p-6 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#1f2029] via-[#333545] to-[#12131a] border border-white/10 space-y-4">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wider text-gray-300">Titanium LLC Card</span>
                                    <i data-lucide="briefcase" class="text-[#a380f9] w-5 h-5"></i>
                                </div>
                                <h4 class="text-xl font-mono tracking-widest text-white">**** **** **** 5110</h4>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Available Business Flow</p>
                                        <p class="text-lg font-bold text-white">$145,200.00</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold bg-white/10 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">MASTER</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Action List -->
                        <div class="p-5 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] space-y-4">
                            <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Quick Simulation Actions</h4>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                                <button onclick="simulateAddFunds()" class="p-4 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.02] hover:bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.06] text-left space-y-1 group">
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-bold text-white group-hover:text-brand-100 transition-colors">Add Mock Funds</h5>
                                    <p class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Deposit simulated $500 to test charts.</p>
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="simulateAddExpenses()" class="p-4 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.02] hover:bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.06] text-left space-y-1 group">
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-bold text-white group-hover:text-rose-400 transition-colors">Simulate Expense</h5>
                                    <p class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Add negative mock transaction.</p>
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="switchDashboardTab('overview')" class="p-4 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.02] hover:bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.06] text-left space-y-1 group">
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-bold text-white group-hover:text-emerald-400 transition-colors">Refresh System</h5>
                                    <p class="text-[9px] text-gray-400">Reinitialize core variables.</p>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else if (tabId === 'messages') {
                mainContent.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="space-y-6">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white">Messages & Communications</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-400">Review official alerts from our asset compliance team.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <div class="p-4 rounded-xl bg-brand-500/5 border border-brand-500/20 flex gap-4">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-500/20 text-brand-100 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i data-lucide="shield-alert" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Smart Card V2 Upgraded Successfully</h5>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 leading-relaxed mt-1">Your titanium digital debit card has been upgraded to utilize advanced quantum cryptography shields. No additional settings are required.</p>
                                    <span class="text-[9px] text-brand-500 block mt-2">Received 2 hours ago</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="p-4 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.01] border border-white/[0.05] flex gap-4 opacity-75">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-slate-500/20 text-slate-400 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i data-lucide="mail-open" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h5 class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Weekly Yield Compound Statement Ready</h5>
                                    <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 leading-relaxed mt-1">Your high-yield compound goal vault earned a total interest profit of $45.20 USD during the last tracking cycle.</p>
                                    <span class="text-[9px] text-gray-500 block mt-2">Received 1 day ago</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else if (tabId === 'analytics') {
                mainContent.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="space-y-6">
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white">Asset Analytics</h3>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-400">Analyze performance curves, investment yields, and metrics.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                            <div class="p-5 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] space-y-4">
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Asset Allocation Distribution</h4>
                                <div class="h-44 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.01] rounded-xl relative">
                                    <!-- Simple SVG pie visualizer representation -->
                                    <svg class="w-32 h-32 transform -rotate-90">
                                        <circle cx="64" cy="64" r="50" fill="transparent" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" stroke-width="12" />
                                        <circle cx="64" cy="64" r="50" fill="transparent" stroke="#4d66f6" stroke-width="12" stroke-dasharray="314" stroke-dashoffset="94" />
                                        <circle cx="64" cy="64" r="50" fill="transparent" stroke="#a380f9" stroke-width="12" stroke-dasharray="314" stroke-dashoffset="240" />
                                    </svg>
                                    <div class="absolute text-center">
                                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Total Funds</p>
                                        <p class="text-sm font-extrabold text-white">$26,078</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-around text-[10px]">
                                    <span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-brand-500"></span> ETFs (70%)</span>
                                    <span class="flex items-center gap-1.5"><span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#a380f9]"></span> Savings (30%)</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="p-5 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] space-y-4">
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-bold text-white">System Compound Yield History</h4>
                                <div class="space-y-3.5">
                                    <div class="space-y-1">
                                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]">
                                            <span class="text-gray-400">Target Goal (Compounding)</span>
                                            <span class="font-bold text-white">82% Complete</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="w-full h-2 bg-white/[0.03] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                            <div class="bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-purple-600 h-full w-[82%] rounded-full"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="space-y-1">
                                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]">
                                            <span class="text-gray-400">Passive Income Target</span>
                                            <span class="font-bold text-white">45% Complete</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="w-full h-2 bg-white/[0.03] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                            <div class="bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-purple-600 h-full w-[45%] rounded-full"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="space-y-1">
                                        <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]">
                                            <span class="text-gray-400">Emergency Capital Reserve</span>
                                            <span class="font-bold text-white">100% Secured</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="w-full h-2 bg-white/[0.03] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                                            <div class="bg-emerald-400 h-full w-full rounded-full"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            lucide.createIcons();
        }

        // Action Simulation Trigger Actions within Dashboard Wallet Tab
        function simulateAddCard() {
            showToast('Card Provisioning', 'Generating titanium smart credentials...', 'loader');
            setTimeout(() => {
                showToast('Card Authorized', 'Titanium Card successfully linked!', 'check-circle');
            }, 1500);
        }

        function simulateAddFunds() {
            showToast('Depositing Simulation Funds', 'Adding $500.00 to checking account...', 'loader');
            setTimeout(() => {
                showToast('Deposit Complete', '$500.00 added successfully!', 'arrow-down-circle');
            }, 1200);
        }

        function simulateAddExpenses() {
            showToast('Processing Mock Expense', 'Deducting -$120.00 simulation charge...', 'loader');
            setTimeout(() => {
                showToast('Charge Settled', '-$120.00 logged successfully', 'x-circle');
            }, 1000);
        }

        function simulateAction(type) {
            if (type === 'receive') {
                showToast('Receive Mode Enabled', 'Ready to accept incoming payments.', 'arrow-down-left');
            } else if (type === 'analytics') {
                showToast('Exporting Statement', 'CSV generated and saved to memory.', 'file-text');
            }
        }

        function clearActivityLogs() {
            const container = document.getElementById('transaction-log-container');
            if (container) {
                container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="text-center py-6 text-gray-500 text-xs">
                        No transactions to show. Simulate more in the wallet tab!
                    </div>
                `;
                showToast('Logs Cleared', 'Simulation logs reset.', 'trash');
            }
        }

        // Show live hover tooltips in graph view
        function showChartTooltip(month, income, expense) {
            document.getElementById('tooltip-month').textContent = month;
            document.getElementById('tooltip-income').textContent = income;
            document.getElementById('tooltip-expense').textContent = expense;
        }

        // Dynamic Compound Yield Calculator
        function calculateSavings() {
            const monthly = parseFloat(document.getElementById('slider-deposit').value);
            const years = parseInt(document.getElementById('slider-years').value);
            const r = parseFloat(document.getElementById('slider-apy').value) / 100 / 12;
            const n = years * 12;

            document.getElementById('deposit-val').textContent = `$${monthly}`;
            document.getElementById('years-val').textContent = `${years} Years`;
            document.getElementById('apy-val').textContent = `${(r * 12 * 100).toFixed(1)}% APY`;

            // Compound interest formula for monthly contributions:
            // FV = P * [((1 + r)^n - 1) / r] * (1 + r)
            const fv = monthly * ((Math.pow(1 + r, n) - 1) / r) * (1 + r);
            document.getElementById('calc-result').textContent = `$${Math.round(fv).toLocaleString()}`;
        }

        // Dynamic Pricing Plan switch controller
        function togglePricing(period) {
            const btnMonthly = document.getElementById('price-btn-monthly');
            const btnYearly = document.getElementById('price-btn-yearly');
            const pricePro = document.getElementById('price-pro');
            const priceUltimate = document.getElementById('price-ultimate');

            if (period === 'monthly') {
                btnMonthly.className = 'px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-brand-500 text-white transition-all';
                btnYearly.className = 'px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-all';
                pricePro.textContent = '$15';
                priceUltimate.textContent = '$49';
                showToast('Billing Period Switch', 'Monthly rates applied.', 'calendar');
            } else {
                btnMonthly.className = 'px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-all';
                btnYearly.className = 'px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-brand-500 text-white transition-all';
                pricePro.textContent = '$12';
                priceUltimate.textContent = '$39';
                showToast('Billing Period Switch', 'Yearly rates applied (20% Off).', 'percent');
            }
        }

        // Toast alert system
        function showToast(title, msg, iconName) {
            const toast = document.getElementById('status-toast');
            const tTitle = document.getElementById('toast-title');
            const tMsg = document.getElementById('toast-msg');
            const tIconBg = document.getElementById('toast-icon-bg');
            
            tTitle.textContent = title;
            tMsg.textContent = msg;
            
            // Set toast icon class
            tIconBg.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="${iconName || 'info'}" class="w-4.5 h-4.5"></i>`;
            lucide.createIcons();

            // Slide Toast up
            toast.className = "fixed bottom-6 left-6 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/95 border border-white/10 z-[120] shadow-2xl max-w-xs flex items-center gap-3 transition-all duration-500 transform translate-y-0 opacity-100";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                toast.className = "fixed bottom-6 left-6 p-4 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/95 border border-white/10 z-[120] shadow-2xl max-w-xs flex items-center gap-3 transition-all duration-500 transform translate-y-24 opacity-0";
            }, 3000);
        }

        // Modal Controllers
        function openVideoModal() {
            document.getElementById('video-modal').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        function closeVideoModal() {
            document.getElementById('video-modal').style.display = 'none';
        }
        function openFeatureTour() {
            showToast('Concept Presentation', 'Launching interactive asset features...', 'info');
            setTimeout(() => {
                openVideoModal();
            }, 600);
        }

        // Gemini AI Chat integration (with secure fallback model config)
        const apiKey = ""; // Left empty per system environment variables requirement

        function prefillChat(text) {
            document.getElementById('ai-chat-input').value = text;
        }

        async function handleChatSubmit(event) {
            event.preventDefault();
            const inputField = document.getElementById('ai-chat-input');
            const userQuery = inputField.value.trim();
            if (!userQuery) return;

            // Render User Message in Chat UI
            appendChatMessage('user', userQuery);
            inputField.value = '';

            // Render simulated AI typing placeholder
            const typingId = appendChatMessage('ai', 'Thinking...');
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('chat-submit-btn');
            submitBtn.disabled = true;

            try {
                // Fetch from Gemini Endpoint with system prompt setting
                const systemPrompt = `You are UIXSHUVO's expert financial planning partner. Give helpful advice on compounding, investing, savings, ETFs, portfolios, and budgeting. Use simple terms. Be polite and professional. Keep response length down to 2-3 short paragraphs max. Highlight key numbers.`;
                
                // Exponential backoff logic
                let result = null;
                let delay = 1000;
                let retries = 5;
                
                for (let i = 0; i < retries; i++) {
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch(`https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`, {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                            body: JSON.stringify({
                                contents: [{ parts: [{ text: userQuery }] }],
                                systemInstruction: { parts: [{ text: systemPrompt }] }
                            })
                        });
                        
                        if (response.ok) {
                            result = await response.json();
                            break;
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                        // ignore and proceed to next retry
                    }
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delay));
                    delay *= 2;
                }

                if (result) {
                    const responseText = result.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || "Thank you for asking. Let's build a smart growth target. Keep contributions consistent to leverage compound yields.";
                    updateChatMessage(typingId, responseText);
                } else {
                    updateChatMessage(typingId, "Secure API simulation offline. Standard compound advice: Consistent monthly deposits (even $50/mo) in diversified index funds consistently yields high long-term gains.");
                }

            } catch (err) {
                updateChatMessage(typingId, "Simulated financial advisory is temporarily offline. Consistent monthly contributions yield the best growth curve results.");
            } finally {
                submitBtn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        function appendChatMessage(sender, text) {
            const container = document.getElementById('ai-chat-messages');
            const messageId = `msg-${Date.now()}`;
            
            const msgDiv = document.createElement('div');
            msgDiv.className = 'flex items-start gap-3 animate-fade-in';
            msgDiv.id = messageId;

            if (sender === 'user') {
                msgDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="ml-auto p-3 rounded-2xl bg-brand-500 text-white max-w-[80%]">
                        <p class="leading-relaxed">${text}</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            } else {
                msgDiv.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-brand-500/10 text-brand-100 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                        <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-3.5 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.05] max-w-[80%] space-y-2">
                        <p class="text-gray-200 leading-relaxed text-content">${text}</p>
                    </div>
                `;
            }

            container.appendChild(msgDiv);
            container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
            lucide.createIcons();
            return messageId;
        }

        function updateChatMessage(id, text) {
            const msgDiv = document.getElementById(id);
            if (msgDiv) {
                const textPara = msgDiv.querySelector('.text-content');
                if (textPara) {
                    textPara.innerHTML = text.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
                }
            }
            const container = document.getElementById('ai-chat-messages');
            container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
        }

        // Run savings yield calculation on initial load
        calculateSavings();
    </script>

</body>
</html>
23
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  ChevronDown, 
  Plus, 
  ArrowRight, 
  ShieldCheck, 
  Globe2, 
  Zap, 
  Sparkles,
  Search,
  Menu,
  X
} from 'lucide-react';

const App = () => {
  const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleScroll = () => {
      setIsScrolled(window.scrollY > 50);
    };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen text-white font-sans selection:bg-[#E0E59A] selection:text-[#0C3E50] overflow-x-hidden">
      {/* Complex Atmospheric Background 
        Simulating the ocean, glowing horizon, and deep sky
      */}
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-0 pointer-events-none">
        {/* Base Gradient */}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#224b5d] via-[#48899c] to-[#0b2b39]"></div>
        
        {/* Horizon Glow */}
        <div className="absolute top-[50%] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[120vw] h-[40vh] bg-[#97ddec] opacity-40 blur-[120px] rounded-[100%]"></div>
        <div className="absolute top-[55%] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[60vw] h-[20vh] bg-white opacity-30 blur-[80px] rounded-[100%]"></div>
        
        {/* Water Surface Simulation (Darker bottom with slight horizontal banding) */}
        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-[40%] bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-[#0d3446]/80 to-[#061b25] z-10"></div>
        
        {/* Subtle floating particles/stars */}
        <div className="absolute top-[20%] left-[15%] w-1 h-1 bg-white rounded-full blur-[1px] opacity-60 animate-pulse"></div>
        <div className="absolute top-[30%] right-[25%] w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-white rounded-full blur-[1px] opacity-40 animate-pulse" style={{ animationDelay: '1s' }}></div>
        <div className="absolute top-[60%] left-[8%] w-2 h-2 bg-[#E0E59A] rounded-full blur-[2px] opacity-30 animate-pulse" style={{ animationDelay: '2s' }}></div>
        <div className="absolute top-[40%] right-[10%] w-1 h-1 bg-white rounded-full blur-[1px] opacity-80 animate-pulse" style={{ animationDelay: '0.5s' }}></div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content Wrapper */}
      <div className="relative z-10">
        
        {/* Navigation */}
        <nav className={`fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300 ${isScrolled ? 'bg-[#153b4d]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10 py-4' : 'bg-transparent py-6'}`}>
          <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 flex justify-between items-center">
            {/* Logo */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg leading-none">
                O
              </div>
              <span className="text-xl font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase">Odyssey</span>
            </div>

            {/* Desktop Links */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8 text-sm font-medium text-white/90">
              <a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Home</a>
              <a href="#" className="flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-white transition-colors">Product <ChevronDown size={14} className="opacity-70" /></a>
              <a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Pricing</a>
              <a href="#" className="flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-white transition-colors">Company <ChevronDown size={14} className="opacity-70" /></a>
              <a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Resources</a>
            </div>

            {/* Desktop Actions */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-4">
              <button className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm hover:text-white/80 transition-colors">
                <Globe2 size={16} /> English
              </button>
              <button className="px-5 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/30 text-sm hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors backdrop-blur-sm">
                Login
              </button>
              <button className="px-5 py-2 rounded-full bg-[#0C3E50] text-sm flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#11556e] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(12,62,80,0.5)] border border-[#1a627d]">
                <Plus size={16} /> Register
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Toggle */}
            <button className="md:hidden text-white" onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}>
              {mobileMenuOpen ? <X size={24} /> : <Menu size={24} />}
            </button>
          </div>
        </nav>

        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        {mobileMenuOpen && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40 bg-[#123645]/95 backdrop-blur-xl pt-24 px-6 flex flex-col gap-6 md:hidden">
            <a href="#" className="text-2xl font-medium">Home</a>
            <a href="#" className="text-2xl font-medium">Product</a>
            <a href="#" className="text-2xl font-medium">Pricing</a>
            <a href="#" className="text-2xl font-medium">Company</a>
            <div className="mt-8 flex flex-col gap-4">
               <button className="w-full py-3 rounded-full border border-white/30 text-lg">Login</button>
               <button className="w-full py-3 rounded-full bg-[#0C3E50] text-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <Plus size={20} /> Register
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Hero Section */}
        <section className="pt-32 pb-20 md:pt-48 md:pb-32 px-6 flex flex-col items-center text-center min-h-[90vh] relative">
          
          {/* Badge */}
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm mb-8 text-sm text-white/90">
             <Sparkles size={14} className="text-[#E0E59A]" /> Personal
          </div>

          {/* Heading */}
          <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[5rem] font-medium tracking-tight max-w-4xl leading-[1.1] mb-6 drop-shadow-lg">
            The <span className="font-serif italic text-[#E0E59A] font-light">Fast</span> and <span className="font-serif italic text-[#E0E59A] font-light">Secure</span><br className="hidden md:block"/> way to send money
          </h1>

          {/* Subheading */}
          <p className="text-lg md:text-xl text-white/80 max-w-xl mb-12 font-light">
            Join 30+ million customers saving on global transfers with Odyssey.
          </p>

          {/* Input Group */}
          <div className="flex items-center w-full max-w-md p-1.5 rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md mb-20 shadow-2xl">
            <input 
              type="email" 
              placeholder="Your Email Address" 
              className="flex-1 bg-transparent border-none outline-none px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/50 w-full"
            />
            <button className="px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#0C3E50] hover:bg-[#11556e] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 font-medium border border-white/10 whitespace-nowrap">
              <Plus size={16} /> Get Started
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Floating Card Visual */}
          <div className="relative w-full max-w-3xl h-[300px] flex justify-center items-center perspective-[1000px] mt-10">
            {/* Card Shadow/Glow */}
            <div className="absolute w-[320px] h-[200px] bg-[#49B5CD] opacity-40 blur-[60px] rounded-full top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2"></div>
            
            {/* The Card */}
            <div 
              className="w-[340px] h-[210px] rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/30 shadow-[0_30px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-transform duration-1000 ease-in-out hover:scale-105"
              style={{
                background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(73, 181, 205, 0.9) 0%, rgba(31, 107, 133, 0.8) 100%)',
                transform: 'rotateX(15deg) rotateY(-10deg) rotateZ(2deg)',
                animation: 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite'
              }}
            >
              {/* Card Inner Glow/Reflection */}
              <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-white/5 to-white/30 pointer-events-none"></div>
              
              <div className="p-6 h-full flex flex-col justify-between relative z-10">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                  <div className="w-12 h-8 bg-yellow-400/80 rounded flex items-center justify-center opacity-80">
                    <div className="w-8 h-5 border border-yellow-200/50 rounded-sm"></div>
                  </div>
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" className="w-8 h-8 opacity-50" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2">
                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                
                <div className="flex justify-between text-xs font-mono opacity-80 px-2 mt-4">
                   <span>Yue Name</span>
                   <span>Yue Tring</span>
                </div>

                <div className="flex justify-between items-end">
                  <div className="font-semibold text-xl tracking-wide">Odyssey<span className="font-light">bank</span></div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold italic opacity-90">VISA</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </section>

        {/* Partners Strip */}
        <section className="border-y border-white/10 bg-[#0d2a38]/40 backdrop-blur-sm py-8 px-6 relative z-10">
          <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto flex flex-wrap justify-center md:justify-between items-center gap-8 opacity-60 grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500">
             {/* Mock Logos using text for simplicity but styled to look like logos */}
             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-bold text-xl"><Globe2 size={24}/> yonder</div>
             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-lg"><Search size={20}/> ONE DOME</div>
             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-mono tracking-widest"><Zap size={20}/> ISOMETRIC</div>
             <div className="font-bold text-xl tracking-tighter">deblock</div>
             <div className="font-bold text-xl uppercase">PATCH</div>
             <div className="flex items-center gap-1 font-semibold text-xl"><ShieldCheck size={20}/>safi</div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* Features / Value Props - Extending the Universe */}
        <section className="py-32 px-6 relative z-10">
          <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div className="text-center mb-20">
              <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-medium mb-6">Designed for a <span className="font-serif italic text-[#E0E59A]">boundless</span> world</h2>
              <p className="text-white/70 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-lg">Experience financial freedom with tools crafted for clarity, speed, and absolute security.</p>
            </div>

            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
              {/* Feature Card 1 */}
              <div className="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-[#1e5870] flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                  <Globe2 size={28} className="text-[#E0E59A]" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-2xl font-medium mb-4">Global Reach</h3>
                <p className="text-white/60 leading-relaxed">Send money to over 150 countries with real-time exchange rates and zero hidden markups. Your money knows no borders.</p>
              </div>

              {/* Feature Card 2 */}
              <div className="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-[#1e5870] flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                  <Zap size={28} className="text-[#E0E59A]" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-2xl font-medium mb-4">Instant Settling</h3>
                <p className="text-white/60 leading-relaxed">Why wait days? Over 80% of our transfers arrive in seconds. Powered by our proprietary next-gen routing network.</p>
              </div>

              {/* Feature Card 3 */}
              <div className="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-[#1e5870] flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                  <ShieldCheck size={28} className="text-[#E0E59A]" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-2xl font-medium mb-4">Bank-grade Security</h3>
                <p className="text-white/60 leading-relaxed">Your funds are safeguarded with industry-leading encryption and biometric authentication. Peace of mind built-in.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* CTA Section */}
        <section className="py-24 px-6 relative z-10 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[#0C3E50]/40 skew-y-3 transform origin-bottom-left -z-10 border-y border-white/5"></div>
          
          <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center">
            <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-6xl font-medium mb-8">Ready to start your <span className="font-serif italic text-[#E0E59A]">Odyssey</span>?</h2>
            <p className="text-xl text-white/80 mb-10 font-light">Join millions who have already revolutionized how they manage money.</p>
            
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4">
              <button className="px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-white text-[#0C3E50] hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors font-semibold text-lg flex items-center gap-2 w-full sm:w-auto justify-center">
                Create Free Account <ArrowRight size={20} />
              </button>
              <button className="px-8 py-4 rounded-full border border-white/30 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors font-medium text-lg w-full sm:w-auto justify-center backdrop-blur-sm">
                View Pricing
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </section>

        {/* Footer */}
        <footer className="pt-20 pb-10 px-6 border-t border-white/10 bg-[#061b25] relative z-10">
          <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-10 mb-16">
            <div className="col-span-2">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg leading-none">O</div>
                <span className="text-xl font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase">Odyssey</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-white/50 max-w-sm mb-6">The fast, secure, and beautiful way to manage your global finances. Designed for the modern world.</p>
              <div className="flex gap-4">
                {/* Social icons placeholders */}
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-white/10">in</div>
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-white/10">tw</div>
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer border border-white/10">ig</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold mb-6">Product</h4>
              <ul className="space-y-4 text-white/60 text-sm">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Transfers</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Multi-currency</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Business Account</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">API & Developers</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
            
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold mb-6">Company</h4>
              <ul className="space-y-4 text-white/60 text-sm">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">About Us</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Careers</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Press</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Blog</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
            
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold mb-6">Legal</h4>
              <ul className="space-y-4 text-white/60 text-sm">
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Terms of Service</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Privacy Policy</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Cookie Policy</a></li>
                <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Licenses</a></li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center pt-8 border-t border-white/10 text-white/40 text-sm">
            <p>© 2026 Odyssey Financial Ltd. All rights reserved.</p>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-4 md:mt-0">
               <span>Status: Operational</span>
               <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </footer>

      </div>

      {/* Global CSS for Animations */}
      <style dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: `
        @keyframes float {
          0% { transform: translateY(0px) rotateX(15deg) rotateY(-10deg) rotateZ(2deg); }
          50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotateX(20deg) rotateY(-5deg) rotateZ(1deg); }
          100% { transform: translateY(0px) rotateX(15deg) rotateY(-10deg) rotateZ(2deg); }
        }
      `}} />
    </div>
  );
};

export default App;
p4
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Banklio — Effortless Finance for a Smarter Future</title>
  <!-- Google Fonts: Plus Jakarta Sans for premium modern fintech typography -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <!-- Tailwind CSS CDN -->
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <!-- Lucide Icons CDN -->
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      theme: {
        extend: {
          fontFamily: {
            sans: ['Plus Jakarta Sans', 'sans-serif'],
          },
          colors: {
            brand: {
              DEFAULT: '#b5f500', // Neon Lime
              dark: '#8ec300',
              light: '#d2ff4d',
              forest: '#0a1410', // Emerald Black
              deep: '#040806',
              card: '#111e18',
              border: 'rgba(181, 245, 0, 0.15)',
            }
          },
          boxShadow: {
            'glow-neon': '0 0 25px rgba(181, 245, 0, 0.25)',
            'glow-emerald': '0 0 40px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.15)',
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>
  <style>
    /* Custom Grid & Glow Effects matching the image */
    .hero-grid {
      background-size: 40px 40px;
      background-image: 
        linear-gradient(to right, rgba(181, 245, 0, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(181, 245, 0, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
    }
    .blur-glow-green {
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
    }
    .blur-glow-neon {
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(181, 245, 0, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%);
    }
    /* Hide scrollbar but keep functionality */
    .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {
      display: none;
    }
    .no-scrollbar {
      -ms-overflow-style: none;
      scrollbar-width: none;
    }
    /* Card Perspective Effects */
    .perspective-1000 {
      perspective: 1000px;
    }
    .preserve-3d {
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-brand-deep text-slate-100 antialiased font-sans overflow-x-hidden">

  <!-- Floating Custom Notification (Custom Toast replaces generic Alerts) -->
  <div id="toast" class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 transform translate-y-20 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-out pointer-events-none">
    <div class="bg-brand-card border border-brand/30 text-white px-5 py-4 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex items-center space-x-3 max-w-sm">
      <div class="p-2 bg-brand/10 rounded-xl text-brand">
        <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="font-semibold text-sm" id="toast-title">Interactive Update</p>
        <p class="text-xs text-slate-400" id="toast-message">Your choice has been synchronized seamlessly.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Hero & Navigation Container (Dark Theme / Grid Background) -->
  <div class="relative min-h-screen hero-grid overflow-hidden">
    <!-- Ambient glows -->
    <div class="absolute top-1/4 left-1/4 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] blur-glow-green pointer-events-none"></div>
    <div class="absolute top-1/3 right-10 w-[600px] h-[600px] blur-glow-neon pointer-events-none"></div>

    <!-- Header / Navbar -->
    <header class="relative z-40 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-6">
      <nav class="flex items-center justify-between bg-brand-forest/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 py-3.5 px-6 rounded-2xl">
        <!-- Brand Logo -->
        <a href="#" class="flex items-center space-x-2.5 focus:outline-none">
          <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-brand flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow-neon">
            <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-brand-deep font-bold" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3">
              <path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5zM2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <span class="text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white flex items-center">
            Banklio <span class="text-brand ml-0.5 font-light">.</span>
          </span>
        </a>

        <!-- Navigation Links -->
        <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8 text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
          <a href="#features" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Features</a>
          <a href="#card-customizer" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">My Cards</a>
          <a href="#stats" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Metrics</a>
          <a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">AI Insights</a>
          <a href="#testimonials" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Testimonials</a>
        </div>

        <!-- Call To Actions -->
        <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
          <a href="#card-customizer" class="hidden sm:inline-block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors">Customize Card</a>
          <a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="bg-brand hover:bg-brand-light text-brand-deep px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-[1.03] active:scale-[0.98]">
            Sign up
          </a>
          <!-- Mobile Menu Trigger -->
          <button id="mobile-menu-btn" class="md:hidden p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-white focus:outline-none">
            <i data-lucide="menu" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </nav>

      <!-- Mobile Dropdown Menu -->
      <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden md:hidden mt-3 bg-brand-forest border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-5 space-y-4 shadow-xl">
        <a href="#features" class="block text-slate-300 hover:text-brand font-medium">Features</a>
        <a href="#card-customizer" class="block text-slate-300 hover:text-brand font-medium">My Cards</a>
        <a href="#stats" class="block text-slate-300 hover:text-brand font-medium">Metrics</a>
        <a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="block text-slate-300 hover:text-brand font-medium">AI Insights</a>
        <a href="#testimonials" class="block text-slate-300 hover:text-brand font-medium">Testimonials</a>
        <hr class="border-white/10">
        <a href="#card-customizer" class="block text-center bg-white/5 text-white py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium hover:bg-white/10">Customize Card</a>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section class="relative z-30 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-12 pb-24 lg:pt-20">
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-8 items-center">
        
        <!-- Left Column: Content -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-7 space-y-8 text-center lg:text-left">
          <!-- Premium Pill Tag -->
          <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-brand/10 border border-brand/30 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-brand text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">
            <i data-lucide="star" class="w-3.5 h-3.5 fill-current"></i>
            <span>Redefining Global Fintech</span>
          </div>

          <!-- Headline -->
          <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-white leading-[1.1]">
            Effortless Finance <br class="hidden sm:inline">
            <span class="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-slate-100 to-brand">for a Smarter Future</span>
          </h1>

          <!-- Subheading -->
          <p class="text-base sm:text-lg text-slate-400 max-w-xl mx-auto lg:mx-0 leading-relaxed">
            Track expenses, optimize budgets, and grow wealth with Al-driven insights. Experience secure, borderless, and premium finance solutions in one single app.
          </p>

          <!-- CTAs -->
          <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center lg:justify-start gap-4">
            <a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="group bg-brand hover:bg-brand-light text-brand-deep font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center space-x-2 shadow-glow-neon transition-all hover:scale-[1.03] w-full sm:w-auto justify-center">
              <span>Start for free</span>
              <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-4 h-4 transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-1"></i>
            </a>
            <a href="#card-customizer" class="bg-brand-card hover:bg-brand-forest border border-white/10 hover:border-brand/40 text-slate-100 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 transition-all w-full sm:w-auto">
              <span>Design Your Card</span>
            </a>
          </div>

          <!-- Social Proof & Trusted By -->
          <div class="pt-6 border-t border-white/5 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center lg:justify-start gap-6">
            <div class="flex items-center -space-x-3">
              <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-brand-deep object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-53994a69daeb?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=100" alt="User 1">
              <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-brand-deep object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=100" alt="User 2">
              <img class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-brand-deep object-cover" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=100" alt="User 3">
              <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-brand-forest border-2 border-brand-deep flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold text-brand">10M+</div>
            </div>
            <div class="text-center sm:text-left">
              <p class="text-sm font-bold text-white">10 Million+ Users</p>
              <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Trusting our visual smart tools globally.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Column: Interactive 3D Mockup Card Arena -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative">
          <!-- Backdrop Glow behind Card -->
          <div class="absolute w-[300px] h-[300px] bg-brand/10 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none -z-10"></div>

          <!-- Main Interactive Card Widget -->
          <div class="perspective-1000 w-full max-w-sm">
            <div id="interactive-hero-card" class="preserve-3d relative w-full h-56 rounded-3xl p-6 text-white shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 cursor-pointer bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-forest to-brand-deep border border-brand/20">
              
              <!-- Shimmer/Gloss overlay -->
              <div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-white/0 via-white/5 to-white/10 pointer-events-none"></div>

              <!-- Card Header -->
              <div class="flex justify-between items-start relative z-10">
                <div>
                  <p class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-brand font-bold" id="card-hero-tier">Premium Account</p>
                  <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-1 tracking-tight">Banklio</h3>
                </div>
                <!-- Premium Chip -->
                <div class="w-10 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-200 to-yellow-500 opacity-90 p-1 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
                  <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-0.5 w-full h-full opacity-60">
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                    <div class="border border-brand-deep/30 rounded-xs"></div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Card Number -->
              <div class="mt-8 relative z-10">
                <p class="text-lg font-medium tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-200" id="card-hero-number">5789 •••• •••• 2847</p>
              </div>

              <!-- Card Footer -->
              <div class="mt-8 flex justify-between items-end relative z-10">
                <div>
                  <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400">Card Holder</p>
                  <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-white tracking-wide mt-0.5" id="card-hero-holder">Sanzida A.</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400">Expires</p>
                  <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-white tracking-wide mt-0.5" id="card-hero-expiry">04/28</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-1">
                  <div class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-red-500/80 backdrop-blur-md"></div>
                  <div class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-yellow-400/80 -ml-2.5 backdrop-blur-md"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Micro Customizer Pills immediately underneath -->
          <div class="mt-8 bg-brand-forest/60 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-4 w-full max-w-sm space-y-3">
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-medium text-center">Interactive Playground: Change Card Style</p>
            <div class="flex items-center justify-center space-x-3">
              <button onclick="changeHeroCard('emerald', 'Emerald Glass')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 border-2 border-emerald-400 focus:outline-none transition-transform hover:scale-110" title="Emerald Glass"></button>
              <button onclick="changeHeroCard('neon', 'Neon Lime')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand/20 border-2 border-brand focus:outline-none transition-transform hover:scale-110" title="Neon Lime"></button>
              <button onclick="changeHeroCard('sapphire', 'Sapphire Tech')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-500/20 border-2 border-blue-400 focus:outline-none transition-transform hover:scale-110" title="Sapphire Tech"></button>
              <button onclick="changeHeroCard('obsidian', 'Obsidian Metal')" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 border-2 border-zinc-400 focus:outline-none transition-transform hover:scale-110" title="Obsidian Metal"></button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Trusted Partners Strip -->
    <div class="border-t border-b border-white/5 bg-brand-deep/80 backdrop-blur-md py-8">
      <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
        <p class="text-center text-xs text-slate-400 font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase mb-6">Our Esteemed Partners & Affiliates</p>
        <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16 opacity-70">
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-white">
            <i data-lucide="pocket" class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400"></i>
            <span class="font-bold text-lg tracking-tight">stripe</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-white">
            <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400"></i>
            <span class="font-bold text-lg tracking-tight">Skrill</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-white">
            <i data-lucide="play" class="w-5 h-5 text-green-400"></i>
            <span class="font-bold text-lg tracking-tight">Google Pay</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 text-white">
            <i data-lucide="credit-card" class="w-5 h-5 text-brand"></i>
            <span class="font-bold text-lg tracking-tight">Apple Pay</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Key Stats Section (Light Grid Transitions) -->
  <section id="stats" class="relative z-20 py-16 bg-white text-slate-900 border-b border-slate-100">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 text-center divide-y md:divide-y-0 md:divide-x divide-slate-200">
        <!-- Stat 1 -->
        <div class="pt-6 md:pt-0 first:pt-0">
          <p class="text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-forest to-slate-700 tracking-tight">524M</p>
          <p class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500 mt-2 tracking-wide uppercase">Users Worldwide</p>
        </div>
        <!-- Stat 2 -->
        <div class="pt-6 md:pt-0">
          <p class="text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-forest to-slate-700 tracking-tight">124+</p>
          <p class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500 mt-2 tracking-wide uppercase">Countries Supported</p>
        </div>
        <!-- Stat 3 -->
        <div class="pt-6 md:pt-0">
          <p class="text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-forest to-slate-700 tracking-tight">184M</p>
          <p class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500 mt-2 tracking-wide uppercase">Customer Reviews</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Main Feature Section (Interactive Dashboard Visuals & Content) -->
  <section id="features" class="py-24 bg-slate-50 text-slate-900">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center">
        <!-- Left Column: Content -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
          <div class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-slate-200 border border-slate-300/60 px-3.5 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-800 text-xs font-semibold">
            <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse"></span>
            <span>Real-time Syncing</span>
          </div>
          <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900 leading-tight">
            Smarter Finance <br>
            <span class="text-slate-500">Better Decisions</span>
          </h2>
          <p class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed">
            Gain full command over your spending behaviors. Our high-fidelity intelligence platform maps out every transaction automatically, labels them intelligently, and advises you where to trim excess expenditures.
          </p>
          
          <ul class="space-y-4 pt-4">
            <li class="flex items-start space-x-3">
              <div class="p-1 bg-brand-forest rounded-lg text-brand mt-0.5">
                <i data-lucide="check" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p class="font-bold text-slate-900">Get 3% Cash Back on Daily Needs</p>
                <p class="text-sm text-slate-500">Every single tap rewards you with instant cash credit.</p>
              </div>
            </li>
            <li class="flex items-start space-x-3">
              <div class="p-1 bg-brand-forest rounded-lg text-brand mt-0.5">
                <i data-lucide="check" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p class="font-bold text-slate-900">Extra Overdraft Shield</p>
                <p class="text-sm text-slate-500">No penalties. Free safety tier when you upgrade to premium.</p>
              </div>
            </li>
          </ul>

          <div class="pt-6">
            <a href="#card-customizer" class="inline-flex items-center space-x-2 bg-brand-forest hover:bg-black text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm transition-all shadow-md">
              <span>Explore More Features</span>
              <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Column: Live Interactive Budget & Expense Simulator -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-7">
          <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 space-y-6 relative overflow-hidden">
            
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 pb-6 border-b border-slate-100">
              <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Live Sim Sandbox</p>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mt-0.5">Live Expense Tracker</h3>
              </div>
              <!-- Simulated Available Balance -->
              <div class="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-2xl">
                <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase">Simulated Budget</p>
                <p class="text-lg font-extrabold text-slate-900" id="live-budget-amount">$1,500.00</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Dynamic Balance Graph Visual using CSS SVGs -->
            <div class="relative bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl p-5 text-white overflow-hidden">
              <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                <div>
                  <p class="text-xs text-brand uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold">Spending Velocity</p>
                  <p class="text-2xl font-black mt-1" id="live-spending-total">$259.75</p>
                </div>
                <span class="text-xs bg-brand/10 border border-brand/20 text-brand px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-bold">Live Data</span>
              </div>

              <!-- Animated Custom SVG Line Chart -->
              <div class="h-32 w-full flex items-end">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 400 120" class="w-full h-full text-brand overflow-visible">
                  <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="chart-grad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#b5f500" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
                      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#b5f500" stop-opacity="0.0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                  </defs>
                  <!-- Base grid lines -->
                  <line x1="0" y1="20" x2="400" y2="20" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                  <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="400" y2="60" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                  <line x1="0" y1="100" x2="400" y2="100" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" stroke-dasharray="4"/>
                  <!-- Dynamic Area -->
                  <path id="svg-area-path" d="M 0 120 L 0 90 Q 80 40 160 80 T 320 30 L 400 120 Z" fill="url(#chart-grad)" class="transition-all duration-700"/>
                  <!-- Dynamic Line -->
                  <path id="svg-line-path" d="M 0 90 Q 80 40 160 80 T 320 30 L 400 45" fill="none" stroke="#b5f500" stroke-width="3" class="transition-all duration-700"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Transaction Controls (Adds live dynamic content to the visual sandbox) -->
            <div>
              <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-3">Add Custom Transaction (Simulator)</p>
              <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                <button onclick="addSimExpense(25.50, 'Grocery', 'cart')" class="p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-left">
                  <div class="p-1.5 bg-red-100 text-red-600 rounded-lg inline-block mb-2">
                    <i data-lucide="shopping-cart" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">Groceries</p>
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">+$25.50</p>
                </button>
                <button onclick="addSimExpense(49.99, 'Gadget', 'cpu')" class="p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-left">
                  <div class="p-1.5 bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-600 rounded-lg inline-block mb-2">
                    <i data-lucide="cpu" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">Gadget Tech</p>
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">+$49.99</p>
                </button>
                <button onclick="addSimExpense(120.00, 'Flight Ticket', 'plane')" class="p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-left">
                  <div class="p-1.5 bg-teal-100 text-teal-600 rounded-lg inline-block mb-2">
                    <i data-lucide="plane" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">Travel/Flight</p>
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">+$120.00</p>
                </button>
                <button onclick="addSimExpense(8.50, 'Coffee', 'coffee')" class="p-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all text-left">
                  <div class="p-1.5 bg-amber-100 text-amber-600 rounded-lg inline-block mb-2">
                    <i data-lucide="coffee" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">Roast Coffee</p>
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">+$8.50</p>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- List of simulated transactions inside widget -->
            <div>
              <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-slate-400 tracking-wider mb-3">Recent Simulated Ledger</p>
              <div class="space-y-2 max-h-[160px] overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar" id="simulated-ledger">
                <!-- Initial items -->
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border border-slate-100">
                  <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                    <div class="p-2 bg-slate-200/60 rounded-lg text-slate-700">
                      <i data-lucide="file-text" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">Initial Setup Balance</p>
                      <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Ledger Genesis</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">$0.00</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Complete Interactive Customizer Workspace Section (Sleek Glassmorphism Dark UI) -->
  <section id="card-customizer" class="py-24 bg-brand-deep border-t border-brand-forest relative overflow-hidden">
    <!-- Accent lights -->
    <div class="absolute bottom-10 left-10 w-96 h-96 bg-brand/5 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Section Header -->
      <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16 space-y-4">
        <span class="text-xs text-brand uppercase font-bold tracking-widest bg-brand/10 border border-brand/20 px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full">Interactive Studio</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-black text-white">Design Your Personal Wealth Card</h2>
        <p class="text-slate-400 text-sm">Choose premium alloys, engrave custom signatures, and visual color profiles. All shipped with 100% biodegradable materials.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
        
        <!-- Left Column: Interactive Real-Time 3D Card Preview -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
          <div class="perspective-1000 w-full max-w-md">
            <!-- 3D Card Preview Frame -->
            <div id="customizer-card-preview" class="preserve-3d relative w-full h-64 rounded-[2rem] p-8 text-white shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-forest to-brand-deep border border-brand/20 hover:scale-[1.02]">
              <!-- Gloss Overlayer -->
              <div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-[2rem] bg-gradient-to-tr from-white/0 via-white/5 to-white/10 pointer-events-none"></div>
              
              <!-- Sparkle details inside Card border -->
              <div class="absolute inset-0.5 rounded-[1.9rem] border border-white/5 pointer-events-none"></div>

              <!-- Header Card content -->
              <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                <div>
                  <p id="preview-tier-badge" class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-brand font-bold">Titanium Core</p>
                  <h3 class="text-2xl font-black mt-1 tracking-tight">Banklio</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="w-11 h-9 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-200 to-slate-400 p-1 flex items-center justify-center opacity-85">
                  <!-- Microchip SVG details -->
                  <svg class="w-full h-full text-slate-800" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                    <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/>
