                    <path d="M9 3v18M15 3v18M3 9h18M3 15h18"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Card Number (Dynamic) -->
              <div class="mt-10">
                <p id="preview-card-number" class="text-xl font-bold tracking-[0.25em] text-slate-100">5789 2843 9102 2847</p>
              </div>

              <!-- Expiry & Dynamic Custom Signature -->
              <div class="mt-10 flex justify-between items-end">
                <div>
                  <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Cardholder Signature</p>
                  <p id="preview-signature" class="text-lg font-medium text-white tracking-wide mt-1 italic font-serif">Sanzida A.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="text-right">
                  <p class="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Valid Thru</p>
                  <p id="preview-expiry" class="text-xs font-semibold text-white mt-1">04/28</p>
                </div>
                <!-- Mini card network logo details -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-0.5">
                  <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-slate-300 opacity-80"></div>
                  <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-brand-light opacity-60 -ml-3"></div>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Tiny visual indicator tag -->
          <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-6 flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <i data-lucide="info" class="w-4.5 h-4.5"></i>
            Hover and drag signature inputs below to see changes instantly
          </p>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Column: Interactive Controls Studio Dashboard -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-6 bg-brand-forest/40 border border-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl p-6 sm:p-8 space-y-6">
          <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-white">Alloy & Profile Controls</h3>
          
          <!-- Color Customizer selection -->
          <div>
            <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3">Select Alloy Core Base</p>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
              <button onclick="updatePreviewAlloy('titanium', 'Titanium Core', 'from-zinc-800 to-zinc-950', 'text-brand')" class="bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700/50 hover:bg-zinc-800/80 p-3 rounded-xl text-left transition-all relative">
                <span class="absolute top-2 right-2 w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-brand rounded-full inline-block" id="alloy-active-indicator"></span>
                <p class="text-xs font-bold text-white">Titanium</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-zinc-400">Polished Silver</p>
              </button>
              <button onclick="updatePreviewAlloy('gold', '24K Gold Elite', 'from-amber-600 to-yellow-950', 'text-yellow-400')" class="bg-amber-950/20 border border-amber-900/50 hover:bg-amber-900/30 p-3 rounded-xl text-left transition-all">
                <p class="text-xs font-bold text-amber-300">Royal Gold</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-amber-500">24 Karat finish</p>
              </button>
              <button onclick="updatePreviewAlloy('cyber', 'Cyber Neon', 'from-teal-800 to-slate-950', 'text-cyan-400')" class="bg-teal-950/20 border border-teal-900/50 hover:bg-teal-900/30 p-3 rounded-xl text-left transition-all">
                <p class="text-xs font-bold text-cyan-400">Cyber Green</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-cyan-600">Electric Aura</p>
              </button>
              <button onclick="updatePreviewAlloy('crimson', 'Crimson Velvet', 'from-rose-950 to-neutral-950', 'text-rose-400')" class="bg-rose-950/20 border border-rose-900/50 hover:bg-rose-900/30 p-3 rounded-xl text-left transition-all">
                <p class="text-xs font-bold text-rose-400">Velvet Rose</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-rose-600">Deep Crimson</p>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Dynamic Text / Inputs -->
          <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <!-- Holder Name Input -->
            <div>
              <label for="custom-holder-name" class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Engrave Signature Name</label>
              <input type="text" id="custom-holder-name" value="Sanzida A." oninput="updateCardName()" class="w-full bg-brand-deep/80 border border-white/10 hover:border-brand/40 focus:border-brand rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none transition-all" placeholder="e.g. Charlotte Anna">
            </div>
            <!-- Dynamic Custom Card Number Generator -->
            <div>
              <label class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Regenerate Safe ID</label>
              <button onclick="generateRandomCardNumber()" class="w-full bg-brand/10 hover:bg-brand/20 border border-brand/30 text-brand font-bold text-sm px-4 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 transition-all">
                <i data-lucide="refresh-cw" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                <span>Roll New Number</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Slider Controls for Visual Depth of Card border highlights -->
          <div>
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
              <label class="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Aura Glow Intensity</label>
              <span id="glow-intensity-val" class="text-xs text-brand font-bold">50%</span>
            </div>
            <input type="range" id="glow-slider" min="10" max="100" value="50" oninput="adjustGlowIntensity()" class="w-full accent-brand h-1.5 bg-brand-deep rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer">
          </div>

          <!-- Complete Visual Package Trigger -->
          <div class="pt-4">
            <button onclick="orderCustomizedCard()" class="w-full bg-brand hover:bg-brand-light text-brand-deep font-bold py-4 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 shadow-glow-neon transition-all hover:scale-[1.01]">
              <i data-lucide="package" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
              <span>Secure Your Custom Card Now</span>
            </button>
          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Dual Layout Grid Blocks: Core Benefits (Capturing Simple, Fast & Hassle-Free) -->
  <section class="py-24 bg-white text-slate-900">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      
      <!-- Layout Title -->
      <div class="text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-20 space-y-4">
        <span class="text-xs text-emerald-600 uppercase font-black tracking-widest bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-100 px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full">Intuitive Suite</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold text-slate-900">Simple, Fast & Hassle-Free</h2>
        <p class="text-slate-500">Sign up, connect your banking assets, and manage finances effortlessly with smart visual trackers and customized goals.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Feature Grid -->
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        
        <!-- Card 1 -->
        <div class="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:bg-slate-100/60 transition-all group flex flex-col justify-between h-[360px]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-brand">
              <i data-lucide="wallet" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 group-hover:text-emerald-700 transition-colors">Sync your bank, wallet, or cards securely</h3>
            <p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">Create a custom ledger that reflects your active spending profile. Select various assets from major global partners dynamically.</p>
          </div>
          <!-- Premium visual graphic -->
          <div class="bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 p-3 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-between">
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2">
              <span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full"></span>
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-700">Main Account</span>
            </div>
            <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-medium">98,500 USD</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Card 2 -->
        <div class="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:bg-slate-100/60 transition-all group flex flex-col justify-between h-[360px]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-brand">
              <i data-lucide="sparkles" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 group-hover:text-emerald-700 transition-colors">Get AI-driven insights to optimize spending</h3>
            <p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">Gain automated feedback alerts detailing where your savings vector is pointing. Run customized predictions.</p>
          </div>
          <!-- Premium mock-up graphic -->
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-center">
            <div class="bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 p-2.5 rounded-xl">
              <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase">Freelance</p>
              <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">$1,500/mo</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 p-2.5 rounded-xl">
              <p class="text-[9px] text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase">Capital Gains</p>
              <p class="text-xs font-bold text-emerald-600">+$4,000</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Card 3 -->
        <div class="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:bg-slate-100/60 transition-all group flex flex-col justify-between h-[360px]">
          <div class="space-y-4">
            <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand-forest flex items-center justify-center text-brand">
              <i data-lucide="globe" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
            </div>
            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 group-hover:text-emerald-700 transition-colors">Create your borderless multi-vault in minutes</h3>
            <p class="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">Establish segmented savings vaults mapped to specific targets. Move capital between currencies inside one click.</p>
          </div>
          <!-- Premium visual design -->
          <div class="bg-white/80 border border-slate-200 p-3 rounded-2xl flex items-center space-x-3">
            <div class="flex -space-x-2">
              <span class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-500 text-[10px] font-bold text-white flex items-center justify-center border border-white">EU</span>
              <span class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 text-[10px] font-bold text-white flex items-center justify-center border border-white">US</span>
              <span class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 text-[10px] font-bold text-white flex items-center justify-center border border-white">UK</span>
            </div>
            <span class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">107+ Vaults Available</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Dynamic Interactive Sandbox Widget: AI Goals and Milestones Tracker -->
  <section id="interactive-sandbox" class="py-24 bg-brand-deep text-white relative overflow-hidden border-t border-white/5">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-brand-forest/10 via-transparent to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
      
      <!-- Section Header -->
      <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16 space-y-4">
        <span class="text-xs text-brand uppercase font-bold tracking-widest bg-brand/10 border border-brand/20 px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full">Insight Sandbox</span>
        <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold">Interactive AI Wealth Calculator</h2>
        <p class="text-slate-400">Choose a financial milestone path below to preview AI allocation rates, compound multipliers, and simulated visual velocity trackers.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Live Simulator Workspace -->
      <div class="bg-brand-forest border border-white/10 rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12">
          
          <!-- Left Column: Choice Controls -->
          <div class="lg:col-span-4 bg-brand-deep/60 p-6 sm:p-10 border-b lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r border-white/10 space-y-6">
            <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-white">1. Select AI Trajectory</h3>
            
            <div class="space-y-3">
              <button onclick="calculateAiMilestone('tesla', 'Tesla Model S Custom Fund', 90000, 36, 15, 'Tesla Cyber Red')" class="w-full text-left p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 hover:border-brand/40 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all flex items-center justify-between group active-trajectory" id="btn-tesla">
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                  <div class="p-2 bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-400 rounded-xl">
                    <i data-lucide="zap" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-bold text-white">Tesla Custom Fund</p>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">36 Mo Target</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
              </button>

              <button onclick="calculateAiMilestone('retire', 'Early Secure Retirement Pool', 850000, 120, 8, 'Premium Amber S-1')" class="w-full text-left p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 hover:border-brand/40 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all flex items-center justify-between group" id="btn-retire">
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                  <div class="p-2 bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 rounded-xl">
                    <i data-lucide="sunset" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-bold text-white">Secure Retirement</p>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">10 Year Accumulation</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
              </button>

              <button onclick="calculateAiMilestone('estate', 'Global Real Estate Downpayment', 180000, 48, 12, 'Sea Emerald Emerald-9')" class="w-full text-left p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 hover:border-brand/40 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all flex items-center justify-between group" id="btn-estate">
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                  <div class="p-2 bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 rounded-xl">
                    <i data-lucide="home" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-bold text-white">Real Estate Pool</p>
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">4 Year Plan</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500 group-hover:text-white transition-colors"></i>
              </button>
            </div>

            <!-- Interactive Custom Initial Input Value -->
            <div class="pt-4 border-t border-white/5">
              <label for="sandbox-initial-deposit" class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Simulated Monthly Contribution</label>
              <div class="relative">
                <span class="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 font-bold">$</span>
                <input type="number" id="sandbox-initial-deposit" value="1200" oninput="runRecalculation()" class="w-full bg-brand-deep border border-white/10 focus:border-brand rounded-xl pl-8 pr-4 py-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Right Column: Results & Interactive Meters -->
          <div class="lg:col-span-8 p-6 sm:p-10 flex flex-col justify-between">
            <div class="space-y-6">
              <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4">
                <div>
                  <span class="text-xs text-brand uppercase font-bold tracking-widest">Active Plan Trajectory</span>
                  <h3 class="text-2xl font-black text-white mt-1" id="sandbox-active-title">Tesla Model S Custom Fund</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-2xl text-right">
                  <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-semibold">Total Target Amount</p>
                  <p class="text-xl font-bold text-brand" id="sandbox-target-amount">$90,000</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Live Visual Progress Bars & Metrics -->
              <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-6 pt-6">
                <!-- Card metric 1 -->
                <div class="bg-brand-deep/40 border border-white/5 p-5 rounded-2xl">
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase font-semibold">Projected AI Monthly Match</p>
                  <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-white mt-2" id="sandbox-monthly-match">$1,380.00</p>
                  <p class="text-[10px] text-brand mt-1" id="sandbox-match-sub">Includes +15% AI Compound Bonus</p>
                </div>
                <!-- Card metric 2 -->
                <div class="bg-brand-deep/40 border border-white/5 p-5 rounded-2xl">
                  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase font-semibold">Simulated Time to Target</p>
                  <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-white mt-2" id="sandbox-time-to-target">36 Months</p>
                  <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1">Accelerated by Smart Investing</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Animated Visual Milestone Meter -->
              <div class="space-y-2 pt-4">
                <div class="flex justify-between text-xs text-slate-400">
                  <span>Progress Velocity Simulator</span>
                  <span class="font-bold text-brand" id="sandbox-progress-percentage">55% Optimized</span>
                </div>
                <div class="w-full h-3.5 bg-brand-deep border border-white/5 rounded-full overflow-hidden p-0.5">
                  <div id="sandbox-progress-bar" class="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-brand rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-out" style="width: 55%;"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footnote Action -->
            <div class="pt-8 border-t border-white/10 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 max-w-md text-center sm:text-left">This visual calculation models historical APY multipliers and visualizes Banklio's automated investment protocols.</p>
              <button onclick="enrollInActivePlan()" class="bg-brand hover:bg-brand-light text-brand-deep font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-xs sm:text-sm shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-[1.03] w-full sm:w-auto text-center">
                Lock In AI Trajectory
              </button>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- High Fidelity Testimonial Carousel -->
  <section id="testimonials" class="py-24 bg-white text-slate-900 border-b border-slate-100">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      
      <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center">
        <!-- Left Title and controls -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-5 space-y-6">
          <span class="text-xs text-emerald-600 uppercase font-black tracking-widest bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-100 px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full">Community Insights</span>
          <h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold text-slate-900 leading-tight">Join 16M+ Users Managing Money Smarter</h2>
          <p class="text-slate-500">Read verified reviews from clients around the globe detailing how they customized cards, maximized APY gains, and optimized workflows.</p>
          
          <!-- Slider Next/Prev Indicators -->
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 pt-4">
            <button onclick="prevTestimonial()" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 flex items-center justify-center transition-all focus:outline-none">
              <i data-lucide="arrow-left" class="w-5 h-5 text-slate-700"></i>
            </button>
            <button onclick="nextTestimonial()" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full border border-slate-200 hover:border-brand-forest hover:bg-slate-50 flex items-center justify-center transition-all focus:outline-none">
              <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-5 h-5 text-slate-700"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Slidable Testimonial Frame -->
        <div class="lg:col-span-7">
          <div class="relative bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200/80 rounded-[2rem] p-8 sm:p-12 shadow-xl overflow-hidden min-h-[300px] flex flex-col justify-between">
            <!-- Large decorative quote mark -->
            <div class="absolute right-8 top-8 opacity-5 text-emerald-700">
              <svg class="w-24 h-24 fill-current" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path d="M14.017 21v-7.391c0-5.704 3.731-9.57 8.983-10.609l.995 2.151c-2.432.917-3.995 3.638-3.995 5.85h4v10h-10zm-10 0v-7.391c0-5.704 3.748-9.57 9-10.609l.996 2.151c-2.433.917-3.996 3.638-3.996 5.85h3.999v10h-10z"/>
              </svg>
            </div>

            <div class="space-y-6 relative z-10">
              <!-- Rating Stars -->
              <div class="flex space-x-1 text-yellow-400">
                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
                <i data-lucide="star" class="w-4 h-4 fill-current"></i>
              </div>

              <!-- Dynamic review quote content -->
              <p id="testimonial-quote" class="text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium text-slate-800 italic leading-relaxed transition-all duration-300">
                "The premium titanium card is incredible! Banklio's interface is the easiest I've ever experienced. Syncing my foreign bank accounts takes under five seconds, and my budget goals are optimized daily."
              </p>
            </div>

            <!-- Bio -->
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-4 pt-8 border-t border-slate-200 mt-8 relative z-10">
              <img id="testimonial-avatar" class="w-14 h-14 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-white shadow-md" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150" alt="Client">
              <div>
                <p id="testimonial-name" class="font-extrabold text-slate-900 tracking-tight">Charlotte Anna</p>
                <p id="testimonial-title" class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Lead Product Designer, Stripe</p>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Complete Premium Call-to-Action Banner (Forest Green Aura Background) -->
  <section class="py-20 bg-brand-deep relative overflow-hidden border-t border-white/5">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-forest to-brand-deep pointer-events-none"></div>
    <!-- Massive ambient glow in center -->
    <div class="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-brand/10 rounded-full blur-[100px] pointer-events-none"></div>

    <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10 text-center space-y-8">
      <span class="inline-block text-xs text-brand font-bold bg-brand/10 border border-brand/20 px-3.5 py-1.5 rounded-full tracking-widest uppercase">Start Your Smarter Future</span>
      <h2 class="text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-black text-white leading-tight">Take Control of Your <br>Finances Today!</h2>
      <p class="text-slate-400 max-w-xl mx-auto text-sm sm:text-base">Do you support international transactions? Yes, with multi-currency support ready out of the box in under 2 minutes.</p>

      <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4 pt-4">
        <a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="group bg-brand hover:bg-brand-light text-brand-deep font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center space-x-2 shadow-glow-neon transition-all hover:scale-[1.03] w-full sm:w-auto justify-center">
          <span>Get Started Now</span>
          <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="w-4 h-4 transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-1"></i>
        </a>
        <a href="#card-customizer" class="bg-brand-card hover:bg-brand-forest border border-white/10 hover:border-brand/40 text-slate-100 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 transition-all w-full sm:w-auto">
          <span>Design Your Card</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Live User counter -->
      <div class="pt-6 text-slate-500 text-xs flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
        <span class="inline-block w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-brand animate-ping"></span>
        <span>1,490 users creating custom digital cards this hour alone</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Polished Footer (Complete Layout Match) -->
  <footer class="bg-brand-deep text-slate-400 border-t border-white/5 pt-16 pb-12 relative z-20">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
      
      <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-8 pb-12 border-b border-white/5">
        
        <!-- Brand identity block -->
        <div class="col-span-2 space-y-4">
          <a href="#" class="flex items-center space-x-2.5 focus:outline-none">
            <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-brand flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow-neon">
              <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-brand-deep font-bold" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3">
                <path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5zM2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <span class="text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white flex items-center">
              Banklio <span class="text-brand ml-0.5 font-light">.</span>
            </span>
          </a>
          <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 max-w-sm leading-relaxed">
            Do you support international transactions? Yes, with multi-currency support ready out of the box in under 2 minutes. Sync digital smart assets inside moments.
          </p>
          <!-- Simulated App Badges -->
          <div class="flex items-center space-x-3 pt-2">
            <div class="bg-brand-card hover:bg-brand-forest border border-white/10 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer transition-colors">
              <i data-lucide="play" class="w-4 h-4 text-white"></i>
              <div>
                <p class="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold">Download App</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-white font-bold">Google Play</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-brand-card hover:bg-brand-forest border border-white/10 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center space-x-2 cursor-pointer transition-colors">
              <i data-lucide="apple" class="w-4 h-4 text-white"></i>
              <div>
                <p class="text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-bold">Download App</p>
                <p class="text-[10px] text-white font-bold">App Store</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Links column 1 -->
        <div>
          <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-white tracking-widest mb-4">Quick Links</p>
          <ul class="space-y-2.5 text-xs">
            <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Home</a></li>
            <li><a href="#features" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">About</a></li>
            <li><a href="#card-customizer" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Services</a></li>
            <li><a href="#interactive-sandbox" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Pricing</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <!-- Links column 2 -->
        <div>
          <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-white tracking-widest mb-4">Services</p>
          <ul class="space-y-2.5 text-xs">
            <li><a href="#card-customizer" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Personal Loan</a></li>
            <li><a href="#card-customizer" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">One Card</a></li>
            <li><a href="#features" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Savings</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <!-- Links column 3 -->
        <div>
          <p class="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-white tracking-widest mb-4">Community</p>
          <ul class="space-y-2.5 text-xs">
            <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Community Hub</a></li>
            <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Invite a Friend</a></li>
            <li><a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">News & Blog</a></li>
          </ul>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Legal footer lines -->
      <div class="pt-8 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4 text-xs">
        <p>&copy; 2026 Banklio Inc. All Rights Reserved. All banking transactions and visa card services are simulated for representation of premium visual layout aesthetics.</p>
        <div class="flex space-x-6">
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Privacy Policy</a>
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Terms of Use</a>
          <a href="#" class="hover:text-brand transition-colors">Legal Cookies</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </footer>

  <script>
    // Initialize Lucide Icons
    lucide.createIcons();

    // Custom Toast/Notification Engine
    function triggerNotification(title, message) {
      const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
      const toastTitle = document.getElementById('toast-title');
      const toastMessage = document.getElementById('toast-message');

      toastTitle.innerText = title;
      toastMessage.innerText = message;

      toast.classList.remove('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
      toast.classList.add('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');

      setTimeout(() => {
        toast.classList.add('translate-y-20', 'opacity-0', 'pointer-events-none');
        toast.classList.remove('translate-y-0', 'opacity-100');
      }, 3500);
    }

    // Interactive Card Playground Engine
    const cardData = {
      emerald: {
        gradient: 'from-emerald-700 to-teal-950',
        tier: 'Emerald Glass Tier',
        number: '5789 2841 8392 2847'
      },
      neon: {
        gradient: 'from-brand-forest to-brand-deep',
        tier: 'Premium Neon Aura',
        number: '3104 2844 9120 4829'
      },
      sapphire: {
        gradient: 'from-blue-800 to-indigo-950',
        tier: 'Sapphire Tech Pro',
        number: '4820 1827 5930 2938'
      },
      obsidian: {
        gradient: 'from-zinc-800 to-zinc-950',
        tier: 'Obsidian Matte Metal',
        number: '9102 4819 2841 9322'
      }
    };

    function changeHeroCard(style, styleName) {
      const heroCard = document.getElementById('interactive-hero-card');
      const heroTier = document.getElementById('card-hero-tier');
      const heroNumber = document.getElementById('card-hero-number');

      // Clear existing classes and add new ones smoothly
      heroCard.className = `preserve-3d relative w-full h-56 rounded-3xl p-6 text-white shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 cursor-pointer bg-gradient-to-br ${cardData[style].gradient} border border-brand/20`;
      heroTier.innerText = cardData[style].tier;
      heroNumber.innerText = cardData[style].number;

      triggerNotification("Card Style Updated", `Switched layout to the beautiful ${styleName} skin.`);
    }

    // Simulated Budget sandbox calculator variables
    let currentSpending = 259.75;
    let baseBudget = 1500.00;

    function addSimExpense(amount, category, iconType) {
      if (currentSpending + amount > baseBudget) {
        triggerNotification("Budget Cap Alert", "This purchase would push you over your secure allocated threshold!");
        return;
      }

      currentSpending += amount;
      document.getElementById('live-spending-total').innerText = `$${currentSpending.toFixed(2)}`;
      
      // Update ledger
      const ledger = document.getElementById('simulated-ledger');
      const newTx = document.createElement('div');
      newTx.className = "flex justify-between items-center p-2.5 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 animate-slide-in";
      newTx.innerHTML = `
        <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
          <div class="p-2 bg-slate-200/60 rounded-lg text-slate-700">
            <i data-lucide="${iconType}" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">${category}</p>
            <p class="text-[10px] text-slate-400">Authorized moments ago</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-800">+$${amount.toFixed(2)}</p>
      `;
      ledger.insertBefore(newTx, ledger.firstChild);
      lucide.createIcons();

      // Slightly perturb/randomize graph visualization paths to show dynamic interactive react behavior
      const svgLine = document.getElementById('svg-line-path');
      const svgArea = document.getElementById('svg-area-path');
      
      // Dynamic calculations for graph paths based on spending velocity
      const randomY1 = 90 - (currentSpending / 10);
      const randomY2 = 80 - (currentSpending / 8);
      const randomY3 = 30 - (currentSpending / 12);
      
      svgLine.setAttribute('d', `M 0 ${randomY1} Q 80 ${randomY2} 160 ${randomY2 + 20} T 320 ${randomY3} L 400 ${randomY3 + 15}`);
      svgArea.setAttribute('d', `M 0 120 L 0 ${randomY1} Q 80 ${randomY2} 160 ${randomY2 + 20} T 320 ${randomY3} L 400 120 Z`);

      triggerNotification("Transaction Added", `Successfully logged $${amount.toFixed(2)} to simulated ledger.`);
    }

    // Dynamic Preview Alloy controls for Card Design Studio
    function updatePreviewAlloy(alloyId, label, bgClass, textClass) {
      const previewCard = document.getElementById('customizer-card-preview');
      const previewTier = document.getElementById('preview-tier-badge');
      
      previewCard.className = `preserve-3d relative w-full h-64 rounded-[2rem] p-8 text-white shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out bg-gradient-to-br ${bgClass} border border-brand/20 hover:scale-[1.02]`;
      previewTier.innerText = label;

      // Update indicators
      document.querySelectorAll('#alloy-active-indicator').forEach(el => el.remove());
      const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('#card-customizer button');
      
      triggerNotification("Alloy Changed", `Card core material switched to ${label}.`);
    }

    function updateCardName() {
      const inputVal = document.getElementById('custom-holder-name').value;
      document.getElementById('preview-signature').innerText = inputVal || "Sanzida A.";
    }

    function generateRandomCardNumber() {
      let segment1 = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
      let segment2 = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
      let segment3 = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
      let segment4 = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000);
      
      const combined = `${segment1} ${segment2} ${segment3} ${segment4}`;
      document.getElementById('preview-card-number').innerText = combined;
      triggerNotification("New Digital Identity Guard", "Regenerated a custom encrypted test token for security sandbox.");
    }

    function adjustGlowIntensity() {
      const val = document.getElementById('glow-slider').value;
      document.getElementById('glow-intensity-val').innerText = `${val}%`;
      const previewCard = document.getElementById('customizer-card-preview');
      
      // Adjust border shadow glow styles based on input range
      previewCard.style.boxShadow = `0 10px 30px rgba(181, 245, 0, ${val / 300})`;
    }

    function orderCustomizedCard() {
      const currentSignature = document.getElementById('preview-signature').innerText;
      triggerNotification("Card Ordered", `Congratulations! Your bespoke physical titanium card for ${currentSignature} is scheduled to pack.`);
    }

    // Trajectory Milestone Simulator
    let activeTrajectoryData = {
      tesla: { title: "Tesla Model S Custom Fund", target: 90000, time: 36, rate: 15, matchText: "Tesla Custom Bonus" },
      retire: { title: "Early Secure Retirement Pool", target: 850000, time: 120, rate: 8, matchText: "Secure Retirement APY" },
      estate: { title: "Global Real Estate Downpayment", target: 180000, time: 48, rate: 12, matchText: "Real Estate Bonus Rate" }
    };
    let activeKey = "tesla";

    function calculateAiMilestone(key, title, target, time, rate, matchText) {
      activeKey = key;
      
      // Toggle CSS highlights
      document.querySelectorAll('#interactive-sandbox button').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-brand/40', 'bg-white/10'));
      document.getElementById(`btn-${key}`).classList.add('border-brand/40', 'bg-white/10');

      runRecalculation();
    }

    function runRecalculation() {
      const depositInput = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sandbox-initial-deposit').value) || 0;
      const trajectory = activeTrajectoryData[activeKey];

      // Calculate simple compound prediction matching mockup details
      const matchMultiplier = 1 + (trajectory.rate / 100);
      const calculatedMatch = depositInput * matchMultiplier;
      
      // Calculate optimized percentage toward target based on projected duration
      const simulatedAccumulation = calculatedMatch * trajectory.time;
      let progressPercentage = Math.min(Math.round((simulatedAccumulation / trajectory.target) * 100), 100);
      if (isNaN(progressPercentage)) progressPercentage = 0;

      // Update UI
      document.getElementById('sandbox-active-title').innerText = trajectory.title;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-target-amount').innerText = `$${trajectory.target.toLocaleString()}`;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-monthly-match').innerText = `$${calculatedMatch.toFixed(2)}`;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-match-sub').innerText = `Includes +${trajectory.rate}% AI Allocation Bonus`;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-time-to-target').innerText = `${trajectory.time} Months`;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-progress-percentage').innerText = `${progressPercentage}% Optimized`;
      document.getElementById('sandbox-progress-bar').style.width = `${progressPercentage}%`;
    }

    function enrollInActivePlan() {
      const trajectory = activeTrajectoryData[activeKey];
      triggerNotification("AI Plan Activated", `Your trajectory for ${trajectory.title} has successfully compiled into production.`);
    }

    // Testimonial sliding logic
    const testimonials = [
      {
        quote: "The premium titanium card is incredible! Banklio's interface is the easiest I've ever experienced. Syncing my foreign bank accounts takes under five seconds, and my budget goals are optimized daily.",
        avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150",
        name: "Charlotte Anna",
        title: "Lead Product Designer, Stripe"
      },
      {
        quote: "I saved over $8,500 in 6 months using Banklio's interactive AI sandbox. Designing a sleek custom card gave me absolute ownership of my business account's core brand identity. 10/10 fintech tool.",
        avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506794778202-cad84cf45f1d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150",
        name: "Jameson Carter",
        title: "VP of Engineering, Skrill Global"
      },
      {
        quote: "The borderless multi-vault options are unmatched. I can seamlessly swap, lock in high rates, and transfer safely without typical hidden fees. Banklio represents the real physical universe of smart finance.",
        avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=150",
        name: "Sanzida Chowdhury",
        title: "Creative Director, Velo Capital"
      }
    ];
    let currentTestimonialIndex = 0;

    function updateTestimonialUI() {
      const active = testimonials[currentTestimonialIndex];
      const quoteEl = document.getElementById('testimonial-quote');
      
      // Apply smooth transition
      quoteEl.style.opacity = 0;
      setTimeout(() => {
        quoteEl.innerText = `"${active.quote}"`;
        document.getElementById('testimonial-avatar').src = active.avatar;
        document.getElementById('testimonial-name').innerText = active.name;
        document.getElementById('testimonial-title').innerText = active.title;
        quoteEl.style.opacity = 1;
      }, 200);
    }

    function nextTestimonial() {
      currentTestimonialIndex = (currentTestimonialIndex + 1) % testimonials.length;
      updateTestimonialUI();
    }

    function prevTestimonial() {
      currentTestimonialIndex = (currentTestimonialIndex - 1 + testimonials.length) % testimonials.length;
      updateTestimonialUI();
    }

    // Mobile Navbar Toggler
    const mobileBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn');
    const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
    mobileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      mobileMenu.classList.toggle('hidden');
    });

    // 3D Tilt Effect for Hero Card Playground
    const cardEl = document.getElementById('interactive-hero-card');
    cardEl.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const rect = cardEl.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width/2;
      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height/2;
      
      // Calculate rotation angles
      const rotX = -y / 10;
      const rotY = x / 10;
      
      cardEl.style.transform = `rotateX(${rotX}deg) rotateY(${rotY}deg) scale(1.05)`;
    });

    cardEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      cardEl.style.transform = `rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) scale(1)`;
    });

    // Run first calculation upon loading document sandbox
    window.onload = function() {
      runRecalculation();
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>
